title: User Role Privilage
description: Human Capital Management Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: PER_PERSON_NAMES_F, PER_ROLES_DN, PER_USERS. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
WITH user_role AS (
    SELECT
        arb.code      role_code,
        pu.username   user_name
    FROM
        ase_user_role_mbr   aurm,
        ase_user_b          au,
        per_users           pu,
        ase_role_b          arb
    WHERE
        aurm.user_id = au.user_id
        AND au.user_guid = pu.user_guid
        AND arb.role_id = aurm.role_id
        AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN nvl(arb.effective_start_date, SYSDATE - 1) AND nvl(arb.effective_end_date, SYSDATE + 1)
        AND nvl(aurm.effective_end_date, SYSDATE) >= SYSDATE
        AND nvl(pu.active_flag, 'Y') = 'Y'
        AND nvl(pu.SUSPENDED, 'N') = 'N'
        AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu.start_date) AND trunc(nvl(pu.end_date, SYSDATE))
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        prd.role_common_name,
        pu.username user_name
    FROM
        per_user_roles   pur,
        per_roles_dn     prd,
        per_users        pu
    WHERE
        pur.user_id = pu.user_id
        AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
        AND prd.active_flag = 'Y'
        AND pur.active_flag = 'Y'
        AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN nvl(pur.start_date, SYSDATE - 1) AND nvl(pur.end_date, SYSDATE + 1)
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT
                1
            FROM
                ase_user_b au
            WHERE
                au.user_guid = pu.user_guid
        )
        AND nvl(pu.active_flag, 'Y') = 'Y'
        AND nvl(pu.suspended, 'N') = 'N'
        AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu.start_date) AND trunc(nvl(pu.end_date, SYSDATE))
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    priv_view.priv_name,
    priv_view.privilege_id,
    roles_view.duty_role,
    pu.username,
    pu.user_id,
    pu.person_id,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN pu.person_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                'Employee'
            ELSE
                'Non - Employee'
        END
    ) user_type,
    ppnf.full_name AS person_name,
    arb.role_name,
     ur.role_code
FROM
    (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            CONNECT_BY_ROOT ase_role_role_mbr.child_role_id AS job_role_id,
            (
                SELECT
                    role_name
                FROM
                    ase_role_vl
                WHERE
                    role_id = ase_role_role_mbr.parent_role_id
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN nvl(effective_start_date, SYSDATE - 1) AND nvl(effective_end_date, SYSDATE + 1)
            ) AS duty_role,
            ase_role_role_mbr.parent_role_id duty_role_id
        FROM
            fusion.ase_role_role_mbr ase_role_role_mbr
        WHERE
            ( ase_role_role_mbr.effective_end_date >= SYSDATE
              OR ase_role_role_mbr.effective_end_date IS NULL )
        CONNECT BY
            PRIOR ase_role_role_mbr.parent_role_id = ase_role_role_mbr.child_role_id
    ) roles_view,
    (
        SELECT
            priv.privilege_id,
            membr.role_id,
            priv.name priv_name
        FROM
            ase_priv_role_mbr   membr,
            ase_privilege_vl    priv
        WHERE
            membr.privilege_id = priv.privilege_id
            AND ( priv.effective_end_date >= SYSDATE
                  OR priv.effective_end_date IS NULL )
    ) priv_view,
    per_users            pu,
    user_role            ur,
    ase_role_vl          arb,
    per_person_names_f   ppnf
WHERE
    arb.code = ur.role_code
    AND pu.username = ur.user_name
 --   AND pu.username = fnd_global.user_name
    AND roles_view.duty_role_id = priv_view.role_id (+)
    AND arb.role_id = roles_view.job_role_id
    AND nvl(pu.active_flag, 'Y') = 'Y'
    AND nvl(pu.suspended, 'N') = 'N'
    AND ppnf.name_type (+) = 'GLOBAL'
    AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id (+)
    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppnf.effective_start_date (+) AND ppnf.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu.start_date) AND trunc(nvl(pu.end_date, SYSDATE))
    AND ( pu.username IN (
        :P_Username
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :P_Username || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( arb.role_name IN (
        :P_ROLE
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :P_ROLE || 'All'
    ) )
        AND (  priv_view.priv_name IN (
        :P_PRIV
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :P_PRIV|| 'All'
    ) )
   
ORDER BY
    pu.username

title: Hindsight Tech Lic Demand Management
description: Human Capital Management Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: PER_ROLES_DN, PER_USERS, PER_USER_ROLES. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
WITH user_role AS (
      SELECT
         arb.role_id,
          arb.code    role_code,
          pu.username user_name
      FROM
          ase_user_role_mbr aurm,
          ase_user_b        au,
          per_users         pu,
          ase_role_b        arb
      WHERE
              aurm.user_id = au.user_id
          AND au.user_guid = pu.user_guid
          AND arb.role_id = aurm.role_id
          AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN nvl(arb.effective_start_date, sysdate - 1) AND nvl(arb.effective_end_date, sysdate + 1)
          AND nvl(aurm.effective_end_date, sysdate+1) >= sysdate
           AND pu.username NOT IN ( 'orcladmin', 'weblogic_read_only', 'xelsysadm', 'oamSoftwareUser', 'IDROUser',
                                         'PolicyROUser', 'PolicyRWUser', 'oimAdminUser', 'IDMPolicyROUser', 'IDMPolicyRWUser',
                                         'faoperator', 'saas_readonly', 'em_monitoring', 'oamAdminUser', 'weblogic_idm',
                                         'IDRWUser', 'PUBLIC', 'FAAdmin', 'weblogic', 'XELOPERATOR',
                                         'OblixAnonymous', 'OCLOUD9_osn_APPID' )
                AND pu.username NOT LIKE 'FUSION_APPS_%_APPID'
          AND nvl(pu.active_flag, 'Y') = 'Y'
          AND nvl(pu.suspended, 'N') = 'N'
          AND (sysdate) BETWEEN (pu.start_date) AND (nvl(pu.end_date, sysdate))
          
             union all

  SELECT 
arb.role_id,
    prd.role_common_name, 
    pu.username user_name 
  FROM 
    per_user_roles pur, 
    per_roles_dn prd, 
    per_users pu ,
 ase_role_b        arb
  WHERE 
    pur.user_id = pu.user_id 
and  arb.code  =prd.role_common_name
    AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id 
    AND prd.active_flag = 'Y' 
    AND pur.active_flag = 'Y' 
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN nvl(pur.start_date, sysdate - 1) 
    AND nvl(pur.end_date, sysdate + 1) 
   AND pu.username NOT IN ( 'orcladmin', 'weblogic_read_only', 'xelsysadm', 'oamSoftwareUser', 'IDROUser',
                                         'PolicyROUser', 'PolicyRWUser', 'oimAdminUser', 'IDMPolicyROUser', 'IDMPolicyRWUser',
                                         'faoperator', 'saas_readonly', 'em_monitoring', 'oamAdminUser', 'weblogic_idm',
                                         'IDRWUser', 'PUBLIC', 'FAAdmin', 'weblogic', 'XELOPERATOR',
                                         'OblixAnonymous', 'OCLOUD9_osn_APPID' )
                AND pu.username NOT LIKE 'FUSION_APPS_%_APPID'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 
        1 
      FROM 
        ase_user_b au 
      WHERE 
        au.user_guid = pu.user_guid
    ) 
    AND nvl(pu.active_flag, 'Y') = 'Y' 
    AND nvl(pu.suspended, 'N') = 'N' 
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(pu.start_date) 
    AND trunc(
      nvl(pu.end_date, sysdate)
    )
     
  ), user_priv_role AS (
      SELECT DISTINCT
          priv_view.priv_name,
          priv_view.privilege_id,
          arb.code    role_code,
          ur.user_name
      FROM
          (
              SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */ DISTINCT
                  CONNECT_BY_ROOT ase_role_role_mbr.child_role_id AS job_role_id,
                  ase_role_role_mbr.parent_role_id                duty_role_id
              FROM
                (select * from ase_role_role_mbr 
              WHERE
                  ( ase_role_role_mbr.effective_end_date >= sysdate
                    OR ase_role_role_mbr.effective_end_date IS NULL )) ase_role_role_mbr
              CONNECT BY nocycle
                  PRIOR ase_role_role_mbr.parent_role_id = ase_role_role_mbr.child_role_id   
          )          roles_view,
          (
              SELECT /*+ PARALLEL(4) */
                  priv.privilege_id,
                  membr.role_id,
                  priv.name priv_name
              FROM
                  ase_priv_role_mbr membr,
                  ase_privilege_vl  priv
              WHERE
                      membr.privilege_id = priv.privilege_id
                  AND  NVL(priv.effective_end_date,SYSDATE+1) >= sysdate
AND  NVL(membr.effective_end_date,SYSDATE+1) >= sysdate
                  AND priv.code IN ( 'MSC_MONITOR_DEMAND_AND_SUPPLY_PLANNING_WORK_AREA_PRIV',
'MSC_MONITOR_DEMAND_MANAGEMENT_WORK_AREA_PRIV',
'MSC_MONITOR_PLANNING_CENTRAL_WORK_AREA_PRIV',
'MSC_MONITOR_REPLENISHMENT_PLANNING_WORK_AREA_PRIV'  )
          )          priv_view,
          user_role  ur,
          ase_role_b arb
      WHERE
              arb.role_id = ur.role_id
          AND (priv_view.role_id = roles_view.duty_role_id
          OR  priv_view.role_id = roles_view.job_role_id)
          AND arb.role_id = roles_view.job_role_id
          
  ),
xx_user as (select distinct user_name from user_priv_role)  
  , xx_user_tra AS (
   SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'MSC_PLAN_DEFINITIONS' as table_name FROM MSC_PLAN_DEFINITIONS xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by 

)
select   sysdate                                                    run_date,
to_char(sysdate-10,'MM-YYYY')  D_MONTH,
    'Oracle Fusion Demand Management Cloud Service' D_SERVICE_NAME,
    count(*) license_unused from (
select user_name from xx_user
minus
(select distinct username from xx_user_tra
union 
select distinct username_update from xx_user_tra)
)

SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJO_PLAN_LINE_DETAILS' as table_name FROM PJO_PLAN_LINE_DETAILS xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJO_PLAN_LINES' as table_name FROM PJO_PLAN_LINES xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJB_INV_LINE_DISTS' as table_name FROM PJB_INV_LINE_DISTS xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJC_PRJ_ASSETS_ALL' as table_name FROM PJC_PRJ_ASSETS_ALL xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJC_COST_DIST_LINES_ALL' as table_name FROM PJC_COST_DIST_LINES_ALL xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJC_EXP_ITEMS_ALL' as table_name FROM PJC_EXP_ITEMS_ALL xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJT_PLAN_VERSIONS' as table_name FROM PJT_PLAN_VERSIONS xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJT_PROJ_PLAN_LINES' as table_name FROM PJT_PROJ_PLAN_LINES xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJF_PROJECTS_ALL_B' as table_name FROM PJF_PROJECTS_ALL_B xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'PJF_PROJ_ELEMENTS_B' as table_name FROM PJF_PROJ_ELEMENTS_B xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all 
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL' as table_name FROM AP_INVOICE_PAYMENTS_ALL xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all 
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'AR_ADJUSTMENTS_ALL' as table_name FROM AR_ADJUSTMENTS_ALL xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all 
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'CE_EXTERNAL_TRANSACTIONS' as table_name FROM CE_EXTERNAL_TRANSACTIONS xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by union all 
SELECT   created_by username,last_updated_by  username_update, COUNT(1) AS count, 'AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL' as table_name FROM AR_PAYMENT_SCHEDULES_ALL xx_tra WHERE last_update_date BETWEEN trunc(sysdate - 365) AND trunc(sysdate)  GROUP BY created_by,last_updated_by

)
select   sysdate                                                    run_date,
to_char(sysdate-10,'MM-YYYY')  D_MONTH,
    'Oracle Fusion Enterprise Resource Planning Cloud Service' D_SERVICE_NAME,
    count(*) license_unused from (
select user_name from xx_user
minus
(select distinct username from xx_user_tra
union 
select distinct username_update from xx_user_tra)
)

title: Jemf Ar Statement Main New Logic 25 March
sql:
WITH cust AS (
    SELECT
        hca.account_number,
        hca.cust_account_id,
        hca.party_id,
        hzp.party_name
    FROM
        hz_cust_accounts hca,
        hz_parties       hzp
    WHERE
            1 = 1
        AND hzp.party_id = hca.party_id
        AND (hca.cust_account_id IN ( :p_cust_number )
		or  hCA.account_number in ( :p_acc_number))
), valid_trx_ids AS (
    SELECT
        gl.name                                                 ledger_name,
        rct.trx_number,
        rct.trx_date,
        rct.invoice_currency_code,
        aps.payment_schedule_id,
        aps.amount_due_original,
        aps.due_date,
        aps.terms_sequence_number,
        hou.name                                                bu_name,
        cust.party_name                                         AS customer_name,
        cust.account_number,
        rct.customer_trx_id,
        ( nvl((
            SELECT
                SUM((ara.amount_applied + nvl(unearned_discount_taken, 0) + nvl(earned_discount_taken, 0)))
            FROM
                ar_cash_receipts_all           acr,
                ar_receivable_applications_all ara
            WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                AND acr.cash_receipt_id = ara.cash_receipt_id
                AND ara.applied_payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                AND ara.status IN('APP')
/*                 AND NOT EXISTS(
                    SELECT
                        1
                    FROM
                        ar_cash_receipt_history_all
                    WHERE
                            posting_control_id = - 3
                        AND cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
                        AND current_record_flag = 'Y'
                ) */
                AND ara.apply_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
        ),
              0) + nvl((
            SELECT
                SUM((aav.amount * - 1))
            FROM
                ar_adjustments_all aav
            WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = aav.customer_trx_id
                AND aav.payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                AND trunc(aav.apply_date) <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
                AND aav.status = 'A'
        ),
                       0) + nvl((
            SELECT
                SUM(ara.amount_applied *(- 1))
            FROM
                ar_receivable_applications_all ara
            WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = ara.customer_trx_id
                AND ara.status IN('ACTIVITY', 'APP')
                                 --     AND ara.display = 'Y'         
                AND ara.apply_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
        ),
                                0) + nvl((
            SELECT
                SUM(ara.amount_applied)
            FROM
                ar_receivable_applications_all ara
            WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                AND ara.status IN('APP')
                AND ara.cash_receipt_id IS NULL
                                 --    AND ara.display = 'Y'
                AND ara.apply_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
        ),
                                         0) )                                                    AS applied_amount,
        rct.purchase_order,
        rct.ct_reference,
        trunc(TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - aps.due_date) aging_days,
        cust.cust_account_id,
        xep.name                                                legal_entity_name,
        rct.attribute1,
		rct.trx_class,
		(select hzp.party_name from  hz_parties       hzp where hzp.party_id=rct.SHIP_TO_PARTY_ID) as SHIP_TO_Customer
    FROM
        ar_payment_schedules_all aps,
        ra_customer_trx_all      rct,
        cust,
        hr_operating_units       hou,
        gl_ledgers               gl,
        xle_entity_profiles      xep
    WHERE
        ( ( aps.status = 'OP'
            AND aps.amount_due_remaining != 0 )
          OR ( ( trunc(aps.last_update_date) >= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_from, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD')) )
               AND aps.status = 'CL' ) )
        AND aps.customer_trx_id = rct.customer_trx_id
        AND cust.cust_account_id = rct.bill_to_customer_id
        AND rct.trx_date <= TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
        AND rct.org_id = hou.organization_id
        AND rct.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
        AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
        AND xep.legal_entity_id (+) = rct.legal_entity_id
        AND ( gl.ledger_id IN ( :p_ledger_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( hou.organization_id IN ( :p_ou_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( rct.trx_number IN ( :p_trx_number )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_trx_number || 'All' ) )
), invoice_base AS (
    SELECT
        rct.ledger_name,
        rct.customer_trx_id,
        rct.trx_number,
        rct.trx_date,
        rct.invoice_currency_code,
        (
            SELECT
                SUM(rctla.extended_amount)
            FROM
                ra_customer_trx_lines_all rctla
            WHERE
                rctla.customer_trx_id = rct.customer_trx_id
        )    invoice_amount,
        rct.payment_schedule_id,
        rct.amount_due_original,
        rct.due_date,
        rct.terms_sequence_number,
        rct.bu_name,
        rct.customer_name,
        rct.account_number,
        NULL AS ship_to_account_number,
        rct.applied_amount,
        rct.purchase_order,
        rct.ct_reference,
        rct.attribute1,
        rct.legal_entity_name,
        rct.aging_days,
        rct.cust_account_id,
		trx_class,
		SHIP_TO_Customer
    FROM
        valid_trx_ids rct
    WHERE
        ( ( trx_date <= TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_from, 1, 10),
            'YYYY-MM-DD')
            AND nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0) <> 0 )
          OR ( trx_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_from, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD') ) )
), xx_final_transactions AS (
    SELECT
        legal_entity_name,
        (Case 
WHEN trx_class = 'CM' and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) = 0 THEN
        'Credit Memo'
    WHEN trx_class = 'DM' and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) = 0 THEN
        'Debit Memo'
    WHEN trx_class = 'ONACC' and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) = 0 THEN
        'Credit Memo'
	WHEN trx_class = 'CM' and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) != 0 THEN
        'Unapplied Credit Memo'
    WHEN trx_class = 'DM' and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) != 0 THEN
        'Unapplied Debit Memo'
    WHEN trx_class = 'ONACC' and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) != 0 THEN
        'Unapplied Credit Memo'	
		when trx_class = 'INV' THEN
        'Invoice'
		else trx_class
		end)              AS type,
        trx_number             AS document,
        NULL                   AS applied_to,
        ct_reference           AS order_no,
        attribute1             AS quote,
        purchase_order         AS po_no,
        customer_name          AS end_customer,
        trx_date               AS trx_date,
        due_date               AS due_date,
		   CASE
            WHEN nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) = 0 THEN
                NULL
            ELSE
              aging_days 
        END  AS days_past_due,
        invoice_currency_code  AS currency,
        invoice_amount         AS original_amount,
        nvl(applied_amount, 0) applied_balance,
        CASE
            WHEN nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) = 0 THEN
                NULL
            ELSE
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    AS balance,
        CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) <= 0 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    current_bucket,
        CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    bucket_0_30,
        CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    bucket_31_60,
        CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    bucket_61_90,
		  CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and  ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) BETWEEN 91 AND 180 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    bucket_90_180,
		  CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) BETWEEN 181 AND 365 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    bucket_180_365,
        CASE
            WHEN trx_class = 'INV' and ( TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date ) > 365 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                    0)
        END                    bucket_365_plus,
        trx_number             AS sort_col,
        ib.payment_schedule_id,
        ib.trx_number,
        ib.account_number,
        ib.cust_account_id,
        0                      AS unapplied_receipts,
        (case when  trx_class in ('CM','DM','ONACC') and nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) != 0 THEN
                nvl(amount_due_original - nvl(applied_amount, 0),
                     0) else 0 end )          AS unapplied_memos,
		SHIP_TO_Customer
    FROM
        invoice_base ib
), applications AS (
    SELECT
        xep.name as legal_entity_name,
        CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                'Applied Payment'
            WHEN src.trx_class = 'CM'                              THEN
                'Applied Credit Memo'
            WHEN src.trx_class = 'ONACC'                           THEN
                'Applied Credit Memo'
            WHEN src.trx_class = 'DM'                              THEN
                'Applied Debit Memo'
		WHEN src.trx_class = 'INV'                              THEN
                'Applied Invoice'
            WHEN ara.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id THEN
                'Self Application'
            ELSE
                'Application'
        END                              AS type,
        CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                acr.receipt_number
            ELSE
                src.trx_number
        END                              AS document,
        xft.trx_number                   AS applied_to,
  CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                xft.ct_reference 
            ELSE
              src.ct_reference
        END          AS order_no,
  CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
             xft.attribute1
            ELSE
              src.attribute1
        END 	   AS quote,
  CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                 xft.purchase_order  
            ELSE
              src.purchase_order
        END 		AS po_no,
        cust.party_name                  AS end_customer,
        (
            CASE
                WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                    acr.receipt_date
                ELSE
                    src.trx_date
            END
        )                                AS trx_date,
        NULL                             AS due_date,
        NULL                             AS days_past_due,
        (
            CASE
                WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                    acr.currency_code
                ELSE
                    src.invoice_currency_code
            END
        )                                AS currency,
        CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                acr.amount * - 1
            ELSE
                (
                    SELECT
                        SUM(rctla.extended_amount)
                    FROM
                        ra_customer_trx_lines_all rctla
                    WHERE
                        rctla.customer_trx_id = src.customer_trx_id
                )
        END                              AS original_amount,
        nvl(ara.amount_applied, 0) * - 1 applied_balance,
        NULL                             AS balance,
        NULL                             AS current_bucket,
        NULL                             AS bucket_0_30,
        NULL                             AS bucket_31_60,
        NULL                             AS bucket_61_90,
		 NULL                             AS bucket_90_180,
        NULL                             AS bucket_180_365,
        NULL                             AS bucket_365_plus,
        xft.trx_number                   AS sort_col,
        NULL                             AS payment_schedule_id,
        xft.trx_number,
        cust.account_number,
        cust.cust_account_id,
        0                                AS unapplied_receipts,
        0                                AS unapplied_memos,
		CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                 cust.party_name
            ELSE
              nvl((select hzp.party_name from  hz_parties       hzp where hzp.party_id=src.SHIP_TO_PARTY_ID),cust.party_name)
        END  as SHIP_TO_Customer
    FROM
        ar_receivable_applications_all ara,
        ra_customer_trx_all            xft,
        ar_cash_receipts_all           acr,
        ra_customer_trx_all            src,
        cust,
        hr_operating_units             hou,
        gl_ledgers                     gl,
        xle_entity_profiles            xep
    WHERE
            1 = 1
--		   ara.display = 'Y'
        AND ara.applied_customer_trx_id = xft.customer_trx_id
	/*  AND xft.payment_schedule_id = CASE
                                          WHEN ara.applied_payment_schedule_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                                              ara.applied_payment_schedule_id
                                          ELSE
                                              ara.payment_schedule_id 
                                      END*/
        AND ( ara.apply_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(:p_date_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
        AND ara.cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id (+)
        AND ara.customer_trx_id = src.customer_trx_id (+)
        AND xft.bill_to_customer_id=cust.cust_account_id 
        AND xft.org_id = hou.organization_id
        AND xft.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
        --AND xft.complete_flag = 'Y'
        AND  xft.legal_entity_id=xep.legal_entity_id (+)
        AND ( gl.ledger_id IN ( :p_ledger_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( hou.organization_id IN ( :p_ou_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
), adjustments AS (
    SELECT
        xep.name legal_entity_name,
        'Adjustment'          AS type,
        aaa.adjustment_number AS document,
        xft.trx_number        AS applied_to,
        xft.ct_reference      AS order_no,
        xft.attribute1        AS quote,
        xft.purchase_order    AS po_no,
        cust.party_name       AS end_customer,
        aaa.creation_date     AS trx_date,
        NULL                  AS due_date,
        NULL                  AS days_past_due,
        xft.invoice_currency_code          AS currency,
        aaa.amount            AS original_amount,
        aaa.amount            applied_balance,
        NULL                  AS balance,
        NULL                  AS current_bucket,
        NULL                  AS bucket_0_30,
        NULL                  AS bucket_31_60,
        NULL                  AS bucket_61_90,
  		 NULL                             AS bucket_90_180,
        NULL                             AS bucket_180_365,
        NULL                             AS bucket_365_plus,
        xft.trx_number        AS sort_col,
        NULL                  AS payment_schedule_id,
        xft.trx_number,
        cust.account_number,
        cust.cust_account_id,
        0                     AS unapplied_receipts,
        0                     AS unapplied_memos,
				 cust.party_name as SHIP_TO_Customer
    FROM
        ar_adjustments_all  aaa,
        ra_customer_trx_all xft,
        cust,
        hr_operating_units  hou,
        gl_ledgers          gl,
        xle_entity_profiles xep
    WHERE
            aaa.status = 'A'
        AND aaa.customer_trx_id = xft.customer_trx_id
        AND cust.cust_account_id = xft.bill_to_customer_id
        AND xft.org_id = hou.organization_id
        AND xft.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
       -- AND xft.complete_flag = 'Y'
        AND xep.legal_entity_id (+) = xft.legal_entity_id
        AND ( gl.ledger_id IN ( :p_ledger_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( hou.organization_id IN ( :p_ou_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( aaa.apply_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(:p_date_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
), activities AS (
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        applications
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        *
    FROM
        adjustments
), xx_receipt_transaction AS (
    SELECT
        acr.cash_receipt_id,
        xep.name legal_entity_name,
        hou.name operating_unit,
        gl.name  ledger_name,
        cust.account_number,
        cust.party_name,
        cust.cust_account_id,
        acr.receipt_number,
        acr.receipt_date,
        acr.currency_code,
        acr.amount
    FROM
        ar_cash_receipts_all acr,
        cust,
        gl_ledgers           gl,
        hr_operating_units   hou,
        xle_entity_profiles  xep
    WHERE
            acr.pay_from_customer = cust.cust_account_id
        AND acr.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
        AND acr.org_id = hou.organization_id
        AND xep.legal_entity_id (+) = acr.legal_entity_id
        AND acr.status <> 'REV'
        AND ( acr.status = 'UNAPP'
              OR ( acr.receipt_date BETWEEN trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_from, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD')) )
              OR ( EXISTS (
            SELECT
                1
            FROM
                ar_receivable_applications_all ara
            WHERE
                    apply_date >= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
            'YYYY-MM-DD'))
                AND ara.cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
        ) ) )
        AND acr.receipt_date < trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
        AND ( gl.name IN ( :p_ledger_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( hou.name IN ( :p_ou_name )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
        AND ( receipt_number IN ( :p_trx_number )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_trx_number || 'All' ) )
), applied_amt AS (
    SELECT
        araa.cash_receipt_id,
        SUM(nvl(araa.amount_applied_from, araa.amount_applied)) applied_amt
    FROM
        ar_receivable_applications_all araa,
        xx_receipt_transaction         xrt
    WHERE
        araa.status IN ( 'ACTIVITY', 'APP' )
        AND araa.display = 'Y'
        AND araa.cash_receipt_id = xrt.cash_receipt_id
        AND araa.apply_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    GROUP BY
        araa.cash_receipt_id
), receipt_transactions AS (
    SELECT
        acr.legal_entity_name,
        CASE
            WHEN ( acr.amount - nvl(app.applied_amt, 0) ) = 0 THEN
                'Payment'
            ELSE
                'Unapplied Payment'
        END                                            receipt_type,
        acr.operating_unit,
        acr.ledger_name,
        acr.account_number                             customer_number,
        acr.party_name                                 customer_name,
        acr.receipt_number,
        acr.receipt_date,
        acr.currency_code,
        acr.amount                                     receipt_amount,
        nvl(app.applied_amt, 0)                        applied_amount,
        CASE
            WHEN ( acr.amount - nvl(app.applied_amt, 0) ) = 0 THEN
                NULL
            ELSE
                ( acr.amount - nvl(app.applied_amt, 0) )*-1
        END                                            remaining_amount,
        NULL                                           AS trx_number,
        nvl(app.applied_amt, 0)                        applied_to_amount,
        NULL                                           due_date,
        NULL                                           days_past_due,
        acr.account_number,
        acr.cust_account_id,
        ( acr.amount - nvl(app.applied_amt, 0) ) * - 1 AS unapplied_receipts,
        0                                              AS unapplied_memos,
		acr.party_name    as SHIP_TO_Customer
    FROM
        xx_receipt_transaction acr,
        applied_amt            app
    WHERE
            acr.cash_receipt_id = app.cash_receipt_id (+)
	
      /*   AND ( ( acr.amount - nvl(app.applied_amt, 0) ) <> 0
              OR ( acr.receipt_date BETWEEN trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_from, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD')) ) ) */
		
		   AND ( ( acr.amount - nvl(app.applied_amt, 0) ) <> 0)
	
)
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            xft.*,
            1        AS seq,
            1        AS sub_seq,
            currency AS currency_code
        FROM
            xx_final_transactions xft
			where 1=1 
			and (case when xft.type in ('Credit Memo','Debit Memo') and xft.balance is null then 1 else 0 end)=0
			and ( case when :P_TRX_ONLY='YES' and xft.balance is not null then 'YES' else 'ALL Data' end)=nvl(:P_TRX_ONLY,'ALL Data')
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            act.*,
            1        AS seq,
            2        AS sub_seq,
            currency AS currency_code
        FROM
            activities act
			where 
			 'ALL Data'=nvl(:P_TRX_ONLY,'ALL Data')
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            legal_entity_name,
            receipt_type         AS type,
            receipt_number       document,
            trx_number           applied_to,
            NULL                 order_no,
            NULL                 quote,
            NULL                 po_no,
            customer_name        end_customer,
            receipt_date         trx_date,
            NULL                 due_date,
            NULL                 days_past_due,
            currency_code        currency,
            receipt_amount * - 1 original_amount,
            applied_amount * - 1 applied_balance,
            remaining_amount     balance,
            NULL                 current_bucket,
            NULL                 bucket_0_30,
            NULL                 bucket_31_60,
            NULL                 bucket_61_90,
		 NULL                             AS bucket_90_180,
        NULL                             AS bucket_180_365,
        NULL                             AS bucket_365_plus,
            receipt_number       sort_col,
            NULL                 payment_schedule_id,
            trx_number,
            account_number,
            cust_account_id,
            unapplied_receipts,
            unapplied_memos,
			SHIP_TO_Customer,
            3                    AS seq,
            3                    AS seq,
            currency_code
        FROM
            receipt_transactions
--			where
--			 ( case when (:P_TRX_ONLY='YES' and remaining_amount is not null) then 'YES' else 'ALL Data' end)=nvl(:P_TRX_ONLY,'ALL Data')
    )
ORDER BY
    seq,
    sort_col,
    sub_seq,
    currency

title: Ar Installment Detail
sql:
WITH cust AS (
    SELECT
        hca.cust_account_id,
        hca.account_number,
        hp.party_name
    FROM hz_cust_accounts hca,
         hz_parties hp
    WHERE hp.party_id = hca.party_id
      AND hp.party_name = :p_customer_name
),

/* ===========================
   INVOICE BASE
   =========================== */
invoice_base AS (
    SELECT
        rct.customer_trx_id,
        rct.trx_number,
        rct.trx_date,
        rct.invoice_currency_code,
        aps.payment_schedule_id,
        aps.amount_due_original,
        aps.due_date,
        aps.terms_sequence_number,
        hou.name bu_name,
        gl.name ledger_name,
		   (
        SELECT
            hzp1.party_name
        FROM
            hz_cust_accounts hca1,
            hz_parties       hzp1
        WHERE
                hca1.cust_account_id = rct.bill_to_customer_id
            AND hzp1.party_id = hca1.party_id
    )                             AS bill_to_account_number,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN rct.ship_to_party_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                (
                    SELECT
                        hzp2.party_name
                    FROM
                        hz_parties hzp2
                    WHERE
                        hzp2.party_id = rct.ship_to_party_id
                )
            ELSE
                (
                    SELECT
                        hzp1.party_name
                    FROM
                        hz_cust_accounts hca2,
                        hz_parties       hzp1
                    WHERE
                            hca2.cust_account_id = rct.ship_to_customer_id
                        AND hzp1.party_id = hca2.party_id
                )
        END
    )                             AS ship_to_account_number,
    rct.purchase_order,
	  rct.ct_reference
    FROM
        ra_customer_trx_all rct,
        ar_payment_schedules_all aps,
        hr_operating_units hou,
        gl_ledgers gl,
        cust c
    WHERE rct.bill_to_customer_id = c.cust_account_id
      AND rct.customer_trx_id = aps.customer_trx_id
      AND rct.org_id = hou.organization_id
      AND rct.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
      AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
      AND rct.trx_date <= TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
	      AND ( gl.ledger_id IN ( :p_ledger_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( hou.organization_id IN ( :p_ou_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( rct.trx_number IN ( :p_trx_number )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_trx_number || 'All' ) )
	  
),

/* ===========================
   APPLICATIONS
   (PAYMENT / CM / DM / SELF)
   =========================== */
applications AS (
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN ara.applied_payment_schedule_id IS NOT NULL
                 THEN ara.applied_payment_schedule_id
            ELSE ara.payment_schedule_id
        END payment_schedule_id,

        CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL
                THEN acr.receipt_number
            ELSE src.trx_number
        END activity_number,

        CASE
            WHEN ara.cash_receipt_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Payment'
            WHEN src.trx_class = 'CM' THEN 'Credit Memo'
            WHEN src.trx_class = 'DM' THEN 'Debit Memo'
            WHEN ara.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                 THEN 'Self Application'
            ELSE 'Application'
        END activity_type,

        ara.amount_applied amount,
        ara.gl_date accounting_date

    FROM
        ar_receivable_applications_all ara,
        ar_cash_receipts_all acr,
        ra_customer_trx_all src
    WHERE ara.display = 'Y'
      AND ara.gl_date <= TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
      AND ara.cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id(+)
      AND ara.customer_trx_id = src.customer_trx_id(+)
),

/* ===========================
   ADJUSTMENTS
   =========================== */
adjustments AS (
    SELECT
        payment_schedule_id,
        adjustment_number activity_number,
        'Adjustment' activity_type,
        amount * (-1) amount,
        gl_date accounting_date
    FROM ar_adjustments_all
    WHERE status = 'A'
      AND gl_date <= TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
),

/* ===========================
   ALL ACTIVITIES
   =========================== */
activities AS (
    SELECT * FROM applications
    UNION ALL
    SELECT * FROM adjustments
)

/* ===========================
   FINAL STATEMENT DATASET
   =========================== */
SELECT
    ib.bu_name,
    ib.ledger_name,
    ib.trx_number invoice_number,
    ib.invoice_currency_code,
    ib.trx_date invoice_date,
    ib.due_date,
    ib.amount_due_original original_amount,
    act.activity_number,
    act.activity_type,
    act.amount activity_amount,
    act.accounting_date,
/* ===========================
   RUNNING BALANCE
   =========================== */
    SUM(ib.amount_due_original)
        OVER (PARTITION BY ib.customer_trx_id)
    -
    SUM(NVL(act.amount,0))
        OVER (
            PARTITION BY ib.customer_trx_id
            ORDER BY NVL(act.accounting_date, ib.trx_date)
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) running_balance,
 
MAX(ib.amount_due_original)
    OVER (PARTITION BY ib.customer_trx_id)
-
SUM(NVL(act.amount,0))
    OVER (PARTITION BY ib.customer_trx_id)
AS remaining_amount_invoice_level,
/* ===========================
   AGING DAYS
   =========================== */
    TRUNC(TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ib.due_date) aging_days,

/* ===========================
   AGING BUCKETS
   =========================== */

    CASE
        WHEN (TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ib.due_date) <= 0 THEN ib.amount_due_original
    END current_bucket,

    CASE
        WHEN (TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ib.due_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 30
            THEN ib.amount_due_original
    END bucket_0_30,

    CASE
        WHEN (TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ib.due_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 60
            THEN ib.amount_due_original
    END bucket_31_60,

    CASE
        WHEN (TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ib.due_date) BETWEEN 61 AND 90
            THEN ib.amount_due_original
    END bucket_61_90,

    CASE
        WHEN (TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - ib.due_date) > 90
            THEN ib.amount_due_original
    END bucket_91_plus,
bill_to_account_number,
ship_to_account_number,
purchase_order,
ct_reference

FROM
    invoice_base ib,
    activities act
WHERE
    ib.payment_schedule_id = act.payment_schedule_id(+)

ORDER BY
    ib.trx_number,
    act.accounting_date

title: Backup Ar Statement Code
sql:
WITH cust_account AS (
    SELECT
        hca.account_number,
        hca.cust_account_id,
        hca.party_id,
        hzp.party_name
    FROM
        hz_cust_accounts hca,
        hz_parties       hzp
    WHERE
            hzp.party_id = hca.party_id
			-- and hca.cust_account_id
        AND :p_customer_name = hzp.party_name
), valid_trx_ids AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        customer_trx_id
    FROM
        ar_payment_schedules_all
    WHERE
        ( ( status = 'OP'
            AND amount_due_remaining != 0 )
          OR ( ( trunc(last_update_date) >= trunc(TO_DATE(:p_date_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) )
               AND status = 'CL' ) )
        AND customer_trx_id IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            'Old open invoice'        AS type,
            hou.name                  bu_name,
            gl.name                   AS ledger_name,
            cust.account_number       cust_number,
            (
                SELECT
                    SUM(rctla.extended_amount)
                FROM
                    ra_customer_trx_lines_all rctla
                WHERE
                    rctla.customer_trx_id = rct.customer_trx_id
            )                         invoice_amount,
            rct.invoice_currency_code,
            ( ( amount_due_original ) - ( nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM((ara.amount_applied + nvl(unearned_discount_taken, 0) + nvl(earned_discount_taken, 0)))
                FROM
                    ar_cash_receipts_all           acr,
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                    AND acr.cash_receipt_id = ara.cash_receipt_id
                    AND ara.applied_payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                    AND ara.status IN('APP')
                    AND NOT EXISTS(
                        SELECT
                            1
                        FROM
                            ar_cash_receipt_history_all
                        WHERE
                                posting_control_id = - 3
                            AND cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
                            AND current_record_flag = 'Y'
                    )
                    AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            ),
                                              0) + nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM((aav.amount * - 1))
                FROM
                    ar_adjustments_all aav
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = aav.customer_trx_id
                    AND aav.payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                    AND trunc(aav.gl_date) <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
                    AND aav.status = 'A'
            ),
                                                       0) + nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(ara.amount_applied *(- 1))
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = ara.customer_trx_id
                    AND ara.status IN('ACTIVITY', 'APP')
                                 --     AND ara.display = 'Y'
                    AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            ),
                                                                0) + nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(ara.amount_applied)
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                    AND ara.status IN('APP')
                    AND ara.cash_receipt_id IS NULL
                                 --    AND ara.display = 'Y'
                    AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            ),
                                                                         0) ) )                    AS total_amt_rem,
            ( amount_due_original )   AS original_amount,
            nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM((ara.amount_applied + nvl(unearned_discount_taken, 0) + nvl(earned_discount_taken, 0)))
                FROM
                    ar_cash_receipts_all           acr,
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                    AND acr.cash_receipt_id = ara.cash_receipt_id
                    AND ara.applied_payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                    AND ara.status IN('APP')
                    AND NOT EXISTS(
                        SELECT
                            1
                        FROM
                            ar_cash_receipt_history_all
                        WHERE
                                posting_control_id = - 3
                            AND cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
                            AND current_record_flag = 'Y'
                    )
                    AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            ),
                0)                    AS receipt_applied_amt,
            nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM((aav.amount * - 1))
                FROM
                    ar_adjustments_all aav
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = aav.customer_trx_id
                    AND aav.payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                    AND trunc(aav.gl_date) <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
                    AND aav.status = 'A'
            ),
                0)                    AS adjustment_amt,
            nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(ara.amount_applied *(- 1))
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = ara.customer_trx_id
                    AND ara.status IN('ACTIVITY', 'APP')
                    AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            ),
                0)                    AS activity_application_amt,
            nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(ara.amount_applied)
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                        rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                    AND ara.status IN('APP')
                    AND ara.cash_receipt_id IS NULL
                    AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            ),
                0)                    AS non_cash_application_amt,
            due_date,
            trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date) days_since_sysdate,
            rct.trx_number            invoice_number,
            rct.trx_class,
            rct.ct_reference,
            cust.party_name           customer_name,
            rct.trx_date              invoice_date,
            (
                SELECT
                    hzp1.party_name
                FROM
                    hz_cust_accounts hca1,
                    hz_parties       hzp1
                WHERE
                        hca1.cust_account_id = rct.bill_to_customer_id
                    AND hzp1.party_id = hca1.party_id
            )                         AS bill_to_account_number,
            (
                CASE
                    WHEN rct.ship_to_party_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                        (
                            SELECT
                                hzp2.party_name
                            FROM
                                hz_parties hzp2
                            WHERE
                                hzp2.party_id = rct.ship_to_party_id
                        )
                    ELSE
                        (
                            SELECT
                                hzp1.party_name
                            FROM
                                hz_cust_accounts hca2,
                                hz_parties       hzp1
                            WHERE
                                    hca2.cust_account_id = rct.ship_to_customer_id
                                AND hzp1.party_id = hca2.party_id
                        )
                END
            )                         AS ship_to_account_number,
            rct.purchase_order,
            rct.customer_trx_id
        FROM
            ra_customer_trx_all      rct,
            cust_account             cust,
            ar_payment_schedules_all aps,
            ra_cust_trx_types_all    rctt,
            gl_ledgers               gl,
            hr_operating_units       hou
        WHERE
                rct.bill_to_customer_id = cust.cust_account_id
                 -- FOR REMOVE CREADIT MEMO
           -- AND rct.trx_class NOT IN ( 'CM' )
                 -- FOR  COMPLETE FLAG

            AND ( rct.trx_date < TO_DATE(:p_date_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
            AND ( aps.gl_date <= TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
            AND rct.customer_trx_id IN (
                SELECT
                    vti.customer_trx_id
                FROM
                    valid_trx_ids vti
            )
            AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
            AND rct.customer_trx_id = aps.customer_trx_id
            AND rctt.cust_trx_type_seq_id = rct.cust_trx_type_seq_id
            AND rct.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND rct.org_id = hou.organization_id
            AND ( gl.ledger_id IN ( :p_ledger_name )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
            AND ( hou.organization_id IN ( :p_ou_name )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
            AND ( rct.trx_number IN ( :p_trx_number )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_trx_number || 'All' ) )
            AND NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT
                    1
                FROM
                    ra_cust_trx_line_gl_dist_all
                WHERE
                        posting_control_id = - 3
                    AND account_class = 'REC'
                    AND latest_rec_flag = 'Y'
                    AND customer_trx_id = rct.customer_trx_id
            )
    )
WHERE
    total_amt_rem != 0
UNION ALL
SELECT
    'Statement invoice'           AS type,
    hou.name                      bu_name,
    gl.name                       AS ledger_name,
    cust.account_number           cust_number,
    (
        SELECT
            SUM(rctla.extended_amount)
        FROM
            ra_customer_trx_lines_all rctla
        WHERE
            rctla.customer_trx_id = rct.customer_trx_id
    )                             invoice_amount,
    rct.invoice_currency_code,
    ( ( amount_due_original ) - ( nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM((ara.amount_applied + nvl(unearned_discount_taken, 0) + nvl(earned_discount_taken, 0)))
        FROM
            ar_cash_receipts_all           acr,
            ar_receivable_applications_all ara
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
            AND acr.cash_receipt_id = ara.cash_receipt_id
            AND ara.applied_payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
            AND ara.status IN('APP')
            AND NOT EXISTS(
                SELECT
                    1
                FROM
                    ar_cash_receipt_history_all
                WHERE
                        posting_control_id = - 3
                    AND cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
                    AND current_record_flag = 'Y'
            )
            AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    ),
                                      0) + nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM((aav.amount * - 1))
        FROM
            ar_adjustments_all aav
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = aav.customer_trx_id
            AND aav.payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
            AND trunc(aav.gl_date) <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            AND aav.status = 'A'
    ),
                                               0) + nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM(ara.amount_applied *(- 1))
        FROM
            ar_receivable_applications_all ara
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = ara.customer_trx_id
            AND ara.status IN('ACTIVITY', 'APP')
                                 --     AND ara.display = 'Y'
            AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    ),
                                                        0) + nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM(ara.amount_applied)
        FROM
            ar_receivable_applications_all ara
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
            AND ara.status IN('APP')
            AND ara.cash_receipt_id IS NULL
                                 --    AND ara.display = 'Y'
            AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    ),
                                                                 0) ) )                        AS total_amt_rem,
    ( amount_due_original )       AS original_amount,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM((ara.amount_applied + nvl(unearned_discount_taken, 0) + nvl(earned_discount_taken, 0)))
        FROM
            ar_cash_receipts_all           acr,
            ar_receivable_applications_all ara
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
            AND acr.cash_receipt_id = ara.cash_receipt_id
            AND ara.applied_payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
            AND ara.status IN('APP')
            AND NOT EXISTS(
                SELECT
                    1
                FROM
                    ar_cash_receipt_history_all
                WHERE
                        posting_control_id = - 3
                    AND cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
                    AND current_record_flag = 'Y'
            )
            AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    ),
        0)                        AS receipt_applied_amt,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM((aav.amount * - 1))
        FROM
            ar_adjustments_all aav
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = aav.customer_trx_id
            AND aav.payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
            AND trunc(aav.gl_date) <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
            AND aav.status = 'A'
    ),
        0)                        AS adjustment_amt,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM(ara.amount_applied *(- 1))
        FROM
            ar_receivable_applications_all ara
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = ara.customer_trx_id
            AND ara.status IN('ACTIVITY', 'APP')
            AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    ),
        0)                        AS activity_application_amt,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            SUM(ara.amount_applied)
        FROM
            ar_receivable_applications_all ara
        WHERE
                rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
            AND ara.status IN('APP')
            AND ara.cash_receipt_id IS NULL
            AND ara.gl_date <= trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD'))
    ),
        0)                        AS non_cash_application_amt,
    due_date,
    trunc(TO_DATE(substr(:p_date_to, 1, 10),
        'YYYY-MM-DD') - due_date) days_since_sysdate,
    rct.trx_number                invoice_number,
    rct.trx_class,
    rct.ct_reference,
    cust.party_name               customer_name,
    rct.trx_date                  invoice_date,
    (
        SELECT
            hzp1.party_name
        FROM
            hz_cust_accounts hca1,
            hz_parties       hzp1
        WHERE
                hca1.cust_account_id = rct.bill_to_customer_id
            AND hzp1.party_id = hca1.party_id
    )                             AS bill_to_account_number,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN rct.ship_to_party_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                (
                    SELECT
                        hzp2.party_name
                    FROM
                        hz_parties hzp2
                    WHERE
                        hzp2.party_id = rct.ship_to_party_id
                )
            ELSE
                (
                    SELECT
                        hzp1.party_name
                    FROM
                        hz_cust_accounts hca2,
                        hz_parties       hzp1
                    WHERE
                            hca2.cust_account_id = rct.ship_to_customer_id
                        AND hzp1.party_id = hca2.party_id
                )
        END
    )                             AS ship_to_account_number,
    rct.purchase_order,
    rct.customer_trx_id
FROM
    ra_customer_trx_all      rct,
    cust_account             cust,
    ar_payment_schedules_all aps,
    ra_cust_trx_types_all    rctt,
    gl_ledgers               gl,
    hr_operating_units       hou
WHERE
        rct.bill_to_customer_id = cust.cust_account_id
                 -- FOR REMOVE CREADIT MEMO
           -- AND rct.trx_class NOT IN ( 'CM' )
                 -- FOR  COMPLETE FLAG

    AND ( rct.trx_date BETWEEN TO_DATE(:p_date_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
    AND ( aps.gl_date <= TO_DATE(:p_date_to, 'YYYY-MM-DD') )
    AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
    AND rct.customer_trx_id = aps.customer_trx_id
    AND rctt.cust_trx_type_seq_id = rct.cust_trx_type_seq_id
    AND rct.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
    AND rct.org_id = hou.organization_id
    AND ( gl.ledger_id IN ( :p_ledger_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( hou.organization_id IN ( :p_ou_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_ou_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( rct.trx_number IN ( :p_trx_number )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_trx_number || 'All' ) )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            ra_cust_trx_line_gl_dist_all
        WHERE
                posting_control_id = - 3
            AND account_class = 'REC'
            AND latest_rec_flag = 'Y'
            AND customer_trx_id = rct.customer_trx_id
    )

title: Customer Email Logic
sql:
WITH cust AS (
    SELECT
        hca.account_number,
        hca.cust_account_id,
        hca.party_id,
        hzp.party_name
    FROM
        hz_cust_accounts hca,
        hz_parties       hzp
    WHERE
            1 = 1
        AND hzp.party_id = hca.party_id
        AND hca.account_number='10973'
)
SELECT 
    hca.account_number,
    hp.party_name,
	hp.party_id,
    
    /* Email Logic */
    NVL(site_email.email_address, acct_email.email_address) AS email_address

FROM
    hz_cust_accounts            hca,
    hz_parties                  hp,
	
    hz_cust_acct_sites_all      hcas,
    hz_cust_site_uses_all       hcsu,
    hz_party_sites              hps,
    hz_locations                hl,
	cust,

    /* Bill-to Site Email */
	hz_cust_account_roles customeraccountcontact,
    hz_contact_points           site_email,

    /* Customer Account Email */
	hz_cust_account_roles customersitecontact,
    hz_contact_points           acct_email

WHERE
    hca.party_id = hp.party_id
	and  hca.cust_account_id=cust.cust_account_id
AND hca.cust_account_id = hcas.cust_account_id(+)
AND hcas.cust_acct_site_id = hcsu.cust_acct_site_id(+)
AND hcsu.site_use_code(+) = 'BILL_TO'

AND hcas.party_site_id = hps.party_site_id(+)
AND hps.location_id = hl.location_id(+)

-- Bill-to Site Email Join
AND hcas.cust_acct_site_id =customersitecontact.cust_acct_site_id(+)
      AND customersitecontact.status(+) = 'A'
	  
AND site_email.relationship_id(+) = customersitecontact.relationship_id
AND site_email.owner_table_name(+) = 'HZ_PARTIES'
AND site_email.contact_point_type(+) = 'EMAIL'
AND site_email.status(+) = 'A'

-- Customer Account Level Email Join
 AND hca.cust_account_id =customeraccountcontact.cust_account_id(+)
       AND customeraccountcontact.status(+) = 'A'
AND acct_email.relationship_id(+) = customeraccountcontact.relationship_id
AND acct_email.owner_table_name(+) = 'HZ_PARTIES'
AND acct_email.contact_point_type(+) = 'EMAIL'
AND acct_email.status(+) = 'A'

title: Customer Detail SQL
description: Accounts Receivable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: AR_COLLECTORS, FND_SETID_SETS_VL, HZ_CONTACT_POINTS; includes contact points, addresses. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
(
            SELECT
                v131818700.account_termination_date    AS c202971951,
                v131818700.account_number              AS c69081989,
                v390585951.party_name                  AS c310524679,
                v390585951.party_number                AS c160744894,
                v230110968.organization_name           AS c453114252,
                v91183408.name                         AS c311572421,
                v91183408.coolector_name               AS c119674888,
                v91183408.pref_contact_method          AS c391806109,
                v131818700.set_id_set_name             AS c367043260,
                v131818700.party_site_name             AS c42136419,
                v131818700.party_site_number           AS c318910879,
                v215955141.person_first_name           AS c251308692,
                v215955141.person_last_name            AS c150451949,
                v440202196.contact_point_value         AS c228870017,
                v305680792.resp_type                   AS c350869856,
                v156773441.name                        AS c422426898,
                v131818700.account_status              AS c123057362,
                v390585951.country                     AS c516186432,
                v91183408.profile_dunning_letters      AS c143471884,
                v91183408.send_statements              AS c215592055,
                v131818700.status                      AS c105704447,
                v131818700.site_use_code               AS c355921403,
                v131818700.customer_account_status     AS c249950110,
                v440202196.contact_point_type          AS c441813341,
                v131818700.cust_acct_id                AS c306970227,
                v131818700.acct_cust_acct_site_id      AS pka_customeraccountsitecustac0,
                v131818700.set_id_set_id               AS pka_setidsetsetid0,
                v131818700.party_site_id               AS pka_partysitepartysiteid0,
                v131818700.site_use_id                 AS pka_customeraccountsiteusesit0,
                v215955141.party_id                    AS pka_contactpersonpartypartyid0,
                v440202196.contact_point_id            AS bdep_contactpointid0,
                v91183408.prof_cust_acc_profile_id     AS pka_custaccountprofileid0,
                v91183408.profile_effective_start_date AS pka_customerprofileeffectives0,
                v91183408.profile_effective_end_date   AS pka_customerprofileeffectivee0,
                v91183408.profile_profile_class_id     AS pka_customerprofileclassespro0,
                v91183408.collctr_id                   AS pka_collectorscollectorid0,
                v156773441.profile_profile_class_id    AS pka_customerprofileclassespro1,
                v390585951.party_id                    AS pka_partyid0,
                v230110968.organization_profile_id     AS pka_organizationprofileid0,
                v230110968.effective_start_date        AS pka_effectivestartdate0,
                v230110968.effective_end_date          AS pka_effectiveenddate0
            FROM
                (
                    SELECT
                        customeraccount.account_number,
                        customeraccount.account_termination_date,
                        customeraccount.cust_account_id       AS cust_acct_id,
                        customeraccount.party_id              AS account_party_id,
                        customeraccount.status                AS account_status,
                        customeraccountsite.cust_acct_site_id AS acct_cust_acct_site_id,
                        setidset.set_id                       AS set_id_set_id,
                        setidset.set_name                     AS set_id_set_name,
                        customeraccountsite.status            AS customer_account_status,
                        partysite.party_site_id,
                        partysite.party_site_name,
                        partysite.party_site_number,
                        customeraccountsiteuse.site_use_code,
                        customeraccountsiteuse.site_use_id,
                        customeraccountsiteuse.status,
                        customeraccountsite.set_id            AS customeraccountsite_set_id
                    FROM
                        hz_cust_accounts       customeraccount,
                        hz_cust_acct_sites_all customeraccountsite,
                        fnd_setid_sets_vl      setidset,
                        hz_party_sites         partysite,
                        hz_cust_site_uses_all  customeraccountsiteuse
                    WHERE
                        ( ( customeraccount.cust_account_id = customeraccountsite.cust_account_id (+)
                            AND customeraccountsite.set_id = setidset.set_id (+)
                            AND customeraccountsite.party_site_id = partysite.party_site_id (+)
                            AND customeraccountsite.cust_acct_site_id = customeraccountsiteuse.cust_acct_site_id (+) )
                          AND ( ( 1 = 1 )
                                AND ( 1 = 1 )
                                AND ( 1 = 1 ) ) )
                        AND ( ( 1 = 1 ) )
                ) v131818700,
                (
                    SELECT
                        contactpersonparty.party_id,
                        contactpersonparty.person_first_name,
                        contactpersonparty.person_last_name,
                        customeraccountcontact.contact_person_id,
                        customeraccountcontact.cust_account_role_id,
                        customeraccountcontact.cust_acct_site_id,
                        customeraccountcontact.relationship_id
                    FROM
                        hz_cust_account_roles customeraccountcontact,
                        hz_parties            contactpersonparty
                    WHERE
                        ( ( customeraccountcontact.contact_person_id = contactpersonparty.party_id )
                          AND ( ( 1 = 1 ) ) )
                        AND ( ( ( customeraccountcontact.status = 'A' ) ) )
                ) v215955141,
                (
                    SELECT
                        role_id,
                        lang,
                        LISTAGG(primeresp, ',') WITHIN GROUP(
                        ORDER BY
                            resptype
                        ) AS primary_resp,
                        LISTAGG(resptype, ',') WITHIN GROUP(
                        ORDER BY
                            resptype
                        ) AS resp_type
                    FROM
                        (
                            SELECT
                                responsibility.responsibility_id    resp_id,
                                responsibility.cust_account_role_id role_id,
                                responsibility.primary_flag         primerespflag,
                                responsibility.responsibility_type  resptype,
                                lookup.meaning                      primeresp,
                                lookup.language                     lang
                            FROM
                                hz_role_responsibility responsibility,
                                fnd_lookup_values_tl   lookup
                            WHERE
                                lookup.lookup_type = 'YES_NO'
                                AND lookup.language = userenv(
                                    'LANG'
                                )
                                AND responsibility.primary_flag = lookup.lookup_code (+)
                                AND lookup.view_application_id = 0
                        )
                    GROUP BY
                        role_id,
                        lang
                ) v305680792,
                (
                    SELECT
                        contactpoint.contact_point_id,
                        contactpoint.contact_point_type,
                        ( decode(
                            contactpoint.contact_point_type, 'EMAIL', contactpoint.email_address, 'WEB', contactpoint.url, 'PHONE', contactpoint.
                            raw_phone_number, 'INSTANT_MESSAGING', contactpoint.instant_messaging_address, NULL
                        ) ) AS contact_point_value,
                        contactpoint.owner_table_id,
                        contactpoint.relationship_id
                    FROM
                        hz_contact_points contactpoint
                    WHERE
                        ( ( contactpoint.owner_table_name = 'HZ_PARTIES' )
                          AND ( contactpoint.relationship_id IS NOT NULL ) )
                ) v440202196,
                (
                    SELECT
                        customerprofile.cust_account_profile_id AS prof_cust_acc_profile_id,
                        customerprofile.cust_account_id         AS prof_cust_account_id,
                        customerprofile.dunning_letters         AS profile_dunning_letters,
                        customerprofile.effective_end_date      AS profile_effective_end_date,
                        customerprofile.effective_start_date    AS profile_effective_start_date,
                        customerprofile.pref_contact_method,
                        customerprofile.send_statements,
                        customerprofileclasses.name,
                        customerprofileclasses.profile_class_id AS profile_profile_class_id,
                        collectors.name                         AS coolector_name,
                        collectors.collector_id                 AS collctr_id
                    FROM
                        hz_customer_profiles_f  customerprofile,
                        hz_cust_profile_classes customerprofileclasses,
                        ar_collectors           collectors
                    WHERE
                        ( customerprofile.profile_class_id = customerprofileclasses.profile_class_id (+)
                          AND customerprofile.collector_id = collectors.collector_id (+) )
                        AND ( ( ( customerprofile.site_use_id IS NULL ) ) )
                ) v91183408,
                (
                    SELECT
                        customerprofile.cust_account_profile_id AS prof_cust_acc_profile_id,
                        customerprofile.site_use_id,
                        customerprofileclasses.name,
                        customerprofileclasses.profile_class_id AS profile_profile_class_id
                    FROM
                        hz_customer_profiles_f  customerprofile,
                        hz_cust_profile_classes customerprofileclasses
                    WHERE
                        ( customerprofile.profile_class_id = customerprofileclasses.profile_class_id (+) )
                        AND ( ( ( customerprofile.site_use_id IS NOT NULL ) ) )
                ) v156773441,
                (
                    SELECT /*+ qb_name(CustomerPVO) */
                        customerpartypeo.country,
                        customerpartypeo.party_id,
                        customerpartypeo.party_name,
                        customerpartypeo.party_number
                    FROM
                        hz_parties customerpartypeo
                ) v390585951,
                (
                    SELECT /*+ qb_name(OrganizationPVO) */
                        organizationpeo.effective_end_date,
                        organizationpeo.effective_start_date,
                        organizationpeo.organization_name,
                        organizationpeo.organization_profile_id,
                        organizationpeo.party_id
                    FROM
                        hz_organization_profiles organizationpeo
                    WHERE
                        ( DATE '2024-10-21' BETWEEN organizationpeo.effective_start_date AND organizationpeo.effective_end_date )
                        AND ( organizationpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' )
                ) v230110968
            WHERE
                v131818700.acct_cust_acct_site_id = v215955141.cust_acct_site_id (+)
                AND v215955141.cust_account_role_id = v305680792.role_id (+)
                AND v215955141.relationship_id = v440202196.relationship_id (+)
                AND v215955141.contact_person_id = v440202196.owner_table_id (+)
                AND v131818700.cust_acct_id = v91183408.prof_cust_account_id (+)
                AND v131818700.site_use_id = v156773441.site_use_id (+)
                AND v131818700.account_party_id = v390585951.party_id (+)
                AND v390585951.party_id = v230110968.party_id (+)
        ) t2389860
), sawith1 AS (
    SELECT  /*+ inline */
        t2389861.c389230568 AS c1,
        t2389861.c164164071 AS c2
    FROM
        (
            SELECT

    FROM
        (
            SELECT
                v72673585.meaning             AS c389230568,

            FROM

            WHERE
                ( ( ( v72673585.lookup_type = 'HZ_STATUS' ) )

        ) t2389865
), sawith6 AS (

    FROM
        (
            SELECT
