            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl v72673585
            WHERE
                ( ( ( v72673585.lookup_type = 'SITE_USE_CODE' ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.view_application_id = 0 ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.set_id = 0 ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.language = 'US' ) ) )
        ) t2389866
), sawith7 AS (
    SELECT  /*+ inline */
        t2389867.c389230568 AS c1,

    FROM
        (
            SELECT
                v72673585.meaning             AS c389230568,
                v72673585.lookup_code         AS c164164071,
                v72673585.language            AS c343259318,
                v72673585.lookup_type         AS c417433804,
                v72673585.view_application_id AS c456636657,
                v72673585.set_id              AS c497682495
            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl v72673585
            WHERE
                ( ( ( v72673585.lookup_type = 'CODE_STATUS' ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.view_application_id = 0 ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.set_id = 0 ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.language = 'US' ) ) )
        ) t2389867
), sawith8 AS (
    SELECT  /*+ inline */
        t2389868.c389230568 AS c1,
        t2389868.c164164071 AS c2
    FROM
        (
            SELECT
                v72673585.meaning             AS c389230568,
                v72673585.lookup_code         AS c164164071,
                v72673585.language            AS c343259318,
                v72673585.lookup_type         AS c417433804,
                v72673585.view_application_id AS c456636657,
                v72673585.set_id              AS c497682495
            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl v72673585
            WHERE
                ( ( ( v72673585.lookup_type = 'COMMUNICATION_TYPE' ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.view_application_id = 0 ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.set_id = 0 ) )
                  AND ( ( v72673585.language = 'US' ) ) )
        ) t2389868
)

title: Project Contract Vs Invoice Vs Revenue
description: Project Contract Vs Invoice Vs Revenue
sql:
/**************************************************************************************  
    Date                     Developer                    Version     Description    
    13-Sep-2022        Pulkit Kumar Jain        1.0      Contract Vs Invoice Vs Revenue         
    ***************************************************************************************/WITH contract_detail AS (
    SELECT
        contractheaderbasepeo.id                         AS contract_header_id,
        contractlinebasepeo.id                           AS contract_line_id,
        contractheaderbasepeo.major_version              AS contract_header_major_version,
        contractlinebasepeo.major_version                AS contract_line_major_version,
        contractheaderbasepeo.contract_number,
        contractheaderbasepeo.currency_code              AS contract_currency_code,
        contractlinebasepeo.line_number                  AS contract_line_number,
        contractheadertranslationpeo.cognomen            AS contract_name,
        contractlinetranslationpeo.item_name             AS contract_line_item_name,
        contractlinetypepeo.name                         AS contractlinetype_name,
        contracttypepeo.name                             AS contracttype_name,
        contractheaderowningorgpeo.name                  AS contract_owning_org,
        contractheader_bu.name                           AS contract_bu,
        legalentitypeoc.name                             AS contract_legal_entity_name,
        contractheaderowningorgpeo.classification_code   AS owningorg_class_code,
        customerpartypeo.party_name                      AS contract_customer_name,
        contractheaderbasepeo.estimated_amount           AS contract_header_amount,
        nvl(contractlinebasepeo.line_amount, 0) AS contract_line_amount
        ,
        contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_plan_name,
        contractline_rev_plan.bill_plan_name             AS revenue_plan_name,
        (
            SELECT
                lookup1.meaning
            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl lookup1
            WHERE
                lookup1.lookup_type = 'OKC_STATUS'
                AND lookup1.language = 'US'
                AND lookup1.lookup_code = contractheaderbasepeo.sts_code
        ) AS contract_header_status,
        (
            SELECT
                lookup1.meaning
            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl lookup1
            WHERE
                lookup1.lookup_type = 'OKC_STATUS'
                AND lookup1.language = 'US'
                AND lookup1.lookup_code = contractlinebasepeo.sts_code
        ) AS contract_line_status,
		'https://' || 
(
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )||'/fndSetup/faces/deeplink?objType=CONTRACT&objKey=contractId='||contractheaderbasepeo.contract_id||'&action=EDIT' as pod_url
	
	
	
    FROM
        okc_k_lines_b           contractlinebasepeo,
        okc_k_headers_all_b     contractheaderbasepeo,
        okc_k_headers_tl        contractheadertranslationpeo,
        okc_k_lines_tl          contractlinetranslationpeo,
        pjb_bill_plans_vl       contractlinepjbbillplanpeo,
        pjb_bill_plans_vl       contractline_rev_plan,
        okc_contract_types_vl   contracttypepeo,
        okc_line_types_vl       contractlinetypepeo,
        hr_organization_v       contractheaderowningorgpeo,
        hr_organization_v       contractheader_bu,
        hz_cust_accounts        hca,
        hz_parties              customerpartypeo,
        xle_entity_profiles     legalentitypeoc
    WHERE
        contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractheaderbasepeo.major_version
        AND contractlinebasepeo.dnz_chr_id = contractheaderbasepeo.id
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.id = contractheadertranslationpeo.id
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.major_version = contractheadertranslationpeo.major_version
        AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = contractheadertranslationpeo.language
        AND contractlinebasepeo.id = contractlinetranslationpeo.id
        AND contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractlinetranslationpeo.major_version
        AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = contractlinetranslationpeo.language
        AND contractlinebasepeo.bill_plan_id = contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_plan_id (+)
        AND contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.major_version (+)
        AND contractlinebasepeo.revenue_plan_id = contractline_rev_plan.bill_plan_id (+)
        AND contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractline_rev_plan.major_version (+)
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id
        AND contractlinebasepeo.line_type_id = contractlinetypepeo.line_type_id
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.owning_org_id = contractheaderowningorgpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = contractheaderowningorgpeo.classification_code (+)
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.org_id = contractheader_bu.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = contractheader_bu.classification_code (+)
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.legal_entity_id = legalentitypeoc.legal_entity_id (+)
        AND contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
        AND hca.party_id = customerpartypeo.party_id (+)
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN contractheaderowningorgpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND contractheaderowningorgpeo.effective_end_date
        (+) )
        AND contractlinebasepeo.version_type = 'C'
       --AND contractheaderbasepeo.contract_number in ( 'SPPI005')
        AND ( :p_contract_name IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractheaderbasepeo.id IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_type IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_type = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contracttypepeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_type, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_type, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_organization IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_organization = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractheaderowningorgpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_organization, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_organization, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_customer_name IS NULL
              OR :p_customer_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR customerpartypeo.party_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_customer_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_customer_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_legal_entity IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_legal_entity = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR legalentitypeoc.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_legal_entity, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_legal_entity, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_line_type IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_line_type = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractlinetypepeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_line_type, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_line_type, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_bill_plan IS NULL
              OR :p_bill_plan = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_plan_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_bill_plan, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_bill_plan, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_revenue_plan IS NULL
              OR :p_revenue_plan = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractline_rev_plan.bill_plan_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_revenue_plan, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_revenue_plan, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_number IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_number = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractheaderbasepeo.contract_number IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_number, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_number, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
    ORDER BY
        line_number
), invocie_amount AS (
    SELECT
        invoicedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        SUM(invoicedistributionpeo.ledger_curr_billed_amt) AS invoice_amount,
        invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        invoicedistributionpeo.contract_project_linkage_id
    FROM
        pjb_inv_line_dists invoicedistributionpeo
    GROUP BY
        invoicedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        contract_project_linkage_id
), revenue_amount AS (
    SELECT
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        SUM(revenuedistributionpeo.ledger_curr_revenue_amt) AS revenue_amount,
        revenuedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_project_linkage_id
    FROM
        pjb_rev_distributions revenuedistributionpeo
    GROUP BY
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        revenuedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_project_linkage_id
), project_detail AS (
    SELECT
        projectpeo.name                       AS project_name,
        projectpeo.project_currency_code,
        projectpeo.project_id,
        projectpeo.projfunc_currency_code,
        projectpeo.segment1                   project_number,
        projectpeo.service_type_code          AS project_service_type_code,
        projecttypepeo.project_type,
        projectowningorgdpeo.name             project_owning_org,
        legalentitypeo.name                   AS proejct_legal_entity,
        projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
        projectunitdpeo.name                  AS project_unit_name,
        worktypepeo.name                      AS project_work_type_name,
        personnamedpeo.list_name              AS project_manager_name,
        organizationunittranslationpeo.name   AS project_bu_name,
        nvl(fl.funding_amount, 0) AS funding_amount,
        taskstructurepeo.element_number       task_number,
        taskstructurepeo.name                 task_name,
        fl.contract_id as link_contract_id,
        fl.contract_line_id as links_contract_line_id,
        fl.major_version link_major_version,
        fl.link_id as link_link_id
    FROM
        pjf_projects_all_vl          projectpeo,
        pjf_project_types_vl         projecttypepeo,
        pjf_latestprojectmanager_v   latesprojectmanagerpeo,
        hr_organization_v            projectowningorgdpeo,
        xle_entity_profiles          legalentitypeo,
        pjf_project_statuses_vl      projectstatuspeo,
        per_person_names_f_v         personnamedpeo,
        hr_organization_v            projectunitdpeo,
        pjf_work_types_vl            worktypepeo,
        hr_organization_units_f_tl   organizationunittranslationpeo,
        pjb_cntrct_proj_links        fl,
        pjf_proj_elements_vl         taskstructurepeo
    WHERE
        projectpeo.project_type_id = projecttypepeo.project_type_id (+)
        AND fl.project_id = projectpeo.project_id
        AND fl.proj_element_id = taskstructurepeo.proj_element_id (+)
        AND fl.version_type  = 'C'
        AND fl.active_flag  = 'Y'
        AND projectpeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code (+)
        AND projectpeo.legal_entity_id = legalentitypeo.legal_entity_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code
        AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo.person_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code (+)
        AND projectpeo.work_type_id = worktypepeo.work_type_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.org_id = organizationunittranslationpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslationpeo.language (+)
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_end_date
        (+) )
        AND ( :p_project_currency IS NULL
              OR :p_project_currency = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectpeo.project_currency_code IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_currency, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_currency, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_bu IS NULL
              OR :p_project_bu = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR organizationunittranslationpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_bu, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_bu, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_legal_entity IS NULL
              OR :p_legal_entity = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR legalentitypeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_legal_entity, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_legal_entity, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_manager IS NULL
              OR :p_project_manager = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR personnamedpeo.list_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_manager, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_manager, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_unit IS NULL
              OR :p_project_unit = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectunitdpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_unit, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_unit, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_status IS NULL
              OR :p_project_status = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectstatuspeo.project_status_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_status, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_status, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_name IS NULL
              OR :p_project_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_number IS NULL
              OR :p_project_number = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectpeo.segment1 IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_number, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_number, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_owning_org IS NULL
              OR :p_project_owning_org = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectowningorgdpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_owning_org, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_owning_org, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
)
SELECT
    'Total' AS total_c,
    'Total' AS total_p,
    cd.*,
    pd.*,
    nvl(ia.invoice_amount, 0) AS invoice_amount,
    nvl(ra.revenue_amount, 0) AS revenue_amount,
    nvl(pd.funding_amount, 0) - nvl(ia.invoice_amount, 0) AS prj_backlog_fun_inv,
    nvl(pd.funding_amount, 0) - nvl(ra.revenue_amount, 0) AS prj_backlog_fun_rev,
    nvl(ia.invoice_amount, 0) - nvl(ra.revenue_amount, 0) AS prj_backlog_inv_rev
FROM
    contract_detail   cd,
    project_detail    pd,
    invocie_amount    ia,
    revenue_amount    ra
WHERE
    cd.contract_header_id = pd.link_contract_id (+)
    AND cd.contract_line_id = pd.links_contract_line_id (+)
    AND cd.contract_line_major_version = pd.link_major_version (+)
    AND pd.links_contract_line_id = ia.contract_line_id (+)
    AND pd.project_id = ia.transaction_project_id (+)
    AND pd.link_link_id = ia.contract_project_linkage_id (+)
    AND pd.links_contract_line_id = ra.contract_line_id (+)
    AND pd.project_id = ra.transaction_project_id (+)
    AND pd.link_link_id = ra.contract_project_linkage_id (+)
ORDER BY
    contract_number,
    contract_line_number,
    project_number

title: Project Cost Adjustment
description: Accounts Payable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_NAMES_BUSINESS_UNITS_V, GL_LEDGERS, PER_PERSON_NAMES_F; includes GL account combinations. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
SELECT
    'Total' AS total,
    TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') adj_creation_date,
    ( TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
      || (
        CASE
            WHEN peiaa.expenditure_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                '-'
            ELSE
                NULL
        END
    )
      || TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'YY') ) adj_creation_date_month,
    peiaa.created_by                    AS adj_created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup1.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup1
        WHERE
            lkup1.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE'
            AND lkup1.lookup_code = peiaa.adjustment_type
    ) adjustment_type,
    peiaa.adjustment_type               AS adjustment_type_1,
    peiaa.expenditure_item_id           AS adj_id,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup2.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup2
        WHERE
            lkup2.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJUST_HISTORY_REC_STATUS'
            AND lkup2.lookup_code = peiaa.status
    ) adjustment_status,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup3.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup3
        WHERE
            lkup3.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJ_SOURCE'
            AND lkup3.lookup_code = peiaa.module_code
    ) adjustment_source,
    peiaa.adjustment_justification,
    TO_CHAR(peia.creation_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') creation_date,
    peia.expenditure_item_id            AS transaction_id,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peia.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peia.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peia.
            creation_date)) ) THEN
                1
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) count_of_trx,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                1
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) count_of_adj,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                1
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS adj_line_count,
    peia.created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            COUNT(peiaa1.expenditure_item_id)
        FROM
            pjc_expend_item_adj_acts peiaa1
        WHERE
            peiaa1.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
            AND ( trunc(peiaa1.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa1.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa1
            .creation_date)) )
            AND ( peiaa1.status IN (
                :p_adj_status
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_adj_status || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( peiaa1.adjustment_type IN (
                :p_adj_type
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_adj_type || 'All'
            ) )
    ) AS count_adj,
    peia.expenditure_item_id            transaction_number,
    ppav.name                           project_name,
    ppav.segment1                       project_number,
    ptv.task_name,
    ptv.task_number,
    petv.expenditure_type_name,
    peia.denom_raw_cost                 raw_cost_in_transaction_currency,
    peia.projfunc_raw_cost              raw_cost_in_project_currency,
    TO_CHAR(peia.expenditure_item_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') expenditure_item_date,
    peia.quantity                       quantity,
    peia.unit_of_measure,
    pwtt.name                           work_type_name,
    peia.billable_flag                  billable,
    peia.capitalizable_flag             capitalizable,
    peia.user_batch_name                user_expenditure_batch_name,
    houfteo.name                        expenditure_organization,
    project_owning_org.name             project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                        AS project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                        project_unit,
    ptsb.user_transaction_source        transaction_source,
    ptdt.document_name,
    ptdet.doc_entry_name                document_entry,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup1.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup1
        WHERE
            lkup1.lookup_type = 'PJC_CMT_PROCESSING_STATUS'
            AND lkup1.lookup_code = peia.invoiced_flag
    ) invoice_status,
    peia.bill_hold_flag                 hold_invoice,
    ps.vendor_name                      supplier_name,
    pect.expenditure_category_name,
    peia.project_currency_code          project_currency,
    peia.denom_currency_code            transaction_currency,
    xep.name                            project_legal_entity_name,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) AS project_manager_name,
    (select PROJECT_STATUS_NAME from 
    PJF_PROJECT_STATUSES_VL PPSV
    where 
    ppav.project_status_code      =PPSV.PROJECT_STATUS_CODE )     project_status,
    gl.name                             ledger_name,
    ptsb.transaction_source_id          transaction_source_number,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                (
                    SELECT
                        peiain.denom_raw_cost
                    FROM
                        pjc_exp_items_all peiain
                    WHERE
                        peiaa.expenditure_item_id = peiain.expenditure_item_id
                )
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS adj_amount_transaction_currency,
    gl.currency_code                    ledger_currency,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                (
                    SELECT
                        peiain.denom_raw_cost * nvl(peiain.acct_exchange_rate, 1)
                    FROM
                        pjc_exp_items_all peiain
                    WHERE
                        peiaa.expenditure_item_id = peiain.expenditure_item_id
                )
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS adj_amount,
    peia.transferred_from_exp_item_id   transferred_from_transaction_number,
    peia.adjusted_expenditure_item_id   adjusting_item
FROM
    pjc_exp_items_all            peia,
    pjc_expend_item_adj_acts     peiaa,
    pjf_projects_all_vl          ppav,
    pjf_tasks_v                  ptv,
    pjf_exp_types_vl             petv,
    pjf_work_types_tl            pwtt,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   houfteo,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   houftpu,
    xle_entity_profiles          xep,
    pjf_txn_sources_vl           ptsb,
    pjf_txn_document_tl          ptdt,
    pjf_txn_doc_entry_tl         ptdet,
    poz_suppliers_v              ps,
    pjf_exp_categories_tl        pect,
    pjf_exp_types_b              petb,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v   project_managet_project,
    fun_names_business_units_v   fnbu,
    gl_ledgers                   gl
WHERE
    1 = 1
--and peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID=347699
    AND peia.expenditure_item_id = peiaa.expenditure_item_id (+)
    AND peia.project_id = ppav.project_id
    AND peia.task_id = ptv.task_id
    AND peia.expenditure_type_id = petv.expenditure_type_id
    AND peia.work_type_id = pwtt.work_type_id (+)
    AND peia.expenditure_organization_id = houfteo.organization_id
    AND ppav.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND peia.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND ptsb.transaction_source_id = peia.transaction_source_id
    AND ptdt.document_id = peia.document_id
    AND ptdet.doc_entry_id = peia.doc_entry_id
    AND peia.vendor_id = ps.vendor_id (+)
    AND peia.expenditure_type_id = petb.expenditure_type_id
    AND petb.expenditure_category_id = pect.expenditure_category_id
    AND ppav.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND ppav.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppav.org_id
    AND fnbu.primary_ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(houfteo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houfteo.effective_end_date)
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houfteo.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND ptdt.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND ptdet.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND pect.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND pwtt.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
--    and peiaa.status='X'
--and peiaa.adjustment_type='Edit comment'
    AND ( gl.ledger_id IN (
        :p_ledger_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( xep.name IN (
        :p_legal_entity_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_legal_entity_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( project_owning_org.name IN (
        :p_project_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( fnbu.bu_name IN (
        :p_project_business_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_business_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppav.project_status_code IN (
        :p_project_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN (
        :p_project_manager
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_manager || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peia.project_currency_code IN (
        :p_project_currency
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_currency || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date
    )) )
          OR ( trunc(peia.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peia.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peia.creation_date
          )) ) )
    AND ( ptsb.transaction_source_id IN (
        :p_transaction_source
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_transaction_source || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ptdt.document_id IN (
        :p_document
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_document || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peiaa.status IN (
        :p_adj_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_adj_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peiaa.adjustment_type IN (
        :p_adj_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_adj_type || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( houfteo.organization_id IN (
        :p_expenditure_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_expenditure_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppav.project_id IN (
        :p_project_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_number || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppav.name IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( petv.expenditure_type_name IN (
        :p_expenditure_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_expenditure_type || 'All'
    ) )s

title: Approved Invoice Not Yet Release
description: Accounts Receivable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT, GL_LEDGERS, HR_ORGANIZATION_INFORMATION_F; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/****************************************************************** new
Date        Developer         Version               Description    
29/12/22     Nilesh Sapkal/Pulkit Jain        V 1.0.0            E06  Approved Invoice - Not Yet Release 
*****************************************************************/SELECT /*+ parallel(10) */
     'Total' AS total,
     SUM(nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_billed_amt * nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_exchg_rate,1),0) ) invoice_amount
    ,
     (
         SELECT
             external_virtual_host   pod_url
         FROM
             ask_deployed_domains
         WHERE
             deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
     )
     || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT_INVOICES&action=NONE&objKey=InvoiceId='
     || invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id AS prod_link,
     TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'Mon','NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
     || '-'
     || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'YY') creation_period,
     TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date),'Mon','NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
     || '-'
     || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date),'YY') approve_period,
     TO_DATE(01
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'MM')
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'YY'),'DD-mm-yy') invoice_month_creation_date,
     TO_DATE(01
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date),'MM')
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date),'YY'),'DD-mm-yy') invoice_month_approved_date,--n         
     invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
     invoiceheaderpeo.created_by,
     personnamedpeo.display_name        approved_by_person,
     invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date,
     contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
     ledger.name                        ledger_name,
     contracttypepeo.name               contract_type_name,
     projectbasepeo.project_id,
     projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
     projectbasepeo.segment1            project_number,
     projecttranslationpeo.name         project_name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
     personnamedpeo3.list_name          project_manajor_name,
     xep.name                           legal_entity_name,
     ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) approved_days,
     CASE
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN '1) Between 0 to 5 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN '2) Between 5 to 10 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) BETWEEN 10 AND 30 THEN '3) Between 10 to 30 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) BETWEEN 30 AND 90 THEN '4)Between 30 to 90 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) BETWEEN 90 AND 365 THEN '5)Between 90 to 365 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) ) > 365        THEN '6) More than 365 Days'
     END bucket,
     organizationunittranslation.name   business_unit,
     pptt.project_type                  project_type,
     projectunitdpeo.name               project_unit,
     projectowningorgdpeo.name          project_org,
     hca.account_name                   customer_name
 FROM
     pjb_inv_line_dists invoicedistributionpeo,
     pjb_invoice_headers invoiceheaderpeo,
     okc_k_headers_vl contractheaderpeo,
     per_person_names_f_v personnamedpeo,
     hr_organization_information_f organizationinformationpeo,
     hr_organization_units_f_tl organizationunittranslation,
     gl_ledgers ledger,
     okc_contract_types_vl contracttypepeo,
     pjf_projects_all_b projectbasepeo,
     pjf_latestprojectmanager_v latesprojectmanagerpeo,
     pjf_projects_all_tl projecttranslationpeo,
     pjf_project_statuses_vl projectstatuspeo,
     per_person_names_f_v personnamedpeo3,
     pjf_project_types_tl pptt,
     hr_organization_v projectowningorgdpeo,
     hr_organization_v projectunitdpeo,
     hz_cust_accounts hca,
     xle_entity_profiles xep
 WHERE
     invoiceheaderpeo.released_date IS NULL
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code = 'APPROVED'
     AND projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code <> 'CLOSED'
     AND contractheaderpeo.sts_code <> 'CLOSED'
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id = invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_id (+)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id = contractheaderpeo.id
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.major_version = contractheaderpeo.major_version
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.approved_by_person_id = personnamedpeo.person_id (+)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.org_id = organizationinformationpeo.organization_id
     AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = organizationinformationpeo.org_information_context
     AND organizationinformationpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslation.organization_id
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslation.effective_start_date AND organizationunittranslation.effective_end_date )
     AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslation.language
     AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id (+)
     AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id (+)
     AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code (+)
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationinformationpeo.effective_start_date AND organizationinformationpeo.effective_end_date )
     AND projectbasepeo.project_type_id = pptt.project_type_id (+)
     AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = pptt.language (+)
     AND organizationinformationpeo.org_information3 = ledger.ledger_id
     AND contractheaderpeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id (+)
     AND invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id = projectbasepeo.project_id (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id (+)
     AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code (+)
     AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo3.person_id (+)
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo3.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo3.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND projectbasepeo.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id (+)
     AND ( organizationunittranslation.name IN (
         :p_business_unit
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_business_unit || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( projectunitdpeo.name IN (
         :p_project_unit
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_unit || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( projectowningorgdpeo.name IN (
         :p_project_org
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_org || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( ledger.name IN (
         :p_ledger
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_ledger || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( replace(projecttranslationpeo.name,'#','') IN (
         :p_project_name
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_name || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( personnamedpeo3.list_name IN (
         :p_project_manager
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_manager || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( xep.name IN (
         :p_legal_entity
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_legal_entity || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.created_by IN (
         :p_invoice_created_by
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_invoice_created_by || 'All'
     ) )
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date,invoiceheaderpeo
     .creation_date)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date,invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date) AND nvl(:p_to_date,invoiceheaderpeo
     .invoice_date)
 GROUP BY
     invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
     invoiceheaderpeo.created_by,
     personnamedpeo.display_name,
     invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date,
     contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
     ledger.name,
     contracttypepeo.name,
     projectbasepeo.project_id,
     projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
     projectbasepeo.segment1,
     projecttranslationpeo.name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
     personnamedpeo3.list_name,
     xep.name,
     organizationunittranslation.name,
     pptt.project_type,
     projectunitdpeo.name,
     projectowningorgdpeo.name,
     hca.account_name

title: Cost Accounting in Error
description: Human Capital Management Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT, FUN_NAMES_BUSINESS_UNITS_V, HR_ORGANIZATION_INFORMATION_F; includes SLA accounting entries, GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/******************************************************************   
Date        Developer         Version               Description    
05/jan/23     Dhwani/Pulkit Jain    V 1.0.1        Proejct Exception Cost Accounting In Error
 
*****************************************************************/WITH accounting_detail AS (
    SELECT
        /*+ qb_name(SubledgerJournalDistributionPVO) */
        /*+ PARALLEL(8) */
        lookuppeo.meaning,
        xladistlink.source_distribution_id_num_1,
        xladistlink.source_distribution_id_num_2
    FROM
        xla_distribution_links  xladistlink,
        xla_ae_lines            xlalines,
        xla_ae_headers          xlahdr,
        xla_lookups             lookuppeo,
        pjc_cost_dist_lines_all projectcostdistributionpeo,
        pjc_exp_items_all       expenditureitempeo
    WHERE
            xladistlink.ae_header_id = xlalines.ae_header_id
        AND xladistlink.ae_line_num = xlalines.ae_line_num
        AND xladistlink.application_id = xlalines.application_id
        AND xlalines.ae_header_id = xlahdr.ae_header_id
        AND xlalines.code_combination_id <> - 1
        AND xlahdr.accounting_entry_status_code = lookuppeo.lookup_code
        AND lookuppeo.lookup_type = 'XLA_ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_STATUS'
                -- this is we are using for accounting staus 
        AND xladistlink.application_id = '10036'
                -- this is project module application id
        AND projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id = expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_id
        AND projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id = xladistlink.source_distribution_id_num_1
        AND projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num = xladistlink.source_distribution_id_num_2
        AND ( expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_id IN ( :p_expenditure_item_id )
              OR 'All' IN ( :p_expenditure_item_id || 'All' ) )
        AND trunc(expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, trunc(expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date))
        AND nvl(:p_end_date, trunc(expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date))
    GROUP BY
        lookuppeo.meaning,
        xladistlink.source_distribution_id_num_1,
        xladistlink.source_distribution_id_num_2
)
SELECT
/*+ PARALLEL(8) */
    'Total'                                                dummy,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id         transaction_number,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.segment1                                project_number,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num,
    projecttranslationpeo.name                             project_name,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name                              project_org,
    projectbusinessunitpeo.bu_name                         business_unit,
    projectunitpeo.name                                    project_unit,
    xep.name                                               project_legal_entity_name,
    expenditureitempeo.expenditure_type_id,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.denom_burdened_cost,
    expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date,
    ( projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id
      || ' - '
      || projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num )               distribution_id,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.quantity,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.acct_source_code,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.acct_event_id,
    transactiondocumentpeo.document_name,
    transactiondocumentpeo.import_cost_acc_flag,
    transactiondocumentpeo.allow_burden_flag,
    transactionsourcepeo.user_transaction_source,
    expenditureitempeo.expenditure_comment                 expenditure_comment,
    expendituretype.expenditure_type_name,
    ppnf.display_name                                      project_manager_name,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_period_name        fiscal_period_name,
    to_char(expenditureitempeo.orig_transaction_reference) orig_transaction_reference,
    CASE
        WHEN trunc(sysdate) - trunc(projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date) BETWEEN 0 AND 5    THEN
            '1) Between 0 to 5 Days'
        WHEN trunc(sysdate) - trunc(projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date) BETWEEN 5 AND 10   THEN
            '2) Between 5 to 10 Days'
        WHEN trunc(sysdate) - trunc(projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date) BETWEEN 10 AND 30  THEN
            '3) Between 10 to 30 Days'
        WHEN trunc(sysdate) - trunc(projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date) BETWEEN 30 AND 90  THEN
            '4) Between 30 to 90 Days'
        WHEN trunc(sysdate) - trunc(projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date) BETWEEN 90 AND 365 THEN
            '5) Between 90 to 365 Days'
        ELSE
            '6) More than 365 Days'
    END                                                    AS bucket,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            ad.meaning
        FROM
            accounting_detail ad
        WHERE
                projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id = ad.source_distribution_id_num_1
            AND projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num = ad.source_distribution_id_num_2
    ), 'UnAccounted')                                      AS accounting_status
FROM
    pjc_cost_dist_lines_all       projectcostdistributionpeo,
    pjc_exp_items_all             expenditureitempeo,
    pjf_txn_document_vl           transactiondocumentpeo,
    pjf_txn_sources_vl            transactionsourcepeo,
    hr_organization_information_f expenditurebupeo,
    pjf_projects_all_b            projectbasepeo,
    pjf_projects_all_tl           projecttranslationpeo,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl       projectstatuspeo,
    hr_organization_v             projectowningorgdpeo,
    fun_names_business_units_v    projectbusinessunitpeo,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl    projectunitpeo,
    pjf_exp_types_vl              expendituretype,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v    project_managet_project,
    xle_entity_profiles           xep,
    per_person_names_f            ppnf
WHERE
    ( projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id = expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_id
      AND transactiondocumentpeo.import_cost_acc_flag = 'N'
         -- To remove the Migrated transaction we are using the Import cost accounting Flag N
      AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            accounting_detail ad
        WHERE
                projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id = ad.source_distribution_id_num_1
            AND projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num = ad.source_distribution_id_num_2
            AND ad.meaning = 'Final'
                        -- In this we only want to get the final accounting result 
    )
         --Nt exists we using to fetch onlt not accounted and pending accounted transaction
      AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
      AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
      AND project_managet_project.resource_source_id = ppnf.person_id
      AND expenditureitempeo.document_id = transactiondocumentpeo.document_id
      AND expenditureitempeo.transaction_source_id = transactionsourcepeo.transaction_source_id
      AND projectcostdistributionpeo.org_id = expenditurebupeo.organization_id
      AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = expenditurebupeo.org_information_context
         --we only want to fetch Business unit where org_information_context is business Unit
      AND ( sysdate BETWEEN expenditurebupeo.effective_start_date AND expenditurebupeo.effective_end_date ) )
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projectcostdistributionpeo.project_id
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language
    AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id
    AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code
       --we only want to fetch Business unit where org_information_context is Proejct ORg
    AND expenditureitempeo.expenditure_type_id = expendituretype.expenditure_type_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND projectbasepeo.org_id = projectbusinessunitpeo.bu_id
    AND ( sysdate BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date )
    AND projectbasepeo.project_unit_id = projectunitpeo.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(projectunitpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(projectunitpeo.effective_end_date)
    AND projectunitpeo.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND projectbasepeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code
    AND ( expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_id IN ( :p_expenditure_item_id )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_expenditure_item_id || 'All' ) )
    AND trunc(expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, trunc(expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date)) AND
    nvl(:p_end_date, trunc(expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_date))
    AND ( xep.name IN ( :p_legal_entity_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_legal_entity_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projectowningorgdpeo.name IN ( :p_project_org )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_org || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projectbusinessunitpeo.bu_name IN ( :p_project_business_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_business_unit || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projectunitpeo.name IN ( :p_project_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_unit || 'All' ) )
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN ( :p_project_manager )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_manager || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projectbasepeo.project_id IN ( :p_project_number )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_number || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projecttranslationpeo.name IN ( :p_project_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_name || 'All' ) )
ORDER BY
    expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_id,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num

title: Draft inovice not yet submitted
description: Accounts Receivable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT, GL_LEDGERS, HR_ORGANIZATION_INFORMATION_F; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/****************************************************************** New 
Date        Developer         Version               Description    
22/12/22     Nilesh Sapkal/Pulkit Jain        V 1.0.0            E02  Draft Invoice - Not Yet Submitted 
*****************************************************************/SELECT /*+ parallel(10) */
    'Total'                                                                                                              AS total,
    SUM(nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_billed_amt * nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_exchg_rate, 1), 0)) invoice_amount,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT_INVOICES&action=NONE&objKey=InvoiceId='
    || invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id                                                                                       AS prod_link,
    to_char(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || to_char(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'YY')                                                              creation_period,
    to_date(01
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy')                                                 invoice_month_creation_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
    invoiceheaderpeo.created_by                                                                                          draft_by_person,
    invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date                                                                                       draft_date,
    contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
    ledger.name                                                                                                          ledger_name,
    contracttypepeo.name                                                                                                 contract_type_name,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
    projectbasepeo.segment1                                                                                              project_number,
    projecttranslationpeo.name                                                                                           project_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_code                                                                                 project_status_code,
    personnamedpeo3.list_name                                                                                            project_manajor_name,
    xep.name                                                                                                             legal_entity_name,
    trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date)                                                               AS draft_days,
    CASE
        WHEN ( trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) BETWEEN 0 AND 5    THEN
            '1) Between 0 to 5 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) BETWEEN 5 AND 10   THEN
            '2) Between 5 to 10 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) BETWEEN 10 AND 30  THEN
            '3) Between 10 to 30 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) BETWEEN 30 AND 90  THEN
            '4)Between 30 to 90 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) BETWEEN 90 AND 365 THEN
            '5)Between 90 to 365 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(sysdate) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) > 365              THEN
            '6) More than 365 Days'
    END                                                                                                                  AS bucket,
    organizationunittranslation.name                                                                                     business_unit,
    pptt.project_type                                                                                                    project_type,
    projectunitdpeo.name                                                                                                 project_unit,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name                                                                                            project_org,
    hca.account_name                                                                                                     customer_name
FROM
    pjb_inv_line_dists            invoicedistributionpeo,
    pjb_invoice_headers           invoiceheaderpeo,
    okc_k_headers_vl              contractheaderpeo,
    hr_organization_information_f organizationinformationpeo,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl    organizationunittranslation,
    gl_ledgers                    ledger,
    okc_contract_types_vl         contracttypepeo,
    pjf_projects_all_b            projectbasepeo,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v    latesprojectmanagerpeo,
    pjf_projects_all_tl           projecttranslationpeo,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl       projectstatuspeo,
    per_person_names_f_v          personnamedpeo3,
    pjf_project_types_tl          pptt,
    hr_organization_v             projectowningorgdpeo,
    hr_organization_v             projectunitdpeo,
    hz_cust_accounts              hca,
    xle_entity_profiles           xep
WHERE
        invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code = 'DRAFT'
    AND projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code <> 'CLOSED'
    AND contractheaderpeo.sts_code <> 'CLOSED'
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id = invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_id (+)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id = contractheaderpeo.id
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.major_version = contractheaderpeo.major_version
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.org_id = organizationinformationpeo.organization_id
    AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = organizationinformationpeo.org_information_context
    AND organizationinformationpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslation.organization_id
    AND ( sysdate BETWEEN organizationunittranslation.effective_start_date AND organizationunittranslation.effective_end_date )
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslation.language
    AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id (+)
    AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id (+)
    AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code (+)
    AND ( sysdate BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND ( sysdate BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND ( sysdate BETWEEN organizationinformationpeo.effective_start_date AND organizationinformationpeo.effective_end_date )
    AND projectbasepeo.project_type_id = pptt.project_type_id (+)
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = pptt.language (+)
    AND organizationinformationpeo.org_information3 = ledger.ledger_id
    AND contractheaderpeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id (+)
    AND invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id = projectbasepeo.project_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id (+)
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code (+)
    AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo3.person_id (+)
    AND ( sysdate BETWEEN personnamedpeo3.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo3.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND projectbasepeo.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id (+)
    AND ( organizationunittranslation.name IN ( :p_business_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_business_unit || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projectunitdpeo.name IN ( :p_project_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_unit || 'All' ) )
    AND ( projectowningorgdpeo.name IN ( :p_project_org )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_org || 'All' ) )
    AND ( ledger.name IN ( :p_ledger )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger || 'All' ) )
    AND ( replace(projecttranslationpeo.name, '#', '') IN ( :p_project_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( personnamedpeo3.list_name IN ( :p_project_manager )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_manager || 'All' ) )
    AND ( xep.name IN ( :p_legal_entity )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_legal_entity || 'All' ) )
    AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.created_by IN ( :p_invoice_created_by )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_invoice_created_by || 'All' ) )
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, invoiceheaderpeo.
    creation_date)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date) AND nvl(:p_to_date, invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date)
GROUP BY
    invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
    invoiceheaderpeo.created_by,
    invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date,
    contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
    ledger.name,
    contracttypepeo.name,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
    projectbasepeo.segment1,
    projecttranslationpeo.name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
    personnamedpeo3.list_name,
    xep.name,
    organizationunittranslation.name,
    pptt.project_type,
    projectunitdpeo.name,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name,
    hca.account_name

title: Project Having Budget but not baselined
description: Human Capital Management Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_NAMES_BUSINESS_UNITS_V, PER_PERSON_NAMES_F, PJF_LATESTPROJECTMANAGER_V; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
s/********************************************************************************************   
Last Modified Date		Developer		      Description    
10/01/2023     	        Pulkit Jain    Project Having Budget pending adjustments
**********************************************************************************************/SELECT
    'Total'                                                  dummy,
    ppab.project_id,
    ppat.name                                                project_name,
    ppab.segment1                                            project_number,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name                     project_status,
    xep.name                                                 project_legal_entity_name,
    project_owning_org.name                                  project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                                             project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                                             project_unit,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    )                                                        project_manager_name,
    to_char(ppab.creation_date, 'MM-dd-yyyy')                project_creation_date,
    to_date(01
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy') project_month_creation_date,
    ppab.created_by                                          project_created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT&action=NONE&objKey=ProjectId='
    || ppab.project_id                                       prod_link,
    projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code              project_system_status_code
FROM
    pjf_projects_all_b         ppab,
    pjf_projects_all_tl        ppat,
    xle_entity_profiles        xep,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl houftpu,
    fun_names_business_units_v fnbu,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v project_managet_project,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl    projectstatuspeo
WHERE
        1 = 1
--base conditions
    ----budget not baselined
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            pjo_plan_lines      planlinepeo,
            pjo_plan_versions_b planversionbasepeo
        WHERE
                planlinepeo.plan_version_id = planversionbasepeo.plan_version_id
            AND planversionbasepeo.project_id = ppab.project_id
            --AND planversionbasepeo.current_plan_status_flag = 'Y'
            AND planversionbasepeo.plan_status_code = 'B'
         --   AND planversionbasepeo.planned_for_code = 'COST'
    )
    ---have budget
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            pjo_plan_lines      planlinepeo,
            pjo_plan_versions_b planversionbasepeo
        WHERE
                planlinepeo.plan_version_id = planversionbasepeo.plan_version_id
            AND planversionbasepeo.project_id = ppab.project_id
            --AND planversionbasepeo.current_plan_status_flag = 'Y'
            AND planversionbasepeo.plan_class_code = 'BUDGET'
         --   AND planversionbasepeo.planned_for_code = 'COST'
    )
    ---active project in system
    AND projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code = 'ACTIVE'
---required joins----
    --project name
    AND ppab.project_id = ppat.project_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = ppat.language
    ---legal entity
    AND ppab.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    --project org
    AND ppab.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
    --project unit
    AND ppab.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')
    ---business unit
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppab.org_id
    --project manager
    AND ppab.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    --project status
    AND ppab.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code
---parameters-----
    ---legal entity
    AND ( xep.name IN ( :p_legal_entity_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_legal_entity_name || 'All' ) )
    --project org
    AND ( project_owning_org.name IN ( :p_project_org )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_org || 'All' ) )
    --business unit
    AND ( fnbu.bu_name IN ( :p_project_business_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_business_unit || 'All' ) )
    --project unit
    AND ( houftpu.name IN ( :p_project_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_unit || 'All' ) )
    --project manager
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN ( :p_project_manager )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_manager || 'All' ) )
    --project number using id
    AND ( ppab.project_id IN ( :p_project_number )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_number || 'All' ) )
    --project name handling project name containing # 
    AND ( replace(ppat.name, '#', '') IN ( :p_project_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_name || 'All' ) )
    --project status
    AND ( projectstatuspeo.project_status_name IN ( :p_project_status )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_status || 'All' ) )
    --project creation date
    AND ppab.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, ppab.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, ppab.creation_date)

title: Project Having no Budget
description: Human Capital Management Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_NAMES_BUSINESS_UNITS_V, PER_PERSON_NAMES_F, PJF_LATESTPROJECTMANAGER_V; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/********************************************************************************************   
Last Modified Date		Developer	   modified by		        Description    
10/01/2023     			Pulkit Jain       Khadija Nadiadi     Active Project Having no budget
**********************************************************************************************/SELECT
    'Total' AS dummy,  ---for count of projects
    ppab.project_id,
    ppat.name                                                AS project_name,
    ppab.segment1                                            AS project_number,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name                     AS project_status,
    xep.name                                                 AS project_legal_entity_name,
    project_owning_org.name                                  AS project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                                             AS project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                                             AS project_unit,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    )                                                        AS project_manager_name,
    to_char(ppab.creation_date, 'MM-dd-yyyy')                AS project_creation_date,
    to_date(01
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy') project_month_creation_date,
    ppab.created_by                                          AS project_created_by,
    'https://'
    || (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT&action=NONE&objKey=ProjectId='
    || ppab.project_id                                       AS prod_link,
    projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code              AS project_system_status_code
FROM
    pjf_projects_all_b         ppab,
    pjf_projects_all_tl        ppat,
    xle_entity_profiles        xep,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl houftpu,
    fun_names_business_units_v fnbu,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v project_managet_project,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl    projectstatuspeo
WHERE
        1 = 1
------basic conditions-------	
	----no budget
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT
            1
        FROM
            pjo_plan_lines      planlinepeo,
            pjo_plan_versions_b planversionbasepeo
        WHERE
                planlinepeo.plan_version_id = planversionbasepeo.plan_version_id
            AND planversionbasepeo.project_id = ppab.project_id
            AND planversionbasepeo.plan_class_code = 'BUDGET'
    )
    ---Active project in system
    AND projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code = 'ACTIVE' 
	
-----Required joins and conditions-------
	 --Project Name
    AND ppab.project_id = ppat.project_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = ppat.language
	--legal entity name
    AND ppab.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id 
	--project owning org name
    AND ppab.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
	---project unit
    AND ppab.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')	
	---business unit
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppab.org_id 
    ---Project manager
    AND ppab.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
	--Project system status
    AND ppab.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code
	
-------Parameters---------
	--legal entity
    AND ( xep.name IN ( :p_legal_entity_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_legal_entity_name || 'All' ) )
	---project org
    AND ( project_owning_org.name IN ( :p_project_org )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_org || 'All' ) )
	--business unit
    AND ( fnbu.bu_name IN ( :p_project_business_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_business_unit || 'All' ) )
	---project unit
    AND ( houftpu.name IN ( :p_project_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_unit || 'All' ) )
	---manager name
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN ( :p_project_manager )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_manager || 'All' ) )
	---project number on base of project id
    AND ( ppab.project_id IN ( :p_project_number )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_number || 'All' ) )
	--project name along with handling project name containing #
    AND ( replace(ppat.name, '#', '') IN ( :p_project_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_name || 'All' ) )
    AND
	----Project status
     ( projectstatuspeo.project_status_name IN ( :p_project_status )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_status || 'All' ) )
    ---Project creation date
    AND ppab.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, ppab.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, ppab.creation_date)

title: Project Having Pending Adjustments Data Model
description: General Ledger Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_NAMES_BUSINESS_UNITS_V, GL_LEDGERS, PER_PERSON_NAMES_F; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/********************************************************************************************   
Last Modified Date		Developer	  	Modified By 		        Description    
11/01/2023     			Pulkit Jain    Khadija Nadiadi  Project Having pending adjustmnets
**********************************************************************************************/SELECT
    'Total' AS total,
    peia.project_id,
    TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') adj_creation_date,
    ( TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
      || (
        CASE
            WHEN peiaa.expenditure_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                '-'
            ELSE
                NULL
        END
    )
      || TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'YY') ) adj_creation_date_month,
    peiaa.created_by                    adj_created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup1.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup1
        WHERE
            lkup1.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE'
            AND lkup1.lookup_code = peiaa.adjustment_type
    ) adjustment_type,
    peiaa.expenditure_item_id                         adj_id,
    lkup2.meaning                       adjustment_status,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup3.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup3
        WHERE
            lkup3.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJ_SOURCE'
            AND lkup3.lookup_code = peiaa.module_code
    ) adjustment_source,
    TO_CHAR(peia.creation_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') creation_date,
    peia.expenditure_item_id            transaction_id,
    peia.created_by,
    peia.expenditure_item_id            transaction_number,
    ppav.name                           project_name,
    ppav.segment1                       project_number,
    petv.expenditure_type_name,
    peia.denom_raw_cost                 raw_cost_in_transaction_currency,
    peia.projfunc_raw_cost              raw_cost_in_project_currency,
    TO_CHAR(peia.expenditure_item_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') expenditure_item_date,
    peia.quantity                       quantity,
    peia.unit_of_measure,
    peia.billable_flag                  billable,
    peia.capitalizable_flag             capitalizable,
    peia.user_batch_name                user_expenditure_batch_name,
    project_owning_org.name             project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                        project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                        project_unit,
    ptsb.user_transaction_source        transaction_source,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup1.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup1
        WHERE
            lkup1.lookup_type = 'PJC_CMT_PROCESSING_STATUS'
            AND lkup1.lookup_code = peia.invoiced_flag
    ) invoice_status,
    peia.bill_hold_flag                 hold_invoice,
    peia.project_currency_code          project_currency,
    peia.denom_currency_code            transaction_currency,
    xep.name                            project_legal_entity_name,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) AS project_manager_name,
    ppsv.project_status_name            project_status,
