    gl.name                             ledger_name,
    ptsb.transaction_source_id          transaction_source_number,
    (
        SELECT
            peiain.denom_raw_cost
        FROM
            pjc_exp_items_all peiain
        WHERE
            peiaa.expenditure_item_id = peiain.expenditure_item_id
    ) AS adj_amount_transaction_currency,
    gl.currency_code                    ledger_currency,
    (
        SELECT
            peiain.denom_raw_cost * nvl(peiain.acct_exchange_rate, 1)
        FROM
            pjc_exp_items_all peiain
        WHERE
            peiaa.expenditure_item_id = peiain.expenditure_item_id
    ) adj_amount,
    peia.transferred_from_exp_item_id   transferred_from_transaction_number,
    peia.adjusted_expenditure_item_id   adjusting_item,
    ppsv.project_system_status_code
FROM
    pjc_exp_items_all            peia,
    pjc_expend_item_adj_acts     peiaa,
    pjf_projects_all_vl          ppav,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl      ppsv,
    pjf_exp_types_vl             petv,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   houftpu,
    xle_entity_profiles          xep,
    pjf_txn_sources_vl           ptsb,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v   project_managet_project,
    fun_names_business_units_v   fnbu,
    gl_ledgers                   gl,
   pjc_lookups                  lkup2
WHERE
	
    lkup2.lookup_code = peiaa.status
    AND lkup2.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJUST_HISTORY_REC_STATUS'
    AND lkup2.meaning IN ( 'Approval Error', 'Approval Rejected', 'Approval Expired', 'Pending', 'Pending Approve' )
    ---base join for adjustment and project
    AND peia.expenditure_item_id = peiaa.expenditure_item_id
    ---project system status
    AND ppav.project_status_code = ppsv.project_status_code
    ---project name
    AND peia.project_id = ppav.project_id
    --expenditure type
    AND peia.expenditure_type_id = petv.expenditure_type_id
    ---project owning org
    AND ppav.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
    --project unit
    AND peia.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')
    --transaction source--
    AND ptsb.transaction_source_id = peia.transaction_source_id
    --legal entity
    AND ppav.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND ppav.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    ---business unit
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppav.org_id
    --ledgner name and currency
    AND fnbu.primary_ledger_id = gl.ledger_id

----parameters---
    ----project org
    AND ( project_owning_org.name IN (
        :p_project_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_org || 'All'
    ) )
    --business unit
    AND ( fnbu.bu_name IN (
        :p_project_business_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_business_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    ---project status
    AND ( ppav.project_status_code IN (
        :p_project_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_status || 'All'
    ) )
    --project manager
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN (
        :p_project_manager
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_manager || 'All'
    ) )
    ---adj creation date
    AND ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_end_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date
    )) )
    ---transaction source
    AND ( ptsb.transaction_source_id IN (
        :p_transaction_source
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_transaction_source || 'All'
    ) )
    --project number
    AND ( ppav.project_id IN (
        :p_project_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_number || 'All'
    ) )
    --project name
    AND ( replace(ppav.name, '#', '') IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )

title: Project Not used in N months
description: General Ledger Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_NAMES_BUSINESS_UNITS_V, GL_LEDGERS, PER_PERSON_NAMES_F; includes GL account combinations. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/******************************************************************   
Date        Developer         Version               Description    
08/12/22     Dhwani Bhatt/Pulkit Jain        V 1.0.0              Project Not used in last N months 
*****************************************************************/WITH last_creation_info AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        project_id
    FROM
        (
            SELECT
                transaction_project_id AS project_id,
                MAX(creation_date)     creation_date
            FROM
                pjb_inv_line_dists
            GROUP BY
                transaction_project_id
            UNION ALL
            SELECT
                project_id,
                MAX(creation_date) creation_date
            FROM
                pjc_cost_dist_lines_all
            GROUP BY
                project_id
            UNION ALL
            SELECT
                transaction_project_id AS project_id,
                MAX(creation_date)     creation_date
            FROM
                pjb_rev_distributions prd
            GROUP BY
                transaction_project_id
        )
    GROUP BY
        project_id
)
SELECT
    'Total'                                                                          AS dummy,
    ppab.project_id,
    ppat.name                                                                        AS project_name,
    ppab.segment1                                                                    AS project_number,
    to_char(lci.creation_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY')                                         AS last_used_date,
    to_date(01
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(nvl(lci.creation_date, ppab.creation_date)), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(nvl(lci.creation_date, ppab.creation_date)), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy') project_month_last_used_date,
    nvl(to_char((lci.creation_date), 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'Never Used')                    AS last_transacted_by,
    CASE
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 0 AND 180   THEN
            '1) Between 0 to 180 Days'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 181 AND 360 THEN
            '2) Between 181 to 360 Days'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 361 AND 720 THEN
            '3) Between 1 to 2 Years'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) >= 720              THEN
            '4) More than 2 Years'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) IS NULL THEN
            '5) Never Transacted'
    END                                                                              AS bucket,
    ppab.project_status_code                                                         project_status,
    xep.name                                                                         project_legal_entity_name,
    project_owning_org.name                                                          project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                                                                     AS project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                                                                     project_unit,
    pptv.project_type,
    gl.name                                                                          ledger_name,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    )                                                                                AS project_manager_name,
    ppab.creation_date                                                               AS project_creation_date,
    to_date(01
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy')                         project_month_creation_date,
    ppab.created_by                                                                  AS project_created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT&action=NONE&objKey=ProjectId='
    || ppab.project_id                                                               AS prod_link
FROM
    pjf_projects_all_b         ppab,
    pjf_projects_all_tl        ppat,
    pjf_project_types_vl       pptv,
    last_creation_info         lci,
    xle_entity_profiles        xep,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl houftpu,
    fun_names_business_units_v fnbu,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v project_managet_project,
    gl_ledgers                 gl
WHERE
        1 = 1
    AND ppab.project_id = ppat.project_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = ppat.language
    AND ppab.project_type_id = pptv.project_type_id
    AND ppab.project_status_code = 'ACTIVE'
    AND ppab.project_id = lci.project_id (+)
    AND nvl(lci.creation_date, TO_DATE('01-01-1900', 'DD-MM-YYYY')) < add_months(sysdate, - nvl(:p_month, 6))
    AND ppab.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND ppab.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND ppab.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppab.org_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND ppab.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    AND fnbu.primary_ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
    AND ( xep.name IN ( :p_legal_entity_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_legal_entity_name || 'All' ) )
    AND ( project_owning_org.name IN ( :p_project_org )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_org || 'All' ) )
    AND ( fnbu.bu_name IN ( :p_project_business_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_business_unit || 'All' ) )
    AND ( houftpu.name IN ( :p_project_unit )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_unit || 'All' ) )
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN ( :p_project_manager )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_manager || 'All' ) )
    AND ( ppab.project_id IN ( :p_project_number )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_number || 'All' ) )
    AND ( replace(ppat.name, '#', '') IN ( :p_project_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_project_name || 'All' ) )

title: Release Invoice Not Yet Accepted
description: Accounts Receivable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT, GL_LEDGERS, HR_ORGANIZATION_INFORMATION_F; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/****************************************************************** 
Date        Developer         Version               Description    
30/12/22     Nilesh Sapkal/Pulkit Jain        V 1.0.0          E07   Release Invoice - Not Yet Accepted 
*****************************************************************/SELECT /*+ parallel(10) */
    'Total' AS total,
    SUM(nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_billed_amt * nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_exchg_rate, 1),0) ) AS invoice_amount,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT_INVOICES&action=NONE&objKey=InvoiceId='
    || invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id AS prod_link,
    TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'YY') creation_period,
    TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date), 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date), 'YY') released_period,
    TO_DATE(01
            || '-'
            || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy') invoice_month_creation_date,
    TO_DATE(01
            || '-'
            || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date), 'MM')
            || '-'
            || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date), 'YY'), 'DD-mm-yy') invoice_month_released_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.released_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
    personnamedpeo1.display_name       released_by_person,
    invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date     draft_date,
    contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
    ledger.name                        ledger_name,
    contracttypepeo.name               contract_type_name,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
    projectbasepeo.segment1            project_number,
    projecttranslationpeo.name         project_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
    personnamedpeo3.list_name          project_manajor_name,
    xep.name                           legal_entity_name,
    trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) AS released_days,
    CASE
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) ) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN
            '1) Between 0 to 5 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) ) BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN
            '2) Between 5 to 10 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) ) BETWEEN 10 AND 30 THEN
            '3) Between 10 to 30 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) ) BETWEEN 30 AND 90 THEN
            '4)Between 30 to 90 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) ) BETWEEN 90 AND 365 THEN
            '5)Between 90 to 365 Days'
        WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) ) > 365        THEN
            '6) More than 365 Days'
    END bucket,
    organizationunittranslation.name   business_unit,
    pptt.project_type                  project_type,
    projectunitdpeo.name               project_unit,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name          project_org,
    hca.account_name                   customer_name
FROM
    pjb_inv_line_dists              invoicedistributionpeo,
    pjb_invoice_headers             invoiceheaderpeo,
    okc_k_headers_vl                contractheaderpeo,
    per_person_names_f_v            personnamedpeo1,
    hr_organization_information_f   organizationinformationpeo,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl      organizationunittranslation,
    gl_ledgers                      ledger,
    okc_contract_types_vl           contracttypepeo,
    pjf_projects_all_b              projectbasepeo,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v      latesprojectmanagerpeo,
    pjf_projects_all_tl             projecttranslationpeo,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl         projectstatuspeo,
    per_person_names_f_v            personnamedpeo3,
    pjf_project_types_tl            pptt,
    hr_organization_v               projectowningorgdpeo,
    hr_organization_v               projectunitdpeo,
    hz_cust_accounts                hca,
    xle_entity_profiles             xep
WHERE
    invoiceheaderpeo.accepted_date IS NULL
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code = 'RELEASED'
    AND projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code (+) <> 'CLOSED'
    AND contractheaderpeo.sts_code <> 'CLOSED'
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id = invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_id (+)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id = contractheaderpeo.id
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.major_version = contractheaderpeo.major_version
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.released_by_person_id = personnamedpeo1.person_id (+)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.org_id = organizationinformationpeo.organization_id
    AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = organizationinformationpeo.org_information_context
    AND organizationinformationpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslation.organization_id
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslation.effective_start_date AND organizationunittranslation.effective_end_date )
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslation.language
    AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id (+)
    AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id (+)
    AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code (+)
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo1.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo1.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationinformationpeo.effective_start_date AND organizationinformationpeo.effective_end_date )
    AND projectbasepeo.project_type_id = pptt.project_type_id (+)
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = pptt.language (+)
    AND organizationinformationpeo.org_information3 = ledger.ledger_id
    AND contractheaderpeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id (+)
    AND invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id = projectbasepeo.project_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id (+)
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code (+)
    AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo3.person_id (+)
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo3.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo3.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND projectbasepeo.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id (+)
    AND ( organizationunittranslation.name IN (
        :p_business_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_business_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectunitdpeo.name IN (
        :p_project_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectowningorgdpeo.name IN (
        :p_project_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ledger.name IN (
        :p_ledger
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( replace(projecttranslationpeo.name, '#', '') IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( personnamedpeo3.list_name IN (
        :p_project_manager
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_manager || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( xep.name IN (
        :p_legal_entity
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_legal_entity || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.created_by IN (
        :p_invoice_created_by
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_invoice_created_by || 'All'
    ) )
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, invoiceheaderpeo
    .creation_date)
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date) AND nvl(:p_to_date, invoiceheaderpeo
    .invoice_date)
GROUP BY
    invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.released_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
    invoiceheaderpeo.created_by,
    personnamedpeo1.display_name,
    invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date,
    contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
    ledger.name,
    contracttypepeo.name,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
    projectbasepeo.segment1,
    projecttranslationpeo.name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
    personnamedpeo3.list_name,
    xep.name,
    organizationunittranslation.name,
    pptt.project_type,
    projectunitdpeo.name,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name,
    hca.account_name

title: Submitted Invoice Not Yet Approved
description: Accounts Receivable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT, GL_LEDGERS, HR_ORGANIZATION_INFORMATION_F; includes GL account combinations, date range parameters. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/******************************************************************  New 
Date        Developer         Version               Description    
29/12/22     Nilesh Sapkal/Pulkit Jain        V 1.0.0             E05 Submitted Invoice - Not Yet Approved 
*****************************************************************/SELECT /*+ parallel(10) */
     'Total' AS total,
     SUM(nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_billed_amt * nvl(invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_curr_exchg_rate,1),0) ) invoice_amount
    ,
     (
         SELECT
             external_virtual_host   pod_url
         FROM
             ask_deployed_domains
         WHERE
             deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
     )
     || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT_INVOICES&action=NONE&objKey=InvoiceId='
     || invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id AS prod_link,
     TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'Mon','NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
     || '-'
     || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'YY') creation_period,
     TO_CHAR(trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ),'Mon','NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
     || '-'
     || TO_CHAR(trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ),'YY') submission_period,
     TO_DATE(01
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'MM')
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date),'YY'),'DD-mm-yy') invoice_month_creation_date,
     TO_DATE(01
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date),'MM')
               || '-'
               || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date),'YY'),'DD-mm-yy') invoice_month_submission_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
     invoiceheaderpeo.created_by,
     nvl(personnamedpeo2.display_name,invoiceheaderpeo.created_by) submitted_by_person,
     invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date,
     nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) submitted_creation_date,
     contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
     ledger.name                        ledger_name,
     contracttypepeo.name               contract_type_name,
     projectbasepeo.project_id,
     projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
     projectbasepeo.segment1            project_number,
     projecttranslationpeo.name         project_name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
     personnamedpeo3.list_name          project_manajor_name,
     xep.name                           legal_entity_name,
     trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) AS submitted_days,
     CASE
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) ) BETWEEN 0 AND 5 THEN
         '1) Between 0 to 5 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) ) BETWEEN 5 AND 10 THEN
         '2) Between 5 to 10 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) ) BETWEEN 10 AND 30 THEN
         '3) Between 10 to 30 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) ) BETWEEN 30 AND 90 THEN
         '4)Between 30 to 90 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) ) BETWEEN 90 AND 365 THEN
         '5)Between 90 to 365 Days'
         WHEN ( trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) ) ) > 365       THEN '6) More than 365 Days'
     END bucket,
     organizationunittranslation.name   business_unit,
     pptt.project_type                  project_type,
     projectunitdpeo.name               project_unit,
     projectowningorgdpeo.name          project_org,
     hca.account_name                   customer_name
 FROM
     pjb_inv_line_dists invoicedistributionpeo,
     pjb_invoice_headers invoiceheaderpeo,
     okc_k_headers_vl contractheaderpeo,
     per_person_names_f_v personnamedpeo2,
     hr_organization_information_f organizationinformationpeo,
     hr_organization_units_f_tl organizationunittranslation,
     gl_ledgers ledger,
     okc_contract_types_vl contracttypepeo,
     pjf_projects_all_b projectbasepeo,
     pjf_latestprojectmanager_v latesprojectmanagerpeo,
     pjf_projects_all_tl projecttranslationpeo,
     pjf_project_statuses_vl projectstatuspeo,
     per_person_names_f_v personnamedpeo3,
     pjf_project_types_tl pptt,
     hr_organization_v projectowningorgdpeo,
     hr_organization_v projectunitdpeo,
     hz_cust_accounts hca,
     xle_entity_profiles xep
 WHERE
     invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date IS NULL
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code = 'SUBMITTED'
     AND projectstatuspeo.project_system_status_code <> 'CLOSED'
     AND contractheaderpeo.sts_code <> 'CLOSED'
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id = invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_id (+)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id = contractheaderpeo.id
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.major_version = contractheaderpeo.major_version
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_by_person_id = personnamedpeo2.person_id (+)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.org_id = organizationinformationpeo.organization_id
     AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = organizationinformationpeo.org_information_context
     AND organizationinformationpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslation.organization_id
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslation.effective_start_date AND organizationunittranslation.effective_end_date )
     AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslation.language
     AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id (+)
     AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id (+)
     AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code (+)
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo2.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo2.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationinformationpeo.effective_start_date AND organizationinformationpeo.effective_end_date )
     AND projectbasepeo.project_type_id = pptt.project_type_id (+)
     AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = pptt.language (+)
     AND organizationinformationpeo.org_information3 = ledger.ledger_id
     AND contractheaderpeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id (+)
     AND invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id = projectbasepeo.project_id (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id (+)
     AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language (+)
     AND projectbasepeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code (+)
     AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo3.person_id (+)
     AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo3.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo3.effective_end_date (+) )
     AND projectbasepeo.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id (+)
     AND ( organizationunittranslation.name IN (
         :p_business_unit
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_business_unit || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( projectunitdpeo.name IN (
         :p_project_unit
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_unit || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( projectowningorgdpeo.name IN (
         :p_project_org
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_org || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( ledger.name IN (
         :p_ledger
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_ledger || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( replace(projecttranslationpeo.name,'#','') IN (
         :p_project_name
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_name || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( personnamedpeo3.list_name IN (
         :p_project_manager
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_project_manager || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( xep.name IN (
         :p_legal_entity
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_legal_entity || 'All'
     ) )
     AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.created_by IN (
         :p_invoice_created_by
     )
           OR 'All' IN (
         :p_invoice_created_by || 'All'
     ) )
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date,invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date,invoiceheaderpeo
     .creation_date)
     AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date,invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date) AND nvl(:p_to_date,invoiceheaderpeo
     .invoice_date)
 GROUP BY
     invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
     invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
     invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
     invoiceheaderpeo.created_by,
     personnamedpeo2.display_name,
     invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date,
     contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
     ledger.name,
     contracttypepeo.name,
     projectbasepeo.project_id,
     projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
     projectbasepeo.segment1,
     projecttranslationpeo.name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
     projectstatuspeo.project_status_code,
     personnamedpeo3.list_name,
     xep.name,
     organizationunittranslation.name,
     pptt.project_type,
     projectunitdpeo.name,
     projectowningorgdpeo.name,
     hca.account_name

title: E01
description: Accounts Receivable Oracle Fusion BIP report. Tables: AR_CASH_RECEIPTS, AR_CASH_RECEIPTS_ALL, AR_RECEIPT; includes date range parameters, org/BU parameter. Oracle (+) outer-join syntax for BIP/OTBI.
sql:
/* Formatted on 27-05-2020 10:36:10 (QP5 v5.149.1003.31008) */
/*********************************************************************
Date               Developer                  Version             Description   
03/03/2020    Pulkit Kumar Jain           1.0                   Duplicate Receipt
 *********************************************************************/SELECT
    (
        SELECT
            account_number
        FROM
            hz_cust_accounts
        WHERE
            cust_account_id = acra.pay_from_customer
    )                      account_number,
    (
        SELECT
            name
        FROM
            hr_organization_units
        WHERE
            organization_id = acra.org_id
    )                      AS bu_name,
    acra.receipt_date,
    acra.type,
    acra.status,
    acra.currency_code,
    acra.created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            name
        FROM
            gl_ledgers gl
        WHERE
            gl.ledger_id = acra.set_of_books_id
    )                      AS ledger_name,
    acra.amount,
    acra.creation_date,
    acra.cash_receipt_id,
    acra.receipt_number,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=AR_RECEIPT&action=EDIT&objKey=receiptNumber='
    || acra.receipt_number AS prod_link
FROM
    ar_cash_receipts acra
WHERE
        acra.status <> 'REV'
    AND ( acra.receipt_number IN (
        SELECT
            pp.receipt_number
        FROM
            ar_cash_receipts pp
        WHERE
                :p_status = 'Same Receipt Number'
            AND pp.status <> 'REV'
            AND ( pp.set_of_books_id IN ( :p_ledger )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger || 'All' ) )
            AND ( pp.org_id IN ( :p_org_id )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_org_id || 'All' ) )
            AND ( pp.pay_from_customer IN ( :p_cust_name )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_cust_name || 'All' ) )
            AND pp.receipt_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, pp.receipt_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, pp.receipt_date)
        GROUP BY
            pp.receipt_number
        HAVING
            COUNT(cash_receipt_id) > 1
    )
          OR acra.receipt_number
             || acra.pay_from_customer
             || acra.receipt_date
             || acra.amount IN (
        SELECT
            pp.receipt_number
            || pp.pay_from_customer
            || pp.receipt_date
            || pp.amount
        FROM
            ar_cash_receipts_all pp
        WHERE
                :p_status = 'Same Receipt Number, Amount, Date & Customer'
            AND pp.status <> 'REV'
            AND ( pp.set_of_books_id IN ( :p_ledger )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger || 'All' ) )
            AND ( pp.org_id IN ( :p_org_id )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_org_id || 'All' ) )
            AND ( pp.pay_from_customer IN ( :p_cust_name )
                  OR 'All' IN ( :p_cust_name || 'All' ) )
            AND pp.receipt_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, pp.receipt_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, pp.receipt_date)
        GROUP BY
            pp.receipt_number, pp.pay_from_customer, pp.receipt_date, pp.amount
        HAVING
            COUNT(cash_receipt_id) > 1
    ) )
    AND ( acra.set_of_books_id IN ( :p_ledger )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_ledger || 'All' ) )
    AND ( acra.org_id IN ( :p_org_id )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_org_id || 'All' ) )
    AND ( acra.pay_from_customer IN ( :p_cust_name )
          OR 'All' IN ( :p_cust_name || 'All' ) )
    AND acra.receipt_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, acra.receipt_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, acra.receipt_date)
    AND trunc(acra.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(acra.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(acra.creation_date))
ORDER BY
    acra.receipt_number,
    acra.amount,
    acra.receipt_date

title: How to create a dynamic instance URL for BIP reports, which will be generated dynamically based on i
description:
Please find the below SQL code for the Dynamic Instance link.
SELECT UPPER (
         SUBSTR (external_virtual_host,
                 1,
                 INSTR (external_virtual_host, '.') - 1))
sql:
SELECT UPPER (
         SUBSTR (external_virtual_host,
                 1,
                 INSTR (external_virtual_host, '.') - 1))
         pod_name,
      external_virtual_host pod_url,
      TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'MM-DD-YYYY') prt_generated_on,
      fnd_global.user_name prt_generated_by
 FROM ask_deployed_domains
WHERE deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
using this code we can find the instance name, instance type, and Instance URL.  
Please find the below example, where I have one report in the custom-> GL Report ( Report Name) folder. now I want to develop a dynamic link for this report.
SELECT
    'https://'
    || ( (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
         || '/analytics/saw.dll?bipublisherEntry&Action=open&itemType=.xdo&bipPath=%2FCustom%2FGL%20Report.xdo' ) AS dynamic_instance_link
FROM
    dual
The output of the SQL is : 
DYNAMIC_INSTANCE_LINK
https://XXXX.XX.us2.oraclecloud.com/analytics/saw.dll?bipublisherEntry&Action=open&itemType=.xdo&bipPath=%2FCustom%2FGL%20Report.xdo

title: How to add a deep link In OTBI Analysis?
description:
Open your OTBI Analysis
For example we want to add  deep link on invoice number
Then you need to add invoice number and invoice id in your analysis and also in your table/ view. Here we are using "Pay
sql:
select the column properties option.
Then go in the interaction tab ->go in the Value Section & In Primary Interaction section  select “Action Links” Option. 
Then click on Add Action Link “+” button  
Then enter action text in link text and click on “Action run button” & select “navigate to a web page” option.
Then you need to enter your 
URL
 and click on define parameters.
How to create URL?
Syntax:- Invoice Deep Link
“instance_link
/fscmui/faces/deeplink?objtype=@{1}&action=@{2}&objkey=
column_name
=@{3}
”
For example:-
https://e******s2.oraclecloud.com/fscmui/faces/deeplink?objtype=@{1}&action=@{2}&objkey=invoiceid=@{3}
In this, I need to use invoice id, but we want to add a deep link on invoice number then why I choose invoice id. Because in backend database work on invoice id, not on the invoice number.  So we need to select invoice id.
Then again one doubt occurs. But we can’t show invoice id in the front end, show we need to hide your invoice id field.
(It is necessary to add invoice id in your table/view, not in exclude)
And what is {1}, {2} and {3}
So these are parameters, your column id passing throws these parameters.
Then you need to click on add parameter button and create 3 parameter
In the 1
st
 parameter, you need to enter your “Ap_Viewinvoice”.
 In 2
nd
 enter “VIEW”.
 In 3
rd
 click on Menu Button and select column value option.
And choose invoice id (formula) from the list and also enable all fixed and hidden checkboxes. Then click on ok –> ok -> ok.
How to hide column from table?
Click on the edit table
Then click on invoice id setting
 Check (Enable) the hidden option.
Then click on OK 
Save the analysis.
After all the process I have one more doubt, 
How to create a dynamic deep link in OTBI?.

title: SQL query to find out the AP Invoice Basic Detail: Business Unit, Supplier, Supplier Site, Ledger, S
description:
SELECT
    aia.org_id,
    aia.created_by,
    aia.source,
    aia.creation_date,
    TO_DATE('01-'
            || TO_CHAR(aia.invoice_date, 'MM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
            || '-'
sql:
SELECT
    aia.org_id,
    aia.created_by,
    aia.source,
    aia.creation_date,
    TO_DATE('01-'
            || TO_CHAR(aia.invoice_date, 'MM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
            || '-'
            || TO_CHAR(aia.invoice_date, 'YY'), 'DD-MM-YY') month_date1,
    aia.invoice_amount * nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) AS invoice_ledger_amount,
    hou.name                       bu_name,
    gl.name                        ladger_name,
    nvl(psv.vendor_name, hp.party_name) supplier,
    nvl(pssv.vendor_site_code, sites.party_site_name) supplier_site,
    aia.vendor_site_id             supplier_site_id,
    aia.invoice_type_lookup_code   invoice_type,
    aia.invoice_id,
    apsa.due_date,
    aia.invoice_currency_code,
    (
        SELECT
            trm.name
        FROM
            ap_terms_tl trm
        WHERE
            trm.term_id = aia.terms_id
            AND trm.language = 'US'
    ) terms_name,
    aia.invoice_num                invoice_number,
    aia.invoice_amount,
    apsa.gross_amount,
    aia.invoice_date,
    ceil(SYSDATE - apsa.due_date) days_past_due,
    nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) exchange_rate,
    nvl(apsa.gross_amount, 0) * nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) amt_due_original,
    ( apsa.amount_remaining * nvl(exchange_rate, 1) ) c_amt_due_remaining,
    gl.currency_code               ledger_currency_code,
    ap_invoices_pkg.get_approval_status(aia.invoice_id, aia.invoice_amount, aia.payment_status_flag, aia.invoice_type_lookup_code
    ) inv_status,
    DECODE(aia.payment_status_flag, 'Y', 'Paid', 'N', 'Not Paid', 'P', 'Partially Paid') payment_status,
    aia.approval_status,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=AP_VIEWINVOICE&action=VIEW&objKey=InvoiceId='
    || aia.invoice_id AS prod_link
FROM
    ap_invoices                aia,
    ap_payment_schedules_all   apsa,
    hz_parties                 hp,
    hz_party_sites             sites,
    poz_suppliers_v            psv,
    poz_supplier_sites_v       pssv,
    hr_operating_units         hou,
    gl_ledgers                 gl,
    per_users                  pu
WHERE
    apsa.invoice_id (+) = aia.invoice_id
    AND hp.party_id (+) = aia.party_id
    AND psv.vendor_id (+) = aia.vendor_id
    AND pssv.vendor_site_id (+) = aia.vendor_site_id
    AND pssv.vendor_id (+) = aia.vendor_id
    AND hou.organization_id = aia.org_id
    AND sites.party_id (+) = hp.party_id
    AND aia.party_site_id = sites.party_site_id (+)
    AND nvl(aia.approval_status, 'aa') <> 'CANCELLED'

title: Oracle Fusion BIP Bursting Sample Script for FTP.
description:
SELECT 'TEST' AS "KEY",   -- Link between data model and bursting server
       'OUTPUT' TEMPLATE,   --- Report template name
       'ETEXT' TEMPLATE_FORMAT, -- Report template formate ('RTF',etc..)
sql:
SELECT 'TEST' AS "KEY",   -- Link between data model and bursting server
       'OUTPUT' TEMPLATE,   --- Report template name
       'ETEXT' TEMPLATE_FORMAT, -- Report template formate ('RTF',etc..)
       'text' OUTPUT_FORMAT, -- Report Output formate ('XML',Excel,PDF,etc...)
       'FTP' DEL_CHANNEL,
       (SELECT MEANING
          FROM FND_LOOKUPS
         WHERE upper(LOOKUP_TYPE) = 'BURSTING_CONFIG_LKP' -- This will different from each client
               AND upper(LOOKUP_CODE) = 'SERVER_NAME')
          PARAMETER1,  -- Client server name---
       (SELECT MEANING
          FROM FND_LOOKUPS
         WHERE upper(LOOKUP_TYPE) = 'BURSTING_CONFIG_LKP'
               AND upper(LOOKUP_CODE) = 'USER_NAME')
          PARAMETER2, -- Client server user name 
       (SELECT MEANING
          FROM FND_LOOKUPS
         WHERE upper(LOOKUP_TYPE) = 'BURSTING_CONFIG_LKP'
               AND upper(LOOKUP_CODE) = 'PASSWORD')
          PARAMETER3, -- Client server password
       '/OUT/PBCS-OUT-PY-PYMONITORING/OUTPUT/' PARAMETER4, --- Client Sever Path
       'Report Name'||'.CSV' PARAMETER5, -- Report output name
       'TRUE' PARAMETER6 -- Enable disable condition 
  FROM DUAL

title: Oracle Fusion Basic SQL Query for GLOBAL HR.
description:
SELECT PAPF.PERSON_NUMBER,
       (SELECT  (FTB.NLS_TERRITORY)
          FROM FND_TERRITORIES_B FTB
         WHERE FTB.TERRITORY_CODE = ADDR_M.COUNTRY)
          WORK_COUNTRY,
       NAME_G.TITLE g_ti
sql:
SELECT PAPF.PERSON_NUMBER,
       (SELECT  (FTB.NLS_TERRITORY)
          FROM FND_TERRITORIES_B FTB
         WHERE FTB.TERRITORY_CODE = ADDR_M.COUNTRY)
          WORK_COUNTRY,
       NAME_G.TITLE g_title,
       NAME_G.FIRST_NAME g_first_name,
       NAME_G.MIDDLE_NAMES g_middle_name,
       NAME_G.LAST_NAME g_last_name,
       NAME_G.PRE_NAME_ADJUNCT g_prefix,
       NAME_G.SUFFIX g_suffix,
       NAME_G.HONORS g_honors,
       NAME_G.PREVIOUS_LAST_NAME g_prev_name,
       NAME_G.KNOWN_AS g_known_as,
       NAME_AR.TITLE l_title,
       NAME_AR.FIRST_NAME l_firstname,
       NAME_AR.MIDDLE_NAMES l_middle_name,
       NAME_AR.LAST_NAME l_last_name,
       NAME_AR.PRE_NAME_ADJUNCT l_prefix,
       NAME_AR.SUFFIX l_suffix,
       NAME_AR.HONORS l_honors,
       NAME_AR.KNOWN_AS l_known_as,
       NAME_AR.PREVIOUS_LAST_NAME l_prev_last_name,
       (SELECT MAX (FTB.NLS_TERRITORY)
          FROM FND_TERRITORIES_B FTB
         WHERE FTB.TERRITORY_CODE = ADDR_H.COUNTRY)
          hOME_Country,
       ADDR_U_H.ADDRESS_TYPE,
       ADDR_H.ADDRESS_LINE_1 HOME_ADDRESS_LINE_1,
       ADDR_H.ADDRESS_LINE_2 HOME_ADDRESS_LINE_2,
       ADDR_H.ADDRESS_LINE_3 HOME_ADDRESS_LINE_3,
       ADDR_H.ADDRESS_LINE_4 HOME_ADDRESS_LINE_4,
       ADDR_H.REGION_1,
       ADDR_H.REGION_2,
       ADDR_H.REGION_3,
       ADDR_H.POSTAL_CODE,
       ADDR_H.TOWN_OR_CITY,
       PHONE_H.PHONE_TYPE "Phone Type",
       PHONE_H.COUNTRY_CODE_NUMBER " Country Code",
       PHONE_H.AREA_CODE "  Area Code",
       PHONE_H.PHONE_NUMBER " Phone Number",
       PHONE_W.PHONE_TYPE " Phone Type 1",
       PHONE_W.COUNTRY_CODE_NUMBER,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'EMAIL_TYPE'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = EMAIL.EMAIL_TYPE)
          "E-Mail Type",
       EMAIL.EMAIL_ADDRESS " E-Mail",
       PPLF.LEGISLATION_CODE "Legislation",
       PPLF.PER_INFORMATION1,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'MAR_STATUS'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = PPLF.MARITAL_STATUS)
          "Marital Status",
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'PER_RELIGION'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = PR.RELIGION)
          " Religion",
       DECODE (PPLF.SEX,  'M', 'Male',  'F', 'Female',  PPLF.SEX) "Gender",
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_TL FL
         WHERE     FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'PER_HIGHEST_EDUCATION_LEVEL'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = PPLF.HIGHEST_EDUCATION_LEVEL
               AND FL.LANGUAGE = USERENV ('LANG'))
          "Highest Education Level",
       /*  PCRF.CONTACT_TYPE,
          PCEI.INFORMATION_TYPE,
          PCEI.CEI_INFORMATION1,*/
       PAPF.PERSON_ID,
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE1 "PERSON ATTRIBUTE1",
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE2 "PERSON ATTRIBUTE2",
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE3 "PERSON ATTRIBUTE3",
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE4 "PERSON ATTRIBUTE4",
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE5 "PERSON ATTRIBUTE5",
       PAPF.ATTRIBUTE6 "PERSON ATTRIBUTE6",
       PPOS.WORKER_NUMBER,
       PPOS.LAST_WORKING_DATE,
       PPOS.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE,
       PPOS.ON_MILITARY_SERVICE,
       --   PPOS.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID,
       --  PPOS.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE,
       TO_CHAR (PPOS.DATE_START, 'DD-MON-YYYY') HIRE_DATE,
       --   ASG_ACT.ACTION_CODE,
       --  PARB.ACTION_REASON_CODE,
       TO_CHAR (PAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, 'DD-MON-YYYY')
          EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
       TO_CHAR (PER.DATE_OF_BIRTH, 'DD-MON-YYYY') DATE_OF_BIRTH,
       TRUNC (MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, PER.DATE_OF_BIRTH) / 12) || '.'
       || TRUNC (
             (MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, PER.DATE_OF_BIRTH))
             - (TRUNC (MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, PER.DATE_OF_BIRTH) / 12) * 12))
          AGE,
       --   TO_CHAR (PER.DATE_OF_BIRTH, 'YYYY') BIRTH_YEAR,
       --   TO_CHAR (PER.DATE_OF_BIRTH, 'MM') BIRTH_MONTH,
       PPTL.USER_PERSON_TYPE PERSON_TYPE,
       (SELECT MAX (FT.NLS_TERRITORY)
          FROM FND_TERRITORIES_B FT
         WHERE FT.TERRITORY_CODE = PNI.LEGISLATION_CODE)
          NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_COUNTRY,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'PER_NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_TYPE'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = PNI.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_TYPE)
          NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_TYPE,
       TO_CHAR (PNI.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_NUMBER) NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_NUMBER,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_TL FL
         WHERE     FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'NATIONALITY'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE(+) = PCZ.LEGISLATION_CODE
               AND FL.LANGUAGE = USERENV ('LANG'))
          NATIONALITY,
       TO_CHAR (PCZ.DATE_FROM, 'DD-MON-YYYY') NATIONALITY_FROM_DATE,
       TO_CHAR (PCZ.DATE_TO, 'DD-MON-YYYY') NATIONALITY_TO_DATE,
       DECODE (PCZ.CITIZENSHIP_STATUS,  'A', 'Active',  'I', 'Inactive')
          NATIONALITY_STATUS,
       --ASG_SEC.ACTION_CODE,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'EMPLOYEE_CATG'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = ASG_ACT.EMPLOYEE_CATEGORY)
          WORKER_TYPE,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'EMP_CAT'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = ASG_ACT.EMPLOYMENT_CATEGORY)
          ASSIGNMENT_CATEGORY,
       DECODE (ASG_ACT.WORK_AT_HOME,  'Y', 'Yes',  'N', 'No') WORK_AT_HOME,
       DECODE (ASG_ACT.MANAGER_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes',  'N', 'No')
          WORKING_AS_MANAGER,
       DECODE (ASG_ACT.HOURLY_SALARIED_CODE,
               'S', 'Salaried',
               'H', 'Hourly Paid')
          HOURLY_PAID_OR_SALARIED,
       ASG_ACT.NORMAL_HOURS WORKING_HOURS,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM FND_LOOKUP_VALUES_TL FL
         WHERE     FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'FREQUENCY'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = ASG_ACT.FREQUENCY
               AND FL.LANGUAGE = USERENV ('LANG'))
          FREQUENCY,
       ASG_ACT.TIME_NORMAL_START START_TIME,
       ASG_ACT.TIME_NORMAL_FINISH END_TIME,
       ASG_ACT.PROBATION_PERIOD,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'PROBATION_PERIOD'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = ASG_ACT.PROBATION_UNIT)
          PROBATION_UNIT,
       ASG_ACT.NOTICE_PERIOD,
       (SELECT MAX (FL.MEANING)
          FROM HR_LOOKUPS FL
         WHERE FL.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'PROBATION_PERIOD'
               AND FL.LOOKUP_CODE = ASG_ACT.NOTICE_PERIOD_UOM)
          NOTICE_PERIOD_UOM,
      TRUNC (MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, PPOS.DATE_START) / 12) || '.'
       || TRUNC (
             (MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, PPOS.DATE_START))
             - (TRUNC (MONTHS_BETWEEN (SYSDATE, PPOS.DATE_START) / 12) * 12))
          YR_N_MON,
       (SELECT SAL.SALARY_AMOUNT
          FROM CMP_SALARY SAL
         WHERE SAL.ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASG_ACT.ASSIGNMENT_ID
               AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (SAL.DATE_FROM, SYSDATE))
                                       AND TRUNC(NVL (SAL.DATE_TO, SYSDATE)))
          SALARY_AMOUNT,
       (SELECT CSB.NAME
          FROM CMP_SALARY SAL, CMP_SALARY_BASES CSB
         WHERE CSB.SALARY_BASIS_ID = SAL.SALARY_BASIS_ID
               AND SAL.ASSIGNMENT_ID = ASG_ACT.ASSIGNMENT_ID
               AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (SAL.DATE_FROM, SYSDATE)
                                       AND NVL (SAL.DATE_TO, SYSDATE))
          SALARY_BASIS,
		
       --  DECODE (PPTU.SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE, 'EMP', 'EMPLOYEE') PERSON_TYPE,
       /* PCF.TYPE "CONTRACT TYPE",
        PCF.STATUS "CONTRACT STATUS",
        PCF.DURATION "CONTRACT DURATION",
        PCF.DURATION_UNITS "CONTRACT DURATION UNITS",*/
       ASG_ACT.PEOPLE_GROUP_ID,
       PPG.GROUP_NAME PEOPLE_GROUP,
       PPG.SEGMENT1 "PEOPLE_G_NAME",
       ASG_ACT.RETIREMENT_AGE,
       TO_CHAR (ASG_ACT.RETIREMENT_DATE, 'DD-MON-YYYY'),
       PJ.JOB_CODE,
       PJ.NAME JOB_NAME,
       HAP.POSITION_CODE,
       HAP.NAME POSITION_NAME,
       HAP.BARGAINING_UNIT_CD,
       PG.GRADE_CODE,
       PG.NAME GRADE_NAME,
       MGRP.DISPLAY_NAME MANAGER_NAME,
       TO_CHAR (MGR_PAPF.PERSON_NUMBER) MANAGER_PERSON_NUMBER,
       PLDF.LOCATION_CODE,
       PLDF.LOCATION_NAME,
       MGR_PLDF.LOCATION_NAME MGR_LOCATION_NAME,
       PASTTL.USER_STATUS ASSIGNMENT_STATUS,
       HR_ORG.NAME ORGANIZATION_NAME,
       LEGAL_ENTETY.NAME LEGAL_ENTITY,
       BU_UNIT.NAME BUSINESS_UNIT,
       ASG_ACT.ASS_ATTRIBUTE1,
       ASG_ACT.ASS_ATTRIBUTE2,
       ASG_ACT.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3,
       ASG_ACT.ASS_ATTRIBUTE4,
       ASG_ACT.ASS_ATTRIBUTE5,
       ASG_ACT.ASS_ATTRIBUTE6
  FROM PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F PAPF,
       PER_PERSONS PER,
       PER_PERSON_NAMES_F NAME_G,
       PER_PERSON_NAMES_F NAME_AR,
       PER_EMAIL_ADDRESSES EMAIL,
       PER_PHONES PHONE_H,
       PER_PHONES PHONE_W,
       PER_RELIGIONS PR,
       PER_PERSON_ADDR_USAGES_F ADDR_U_H,
       PER_ADDRESSES_F ADDR_H,
       PER_PERSON_ADDR_USAGES_F ADDR_U_M,
       PER_ADDRESSES_F ADDR_M,
       PER_PEOPLE_LEGISLATIVE_F PPLF,
       PER_NATIONAL_IDENTIFIERS PNI,
       PER_CITIZENSHIPS PCZ,
       PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F ASG_ACT,
       PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE PPOS,
       PER_PERSON_TYPE_USAGES_M PPTU,
       PER_PERSON_TYPES_VL PPTL,
       PER_JOBS PJ,
       HR_ALL_POSITIONS HAP,
       PER_GRADES PG,
       PER_ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISORS_F PASF,
       PER_PERSON_NAMES_F MGRP,
       PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F MGR_PAPF,
       PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M MGR_ASG,
       PER_LOCATION_DETAILS_F_VL PLDF,
       PER_LOCATION_DETAILS_F_VL MGR_PLDF,
       PER_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPES_TL PASTTL,
       HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS LEGAL_ENTETY,
       HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS HR_ORG,
       HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS BU_UNIT,
       /* PER_CONTACT_RELSHIPS_F PCRF,
        PER_CONTACT_EXTRA_INFO_F PCEI,
        PER_CONTRACTS_F PCF,*/
       PER_PEOPLE_GROUPS PPG
 --  PER_ACTIONS_B PAB,
 --     PER_ACTION_REASONS_B PARB,
 --     PER_ACTION_HEADERS_M PAHM
 WHERE PER.PERSON_ID = PAPF.PERSON_ID   --- Biographical Information ------------------
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN  trunc(NVL (PAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, SYSDATE))
                               AND trunc(NVL (PAPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, SYSDATE))
     
--- Naming Infromation with different both Language -------------
	 AND NAME_G.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(NVL (NAME_G.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, SYSDATE))
                               AND trunc(NVL (NAME_G.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, SYSDATE))
       AND UPPER (NAME_G.NAME_TYPE(+)) = UPPER ('GLOBAL')
       AND NAME_AR.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(NVL (NAME_AR.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND trunc(NVL (NAME_AR.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, SYSDATE))
       AND UPPER (NAME_AR.NAME_TYPE(+)) <> UPPER ('GLOBAL')
	   
----- Email Information ----------------	   
       AND EMAIL.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
    --   AND EMAIL.EMAIL_ADDRESS_ID(+) = PAPF.PRIMARY_EMAIL_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (EMAIL.DATE_FROM(+), SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (EMAIL.DATE_TO(+), SYSDATE))
---- Email Information -----------							   
		
--- Phone Detail --------------------------		
       AND PHONE_H.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
     --  AND PHONE_H.PHONE_ID(+) = PAPF.PRIMARY_PHONE_ID
       AND UPPER (PHONE_H.PHONE_TYPE(+)) = UPPER ('HM')
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (PHONE_H.DATE_FROM(+), SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (PHONE_H.DATE_TO(+), SYSDATE))
       AND PHONE_W.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
    --   AND PHONE_W.PHONE_ID(+) = PAPF.PRIMARY_PHONE_ID
       AND UPPER (PHONE_W.PHONE_TYPE(+)) = UPPER ('WM')
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (PHONE_W.DATE_FROM(+), SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (PHONE_W.DATE_TO(+), SYSDATE))
       AND PR.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
      
----- Address Detail Home---------------
	  AND ADDR_U_H.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       AND UPPER (ADDR_U_H.ADDRESS_TYPE(+)) = UPPER ('HOME')
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_U_H.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_U_H.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
       AND ADDR_H.ADDRESS_ID(+) = ADDR_U_H.ADDRESS_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_H.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_H.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
	
------------ Address Detail Work  ------	
										
       AND ADDR_U_M.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       AND UPPER (ADDR_U_M.ADDRESS_TYPE(+)) = UPPER ('MAIL')
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_U_M.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_U_M.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
       AND ADDR_M.ADDRESS_ID(+) = ADDR_U_M.ADDRESS_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_M.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (ADDR_M.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
										
										
----  Address Detail ------------------------------										
										
       AND PPLF.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID  ---Legislation Detail----------
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (PPLF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (PPLF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+), SYSDATE))
--- National Identifier Infromation -------							   
   AND PNI.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       AND PNI.NATIONAL_IDENTIFIER_ID(+) = PAPF.PRIMARY_NID_ID
   
--- citizenship Infromation -------
   AND PCZ.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       
	   
	   
	   ----- Employment Information -----------------
	   
	   AND ASG_ACT.PERSON_ID = PAPF.PERSON_ID
    --   AND UPPER (ASG_ACT.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE(+)) IN ('E', 'C')
       AND UPPER (ASG_ACT.PRIMARY_FLAG(+)) = UPPER ('Y')
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (ASG_ACT.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (ASG_ACT.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
       AND ASG_ACT.EFFECTIVE_LATEST_CHANGE = 'Y'
       AND PASTTL.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID(+) =
              ASG_ACT.ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_TYPE_ID
       AND PASTTL.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
       AND PASTTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV ('LANG')
       AND PPOS.PERSON_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.PERSON_ID
       AND PPOS.PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
    /*   AND (PPOS.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE(+) >= TRUNC (SYSDATE)
            OR PPOS.ACTUAL_TERMINATION_DATE(+) IS NULL)*/
       AND PPTU.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
       AND UPPER (PPTU.SYSTEM_PERSON_TYPE) = UPPER ('EMP')
       AND PPTU.PERSON_TYPE_ID = PPTL.PERSON_TYPE_ID
       --  AND UPPER(PPTL.USER_PERSON_TYPE) = UPPER('Contingent Worker')
       AND PJ.JOB_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.JOB_ID
       AND HAP.POSITION_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.POSITION_ID
       AND PG.GRADE_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.GRADE_ID
       AND PASF.ASSIGNMENT_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.ASSIGNMENT_ID
       AND PASF.PERSON_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.PERSON_ID
       AND UPPER (PASF.PRIMARY_FLAG(+)) = UPPER ('Y')
       AND MGRP.PERSON_ID(+) = PASF.MANAGER_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (MGRP.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (MGRP.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+), SYSDATE))
       AND MGR_PAPF.PERSON_ID(+) = PASF.MANAGER_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN TRUNC(NVL (MGR_PAPF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
                               AND TRUNC(NVL (MGR_PAPF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE))
       AND UPPER (MGRP.NAME_TYPE) = UPPER ('GLOBAL')
       AND MGR_ASG.ASSIGNMENT_ID(+) = PASF.MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
       AND MGR_ASG.PERSON_ID(+) = PASF.MANAGER_ID
       AND UPPER (MGR_ASG.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE(+)) IN ('E', 'C')
       AND UPPER (MGR_ASG.PRIMARY_FLAG(+)) = UPPER ('Y')
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (MGR_ASG.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE)
                               AND NVL (MGR_ASG.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE)
       AND PLDF.LOCATION_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.LOCATION_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (PLDF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE)
                               AND NVL (PLDF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+), SYSDATE)
       AND MGR_PLDF.LOCATION_ID(+) = MGR_ASG.LOCATION_ID
       AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (MGR_PLDF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE)
                               AND NVL (MGR_PLDF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+),
                                        SYSDATE)
       AND HR_ORG.ORGANIZATION_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.ORGANIZATION_ID
       AND LEGAL_ENTETY.ORGANIZATION_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
       AND BU_UNIT.ORGANIZATION_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
       /* AND PCRF.CONTACT_RELATIONSHIP_ID = PCEI.CONTACT_RELATIONSHIP_ID(+)
        AND PAPF.PERSON_ID = PCRF.PERSON_ID(+)
        AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (PCRF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                         SYSDATE)
                                AND NVL (PCRF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+), SYSDATE)
        AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (PCEI.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+),
                                         SYSDATE)
                                AND NVL (PCEI.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+), SYSDATE)
        AND PCF.PERSON_ID(+) = PAPF.PERSON_ID
        AND TRUNC (SYSDATE) BETWEEN NVL (PCF.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+), SYSDATE)
                                AND NVL (PCF.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE(+), SYSDATE)*/
       AND PPG.PEOPLE_GROUP_ID(+) = ASG_ACT.PEOPLE_GROUP_ID
       --     AND   ASG_ACT.ACTION_CODE = PAB.ACTION_CODE
       --     AND  PAB.ACTION_ID(+) = PAHM.ACTION_ID
       --     AND PAHM.ACTION_REASON_ID = PARB.ACTION_REASON_ID(+)
       AND NAME_G.FULL_NAME = NVL (:P_PERSON_NAME, NAME_G.FULL_NAME)
	   
	 --  and papf.person_number = 'Q04040'

title: How to Show Display custom message when no result in OTBI Analysis?
description:
Edit the Analysis
Go to Criteria & click on Edit Analysis Properties (XYZ) Button.
No Results Settings
Use this box to select the type of message (default or custom) that is displayed if no results ar
sql:
select the type of message (default or custom) that is displayed if no results are returned from an analysis. You might see the message, for example, if you have a very restrictive filter placed on the columns in the analysis. You do not see the custom message if you simply create the analysis and include no columns.
In No Result, Setting select the Display Custom message option. and Enter your custom Message In the header and Message Box.
If you want to add HTML /CSS on the Message box for this you need to enable the "Contains HTML/JavaScript/CSS Markup" check box. After this, you can add HTML.
View for Text Delivery, Use this box to manually control which compound layout, including its associated views, is sent to a particular destination.
Click on OK
Save the Analysis

title: Purchase order Creation date after AP Invoice Creation Date
description:
/* Formatted on 28-11-2019 19:25:40 (QP5 v5.149.1003.31008) */SELECT
    aia.invoice_id,
    aia.invoice_num,
    pha.segment1           AS po_number,
    aia.creation_date      invoice_creation_date,
sql:
SELECT
    aia.invoice_id,
    aia.invoice_num,
    pha.segment1           AS po_number,
    aia.creation_date      invoice_creation_date,
    aia.created_by,
    pha.creation_date      AS po_creation_date,
    aia.invoice_date,
    aila.line_number,
    CASE
        WHEN trunc(pha.creation_date) - trunc(aia.creation_date) BETWEEN 0
                                                                           AND 10
            THEN
            '0 to 10'
        WHEN trunc(pha.creation_date) - trunc(aia.creation_date) BETWEEN 11 AND 30 THEN
            '11 to 30'
        WHEN trunc(pha.creation_date) - trunc(aia.creation_date) BETWEEN 31 AND 100 THEN
            '31 to 100'
        WHEN ( trunc(pha.creation_date) - trunc(aia.creation_date) ) > 100 THEN
            'More Then 100'
    END bucket,
    aia.source,
    aida.distribution_line_number,
    hou.name               bu_name,
    ps.vendor_name         supplier,
    ps.vendor_type_lookup_code,
    pss.vendor_site_code   supplier_site,
    gle.name               ledger_name,
    aia.invoice_amount,
    aia.invoice_amount * nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) invoice_ledger_amount,
    aia.invoice_currency_code,
    aila.item_description,
    ap_invoices_pkg.get_approval_status(aia.invoice_id, aia.invoice_amount, aia.payment_status_flag, aia.invoice_type_lookup_code
    ) inv_status,
    DECODE(aia.payment_status_flag, 'Y', 'Paid', 'N', 'Not Paid', 'P', 'Partially Paid')
            payment_status,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=AP_VIEWINVOICE&action=VIEW&objKey=InvoiceId='
    || aia.invoice_id AS prod_link
FROM
    ap_invoices                    aia,
    ap_invoice_lines_all           aila,
    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
    po_distributions_all           pda,
    po_lines_all                   pla,
    po_headers_all                 pha,
    poz_suppliers_v                ps,
    poz_supplier_sites_v           pss,
    per_users                      pu,
    gl_ledgers                     gle,
    hr_operating_units             hou
WHERE
    aida.po_distribution_id = pda.po_distribution_id
    AND pda.po_header_id = pha.po_header_id
    AND pda.po_line_id = pla.po_line_id
    AND pla.po_header_id = pha.po_header_id
    AND aida.invoice_id = aia.invoice_id
    AND aida.invoice_line_number = aila.line_number
    AND aila.invoice_id = aia.invoice_id
    AND aia.creation_date < pha.creation_date
    AND aia.vendor_id = ps.vendor_id (+)
    AND aia.org_id = hou.organization_id
    AND gle.ledger_id = aia.set_of_books_id
    AND pu.username = aia.created_by
    AND nvl(aia.approval_status, 'aa') <> 'CANCELLED'
    AND aia.vendor_site_id = pss.vendor_site_id (+)
    AND ( aia.set_of_books_id IN (
        :p_ledger
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( aia.org_id IN (
        :p_org_id
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_org_id || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( pu.user_id IN (
        :p_created_by
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_created_by || 'All'
    ) )
    AND aia.invoice_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, aia.invoice_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, aia.invoice_date)
-- and aia.invoice_num='Test PO2'
ORDER BY
    gle.name,
    aia.invoice_num,
    aila.line_number,
    aida.distribution_line_number

title: Different tax rates on PO and AP Invoice
description:
SELECT
    aia.invoice_num,
    hou.name               bu_name,
    aia.invoice_currency_code,
    aia.invoice_id,
    aia.source,
    aia.invoice_type_lookup_code,
    pha.segment1           po_num,
sql:
SELECT
    aia.invoice_num,
    hou.name               bu_name,
    aia.invoice_currency_code,
    aia.invoice_id,
    aia.source,
    aia.invoice_type_lookup_code,
    pha.segment1           po_num,
    aia.invoice_amount     invoice_amount,
    aia.invoice_date       invoice_date,
    aia.creation_date,
    aia.created_by,
    ps.vendor_name         supplier,
       aia.invoice_amount * nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) AS invoice_ledger_amount,
    gl.name,
    aia.total_tax_amount   AS invoice_tax_amount,
    pda.nonrecoverable_tax + pda.recoverable_inclusive_tax AS po_total_tax,
    pda.amount_billed,
    pda.po_header_id,
    pda.po_distribution_id,
    pda.nonrecoverable_tax + pda.amount_billed + pda.recoverable_inclusive_tax AS po_total_amount,
    pss.vendor_site_code   supplier_site,
    zl.tax_rate_code,
    plla.input_tax_classification_code,
    ap_invoices_pkg.get_approval_status(aia.invoice_id, aia.invoice_amount, aia.payment_status_flag, aia.invoice_type_lookup_code
    ) inv_status,
    ail.line_number,
    DECODE(aia.payment_status_flag, 'Y', 'Paid', 'N', 'Not Paid', 'P', 'Partially Paid') payment_status,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=AP_VIEWINVOICE&action=VIEW&objKey=InvoiceId='
    || aia.invoice_id AS prod_link
FROM
    ap_invoices                    aia,
    ap_invoice_lines_all           ail,
    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aid,
    zx_lines                       zl,
    hr_operating_units             hou,
    gl_ledgers                     gl,
    per_users                      pu,
    poz_suppliers_v                ps,
       poz_supplier_sites_v pss,
    po_distributions_all           pda,
    po_headers_all                 pha,
    po_line_locations_all          plla
WHERE                                    --  aia.invoice_num = 'Test Test PO'
    aia.invoice_id = ail.invoice_id
    AND ail.line_type_lookup_code = 'ITEM'
    AND aid.invoice_id = ail.invoice_id
    AND aid.invoice_line_number = ail.line_number
    AND zl.trx_id = ail.invoice_id
    AND zl.trx_line_number = ail.line_number
    AND aia.org_id = hou.organization_id
    AND gl.ledger_id = aia.set_of_books_id
    AND aia.created_by = pu.username
    AND aia.vendor_id = ps.vendor_id (+)
    AND aia.vendor_site_id = pss.vendor_site_id (+)
    AND zl.cancel_flag <> 'Y' ----If the tax line from the invoice canceled the need to exclude that line
    AND pda.po_distribution_id = aid.po_distribution_id
    AND pha.po_header_id = pda.po_header_id
    AND pda.line_location_id = plla.line_location_id
    AND ( aia.org_id IN (
        :p_org_id
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_org_id || 'All'
    ) )
    AND aia.created_by = pu.username
    AND ( pu.user_id IN (
        :p_created_by
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_created_by || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( aia.set_of_books_id IN (
        :p_ledger
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger || 'All'
    ) )
    AND gl.ledger_id = aia.set_of_books_id
    AND aia.invoice_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, aia.invoice_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, aia.invoice_date)
    AND TRIM(zl.tax_rate_code) != nvl(TRIM(plla.input_tax_classification_code), 'XYZ') ----we are comparing the tax code from the invoice and po level ,this condition will exclude the records if the tax code is not same from the both invoice and PO level

title: Payable Invoice Not Paid Since 1 Year
description:
SELECT
    org_id,
    bu_name,
    supplier,
    created_by,
    source,
    supplier_site,
    invoice_type,
    invoice_id,
    due_date,
    ladger_name,
    creation_date,
    supplier_site_id,
sql:
SELECT
    org_id,
    bu_name,
    supplier,
    created_by,
    source,
    supplier_site,
    invoice_type,
    invoice_id,
    due_date,
    ladger_name,
    creation_date,
    supplier_site_id,
    invoice_currency_code,
    ledger_currency_code,
    terms_name,
    invoice_number,
    invoice_amount,
    gross_amount,
    invoice_date,
    days_past_due,
    exchange_rate,
    amt_due_original,
    c_amt_due_remaining,
    nvl(c_amt_due_remaining, 0) tot_outst_sar,
         day_over_due,
         inv_status,
    invoice_ledger_amount,
    month_date1,
    payment_status,
    prod_link
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            aia.org_id,
            aia.created_by,
            aia.source,
            aia.CREATION_DATE,
            TO_DATE('01-'
                    || TO_CHAR(aia.invoice_date, 'MM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
                    || '-'
                    || TO_CHAR(aia.invoice_date, 'YY'), 'DD-MM-YY') month_date1,
            aia.invoice_amount * nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) AS invoice_ledger_amount,
            hou.name                       bu_name,
            gl.name                        ladger_name,
            nvl(psv.vendor_name, hp.party_name) supplier,
            nvl(pssv.vendor_site_code, sites.party_site_name) supplier_site,
            aia.vendor_site_id             supplier_site_id,
            aia.invoice_type_lookup_code   invoice_type,
            aia.invoice_id,
            apsa.due_date,
            ( to_number(trunc(apsa.due_date) - trunc(:p_end_date)) * - 1 ) day_over_due,
            aia.invoice_currency_code,
            (
                SELECT
                    trm.name
                FROM
                    ap_terms_tl trm
                WHERE trm.term_id = aia.terms_id
                    AND trm.language = 'US'
            ) terms_name,
            aia.invoice_num                invoice_number,
            aia.invoice_amount,
            apsa.gross_amount,
            aia.invoice_date,
            ceil(SYSDATE - apsa.due_date) days_past_due,
            nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) exchange_rate,
            nvl(apsa.gross_amount, 0) * nvl(aia.exchange_rate, 1) amt_due_original,
            ( apsa.amount_remaining * nvl(exchange_rate, 1) ) c_amt_due_remaining,
            gl.currency_code               ledger_currency_code,
            ap_invoices_pkg.get_approval_status(aia.invoice_id, aia.invoice_amount, aia.payment_status_flag, aia.invoice_type_lookup_code
            ) inv_status,
            DECODE(aia.payment_status_flag, 'Y', 'Paid', 'N', 'Not Paid', 'P', 'Partially Paid') payment_status,
            (
                SELECT
                    external_virtual_host pod_url
                FROM
                    ask_deployed_domains
                WHERE
                    deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
            )
            || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=AP_VIEWINVOICE&action=VIEW&objKey=InvoiceId='
            || aia.invoice_id AS prod_link
        FROM
            ap_invoices                aia,
            ap_payment_schedules_all   apsa,
            hz_parties                 hp,
            hz_party_sites             sites,
            poz_suppliers_v            psv,
            poz_supplier_sites_v       pssv,
            hr_operating_units         hou,
            gl_ledgers                 gl,
            per_users                  pu
        WHERE
            apsa.invoice_id = aia.invoice_id
            AND apsa.org_id = aia.org_id
            AND hp.party_id = aia.party_id
            AND psv.vendor_id (+) = aia.vendor_id
            AND pssv.vendor_site_id (+) = aia.vendor_site_id
            AND pssv.vendor_id (+) = aia.vendor_id
            AND hou.organization_id = aia.org_id
            AND sites.party_id = hp.party_id
            AND aia.invoice_type_lookup_code <> 'PREPAYMENT'
            AND aia.party_site_id = sites.party_site_id
            AND nvl(aia.approval_status, 'aa') <> 'CANCELLED'
            AND ( aia.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
                  OR aia.wfapproval_status IN (
                'MANUALLY APPROVED',
                'NOT REQUIRED'
            ) )
            AND ( aia.set_of_books_id IN (
                :p_ledger
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_ledger || 'All'
            ) )
            AND aia.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND ( aia.org_id IN (
                :p_org_id
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_org_id || 'All'
            ) )
            AND pu.username = aia.created_by
            AND ( pu.user_id IN (
                :p_created_by
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_created_by || 'All'
            ) )
            AND aia.invoice_date <= nvl(:p_end_date, aia.invoice_date)
    ) z
WHERE
    c_amt_due_remaining != 0
    AND day_over_due > 365
ORDER BY
    supplier,
    day_over_due

title: SQL Query to find the user, roles with basic details of user.
description:
SELECT
    pu.username,
    prd.role_name,
    ppnf.display_name,
    pu.active_flag    user_active_flag,
    pu.suspended      user_suspended_flag,
    prd.description   role_desc,
     prd.active_fl
sql:
SELECT
    pu.username,
    prd.role_name,
    ppnf.display_name,
    pu.active_flag    user_active_flag,
    pu.suspended      user_suspended_flag,
    prd.description   role_desc,
     prd.active_flag       role_active_flag,
    prd.role_common_name
FROM
    per_roles_dn_vl      prd,
