WHERE
    pur.user_id = pu.USER_id
    AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
    AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id (+)
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE(+)) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date(+))
    AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
    AND ( pu.username = :p_user
          OR ppnf.display_name = :p_emp_name )

title: SQL Query to Find the Pending Approval in Oracle Fusion.
description:
WITH all_pending AS (
    SELECT
        wft.identificationkey,
        wft.packagename,
        wft.category,
        wft.taskdefinitionname,
        ppnf.person_id,
        DECODE(wft.taskdefinition
sql:
WITH all_pending AS (
    SELECT
        wft.identificationkey,
        wft.packagename,
        wft.category,
        wft.taskdefinitionname,
        ppnf.person_id,
        DECODE(wft.taskdefinitionname, 'FinApInvoiceApproval', 'AP Invoice', 'DocumentApproval', 'Purchase Order', 'FinApHoldApproval'
        , 'AP Invoice Hold', 'ReqApproval', 'Requisition', 'FinGlJournalApproval', 'GL Journal', 'FinExmWorkflowExpenseApproval', 'Expense Report',
                        'FinExmWorkflowCashAdvanceApproval', 'Cash Advance',
        'SpendAuthorizationApproval', 'Spend Authorization Approval', 'BankAcctTransferRequestForAction', 'Bank Account Transfer'
        , 'FinFunTransactionApproval', 'Intercompany Transactions', 'ApprovalHumantask', 'Sales Order Transaction', wft.taskdefinitionname
        ) transaction_name,
        (
            SELECT hauft.name
            FROM
                hr_org_unit_classifications_f   houcf,
                hr_all_organization_units_f     haouf,
                hr_organization_units_f_tl hauft,
                per_all_assignments_m           paam,
                per_all_people_f                papf,
                per_users                       pu
            WHERE haouf.organization_id = houcf.organization_id
                AND haouf.organization_id = hauft.organization_id
                AND haouf.effective_start_date BETWEEN houcf.effective_start_date
                                                                AND houcf.effective_end_date
                AND hauft.language = 'US'
                AND hauft.effective_start_date = haouf.effective_start_date
                AND hauft.effective_end_date = haouf.effective_end_date
                AND houcf.classification_code = 'DEPARTMENT'
                AND SYSDATE BETWEEN hauft.effective_start_date AND hauft.effective_end_date
                AND hauft.organization_id = paam.organization_id
                AND paam.person_id = papf.person_id
                AND paam.primary_assignment_flag = 'Y'
                AND paam.assignment_type = 'E'
                AND paam.effective_latest_change = 'Y'
                AND SYSDATE BETWEEN paam.effective_start_date AND paam.effective_end_date
                AND SYSDATE BETWEEN papf.effective_start_date
                                             AND papf.effective_end_date
                AND upper(replace(wft.assignees, ',user', '')) = upper(pu.username)
                AND pu.person_id = papf.person_id
                AND ROWNUM = 1
        ) AS department,
        (
            SELECT
                ppnf.full_name
            FROM
                per_all_people_f               papf,
                per_all_assignments_m          paam,
                per_assignment_supervisors_f   pasf,
                per_person_names_f             ppnf,
                per_users                      pu
            WHERE
                upper(replace(wft.assignees, ',user', '')) = upper(pu.username)
                AND pu.person_id = papf.person_id
                AND papf.person_id = paam.person_id
                AND paam.primary_assignment_flag = 'Y'
                AND paam.assignment_type = 'E'
                AND paam.effective_latest_change = 'Y'
                AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN paam.effective_start_date AND paam.effective_end_date
                AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN paam.effective_start_date AND paam.effective_end_date
                AND papf.person_id = pasf.person_id
                AND pasf.manager_type = 'LINE_MANAGER'
                AND ppnf.person_id = pasf.manager_id
                AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
                AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN pasf.effective_start_date AND pasf.effective_end_date
                AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppnf.effective_start_date AND ppnf.effective_end_date
                AND ROWNUM = 1
        ) AS supervisor,
        wft.assignees,
        wft.assigneesdisplayname,
        wft.assigneddate,
        wft.createddate,
        wft.updateddate,
        wft.title,
        wft.compositeinstanceid,
        trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(wft.assigneddate) AS pending_days
    FROM
        fa_fusion_soainfra.wftask   wft,
        per_person_names_f          ppnf
    WHERE
        1 = 1          --dentificationkey = '300000045485925'
                     --         AND WFT.PACKAGENAME = 'fin'
                     --                AND WFT.TASKDEFINITIONNAME = 'FinApInvoiceApproval'
        AND wft.outcome IS NULL
        AND wft.assigneesdisplayname = ppnf.display_name
        AND wft.state IN (
            'ASSIGNED',
            'INFO_REQUESTED'
        )
        AND wft.assignees IS NOT NULL
        AND wft.workflowpattern NOT IN (
            'AGGREGATION',
            'FYI'
        )
        AND wft.compositeinstanceid IN (
            SELECT
                wft1.compositeinstanceid
            FROM
                fa_fusion_soainfra.wftask wft1
            WHERE
                wft.packagename = wft1.packagename
                AND wft.taskdefinitionname = wft1.taskdefinitionname
                AND wft1.identificationkey = wft.identificationkey
                AND wft1.createddate = (
                    SELECT
                        MAX(wft2.createddate)
                    FROM
                        fa_fusion_soainfra.wftask wft2
                    WHERE
                        wft2.packagename = wft1.packagename
                        AND wft2.taskdefinitionname = wft1.taskdefinitionname
                        AND wft1.identificationkey = wft2.identificationkey
                )
        )
    ORDER BY
        wft.taskdefinitionname
)
SELECT
    pu.username,
    ap.identificationkey,
    ap.taskdefinitionname,
    ap.category,
    ap.packagename,
    ap.transaction_name,
    ap.pending_days,
    ap.department,
    ap.supervisor,
    ap.assigneddate,
    ap.createddate,
    ap.updateddate
FROM
    per_users            pu,
    all_pending          ap,
    per_person_names_f   ppnf
WHERE
    pu.person_id (+) = ap.person_id
    AND ap.person_id = ppnf.person_id
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date(+)) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date(+))
    AND ppnf.name_type (+) = 'GLOBAL'
    AND ( pu.username = :p_user
          OR ppnf.display_name = :p_emp_name )
ORDER BY
    pu.username,
    ap.taskdefinitionname

title: User and Active Role Assignments Report
description:
SELECT
    detail.*
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.person_id,
            (
                SELECT
                    organizationunittranslationpeo.name
                FROM
sql:
SELECT
    detail.*
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.person_id,
            (
                SELECT
                    organizationunittranslationpeo.name
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m        assignmentpeo,
                    hr_organization_units_f_tl   organizationunittranslationpeo
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslationpeo.organization_id
                    AND userenv('LANG') = organizationunittranslationpeo.language (+)
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(organizationunittranslationpeo
                    .effective_end_date, SYSDATE))
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) department,
            (
                SELECT
                    ftl.territory_short_name country
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
                    fnd_territories_tl      ftl,
                    per_users               pu_user
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND ftl.territory_code = assignmentpeo.legislation_code
                    AND ftl.source_lang (+) = 'US'
                    AND ftl.language (+) = 'US'
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
                    AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) country,
            (
                SELECT
                    legal.name legal_entity
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
                    hr_organization_units   legal,
                    per_users               pu_user
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.legal_entity_id = legal.organization_id (+)
                    AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(legal.date_from(+)) AND trunc(legal.date_to(+))
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) legal_entity,
            (
                SELECT
                    bu.name bu
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
                    hr_organization_units   bu,
                    per_users               pu_user
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.business_unit_id = bu.organization_id (+)
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(bu.date_from(+)) AND trunc(bu.date_to(+))
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) bu,
            (
                SELECT
                    assignmentpeo.business_unit_id
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
                    per_users               pu_user
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) bu_id,
            pu.user_id,
            pu.username,
            pu.start_date       AS user_start_date,
            pu.end_date         AS user_end_date,
            DECODE(pu.active_flag, 'N', 'Inactive', 'Y', 'Active') is_user_account_active,
            DECODE(pu.suspended, 'N', 'No', 'Y', 'Yes') is_user_account_suspended,
            ppnf.full_name,
            prdt.role_name,
            prdt.description    roledescription,
            DECODE(pur.method_code, 'A', 'Automatic', 'M', 'Manually', 'E', 'Externally Provisioned') method_code,
            DECODE(pur.active_flag, 'N', 'No', 'Y', 'Yes') is_user_role_active,
            DECODE(pur.terminated_flag, 'N', 'No', 'Y', 'Yes') is_user_role_terminated,
            pur.start_date      AS role_start_date,
            pur.end_date        AS role_end_date,
            prd.role_common_name,
            CASE
                WHEN ( prd.abstract_role = 'Y'
                       AND prd.job_role = 'N'
                       AND prd.data_role = 'N' ) THEN
                    'Abstract Role'
                WHEN ( prd.abstract_role = 'N'
                       AND prd.job_role = 'Y'
                       AND prd.data_role = 'N' ) THEN
                    'Job Role'
                WHEN ( prd.abstract_role = 'N'
                       AND prd.job_role = 'N'
                       AND prd.data_role = 'Y' ) THEN
                    'Data Role'
                WHEN ( prd.abstract_role IS NULL
                       AND prd.job_role IS NULL
                       AND prd.data_role IS NULL ) THEN
                    '--NA--'
            END AS userroletype,
            pur.creation_date   role_assignment_date,
            pur.created_by      role_assigned_by,
            NULL role_removed_by,
            NULL role_removal_date,
            DECODE(arv.is_seeded, 'N', 'Custom', 'Y', 'Seeded') custom_seeded
        FROM
            per_users            pu,
            per_person_names_f   ppnf,
            per_user_roles       pur,
            per_roles_dn         prd,
            per_roles_dn_tl      prdt,
            ase_role_vl          arv
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN ppnf.effective_start_date (+) AND ppnf.effective_end_date (+)
            AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN nvl(arv.effective_start_date, SYSDATE - 1) AND nvl(arv.effective_end_date, SYSDATE + 1)
            AND ppnf.name_type (+) = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id (+) = pu.person_id
            AND pu.username NOT LIKE 'FUSION_APPS_%'
            AND pur.active_flag = 'Y'
            AND pu.user_id = pur.user_id
            AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
            AND pur.role_guid = prd.role_guid
            AND pur.role_id = prdt.role_id
            AND prdt.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND prdt.role_name = arv.role_name
            AND arv.code = prd.role_common_name
            AND arv.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND ( :p_user_name IS NULL
                  OR :p_user_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
                  OR pu.username IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_user_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_user_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( replace(:p_full_name, ',', ' ') IS NULL
                  OR replace(:p_full_name, ',', ' ') = '*)nqgtac(*'
                  OR replace(ppnf.full_name, ',', ' ') IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(replace(:p_full_name, ',', ' '), '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(replace(:p_full_name, ',', ' '), '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( :p_role_name IS NULL
                  OR :p_role_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
                  OR prdt.role_name IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_role_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_role_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
    ) detail
WHERE
    ( (
        CASE
            WHEN ( userroletype = 'Abstract Role' ) THEN
                'Abstract Role'
            WHEN ( userroletype = 'Job Role' ) THEN
                'Job Role'
            WHEN ( userroletype = 'Data Role' ) THEN
                'Data Role'
            WHEN ( userroletype = '--NA--' ) THEN
                'NA'
        END
    ) IN (
        :p_role_type
    )
      OR 'All' IN (
        :p_role_type || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( (
        CASE
            WHEN is_user_role_active = 'Yes' THEN
                'Active'
            WHEN is_user_role_active = 'No'  THEN
                'Inactive'
        END
    ) IN (
        :p_role_active
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_role_active || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( custom_seeded IN (
        :p_role_category
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_role_category || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( :p_country IS NULL
          OR detail.country IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_country, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_country, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_business IS NULL
          OR detail.bu_id IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_business, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_business, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_department IS NULL
          OR detail.department IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_department, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_department, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_legal IS NULL
          OR detail.legal_entity IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_legal, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_legal, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )

title: Login History Report
description:
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.user_id,
            ppnf.first_name,
            ppnf.last_name,
            (
                SELECT
                    organizationunittransla
sql:
SELECT
    *
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.user_id,
            ppnf.first_name,
            ppnf.last_name,
            (
                SELECT
                    organizationunittranslationpeo.name
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m        assignmentpeo,
                    hr_organization_units_f_tl   organizationunittranslationpeo
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslationpeo.organization_id
                    AND userenv('LANG') = organizationunittranslationpeo.language (+)
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(organizationunittranslationpeo
                    .effective_end_date, SYSDATE))
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1 AND ROWNUM=1
            ) department,
            (
                SELECT
                    bu.name bu
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
                    hr_organization_units   bu,
                    per_users               pu_user
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
                    AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.business_unit_id = bu.organization_id (+)
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(bu.date_from(+)) AND trunc(bu.date_to(+))
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1 AND ROWNUM=1
            ) business_unit,
                (
        SELECT
      assignmentpeo.business_unit_id
        FROM
            per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
        
            per_users               pu_user
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date, SYSDATE
            ))
            AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                      OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                      OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                      OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                  AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
            AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
            AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
            AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
            AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
          
           AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
            AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1 AND ROWNUM=1
    ) bu_id,
            (
                SELECT
                    legal.name legal_entity
                FROM
                    per_all_assignments_m   assignmentpeo,
                    hr_organization_units   legal,
                    per_users               pu_user
                WHERE
                    trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(assignmentpeo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(nvl(assignmentpeo.effective_end_date
                    , SYSDATE))
                    AND ( ( ( ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'E' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'C' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'N' ) )
                              OR ( ( assignmentpeo.assignment_type = 'P' ) ) ) )
                          AND ( ( assignmentpeo.effective_latest_change = 'Y' ) ) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND assignmentpeo.assignment_status_type = 'ACTIVE'
                    AND assignmentpeo.person_id = pu_user.person_id
                    AND pu_user.person_id = pu.person_id
                    AND assignmentpeo.legal_entity_id = legal.organization_id (+)
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(legal.date_from(+)) AND trunc(legal.date_to(+))
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu_user.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu_user.end_date(+), SYSDATE)) )
                    AND assignmentpeo.effective_sequence = 1 AND ROWNUM=1
            ) legal_entity,
            ftl.territory_short_name   country,
            logged_user.first_seen,
            logged_user.last_seen,
            logged_user.total_hours,
            logged_user.last_date,
            logged_user.user_id        logged_user_id,
            pu.username
        FROM
            per_users               pu,
            per_person_names_f      ppnf,
            fnd_territories_tl      ftl,
            per_all_assignments_m   paam,
            (
                SELECT
                    fs.user_name,
                    pu.user_id,
                    ppnf.first_name,
                    ppnf.last_name,
                    ftl.territory_short_name country,
                    TO_CHAR(MIN(fs.first_connect), 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS first_seen,
                    TO_CHAR(MAX(fs.last_connect), 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS last_seen,
                    24 * ( MAX(fs.last_connect) - MIN(fs.first_connect) ) total_hours,
                    TO_CHAR(fs.last_update_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') last_date
                FROM
                    fnd_sessions            fs,
                    per_users               pu,
                    per_person_names_f      ppnf,
                    fnd_territories_tl      ftl,
                    per_all_assignments_m   paam
                WHERE
                    pu.username NOT LIKE 'FUSION_APPS%'
                    AND fs.user_name NOT IN (
                        'OCLOUD9_osn_APPID',
                        'em_monitoring',
                        'anonymous User'
                    )
                    AND pu.active_flag = 'Y'
                    AND paam.assignment_type = 'E'
                    AND paam.primary_flag = 'Y'
                    AND pu.person_id = paam.person_id
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(paam.effective_start_date) AND trunc(paam.effective_end_date)
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu.end_date(+), SYSDATE))
                    AND ftl.territory_code (+) = paam.legislation_code
                    AND ftl.source_lang (+) = 'US'
                    AND ftl.language (+) = 'US'
                    AND ( pu.end_date IS NULL
                          OR trunc(pu.end_date) > trunc(SYSDATE) )
                    AND pu.username = fs.user_name
                    AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id (+)
                    AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
                    AND trunc(fs.last_update_date) = trunc(fs.first_connect)
                    AND trunc(fs.last_update_date) = trunc(fs.last_connect)
                GROUP BY
                    fs.user_name,
                    TO_CHAR(fs.last_update_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY'),
                    pu.person_id,
                    ppnf.first_name,
                    ppnf.last_name,
                    ftl.territory_short_name,
                    pu.user_id
                ORDER BY
                    fs.user_name,
                    TO_CHAR(fs.last_update_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY'),
                    pu.person_id,
                    ppnf.first_name,
                    ppnf.last_name
            ) logged_user
        WHERE
            pu.username NOT LIKE 'FUSION_APPS%'
            AND pu.active_flag = 'Y'
            AND paam.assignment_type = 'E'
            AND paam.primary_flag = 'Y'
            AND pu.person_id = paam.person_id
            AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(paam.effective_start_date) AND trunc(paam.effective_end_date)
            AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(pu.start_date(+)) AND trunc(nvl(pu.end_date(+), SYSDATE))
            AND ftl.territory_code (+) = paam.legislation_code
            AND ftl.source_lang (+) = 'US'
            AND ftl.language (+) = 'US'
            AND ( pu.end_date IS NULL
                  OR trunc(pu.end_date) > trunc(SYSDATE) )
            AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id (+)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND logged_user.user_id (+) = pu.user_id
    ) xx
WHERE
    ( :p_country IS NULL
      OR xx.country IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_country, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_country, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_business IS NULL
          OR xx.bu_id IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_business, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_business, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_department IS NULL
          OR xx.department IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_department, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_department, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_legal IS NULL
          OR xx.legal_entity IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_legal, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_legal, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_user_name IS NULL
          OR :p_user_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
          OR TO_CHAR(xx.username) IN (
        SELECT
            TO_CHAR(regexp_substr(:p_user_name, '[^,]+', 1, level))
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_user_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )

title: 2 User Roles Comparisons.
description:
SELECT
    pp1.role_name   AS rolename1,
    pp2.role_name   AS rolename2
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.username,
            role_name
        FROM
            per_roles_dn_vl   prd,
sql:
SELECT
    pp1.role_name   AS rolename1,
    pp2.role_name   AS rolename2
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.username,
            role_name
        FROM
            per_roles_dn_vl   prd,
            per_user_roles    pur,
            per_users         pu
        WHERE
            pur.user_id = pu.user_id
            AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
            AND upper(pu.username) = UPPER (:p_first_name)
    ) pp1,
    (
        SELECT
            pu.username,
            role_name
        FROM
            per_roles_dn_vl   prd,
            per_user_roles    pur,
            per_users         pu
        WHERE
            pur.user_id = pu.user_id
            AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
            AND UPPER(pu.username) = upper(:p_second_name)
    ) pp2
WHERE
    pp1.role_name = pp2.role_name (+)
UNION
SELECT
    pp1.role_name   AS rolename1,
    pp2.role_name   AS rolename2
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            pu.username,
            role_name
        FROM
            per_roles_dn_vl   prd,
            per_user_roles    pur,
            per_users         pu
        WHERE
            pur.user_id = pu.user_id
            AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
            AND upper(pu.username) = upper(:p_first_name)
    ) pp1,
    (
        SELECT
            pu.username,
            role_name
        FROM
            per_roles_dn_vl   prd,
            per_user_roles    pur,
            per_users         pu
        WHERE
            pur.user_id = pu.user_id
            AND pur.role_id = prd.role_id
            AND upper(pu.username) = UPPER(:p_second_name)
    ) pp2
WHERE
    pp1.role_name (+) = pp2.role_name

title: Oracle Fusion OTBI Functions.
description:
Functions
There are various types of functions that you can use in expressions.
Topics:
Aggregate Functions
Analytics Functions
Calendar Functions
Conversion Functions
Display Functions
Evaluate Funct
sql:
SELECT IndexCol(VALUEOF (NQ_SESSION.GEOGRAPHY_LEVEL), Country, State, City), Revenue FROM Sales
Uses external information to return the appropriate column for the signed-in user to see.
NullIf
SELECT e.last_name, NULLIF(e.job_id, j.job_id) "Old Job ID" FROM employees e, job_history j WHERE e.employee_id = j.employee_id ORDER BY last_name, "Old Job ID";
Compares two expressions. If they’re equal, then the function returns null. If they’re not equal, then the function returns the first expression. You can’t specify the literal NULL for the first expression.
To_DateTime
SELECT To_DateTime ('2009-03-0301:01:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh:mi:ss') FROM sales
Converts string literals of dateTime format to a DateTime data type.
Display Functions
Display functions operate on the result set of a query.
Function
Example
Description
BottomN
BottomN(Sales, 10)
Returns the 
n
 lowest values of expression, ranked from lowest to highest.
Filter
Filter(Sales USING Product = 'widgit')
Computes the expression using the given preaggregate filter.
Mavg
Mavg(Sales, 10)
Calculates a moving average (mean) for the last 
n
 rows of data in the result set, inclusive of the current row.
Msum
SELECT Month, Revenue, Msum(Revenue, 3) as 3_MO_SUM FROM Sales
Calculates a moving sum for the last 
n
 rows of data, inclusive of the current row.The sum for the first row is equal to the numeric expression for the first row. The sum for the second row is calculated by taking the sum of the first two rows of data, and so on. When the 
n
th row is reached, the sum is calculated based on the last 
n
 rows of data.
NTile
Ntile(Sales, 100)
Determines the rank of a value in terms of a user-specified range. It returns integers to represent any range of ranks. The example shows a range from 1 to 100, with the lowest sale = 1 and the highest sale = 100.
Percentile
Percentile(Sales)
Calculates a percent rank for each value satisfying the numeric expression argument. The percentile rank ranges are from 0 (1st percentile) to 1 (100th percentile), inclusive.
Rank
Rank(Sales)
Calculates the rank for each value satisfying the numeric expression argument. The highest number is assigned a rank of 1, and each successive rank is assigned the next consecutive integer (2, 3, 4,...). If certain values are equal, they are assigned the same rank (for example, 1, 1, 1, 4, 5, 5, 7...).
Rcount
SELECT month, profit, Rcount(profit) FROM sales WHERE profit > 200
Takes a set of records as input and counts the number of records encountered so far.
Rmax
SELECT month, profit, Rmax(profit) FROM sales
Takes a set of records as input and shows the maximum value based on records encountered so far. The specified data type must be one that can be ordered.
Rmin
SELECT month, profit, Rmin(profit) FROM sales
Takes a set of records as input and shows the minimum value based on records encountered so far. The specified data type must be one that can be ordered.
Rsum
SELECT month, revenue, Rsum(revenue) as RUNNING_SUM FROM sales
Calculates a running sum based on records encountered so far.The sum for the first row is equal to the numeric expression for the first row. The sum for the second row is calculated by taking the sum of the first two rows of data, and so on.
TopN
TopN(Sales, 10)
Returns the 
n
 highest values of expression, ranked from highest to lowest.
Evaluate Functions
Evaluate functions are database functions that can be used to pass through expressions to get advanced calculations.
Embedded database functions can require one or more columns. These columns are referenced by %1 ... %N within the function. The actual columns must be listed after the function.
Function
Example
Description
Evaluate
SELECT EVALUATE('instr(%1, %2)', address, 'Foster City') FROM employees
Passes the specified database function with optional referenced columns as parameters to the database for evaluation.
Evaluate_Aggr
EVALUATE_AGGR('REGR_SLOPE(%1, %2)', sales.quantity, market.marketkey)
Passes the specified database function with optional referenced columns as parameters to the database for evaluation. This function is intended for aggregate functions with a 
GROUP BY
 clause.
Mathematical Functions
The mathematical functions described in this section perform mathematical operations.
Function
Example
Description
Abs
Abs(Profit)
Calculates the absolute value of a numeric expression.
Acos
Acos(1)
Calculates the arc cosine of a numeric expression.
Asin
Asin(1)
Calculates the arc sine of a numeric expression.
Atan
Atan(1)
Calculates the arc tangent of a numeric expression.
Atan2
Atan2(1, 2)
Calculates the arc tangent of 
y
/
x
, where 
y
 is the first numeric expression and 
x
 is the second numeric expression.
Ceiling
Ceiling(Profit)
Rounds a noninteger numeric expression to the next highest integer. If the numeric expression evaluates to an integer, the 
CEILING
 function returns that integer.
Cos
Cos(1)
Calculates the cosine of a numeric expression.
Cot
Cot(1)
Calculates the cotangent of a numeric expression.
Degrees
Degrees(1)
Converts an expression from radians to degrees.
Exp
Exp(4)
Sends the value to the power specified. Calculates 
e
 raised to the n-th power, where 
e
 is the base of the natural logarithm.
ExtractBit
Int ExtractBit(1, 5)
Retrieves a bit at a particular position in an integer. It returns an integer of either 0 or 1 corresponding to the position of the bit.
Floor
Floor(Profit)
Rounds a noninteger numeric expression to the next lowest integer. If the numeric expression evaluates to an integer, the 
FLOOR
 function returns that integer.
Log
Log(1)
Calculates the natural logarithm of an expression.
Log10
Log10(1)
Calculates the base 10 logarithm of an expression.
Mod
Mod(10, 3)
Divides the first numeric expression by the second numeric expression and returns the remainder portion of the quotient.
Pi
Pi()
Returns the constant value of pi.
Power
Power(Profit, 2)
Takes the first numeric expression and raises it to the power specified in the second numeric expression.
Radians
Radians(30)
Converts an expression from degrees to radians.
Rand
Rand()
Returns a pseudo-random number between 0 and 1.
RandFromSeed
Rand(2)
Returns a pseudo-random number based on a seed value. For a given seed value, the same set of random numbers are generated.
Round
Round(2.166000, 2)
Rounds a numeric expression to 
n
 digits of precision.
Sign
Sign(Profit)
This function returns the following:1 if the numeric expression evaluates to a positive number-1 if the numeric expression evaluates to a negative number0 if the numeric expression evaluates to zero
Sin
Sin(1)
Calculates the sine of a numeric expression.
Sqrt
Sqrt(7)
Calculates the square root of the numeric expression argument. The numeric expression must evaluate to a nonnegative number.
Tan
Tan(1)
Calculates the tangent of a numeric expression.
Truncate
Truncate(45.12345, 2)
Truncates a decimal number to return a specified number of places from the decimal point.
String Functions
String functions perform various character manipulations. They operate on character strings.
Function
Example
Description
Ascii
Ascii('a')
Converts a single character string to its corresponding ASCII code, between 0 and 255. If the character expression evaluates to multiple characters, the ASCII code corresponding to the first character in the expression is returned.
Bit_Length
Bit_Length('abcdef')
Returns the length, in bits, of a specified string. Each Unicode character is 2 bytes in length (equal to 16 bits).
Char
Char(35)
Converts a numeric value between 0 and 255 to the character value corresponding to the ASCII code.
Char_Length
Char_Length(Customer_Name)
Returns the length, in number of characters, of a specified string. Leading and trailing blanks aren’t counted in the length of the string.
Concat
SELECT DISTINCT Concat ('abc', 'def') FROM employee
Concatenates two character strings.
Insert
SELECT Insert('123456', 2, 3, 'abcd') FROM table
Inserts a specified character string into a specified location in another character string.
Left
SELECT Left('123456', 3) FROM table
Returns a specified number of characters from the left of a string.
Length
Length(Customer_Name)
Returns the length, in number of characters, of a specified string. The length is returned excluding any trailing blank characters.
Locate
Locate('d' 'abcdef')
Returns the numeric position of a character string in another character string. If the character string isn’t found in the string being searched, the function returns a value of 0.
LocateN
Locate('d' 'abcdef', 3)
Like Locate, returns the numeric position of a character string in another character string. LocateN includes an integer argument that enables you to specify a starting position to begin the search.
Lower
Lower(Customer_Name)
Converts a character string to lowercase.
Octet_Length
Octet_Length('abcdef')
Returns the number of bytes of a specified string.
Position
Position('d', 'abcdef')
Returns the numeric position of 
strExpr1
 in a character expression. If 
strExpr1
 isn’t found, the function returns 0.
Repeat
Repeat('abc', 4)
Repeats a specified expression 
n
 times.
Replace
Replace('abcd1234', '123', 'zz')
Replaces one or more characters from a specified character expression with one or more other characters.
Right
SELECT Right('123456', 3) FROM table
Returns a specified number of characters from the right of a string.
Space
Space(2)
Inserts blank spaces.
Substring
Substring('abcdef' FROM 2)
Creates a new string starting from a fixed number of characters into the original string.
SubstringN
Substring('abcdef' FROM 2 FOR 3)
Like Substring, creates a new string starting from a fixed number of characters into the original string.SubstringN includes an integer argument that enables you to specify the length of the new string, in number of characters.
TrimBoth
Trim(BOTH '_' FROM '_abcdef_')
Strips specified leading and trailing characters from a character string.
TrimLeading
Trim(LEADING '_' FROM '_abcdef')
Strips specified leading characters from a character string.
TrimTrailing
Trim(TRAILING '_' FROM 'abcdef_')
Strips specified trailing characters from a character string.
Upper
Upper(Customer_Name)
Converts a character string to uppercase.
System Functions
The 
USER
 system function returns values relating to the session.
It returns the user name you signed in with.
Time Series Functions
Time series functions are aggregate functions that operate on time dimensions.
The time dimension members must be at or below the level of the function. Because of this, one or more columns that uniquely identify members at or below the given level must be projected in the query.
Function
Example
Description
Ago
SELECT Year_ID, Ago(sales, year, 1)
Calculates the aggregated value of a measure from the current time to a specified time period in the past. For example, 
AGO
 can produce sales for every month of the current quarter and the corresponding quarter-ago sales.
Periodrolling
SELECT Month_ID, Periodrolling (monthly_sales, -1, 1)
Computes the aggregate of a measure over the period starting 
x
 units of time and ending 
y
 units of time from the current time. For example, 
PERIODROLLING
 can compute sales for a period that starts at a quarter before and ends at a quarter after the current quarter.
ToDate
SELECT Year_ID, Month_ID, ToDate (sales, year)
Aggregates a measure from the beginning of a specified time period to the currently displayed time. For example, this function can calculate Year to Date sales.
Forecast
FORECAST(numeric_expr, ([series]), output_column_name, options, [runtime_binded_options])
Creates a time-series model of the specified measure over the series using either Exponential Smoothing or ARMIA and outputs a forecast for a set of periods as specified by numPeriods.

title: How to fetch Dynamic GL Segments: Cost Centre, Account, Balance Segments In Oracle Fusion.
description:
SELECT gcc.code_combination_id,
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,1,gcc.segment1) Segment1_desc,  
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accou
sql:
SELECT gcc.code_combination_id,
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,1,gcc.segment1) Segment1_desc,  
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,2,gcc.segment2) Segment2_desc,
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,3,gcc.segment3) Segment3_desc,
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,4,gcc.segment4) Segment4_desc,
  apps.gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql( gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,5,gcc.segment5) Segment5_desc
from gl_code_combinations gcc
where gcc.code_combination_id = 12854 
======================================================
WITH led_seg AS (
    SELECT
        segment.application_column_name AS seg,
        gls.name,
        fkls.segment_label_code,
        gls.ledger_id
    FROM
        fnd_id_flex_segments_vl     segment,
        fnd_id_flex_structures_vl   struct,
        fnd_id_flexs                flex,
        fnd_application_vl          application,
        fnd_kf_str_instances_vl     fksi,
        gl_ledgers                  gls,
        fnd_kf_labeled_segments     fkls
    WHERE
        struct.id_flex_code = segment.id_flex_code
        AND flex.id_flex_code = segment.id_flex_code
        AND struct.id_flex_num = segment.id_flex_num
        AND fksi.structure_instance_number = struct.id_flex_num
        AND struct.application_id = application.application_id
                   AND application.application_id = 101
        AND gls.chart_of_accounts_id = STRUCT.id_flex_num
        AND fkls.structure_id = fksi.structure_id
                   AND fkls.segment_code = segment.segment_name
        AND fkls.segment_label_code IN (
            'GL_ACCOUNT',
            'FA_COST_CTR',
            'GL_BALANCING'
        )
)
=====================================
 (
                SELECT
                    DECODE(ls.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4', gcc.
                    segment4, 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7)
                FROM
                    led_seg ls
                WHERE
                    segment_label_code = 'FA_COST_CTR'
                    AND rctda.set_of_books_id = ls.ledger_id
            ) AS cost_center,

title: GL Assign Balancing Segment Value to Ledger for Primary Ledger
description:
SELECT
       DISTINCT   
       LG.NAME LEDGER_NAME,
       LE.NAME LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME,
       BSV.SEGMENT_VALUE,
       FFV.FLEX_VALUE_MEANING,
       FFV.DESCRIPTION,
       BSV.START_DATE,
       B
sql:
SELECT
       DISTINCT   
       LG.NAME LEDGER_NAME,
       LE.NAME LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME,
       BSV.SEGMENT_VALUE,
       FFV.FLEX_VALUE_MEANING,
       FFV.DESCRIPTION,
       BSV.START_DATE,
       BSV.END_DATE,
	    TO_CHAR (LG.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (LG.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       LG.created_by,
       LG.last_updated_by	,
LG.ATTRIBUTE1,
LG.ATTRIBUTE2,
LG.ATTRIBUTE3,
LG.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1,
LG.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2,
LG.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3,
LG.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1,
LG.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2,
LG.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3  
  FROM GL_LEDGER_NORM_SEG_VALS BSV,
       GL_LEDGERS LG,
       XLE_ENTITY_PROFILES LE,
       FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS FFS,
       FND_FLEX_VALUES_VL FFV
 WHERE     BSV.SEGMENT_TYPE_CODE = 'B'
       AND NVL (BSV.STATUS_CODE, 'I') <> 'D'
       AND LG.LEDGER_ID = BSV.LEDGER_ID
       AND NVL (LG.COMPLETE_FLAG, 'Y') = 'Y'
       AND LE.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID(+) = BSV.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
       AND LG.BAL_SEG_VALUE_SET_ID = FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID
       AND FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = FFV.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID
       AND BSV.SEGMENT_VALUE = FFV.FLEX_VALUE
       AND LG.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY'
       AND LE.NAME IS NULL
ORDER BY LG.NAME

title: GL Assign Balancing Segment Values to Legal Entities for Primary Ledger
description:
SELECT 
    DISTINCT 
    GLL.LEDGER_NAME PRM_LEG_NAME
    ,GLL.LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME PRM_LE_NAME
    ,FFS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME PRM_COA_NAME
    ,FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME
    ,FFV.FLEX_VALUE PRM_VAL
sql:
SELECT 
    DISTINCT 
    GLL.LEDGER_NAME PRM_LEG_NAME
    ,GLL.LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME PRM_LE_NAME
    ,FFS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME PRM_COA_NAME
    ,FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME
    ,FFV.FLEX_VALUE PRM_VAL
    ,FFV.DESCRIPTION PRM_DESC
    FROM 
    GL_LEDGER_LE_V GLL
    ,FND_ID_FLEX_STRUCTURES_VL FFS
    ,GL_LEGAL_ENTITIES_BSVS GLEB
    ,FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS FFS
    ,FND_FLEX_VALUES_VL FFV
    WHERE 1=1 --GLL.PRIMARY_LEDGER_ID = GLL.LEDGER_ID
    AND GLL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY'
    AND GLL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = FFS.ID_FLEX_NUM
    AND FFS.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
    AND FFS.APPLICATION_ID = 101
    AND GLL.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = GLEB.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
    AND GLEB.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID
    AND FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = FFV.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID
    AND GLEB.FLEX_SEGMENT_VALUE = FFV.FLEX_VALUE
    ORDER BY PRM_LEG_NAME,PRM_LE_NAME

sql:

    GLL.LEDGER_NAME SEC_LEG_NAME

    ,FFS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME SEC_COA_NAME
    ,FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_NAME
    ,FFV.FLEX_VALUE SEC_VAL
    ,FFV.DESCRIPTION SEC_DESC
	,GLEB.START_DATE
	,GLEB.END_DATE,
	TO_CHAR (GLEB.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (GLEB.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       GLEB.created_by,
       GLEB.last_updated_by	
    FROM 
    GL_LEDGER_LE_V GLL
    ,FND_ID_FLEX_STRUCTURES_VL FFS
    ,GL_LEGAL_ENTITIES_BSVS GLEB
    ,FND_FLEX_VALUE_SETS FFS
    ,FND_FLEX_VALUES_VL FFV
    WHERE 1=1 
    AND GLL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'SECONDARY'
    AND GLL.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = FFS.ID_FLEX_NUM
    AND FFS.ID_FLEX_CODE = 'GL#'
    AND FFS.APPLICATION_ID = 101
    AND GLL.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = GLEB.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
    AND GLEB.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID
    AND FFS.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID = FFV.FLEX_VALUE_SET_ID
    AND GLEB.FLEX_SEGMENT_VALUE = FFV.FLEX_VALUE   
    ORDER BY SEC_LEG_NAME,SEC_LE_NAME

title: GL Assign Business Unit Business Function
description:
SELECT DISTINCT BU.bu_name,
                DECODE(BU.STATUS,'A','Active','I','Inactive',BU.STATUS) STATUS,
                business_function_name,
                BU.ENABLED_FOR_HR_FLAG,
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT BU.bu_name,
                DECODE(BU.STATUS,'A','Active','I','Inactive',BU.STATUS) STATUS,
                business_function_name,
                BU.ENABLED_FOR_HR_FLAG,
                XLE.name LEGAL_ENTITY,
                GLV.ledger_name,
                BU.last_update_date,
                BU.last_updated_by,
                BU.creation_date,
                BU.created_by,
 XLE.LEGAL_EMPLOYER_FLAG
 FSET.SET_NAME,
 HL.LOCATION_NAME
FROM   fun_all_business_units_v BU,
       fun_business_functions_vl BF,
       fun_bu_usages_v BUU,
       xle_entity_profiles XLE,
       gl_ledger_le_v GLV,
       hr_locations HL,
       fnd_setid_sets_vl FSET
WHERE  BU.bu_id = BUU.business_unit_id(+)
       AND BUU.module_id = BF.business_function_id (+)
       AND BU.legal_entity_id = XLE.legal_entity_id (+)
       AND BU.legal_entity_id = GLV.legal_entity_id (+)
       AND BU.location_id = HL.location_id (+)
       AND BU.default_set_id = FSET.set_id (+)
       AND GLV.ledger_category_code = 'PRIMARY'
ORDER  BY BU.bu_name

title: GL Define Secondary Ledger - Specify Ledger Options
description:
SELECT GL_PRI.NAME PRI_NAME,
       GL_SEC.NAME,
       GL_SEC.DESCRIPTION,
       FCV.CURRENCY_CODE CURRENCY_CODE,
       FI.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME COA,
       GL_SEC.PERIOD_SET_NAME CALEN,
       GL
sql:
SELECT GL_PRI.NAME PRI_NAME,
       GL_SEC.NAME,
       GL_SEC.DESCRIPTION,
       FCV.CURRENCY_CODE CURRENCY_CODE,
       FI.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME COA,
       GL_SEC.PERIOD_SET_NAME CALEN,
       GL_SEC.FIRST_LEDGER_PERIOD_NAME OPEN_PER,
       GL_SEC.FUTURE_ENTERABLE_PERIODS_LIMIT FUTURE_PER,
       XAM.NAME SLA_CODE,
       FLV.DESCRIPTION LANGUAGE,   
       DECODE (GL_SEC.ENABLE_JE_APPROVAL_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes', 'No')
          JE_APPROVAL,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY_POST_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          ALLOW_INTERCOMPANY,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.AUTOREV_AFTER_OPEN_PRD_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          AUTOREV,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.SEQUENCING_MODE_CODE, 'L', 'Ledger', 'N','No Sequencing','LE','Legal Entity') SEQ_BY,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.ENF_SEQ_DATE_CORRELATION_CODE,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          ENF_DOC_DATE,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.PRIOR_PRD_NOTIFICATION_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          PRIOR_PERIOD,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.POP_UP_STAT_ACCOUNT_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          STATISTICAL_FLAG,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.VALIDATE_JOURNAL_REF_DATE,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          JOURNAL_REF_DATE,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.JRNLS_GROUP_BY_DATE_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes',  'No')
          JOURNAL_IMPORT_GROUP,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.SLA_BAL_BY_LEDGER_CURR_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes', 'No')
          SUSPENSE_SUBLEDGER,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.SUSPENSE_ALLOWED_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes', 'No')
          SUSPENSE_LEDGER,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.NET_CLOSING_BAL_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes', 'No')
          NET_CLOSING_BAL_FLAG,
       DECODE (GL_SEC.AUTOMATE_SEC_JRNL_REV_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes', 'No')
          PRIMARY_AND_SECONDARY,
       GL_SEC.PERIOD_AVERAGE_RATE_TYPE,
       GL_SEC.PERIOD_END_RATE_TYPE,
       DECODE(GL_SEC.AR_DOC_SEQUENCING_OPTION_FLAG,'Y','Yes','No') SEQ_AR,
       DECODE(GL_SEC.AP_DOC_SEQUENCING_OPTION_FLAG,'Y','Yes','No') SEQ_AP,
       CRI.CRITERIA_SET_NAME,
       FND_FLEX_EXT.GET_SEGS ('GL', 'GL#',GL1.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GL_SEC.RET_EARN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-1) RET_EARN_ACC,
       FND_FLEX_EXT.GET_SEGS ('GL', 'GL#',GL2.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GL_SEC.ROUNDING_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-1) ROUNDING_ACC,
       FND_FLEX_EXT.GET_SEGS ('GL', 'GL#',GL3.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GL_SEC.SLA_ENTERED_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID,-1) ENT_CURR_ACCT,
       FND_FLEX_EXT.GET_SEGS ('GL', 'GL#',GL4.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GL_SEC.CUM_TRANS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-1) CUM_TRANS,
       FND_FLEX_EXT.GET_SEGS ('GL', 'GL#',GL5.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID,GSA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-1) DEFAULT_SUSPENSE_ACCOUNT  ,
 TO_CHAR (GL_SEC.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (GL_SEC.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       GL_SEC.created_by,
       GL_SEC.last_updated_by	,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE1,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE2,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE3,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3, 
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2,
GL_SEC.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3 	   
  FROM GL_LEDGERS GL_PRI,
       GL_LEDGERS GL_SEC,
       GL_AUTOREV_CRITERIA_SETS CRI,
       FND_ID_FLEX_STRUCTURES_VL FI,
       GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GL1,
       GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GL2,
       GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GL3,
       GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GL4,
       GL_LEDGER_RELATIONSHIPS GLR,
       GL_SUSPENSE_ACCOUNTS GSA,
       GL_CODE_COMBINATIONS GL5,
       XLA_ACCTG_METHODS_VL XAM,
       FND_LANGUAGES_VL FLV,
       FND_CURRENCIES_VL FCV
 WHERE     GL_SEC.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = FI.ID_FLEX_NUM
       AND GL_SEC.RET_EARN_CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GL1.CODE_COMBINATION_ID(+)
       AND GL_SEC.ROUNDING_CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GL2.CODE_COMBINATION_ID(+)
       AND GL_SEC.SLA_ENTERED_CUR_BAL_SUS_CCID = GL3.CODE_COMBINATION_ID(+)
       AND GL_SEC.CUM_TRANS_CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GL4.CODE_COMBINATION_ID(+)
       AND GL_SEC.CRITERIA_SET_ID = CRI.CRITERIA_SET_ID(+)
       AND GL_SEC.LEDGER_ID = GSA.LEDGER_ID (+)
       AND GSA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = GL5.CODE_COMBINATION_ID(+)
       AND GL_SEC.SLA_ACCOUNTING_METHOD_CODE = XAM.ACCOUNTING_METHOD_CODE (+)
       AND GL_SEC.SLA_DESCRIPTION_LANGUAGE = FLV.LANGUAGE_CODE (+)
       AND GL_SEC.CURRENCY_CODE = FCV.CURRENCY_CODE (+)
       AND GL_PRI.LEDGER_ID = GLR.SOURCE_LEDGER_ID
       AND GL_SEC.LEDGER_ID = GLR.TARGET_LEDGER_ID
       AND GLR.TARGET_LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'SECONDARY'

title: GL Manage Accounting and Reporting Sequencing
description:
SELECT DISTINCT
       FSC.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID,
       FSE.ENTITY_NAME ENTITY_NAME,
       FLU2.MEANING EVENT,
	   FLU2.ENABLED_FLAG,
       FSH.HEADER_NAME,
	   FSH.DESCRIPTION,
       GL.NAME LEDGER_NAME
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
       FSC.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID,
       FSE.ENTITY_NAME ENTITY_NAME,
       FLU2.MEANING EVENT,
	   FLU2.ENABLED_FLAG,
       FSH.HEADER_NAME,
	   FSH.DESCRIPTION,
       GL.NAME LEDGER_NAME,
       (SELECT DISTINCT LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME
          FROM GL_LEDGER_LE_BSV_SPECIFIC_V
         WHERE     LEGAL_ENTITY_ID = FSC.LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
               AND LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID)
          LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME,
       DECODE (FSC.REQUIRE_ASSIGN_FLAG, 'Y', 'Yes', 'No') REQUIRE_FLAG,
       DECODE (FSC.OBSOLETE_FLAG, 'N', 'Enable', 'Disable') OBSOLETE_FLAG,
       GL1.MEANING DATE_TYPE,
       GL2.MEANING SORT_OPTION,
	   FV.USE_STATUS_CODE,
      TO_CHAR (FV.START_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')seq_start_date,
				TO_CHAR (FV.END_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
	    seq_end_date,
       FV.INITIAL_VALUE,
       FV.CURRENT_VALUE,
	   FSA.PRIORITY,
	   FSA.JOURNAL_SOURCE,
	   FSA.JOURNAL_CATEGORY,
	   FSA.ACCOUNTING_EVENT_TYPE,
	   FSA.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_TYPE,
	   FSA.DOCUMENT_CATEGORY,
	 TO_CHAR (FSA.START_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')assignment_start_date,
				TO_CHAR (FSA.END_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
	    assignment_end_date,
	   FSA.USE_STATUS_CODE Assignment_status_code,
	   TO_CHAR (fsh.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (fsh.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       fsh.created_by,
       fsh.last_updated_by
  FROM FUN_SEQ_CONTEXTS FSC,
       FUN_SEQ_ASSIGNMENTS FSA,
       FUN_SEQ_ENTITIES FSE,
       FUN_LOOKUPS FLU2,
       FUN_SEQ_HEADERS FSH,
	   FUN_SEQ_VERSIONS fv,
       GL_LEDGERS GL,
       GL_LOOKUPS GL1,
       GL_LOOKUPS GL2
 WHERE     FSC.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID = FSA.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID(+)
       AND FSC.DATE_TYPE = GL1.LOOKUP_CODE(+)
       AND GL1.LOOKUP_TYPE(+) = 'FUN_SEQ_DATE_TYPE'
       AND FSC.SORT_OPTION = GL2.LOOKUP_CODE(+)
       AND GL2.LOOKUP_TYPE(+) = 'FUN_SEQ_SORT_OPTION'
       AND (    FSE.TABLE_NAME = FSC.TABLE_NAME
            AND FSE.APPLICATION_ID = FSC.APPLICATION_ID)
       AND (    FLU2.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'FUN_SEQ_EVENT'
            AND FLU2.LOOKUP_CODE = FSC.EVENT_CODE)
       AND FSH.SEQ_HEADER_ID(+) = FSA.SEQ_HEADER_ID
	 AND   FSH.SEQ_HEADER_ID = FV.SEQ_HEADER_ID
       AND FSH.HEADER_NAME NOT LIKE '$%'
       AND GL.LEDGER_ID =
              DECODE (FSC.CONTEXT_TYPE,
                      'INTERCOMPANY_BATCH_SOURCE', -99,
                      FSC.CONTEXT_VALUE)
UNION ALL
SELECT DISTINCT
       FSC.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID,
       FSE.ENTITY_NAME ENTITY_NAME,
       FLU2.MEANING EVENT,
	    FLU2.ENABLED_FLAG,
       FSH.HEADER_NAME,
	   FSH.DESCRIPTION,
       NULL LEDGER_NAME,
       NULL LEGAL_ENTITY_NAME,
       DECODE (FSC.REQUIRE_ASSIGN_FLAG, 'Y', 'Yes', 'No') REQUIRE_FLAG,
       DECODE (FSC.OBSOLETE_FLAG, 'N', 'Enable', 'Disable') OBSOLETE_FLAG,
       GL1.MEANING DATE_TYPE,
       GL2.MEANING SORT_OPTION,
	   FV.USE_STATUS_CODE,
	   TO_CHAR (FV.START_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')seq_start_date,
				TO_CHAR (FV.END_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
	    seq_end_date,
       FV.INITIAL_VALUE,
       FV.CURRENT_VALUE,
	   FSA.PRIORITY,
	   FSA.JOURNAL_SOURCE,
	   FSA.JOURNAL_CATEGORY,
	   FSA.ACCOUNTING_EVENT_TYPE,
	   FSA.ACCOUNTING_ENTRY_TYPE,
	   FSA.DOCUMENT_CATEGORY,
	   TO_CHAR (FSA.START_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')assignment_start_date,
				TO_CHAR (FSA.END_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
	    assignment_end_date,
	   FSA.USE_STATUS_CODE Assignment_status_code,
	    TO_CHAR (fsh.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (fsh.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       fsh.created_by,
       fsh.last_updated_by
  FROM FUN_SEQ_CONTEXTS FSC,
       FUN_SEQ_ASSIGNMENTS FSA,
       FUN_SEQ_ENTITIES FSE,
       FUN_LOOKUPS FLU2,
       FUN_SEQ_HEADERS FSH,
	   FUN_SEQ_VERSIONS fv,
       GL_LOOKUPS GL1,
       GL_LOOKUPS GL2
 WHERE     FSC.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID = FSA.SEQ_CONTEXT_ID(+)
       AND FSC.DATE_TYPE = GL1.LOOKUP_CODE(+)
       AND GL1.LOOKUP_TYPE(+) = 'FUN_SEQ_DATE_TYPE'
       AND FSC.SORT_OPTION = GL2.LOOKUP_CODE(+)
       AND GL2.LOOKUP_TYPE(+) = 'FUN_SEQ_SORT_OPTION'
       AND (    FSE.TABLE_NAME = FSC.TABLE_NAME
            AND FSE.APPLICATION_ID = FSC.APPLICATION_ID)
       AND (    FLU2.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'FUN_SEQ_EVENT'
            AND FLU2.LOOKUP_CODE = FSC.EVENT_CODE)
       AND FSH.SEQ_HEADER_ID(+) = FSA.SEQ_HEADER_ID
	   AND   FsH.SEQ_HEADER_ID = FV.SEQ_HEADER_ID
       AND FSH.HEADER_NAME NOT LIKE '$%'
       AND FSC.CONTEXT_TYPE <> 'LEDGER_AND_CURRENCY'
ORDER BY HEADER_NAME

title: Manage Project Cost Detail Report
description: Using this SQL you can easily find the joint between Project, Task, Project ORG, Project Manager Name, Expenditure Type,  Expenditure  Name,  Expenditure  Comments, Burdened Cost, Transaction Source .
sql:
SELECT
    projectcostdistributionpeo.denom_burdened_cost,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.line_num,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.prvdr_gl_date,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.quantity,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.acct_source_code,
    task_table.task_number,
    task_table.task_name,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.segment1      AS project_segment,
    projecttranslationpeo.name   AS project_name,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name    AS bu_name,
  projectcostdistributionpeo.acct_event_id,
    (
        SELECT
            organizationunittranslationpeo.name
        FROM
            hr_organization_units_f_tl organizationunittranslationpeo
        WHERE
            expenditureitempeo.expenditure_organization_id = organizationunittranslationpeo.organization_id
            AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslationpeo.language (+)
            AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_end_date
            (+) )
    ) AS expenditure_organization_name,
    expenditureitempeo.expenditure_type_id,
    transactiondocumentpeo.document_name,
    transactionsourcepeo.user_transaction_source,
    expenditureitempeo.EXPENDITURE_COMMENT	 expenditure_comment,
    expendituretype.expenditure_type_name,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) AS project_manager_name,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.PRVDR_GL_PERIOD_NAME fiscal_period_name,
    projectcostdistributionpeo.PRVDR_GL_PERIOD_NAME fiscal_year_number,
  
    to_char(expenditureitempeo.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE) as ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE
FROM
    pjc_cost_dist_lines_all         projectcostdistributionpeo,
    pjc_exp_items_all               expenditureitempeo,
    pjf_txn_document_vl             transactiondocumentpeo,
    pjf_txn_sources_vl              transactionsourcepeo,
    hr_organization_information_f   expenditurebupeo,
    pjf_projects_all_b              projectbasepeo,
    pjf_projects_all_tl             projecttranslationpeo,
    hr_organization_v               projectowningorgdpeo,
    pjf_exp_types_vl                expendituretype,
    pjf_exp_types_b                 biflexfieldeo,
    pjf_tasks_v                     task_table,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v      project_managet_project
WHERE
    ( projectcostdistributionpeo.expenditure_item_id = expenditureitempeo.expenditure_item_id
      AND expenditureitempeo.document_id = transactiondocumentpeo.document_id
      AND expenditureitempeo.transaction_source_id = transactionsourcepeo.transaction_source_id
      AND projectcostdistributionpeo.org_id = expenditurebupeo.organization_id
      AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = expenditurebupeo.org_information_context
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN expenditurebupeo.effective_start_date AND expenditurebupeo.effective_end_date ) )
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projectcostdistributionpeo.project_id
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id
    AND task_table.task_id = projectcostdistributionpeo.task_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language
    AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id
    AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code
    AND expenditureitempeo.expenditure_type_id = expendituretype.expenditure_type_id (+)
    AND biflexfieldeo.expenditure_type_id = expenditureitempeo.expenditure_type_id
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date )
    AND ( project_managet_project.resource_source_id IN (
        :p_manager_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_manager_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectbasepeo.project_id IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectbasepeo.project_id IN (
        :p_project_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_number || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( task_table.task_id IN (
        :p_task_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_task_number || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( expenditureitempeo.expenditure_organization_id IN (
        :p_org_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_org_name || 'All'
    ) )

title: GL Manage AutoPost Criteria Set
description:
SELECT SETS.AUTOPOST_SET_NAME SET_NAME,
SETS.SUBMIT_APPROVAL_AS_CREATOR,
       SETS.DESCRIPTION SET_DESCRIPTION,
       DECODE(SETS.ENABLED_FLAG,'Y','Yes','No') ENABLE_FLAG,
       INITCAP(APO.PERIOD
sql:
SELECT SETS.AUTOPOST_SET_NAME SET_NAME,
SETS.SUBMIT_APPROVAL_AS_CREATOR,
       SETS.DESCRIPTION SET_DESCRIPTION,
       DECODE(SETS.ENABLED_FLAG,'Y','Yes','No') ENABLE_FLAG,
       INITCAP(APO.PERIOD_NAME) PERIOD_NAME,       
       DECODE (APO.LEDGER_ID, -1234567890, LK.MEANING, LED.NAME) LEDGER_NAME,
       DECODE (APO.JE_SOURCE_NAME,
               'ALL', LK.MEANING,
               SRC.USER_JE_SOURCE_NAME)
          USER_JE_SOURCE_NAME,
       DECODE (APO.JE_CATEGORY_NAME,
               'ALL', LK.MEANING,
               CAT.USER_JE_CATEGORY_NAME)
          USER_JE_CATEGORY_NAME,
       APO.POSTING_PRIORITY POSTING_PRIORITY,
       INITCAP(DECODE(APO.ACTUAL_FLAG,'A','ACTUAL','E','ENCUBRANCE',APO.ACTUAL_FLAG))  ACTUAL_FLAG,
    TO_CHAR (SETS.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') creation_date,
     TO_CHAR (SETS.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
  SETS.EFFECTIVE_DAYS_BEFORE,
  SETS.EFFECTIVE_DAYS_AFTER,
  SETS.SUBMIT_ALL_PRIORITIES_FLAG,
  SETS.NUM_OF_PRIORITY_OPTIONS,
       SETS.created_by,
       SETS.last_updated_by,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE1,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE2,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE3,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE4,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE5,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE6,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE7,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE8,
SETS.ATTRIBUTE9
  FROM GL_LOOKUPS LK,
       GL_LEDGERS LED,
       GL_JE_SOURCES SRC,
       GL_JE_CATEGORIES CAT,
       GL_AUTOMATIC_POSTING_SETS SETS,
       GL_AUTOMATIC_POSTING_OPTIONS APO
 WHERE     SETS.AUTOPOST_SET_ID = APO.AUTOPOST_SET_ID (+)
       AND LED.LEDGER_ID(+) = APO.LEDGER_ID 
       AND SRC.JE_SOURCE_NAME(+) = APO.JE_SOURCE_NAME
       AND CAT.JE_CATEGORY_NAME(+) = APO.JE_CATEGORY_NAME
       AND LK.LOOKUP_TYPE(+) = 'LITERAL'
       AND LK.LOOKUP_CODE(+) = 'ALL'

SELECT

    gjh.creation_date,

    gjh
sql:
SELECT

    gjh.posted_date,

    gls.user_je_source_name     "SOURCE",
    glc.user_je_category_name   "CATEGORY",

title: General Ledger GL Manage Important Fileds Detail SQL
description:
GL Manage Business Unit Set Assignment
SELECT 
DISTINCT 
FAB.BU_NAME,
FSG.VISIBLE_GROUP_NAME,
--FSS.SET_CODE,
--FSS.SET_NAME,
FSA.CREATED_BY,
FSA.CREATION_DATE,
FSA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
FSA.LAST_UPDATE_DA
sql:
SELECT 
DISTINCT 
FAB.BU_NAME,
FSG.VISIBLE_GROUP_NAME,
--FSS.SET_CODE,
--FSS.SET_NAME,
FSA.CREATED_BY,
FSA.CREATION_DATE,
FSA.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
FSA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
FROM 
FND_SETID_ASSIGNMENTS FSA,
FND_SETID_REFERENCE_GROUPS_VL FSG,
FND_SETID_SETS_VL FSS,
FUN_ALL_BUSINESS_UNITS_V FAB

AND FSA.REFERENCE_GROUP_NAME = FSG.REFERENCE_GROUP_NAME

ORDER BY FAB.BU_NAME,FSG.VISIBLE_GROUP_NAME
GL Manage Business Unit
SELECT bu.bu_name,
       Decode(bu.status, 'A', 'Active',
                         'I', 'Inactive',
                         bu.status)      status,
       hl.location_name,
       Replace(To_char(Cast(bu.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME zone),
                       'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
               || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') last_update_date,
       bu.last_updated_by,
       Replace(To_char(Cast(bu.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME zone),
                       'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
               || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') creation_date,
       bu.created_by,
       fss.set_code,
       ppnf.full_name
FROM   fun_all_business_units_v BU,
       hr_locations HL,
       fnd_setid_sets_vl FSS,
       per_person_names_f ppnf
WHERE  hl.location_id(+) = bu.location_id
       AND fss.set_id(+) = bu.default_set_id
       AND bu.manager_id = ppnf.person_id
ORDER  BY bu.bu_name 
GL Manage Chart of Accounts Mapping
SELECT  
GCM.NAME
,GCM.DESCRIPTION
, GCM.last_update_date
,GCM.last_updated_by
,GCM.creation_date
 ,GCM.created_by
