GL_COA_MAPPINGS GCM
order by gcm.name
GL Manage Chart of Accounts Structure Instances
SELECT
    fksiv.structure_instance_code,
    fksiv.name strcu_inst_name,
    fksiv.description struct_inst_desc,
    DECODE(fksiv.enabled_flag,'Y','Yes','No') structure_enabled,
    DECODE(fksiv.dynamic_combo_creation_flag,'Y','Yes','No') dynamic_creation,
    fav.application_name,
    fifs.segment_code,
    DECODE(fifs.required_flag,'Y','Yes','No') required_flag,
    DECODE(fifs.display_flag,'Y','Yes','No') display_flag,
    valueset.flex_value_set_name,
    ksv.name structure_name,
    fksiv.key_flexfield_code,
    fksiv.structure_instance_identifier,
    fifs.query_required_type,
    fifs.tree_code,
    fifs.default_value,
	fkf.DEPLOYMENT_STATUS,
 TO_CHAR (fkf.DEPLOYMENT_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')DEPLOYMENT_DATE,
fkf.DEPLOYMENT_ERROR_MESSAGE, 
   TO_CHAR (fksiv.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (fksiv.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       fksiv.created_by,
       fksiv.last_updated_by
FROM
    fnd_kf_str_instances_vl fksiv,
    fnd_kf_structures_vl ksv,
    fnd_application_vl fav,
    fnd_kf_segment_instances fifs,
    fnd_flex_value_sets valueset,
    FND_KF_SEGMENTS_B FKS,
	fnd_kf_flexfields_vl fkf
WHERE
    fksiv.application_id = fav.application_id
    AND   ksv.application_id = fksiv.application_id
    AND   ksv.structure_id = fksiv.structure_id
    AND   fifs.structure_instance_id = fksiv.structure_instance_id
    AND   valueset.flex_value_set_id = fifs.value_set_id
     AND KSV.STRUCTURE_ID = FKS.STRUCTURE_ID
     AND FIFS.SEGMENT_CODE = FKS.SEGMENT_CODE
	  AND   fksiv.key_flexfield_code = fkf.key_flexfield_code
    AND   fksiv.application_id = 101
    order by  fksiv.structure_instance_code,FKS.SEQUENCE_NUMBER
GL Manage Chart of Accounts Structures
SELECT
    struct.structure_code,
struct.structure_code segment_structure_code,
struct.name structure_name,
    struct.description struct_desc,
    application.application_name,
    struct.key_flexfield_code,
    fkf.name kff_name,
    CASE
            WHEN struct.delimiter = '.' THEN '.(Dot)'
            ELSE struct.delimiter
        END
    delimiter,
segment.SEGMENT_IDENTIFIER,
segment.SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
segment.DISPLAY_WIDTH,
segment.RANGE_TYPE,
segment.NAME,
segment.SHORT_PROMPT,
segment.DESCRIPTION,
segment.ENABLED_FLAG segment_enabled_flag,
    segment.segment_code,
    segment.column_name,
    segment.prompt promp,
    DECODE(segment.enabled_flag,'Y','Yes','No') enabled_flag,
    --DECODE(segment.required_flag,'Y','Yes','No') required_flag,
    valueset.flex_value_set_name,
fkf.DEPLOYMENT_STATUS,
 TO_CHAR (fkf.DEPLOYMENT_DATE,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')DEPLOYMENT_DATE,
fkf.DEPLOYMENT_ERROR_MESSAGE, 
   TO_CHAR (struct.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (struct.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       struct.created_by,
       struct.last_updated_by
FROM
    fnd_kf_structures_vl struct,
    fnd_application_vl application,
    fnd_kf_flexfields_vl fkf,
    fnd_kf_segments_vl segment,
    fnd_flex_value_sets valueset,
    FND_KF_SEGMENTS_B FKS
WHERE
    struct.application_id = application.application_id
    AND   application.application_id = 101
    AND   struct.key_flexfield_code = fkf.key_flexfield_code
    AND   segment.structure_id = struct.structure_id
    AND   valueset.flex_value_set_id = segment.default_value_set_id
      AND struct.STRUCTURE_ID = FKS.STRUCTURE_ID
     AND segment.SEGMENT_CODE = FKS.SEGMENT_CODE
     order by     struct.structure_code,FKS.SEQUENCE_NUMBER
GL Manage Chart of Accounts Value Sets - Accounting Scenarios
/* Formatted on 5/24/2018 10:31:49 AM (QP5 v5.149.1003.31008) */
SELECT fvvs.value_set_code,
       fvvs.description,
       favl.user_module_name,
       fl_vt.meaning                             validation_type,
       fl_vdt.meaning                            value_data_type,
       FVVS.creation_date,
       FVVS.created_by,
       FVVS.last_update_date,
       FVVS.last_updated_by
FROM   fnd_vs_value_sets fvvs,
       fnd_appl_taxonomy_vl favl,
       fnd_lookups fl_vt,
       fnd_lookups fl_vdt,
       fnd_lookups fl_vst
WHERE  fvvs.module_id = favl.module_id
       AND fvvs.validation_type = fl_vt.lookup_code
       AND fl_vt.lookup_type = 'FND_VS_VALIDATION_TYPES'
       AND fl_vt.enabled_flag = 'Y'
       AND fvvs.value_data_type = fl_vdt.lookup_code
       AND fl_vdt.lookup_type = 'FND_VS_VALUE_DATA_TYPES'
       AND fl_vdt.enabled_flag = 'Y'
       AND fvvs.value_subtype = fl_vst.lookup_code
       AND fl_vst.lookup_type = 'FND_VS_VARCHAR2_SUBTYPES'
       AND fl_vst.enabled_flag = 'Y'
       AND favl.user_module_name = 'General Ledger'
       AND fvvs.value_set_id IN (SELECT flex_value_set_id
                                 FROM   fnd_id_flex_segments_vl
                                 WHERE  application_id = 101
                                        AND id_flex_code = 'GL#')
ORDER  BY 1,
          favl.user_module_name 
SELECT fvvs.value_set_code value_set_code,
       fvvb.value,
       Trunc (fvvb.start_date_active),
       Trunc (fvvb.end_date_active),
       fvvb.enabled_flag,
       fvvtl.description,
       fvvs.created_by,
       fvvs.creation_date,
       fvvs.last_update_date,
       fvvs.last_updated_by
FROM   fnd_vs_value_sets fvvs,
       fnd_vs_values_b fvvb,
       fnd_vs_values_tl fvvtl
WHERE  fvvtl.value_id = fvvb.value_id
       AND Trim (Upper (fvvtl.language)) = Trim ('US')
       AND fvvs.value_set_id = fvvb.value_set_id
       AND Trim (Upper (fvvs.value_set_code)) = Trim ('ACCOUNTING SCENARIO') 
GL Manage Chart of Accounts Value Sets
SELECT
    fvvs.value_set_code,
fvvs.PROTECTED_FLAG,
fvvs.UPPERCASE_ONLY_FLAG,
fvvs.ZERO_FILL_FLAG,
fvvs.MINIMUM_VALUE,
fvvs.MAXIMUM_VALUE,
fvvs.DATA_SECURITY_OBJECT_NAME,
    fvvs.description,
    favl.user_module_name,
    fl_vt.meaning         validation_type,
    fl_vdt.meaning        value_data_type,
    fl_vst.meaning        value_sub_type,
    decode(fvvs.security_enabled_flag, 'Y', 'Yes', 'No') security_enabled,
    fvvs.maximum_length   max_length,
     TO_CHAR (fvvs.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (fvvs.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       fvvs.created_by,
       fvvs.last_updated_by
FROM
    fnd_vs_value_sets      fvvs,
    fnd_appl_taxonomy_vl   favl,
    fnd_lookups            fl_vt,
    fnd_lookups            fl_vdt,
    fnd_lookups            fl_vst
WHERE
    fvvs.module_id = favl.module_id
    AND fvvs.validation_type = fl_vt.lookup_code
    AND fl_vt.lookup_type = 'FND_VS_VALIDATION_TYPES'
    AND fl_vt.enabled_flag = 'Y'
    AND fvvs.value_data_type = fl_vdt.lookup_code
    AND fl_vdt.lookup_type = 'FND_VS_VALUE_DATA_TYPES'
    AND fl_vdt.enabled_flag = 'Y'
    AND fvvs.value_subtype = fl_vst.lookup_code
    AND fl_vst.lookup_type = 'FND_VS_VARCHAR2_SUBTYPES'
    AND fl_vst.enabled_flag = 'Y'
    AND favl.user_module_name = 'General Ledger'
    AND fvvs.value_set_id IN (
        SELECT
            flex_value_set_id
        FROM
            fnd_id_flex_segments_vl
        WHERE
            application_id = 101
            AND id_flex_code = 'GL#'
    )
ORDER BY
    1,
    favl.user_module_name
GL Manage Cross Validation Rules
SELECT 
FFS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME,
--FFS.DESCRIPTION FFS_DESC,
--FFS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_CODE,
--FKC.RULE_CODE,
FKC.DESCRIPTION,
DECODE(FKC.ENABLED_FLAG,'Y','Yes','No') ENABLED_FLAG,
FKC.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
FKC.END_DATE_ACTIVE ,
FKC.CONDITION_FILTER,
FKC.VALIDATION_FILTER,
FKC.ERROR_MSG_NAME,
FKC.last_update_date,
FKC.last_updated_by,
FKC.creation_date,
FKC.created_by
FROM 
FND_KF_CROSS_VAL_RULES FKC
,FND_ID_FLEX_STRUCTURES_VL FFS
WHERE 1=1
AND FKC.STRUCTURE_INSTANCE_ID = FFS.ID_FLEX_NUM
AND FFS.APPLICATION_ID = 101
AND FFS.ID_FLEX_CODE ='GL#'
GL Manage Data Access Sets
SELECT  GA.NAME NAME,  
GA.DESCRIPTION,     
       GL1.MEANING SECURITY_SEGMENT_CODE,
       FS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME,
       GA.PERIOD_SET_NAME PERIOD_SET_NAME,
       GLD2.NAME DEFAULT_LEDGER,
       GLD.NAME LEDGER_NAME,
       GL2.MEANING PRIVILEGE,
       DECODE (GLD.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE,'L','Ledger','S','Ledger Set') SEGMENT_VALUE_TYPE_CODE,
       DECODE (GNA.ALL_SEGMENT_VALUE_FLAG,  'Y', 'Yes', 'No') ALL_VALUES,
   GA.ENABLED_FLAG,
   TO_CHAR (GA.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') creation_date,
GNA.FLEX_FILTER SPECIFIC_VALUE,
GNA.TREE_CODE,
GNA.TREE_VERSION_ID TREE_VERSION_NAME,
GNA.SEGMENT_VALUE,
GL1.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
GL1.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
         
       TO_CHAR (GA.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       GA.created_by,
       GA.last_updated_by,
GA.ATTRIBUTE1,
GA.ATTRIBUTE2,
GA.ATTRIBUTE3,
GA.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1,
GA.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2,
GA.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3,
GA.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1,
GA.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2,
GA.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3    
  FROM
       GL_ACCESS_SETS GA,
       GL_ACCESS_SET_NORM_ASSIGN GNA,      
       GL_LEDGERS GLD,
       GL_LEDGERS GLD2,       
       GL_LOOKUPS GL1,
       GL_LOOKUPS GL2,
        FND_ID_FLEX_STRUCTURES_VL FS
 WHERE 1=1
       AND GA.ACCESS_SET_ID = GNA.ACCESS_SET_ID (+)
       AND GNA.LEDGER_ID = GLD.LEDGER_ID (+)  
       AND GA.DEFAULT_LEDGER_ID = GLD2.LEDGER_ID (+)
       AND GA.SECURITY_SEGMENT_CODE = GL1.LOOKUP_CODE(+)
       AND GL1.LOOKUP_TYPE (+) = 'GL_DAS_ACCESS_SET_TYPE'
       AND GNA.ACCESS_PRIVILEGE_CODE = GL2.LOOKUP_CODE(+)
       AND GL2.LOOKUP_TYPE (+) = 'GL_DAS_ACCESS_PRIV_CODE'
       AND GA.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = FS.ID_FLEX_NUM (+)
       AND FS.APPLICATION_ID (+)= 101
       AND FS.ID_FLEX_CODE (+)= 'GL#'
GL Manage General Ledger Descriptive Flexfields
SELECT fdfv.title flexfield_name,
       fdfv.descriptive_flexfield_name flexfield_code,
       fdfv.description,
       fdfv.application_id,
       fdfv1.deployment_status,
       fdfv.concatenated_segment_delimiter segment_separator,
       (SELECT favl.user_module_name
          FROM fnd_df_flexfields_b fdfb, fnd_appl_taxonomy_vl favl
         WHERE     1 = 1
               AND fdfv.descriptive_flexfield_name =
                      fdfb.descriptive_flexfield_code
               AND fdfb.module_id = favl.module_id)
          user_module_name,
FAV.last_update_date,
       FAV.last_updated_by,
       FAV.creation_date,
       FAV.created_by
  FROM fnd_application_vl fav, fnd_descriptive_flexs_vl fdfv,
  fnd_df_flexfields_vl fdfv1
 WHERE     1 = 1
       AND fav.application_name = 'General Ledger'
       AND fav.application_id = fdfv.application_id
       AND  fdfv.descriptive_flexfield_name = FDFV1.DESCRIPTIVE_FLEXFIELD_CODE
order by 1
GL Manage Journal Categories
SELECT user_je_category_name             NAME,
       je_category_key,
       description,
       last_updated_by,
       Replace(To_char(Cast(last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH time zone),
                       'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
               || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') last_update_date,
       Replace(To_char(Cast(creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH time zone),
                       'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
               || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') creation_date,
       created_by,
       attribute1,
       attribute2,
       attribute3,
       attribute_number1,
       attribute_number2,
       attribute_number3,
       attribute_date1,
       attribute_date2,
       attribute_date3
FROM   gl_je_categories_vl
-- WHERE CREATED_BY NOT LIKE 'SEED_DATA_FROM_APPLICATION'
GL Manage Journal Reversal Criteria Sets
SELECT GLC.CRITERIA_SET_NAME,
       GLC.CRITERIA_SET_DESC,
       --GLC.SECURITY_FLAG,
       GJC.USER_JE_CATEGORY_NAME,
       GL.MEANING REVERSAL_PERIOD_CODE,
       GL2.MEANING METHOD_CODE,       
       GL3.MEANING REVERSAL_DATE_CODE,
       CASE WHEN GAO.AUTOREVERSE_FLAG ='Y' AND GAO.AUTOPOST_REVERSAL_FLAG ='Y'
       THEN 'Reverse and Post Automatically'
       WHEN GAO.AUTOREVERSE_FLAG ='Y' AND GAO.AUTOPOST_REVERSAL_FLAG ='N'
       THEN 'Reverse Automatically'
       WHEN GAO.AUTOREVERSE_FLAG ='N' AND GAO.AUTOPOST_REVERSAL_FLAG ='N'
       THEN 'None'      
       END AUTOREVERSE_FLAG,
  GLC.last_update_date,
       GLC.last_updated_by,
       GLC.creation_date,
       GLC.created_by,
	   GLC.ATTRIBUTE1,
	   GLC.ATTRIBUTE2,
	   GLC.ATTRIBUTE3
  FROM 
  GL_AUTOREV_CRITERIA_SETS GLC, 
  GL_AUTOREVERSE_OPTIONS GAO,
  GL_JE_CATEGORIES GJC,
  GL_LOOKUPS GL,
  GL_LOOKUPS GL2,
  GL_LOOKUPS GL3
 WHERE GLC.CRITERIA_SET_ID = GAO.CRITERIA_SET_ID(+)
 AND GAO.REVERSAL_PERIOD_CODE = GL.LOOKUP_CODE (+)
 AND GL.LOOKUP_TYPE (+) = 'AUTOREVERSE_REVERSAL_PERIOD' 
 AND GAO.METHOD_CODE = GL2.LOOKUP_CODE (+)
 AND GL2.LOOKUP_TYPE (+) = 'AUTOREVERSE_METHOD_CODE'
 AND GAO.REVERSAL_DATE_CODE = GL3.LOOKUP_CODE (+)
 AND GL3.LOOKUP_TYPE (+) = 'AUTOREVERSE_DATE_RULE'
 AND GAO.JE_CATEGORY_NAME=GJC.JE_CATEGORY_NAME
ORDER BY GLC.CRITERIA_SET_NAME,GAO.JE_CATEGORY_NAME
GL Manage Journal Sources
SELECT -- GJ.USER_JE_SOURCE_NAME,
-- GJ.JE_SOURCE_NAME,
GJ.je_source_key,
GJ.description,
Decode (GJ.journal_reference_flag, 'Y', 'YES',
                                   'NO')       JOURNAL_REFERENCE,
Decode (GJ.journal_approval_flag, 'Y', 'YES',
                                  'NO')        JOURNAL_APPROVAL,
Decode (GJ.import_using_key_flag, 'Y', 'YES',
                                  'NO')        IMPORT_USING_KEY,
Upper(GL2.meaning)                             OVERRIDE_EDITS,
GL.meaning                                     DATE_RULE_CODE,
Decode (gj.single_currency_journal_flag, 'Y', 'YES',
                                         'NO') SINGLE_CURRENCY_JOURNAL_FLAG,
Replace(To_char(Cast(gj.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME zone),
                'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
        || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T')              last_update_date,
Replace(To_char(Cast(gj.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME zone),
                'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
        || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T')              creation_date,
gj.created_by,
gj.attribute1,
gj.attribute2,
gj.attribute3,
gj.attribute_number1,
gj.attribute_number2,
gj.attribute_number3,
gj.attribute_date1,
gj.attribute_date2,
gj.attribute_date3
FROM   gl_je_sources_vl GJ,
       gl_lookups GL,
       gl_lookups GL2
WHERE  GJ.effective_date_rule_code = GL.lookup_code(+)
       AND GL.lookup_type(+) = 'GL_JE_SOURCE_ACC_DATE_RULE'
       AND GJ.override_edits_flag = GL2.lookup_code(+)
       AND GL2.lookup_type(+) = 'GL_JE_SOURCE_OVERRIDE_CODE'
--       AND GJ.CREATED_BY != 'SEED_DATA_FROM_APPLICATION'
GL Manage Ledger Sets
SELECT 
GLLS.NAME LS_NAME
,FS.ID_FLEX_STRUCTURE_NAME LS_CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_NAME
,GLLS.DESCRIPTION LS_DESCRIPTION
,GLLS.PERIOD_SET_NAME LS_CALENDER
,GL2.NAME DEFAULT_LEDGER
,GL.NAME GL_NAME
,GLUP.MEANING GL_TYPE
,GL.DESCRIPTION GL_DESCRIPTION
,GLS.START_DATE
,GLS.END_DATE
, TO_CHAR (GL.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (GL.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       GL.created_by,
       GL.last_updated_by	,
GL.ATTRIBUTE1,
GL.ATTRIBUTE2,
GL.ATTRIBUTE3,
GL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1,
GL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2,
GL.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3,
GL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1,
GL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2,
GL.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3 
FROM 
GL_LEDGER_SET_NORM_ASSIGN GLS
,GL_LEDGERS GLLS
,GL_LEDGERS GL
,GL_LEDGERS GL2
,GL_ACCESS_SETS GAS
,GL_LOOKUPS GLUP
,FND_ID_FLEX_STRUCTURES_VL FS
WHERE 1=1
AND GLS.LEDGER_SET_ID = GLLS.LEDGER_ID(+)
AND  GLS.LEDGER_ID = GL.LEDGER_ID (+)
AND GLLS.IMPLICIT_ACCESS_SET_ID = GAS.ACCESS_SET_ID (+)
AND GAS.DEFAULT_LEDGER_ID = GL2.LEDGER_ID (+)
AND GL.OBJECT_TYPE_CODE = GLUP.LOOKUP_CODE (+)
AND GLUP.LOOKUP_TYPE (+) = 'LEDGERS' 
AND FS.APPLICATION_ID (+)= 101
AND FS.ID_FLEX_CODE (+)= 'GL#'
AND GLLS.CHART_OF_ACCOUNTS_ID = FS.ID_FLEX_NUM (+) 
ORDER BY GLLS.NAME,GL.NAME
GL Manage Sub Ledger Accounting Options
SELECT gl.name ledger_name,
       fat.application_name sub_ledger_application,
       (SELECT meaning
          FROM fnd_lookup_values
         WHERE     UPPER (TRIM (lookup_type)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM ('XLA_ROUNDING_RULE'))
               AND UPPER (TRIM (language)) = UPPER (TRIM (USERENV ('LANG')))
               AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
               AND UPPER (TRIM (lookup_code)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM (xlao.rounding_rule_code)))
          rouding_rule,
       (SELECT meaning
          FROM fnd_lookup_values
         WHERE     UPPER (TRIM (lookup_type)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM ('XLA_REVERSAL_OPTIONS'))
               AND UPPER (TRIM (language)) = UPPER (TRIM (USERENV ('LANG')))
               AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
               AND UPPER (TRIM (lookup_code)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM (xlao.acct_reversal_option_code)))
          reversal_method,
       (SELECT meaning
          FROM fnd_lookup_values
         WHERE     UPPER (TRIM (lookup_type)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM ('XLA_MERGE_OPTIONS'))
               AND UPPER (TRIM (language)) = UPPER (TRIM (USERENV ('LANG')))
               AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
               AND UPPER (TRIM (lookup_code)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM (xlao.merge_acct_option_code)))
          merge_accounting_opetion,
       (SELECT meaning
          FROM fnd_lookup_values
         WHERE     UPPER (TRIM (lookup_type)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM ('XLA_GL_TRANSFER_MODE'))
               AND UPPER (TRIM (language)) = UPPER (TRIM (USERENV ('LANG')))
               AND enabled_flag = 'Y'
               AND UPPER (TRIM (lookup_code)) =
                      UPPER (TRIM (xlao.transfer_to_gl_mode_code)))
          genral_entry_summarize,
       (SELECT name
          FROM xla_tab_acct_defs_tl
         WHERE     application_id = fat.application_id
               AND UPPER (TRIM (language)) = UPPER (TRIM (USERENV ('LANG')))
               AND account_definition_code = xlao.account_definition_code)
          account_def_type,
gl.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
gl.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
gl.CREATION_DATE,
gl.CREATED_BY,
gl.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
gl.ATTRIBUTE1,
gl.ATTRIBUTE2,
gl.ATTRIBUTE3,
gl.ATTRIBUTE4,
gl.ATTRIBUTE5,
gl.ATTRIBUTE6,
gl.ATTRIBUTE7,
gl.ATTRIBUTE8,
gl.ATTRIBUTE9,
gl.ATTRIBUTE10,
gl.ATTRIBUTE11,
gl.ATTRIBUTE12,
gl.ATTRIBUTE13,
gl.ATTRIBUTE14,
gl.ATTRIBUTE15,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER1,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER2,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER3,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER4,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_NUMBER5,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_DATE1,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_DATE2,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_DATE3,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_DATE4,
gl.ATTRIBUTE_DATE5
  FROM gl_ledgers gl, xla_ledger_options xlao, fnd_application_tl fat
 WHERE     1 = 1
       AND fat.language = 'US'
       AND fat.application_id = xlao.application_id
       AND gl.ledger_id = xlao.ledger_id
GL Publish Account Hierarchies
SELECT FT.TREE_NAME,
       gcc.tree_code || '_V1',
      ftv1.DESCRIPTION,
       FVVS.VALUE_SET_CODE,
        ftv.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE,
       ftv.EFFECTIVE_end_DATE,
       decode(GCC.PUBLISH_FLAG,'N','No','Yes') PUBLISH_FLAG,
       FTV1.TREE_VERSION_NAME,
     TO_CHAR (ft.creation_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          creation_date,
       TO_CHAR (ft.last_update_date,
                'DD-Mon-YYYY',
                'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH')
          last_update_date,
       ft.created_by,
       ft.last_updated_by
  FROM GL_COA_TREE_VERSIONS_AGGR_DTLS gcc,
       FND_TREE_TL ft,
       FND_VS_VALUE_SETS FVVS,
       FND_TREE_STRUCTURE_TL fts,
       FND_TREE_VERSION ftv,
       FND_TREE_VERSION_TL ftv1
 WHERE     FT.TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE = GCC.TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE
 AND FT.TREE_CODE = GCC.TREE_CODE
       AND gcc.VALUE_SET_ID = fvvs.VALUE_SET_ID
       AND gcc.TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE = fts.TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE
       AND ftv.TREE_VERSION_ID = gcc.TREE_VERSION_ID
       AND ftv1.TREE_VERSION_ID = gcc.TREE_VERSION_ID
       AND FT.LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')
       AND FTV1.LANGUAGE   = USERENV ('lang')
       AND FTS.LANGUAGE = USERENV ('lang')
GL View Available Asset Books
SELECT hou.NAME                                   bu_name,
       gl.NAME,
       gl.currency_code,
  --     fbc.book_type_code,
       fbc.book_type_name,
       Decode (fbc.gl_posting_allowed_flag, 'Y', 'Yes',
                                            'No') gl_posting_allowed_flag,
       fdp.period_name,
       gl.last_update_date,
       gl.last_updated_by,
       gl.creation_date,
       gl.created_by,
       gl.attribute1,
       gl.attribute2,
       gl.attribute3,
       gl.attribute_number1,
       gl.attribute_number2,
       gl.attribute_number3,
       gl.attribute_date1,
       gl.attribute_date2,
       gl.attribute_date3
FROM   gl_ledgers gl,
       hr_operating_units hou,
       fa_book_controls fbc,
       fa_deprn_periods fdp
WHERE  fbc.book_type_code = fdp.book_type_code
       AND hou.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
       AND hou.set_of_books_id = fbc.set_of_books_id
       AND fdp.period_close_date IS NULL
--       and fbc.INITIAL_PERIOD_COUNTER=fdp.PERIOD_COUNTER
ORDER  BY fdp.period_name,
          fbc.book_type_code
GL View Service Clients (FA)
SELECT hou.NAME                                   bu_name,
       gl.NAME,
       gl.currency_code,
       fbc.book_type_code,
       fbc.book_type_name,
       Decode (fbc.gl_posting_allowed_flag, 'Y', 'Yes',
                                            'No') gl_posting_allowed_flag,
       fdp.period_name,
       gl.last_update_date,
       gl.last_updated_by,
       gl.creation_date,
       gl.created_by,
       gl.attribute1,
       gl.attribute2,
       gl.attribute3,
       gl.attribute_number1,
       gl.attribute_number2,
       gl.attribute_number3,
       gl.attribute_date1,
       gl.attribute_date2,
       gl.attribute_date3
FROM   gl_ledgers gl,
       hr_operating_units hou,
       fa_book_controls fbc,
       fa_deprn_periods fdp
WHERE  fbc.book_type_code = fdp.book_type_code
       AND hou.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
       AND hou.set_of_books_id = fbc.set_of_books_id
       AND fdp.period_close_date IS NULL
--       and fbc.INITIAL_PERIOD_COUNTER=fdp.PERIOD_COUNTER
ORDER  BY fdp.period_name,
          fbc.book_type_code 
Thank you
Pulkit Kumar Jain

title: GL Transaction Listing Report
sql:
WITH led_seg AS (
    SELECT
        segment.application_column_name AS seg,
        gls.name,
        fkls.segment_label_code,
        gls.ledger_id
    FROM
        fnd_id_flex_segments_vl     segment,
        fnd_id_flex_structures_vl   struct,
        fnd_id_flexs                flex,
        fnd_application_vl          application,
        fnd_kf_str_instances_vl     fksi,
        gl_ledgers                  gls,
        fnd_kf_labeled_segments     fkls
    WHERE
        struct.id_flex_code = segment.id_flex_code
        AND flex.id_flex_code = segment.id_flex_code
        AND struct.id_flex_num = segment.id_flex_num
        AND fksi.structure_instance_number = struct.id_flex_num
        AND struct.application_id = application.application_id
                   AND application.application_id = 101
        AND gls.chart_of_accounts_id = STRUCT.id_flex_num
        AND fkls.structure_id = fksi.structure_id
                   AND fkls.segment_code = segment.segment_name
        AND fkls.segment_label_code IN (
            'GL_ACCOUNT',
            'FA_COST_CTR',
            'GL_BALANCING'
        )
        AND ( gls.ledger_id IN (
            :p_ledger
        )
              OR 'All' IN (
            :p_ledger || 'All'
        ) )
)
SELECT
    period_num,
    code_combination_id,
    concatenated_seg,
    natural_account,
    nat_acc_desc,
    cost_centre_account,
    cc_acc_desc,
    balance_account,
    bal_acc_desc,
    period_name,
    SUM(accounted_amt_cr) accounted_amt_cr,
    SUM(accounted_amt_dr) accounted_amt_dr,
    SUM(net_amount) net_amount,
    source,
    category,
    batch_name,
    header_name,
    header_desc,
    line_desc,
    je_line_num,
    posted_date,
    user_data,
    party_name,
    po_num,
    receipt_num,
    invoice_num,
    cust_name,
    ar_txn_num,
    employee_name,
    employee_number,
    created_by,
    creation_date,
    posted_username,
    approved_date,
    doc_sequence_value,
    batch_approver,
    period_year,
    batch_desc,
    voucher_number,
    project_num,
    project_name,
    task_number,
    task_name,
    sla_transaction_number,
    sla_desc,
    application_id,
    ae_header_id,
    event_type_code,
    accounting_entry_type_code,
    prod_link,
    prod_link1
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            gp.period_num,
            gcc.code_combination_id,
            gcc.segment1
            || '-'
            || gcc.segment2
            || '-'
            || gcc.segment3
            || '-'
            || gcc.segment4
            || '-'
            || gcc.segment5
            || '-'
            || gcc.segment6 concatenated_seg,
            DECODE(natural_account_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4'
            , gcc.segment4, 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) AS natural_account,
            gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql(gcc.chart_of_accounts_id, substr(natural_account_seg.seg, 8, 1), ----- Position of segment
             DECODE(natural_account_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4', gcc.segment4
            , 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) ---- Segment value
            ) nat_acc_desc,
            DECODE(cost_centre_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4',
            gcc.segment4, 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) AS cost_centre_account,
            gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql(gcc.chart_of_accounts_id, substr(cost_centre_seg.seg, 8, 1), ----- Position of segment
             DECODE(cost_centre_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4', gcc.segment4
            , 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) ---- Segment value
            ) cc_acc_desc,
            DECODE(balance_account_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4'
            , gcc.segment4, 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) AS balance_account,
            gl_flexfields_pkg.get_description_sql(gcc.chart_of_accounts_id, substr(balance_account_seg.seg, 8, 1), ----- Position of segment
             DECODE(balance_account_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4', gcc.segment4
            , 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) ---- Segment value
            ) bal_acc_desc,
            gjl.period_name,
            nvl(SUM(xdl.unrounded_accounted_cr), 0) accounted_amt_cr,
            nvl(SUM(xdl.unrounded_accounted_dr), 0) accounted_amt_dr,
            nvl(SUM(nvl(xdl.unrounded_accounted_dr, 0)) - SUM(nvl(xdl.unrounded_accounted_cr, 0)), 0) net_amount,
            gjh.je_source            source,
            gjh.je_category          category,
            gjb.name                 batch_name,
            gjh.name                 header_name,
            gjh.description          header_desc,
            gjl.description          line_desc,
            gjl.je_line_num,
            gjh.posted_date,
            CASE
                WHEN gjl.description IS NOT NULL THEN
                    gjl.description
                WHEN gjh.je_category = 'Purchase Invoices' THEN
                    'Supplier Name:'
                    || nvl((
                        SELECT
                            party_name
                        FROM
                            hz_parties
                        WHERE
                            party_id =(
                                SELECT
                                    party_id
                                FROM
                                    ap_invoices_all
                                WHERE
                                    invoice_id = to_number(xdl.alloc_to_source_id_num_1)
                            )
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    ),(
                        SELECT
                            vendor_name
                        FROM
                            poz_suppliers_v
                        WHERE
                            vendor_id = xal.party_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    ))
                    || ' Invoice Number:'
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            invoice_num
                        FROM
                            ap_invoices_all
                        WHERE
                            invoice_id = to_number(xdl.alloc_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Invoice Description:'
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            replace(description, CHR(10), ' ') description
                        FROM
                            ap_invoices_all
                        WHERE
                            invoice_id = to_number(xdl.alloc_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Batch Name:'
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            batch_name
                        FROM
                            ap_invoices_all   aia,
                            ap_batches_all    aba
                        WHERE
                            invoice_id = to_number(xdl.alloc_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND aba.batch_id = aia.batch_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' PO Number:'
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            segment1
                        FROM
                            po_headers_all
                        WHERE
                            po_header_id = to_number(xdl.applied_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_category = 'Payments'          THEN
                    ' Supplier Name:'
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            vendor_name
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Payment Number: '
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            check_number
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Bank Acc Name:  '
                    || nvl((
                        SELECT
                            cba.bank_account_name
                        FROM
                            ce_bank_accounts        cba, ap_checks_all           aca, ce_bank_acct_uses_all   cbusa
                        WHERE
                            1 = 1
                            AND xte.source_id_int_1 = aca.check_id
                            AND aca.ce_bank_acct_use_id = cbusa.bank_acct_use_id
                            AND cba.bank_account_id = cbusa.bank_account_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    ), nvl((
                        SELECT
                            cba.bank_account_name
                        FROM
                            iby_payments_all   ipa, ce_bank_accounts   cba
                        WHERE
                            ipa.payment_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND cba.bank_account_id = ipa.internal_bank_account_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    ),(
                        SELECT
                            bank_account_name
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )))
                    || ' Payment Description: '
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            description
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                ELSE
                    ' Payment Number: '
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            check_number
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Bank Acc Name: '
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            bank_account_name
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Description: '
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            description
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                    || ' Supplier Name:'
                    || (
                        SELECT
                            vendor_name
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
            END user_data,
            CASE
                WHEN gjh.je_category = 'Payments' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            vendor_name
                        FROM
                            ap_checks_all
                        WHERE
                            check_id = xte.source_id_int_1
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                ELSE
                    nvl((
                        SELECT
                            party_name
                        FROM
                            hz_parties
                        WHERE
                            party_id =(
                                SELECT
                                    party_id
                                FROM
                                    ap_invoices_all
                                WHERE
                                    invoice_id = to_number(xdl.alloc_to_source_id_num_1)
                            )
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    ),(
                        SELECT
                            vendor_name
                        FROM
                            poz_suppliers_v
                        WHERE
                            vendor_id = xal.party_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    ))
            END party_name,
            CASE
                WHEN gjh.je_category IN (
                    'Purchase Invoices'
                )
                     AND xdl.applied_to_entity_code = 'PO' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            segment1
                        FROM
                            po_headers_all
                        WHERE
                            po_header_id = to_number(xdl.applied_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_category IN (
                    'Purchase Invoices'
                )
                     AND xdl.applied_to_entity_code != 'PO'
                     AND xdl.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            pha.segment1
                        FROM
                            po_distributions_all           pda,
                            po_headers_all                 pha,
                            ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida
                        WHERE
                            aida.invoice_distribution_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND aida.po_distribution_id = pda.po_distribution_id
                            AND pha.po_header_id = pda.po_header_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_source = 'Receipt Accounting' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            source_doc_number
                        FROM
                            cmr_rcv_events          cre,
                            cmr_rcv_distributions   crd
                        WHERE
                            crd.cmr_sub_ledger_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND crd.accounting_event_id = cre.accounting_event_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1 --rownum is used as list is through distribution level
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_category IN (
                    'Payments',
                    'Reconciled Payments'
                ) THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            pha.segment1
                        FROM
                            ap_payment_hist_dists          hist,
                            po_distributions_all           pda,
                            po_headers_all                 pha,
                            ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida
                        WHERE
                            payment_hist_dist_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND hist.invoice_distribution_id = aida.invoice_distribution_id
                            AND aida.po_distribution_id = pda.po_distribution_id
                            AND pha.po_header_id = pda.po_header_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                ELSE
                    NULL
            END po_num,
            CASE
                WHEN gjh.je_category IN (
                    'Purchase Invoices'
                )
                     AND xdl.applied_to_entity_code = 'PO' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            h.receipt_num
                        FROM
                            rcv_shipment_headers   h,
                            rcv_shipment_lines     l
                        WHERE
                            l.po_header_id = to_number(xdl.applied_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND h.shipment_header_id = l.shipment_header_id
                            AND l.source_document_code = 'PO'
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_category IN (
                    'Purchase Invoices'
                )
                     AND xdl.applied_to_entity_code != 'PO'
                     AND xdl.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            rsh.receipt_num
                        FROM
                            po_distributions_all           pda,
                            ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                            rcv_shipment_headers           rsh,
                            rcv_shipment_lines             rsl
                        WHERE
                            aida.invoice_distribution_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND aida.po_distribution_id = pda.po_distribution_id
                            AND rsl.po_header_id = pda.po_header_id
                            AND rsh.shipment_header_id = rsl.shipment_header_id
                            AND rsl.source_document_code = 'PO'
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_source = 'Receipt Accounting' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            receipt_number
                        FROM
                            cmr_rcv_events          cre,
                            cmr_rcv_distributions   crd,
                            cmr_rcv_transactions    crt
                        WHERE
                            crd.cmr_sub_ledger_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND crd.accounting_event_id = cre.accounting_event_id
                            AND cre.cmr_rcv_transaction_id = crt.cmr_rcv_transaction_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1 --rownum is used as list is through distribution level
                    )
                WHEN gjh.je_category IN (
                    'Payments',
                    'Reconciled Payments'
                ) THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            rsh.receipt_num
                        FROM
                            ap_payment_hist_dists          hist,
                            po_distributions_all           pda,
                            ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                            rcv_shipment_headers           rsh,
                            rcv_shipment_lines             rsl
                        WHERE
                            payment_hist_dist_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND hist.invoice_distribution_id = aida.invoice_distribution_id
                            AND aida.po_distribution_id = pda.po_distribution_id
                            AND rsl.po_header_id = pda.po_header_id
                            AND rsh.shipment_header_id = rsl.shipment_header_id
                            AND rsl.source_document_code = 'PO'
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                ELSE
                    NULL
            END receipt_num,
            CASE
                                --WHEN GJH.JE_CATEGORY  IN ('Payments', 'Reconciled Payments') THEN
                WHEN xdl.source_distribution_type = 'AP_PMT_DIST'      THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            invoice_num
                        FROM
                            ap_payment_hist_dists          hist,
                            ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                            ap_invoices_all                aia
                        WHERE
                            payment_hist_dist_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND hist.invoice_distribution_id = aida.invoice_distribution_id
                            AND aia.invoice_id = aida.invoice_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN nvl(xdl.alloc_to_entity_code, 'A') = 'AP_INVOICES' THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            invoice_num
                        FROM
                            ap_invoices_all
                        WHERE
                            invoice_id = to_number(xdl.alloc_to_source_id_num_1)
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                WHEN xdl.source_distribution_type = 'AP_INV_DIST'      THEN
                    (
                        SELECT
                            invoice_num
                        FROM
                            ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                            ap_invoices_all                aia
                        WHERE
                            aida.invoice_distribution_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                            AND aia.invoice_id = aida.invoice_id
                            AND ROWNUM = 1
                    )
                ELSE
                    NULL
            END invoice_num,
            NULL cust_name,
            NULL ar_txn_num,
            (
                SELECT
                    ppnf.full_name
                FROM
                    per_person_names_f             ppnf,
                    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                    ap_invoices_all                aia
                WHERE
                    aida.invoice_distribution_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                    AND aia.invoice_id = aida.invoice_id
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
                    AND aia.paid_on_behalf_employee_id = ppnf.person_id
                    AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date) )
            ) employee_name,
            (
                SELECT
                    papf.person_number
                FROM
                    per_all_people_f               papf,
                    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                    ap_invoices_all                aia
                WHERE
                    aida.invoice_distribution_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
                    AND aia.invoice_id = aida.invoice_id
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
                    AND aia.paid_on_behalf_employee_id = papf.person_id
                    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN effective_start_date AND effective_end_date )
            ) employee_number,
            (
                SELECT
                    ppnf.display_name
                FROM
                    per_users            pu,
                    per_person_names_f   ppnf
                WHERE
                    username = gjh.created_by
                    AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN nvl(ppnf.effective_start_date, SYSDATE) AND nvl(ppnf.effective_end_date, SYSDATE)
                    AND upper(ppnf.name_type) = upper('GLOBAL')
                    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN nvl(pu.start_date, SYSDATE) AND nvl(pu.end_date, SYSDATE)
            ) created_by,
            gjh.creation_date,
            (
                SELECT
                    MAX(user_id)
                FROM
                    gl_je_action_log
                WHERE
                    je_batch_id = gjb.je_batch_id
                    AND action_code = 'POSTED'
            ) posted_username,
            (
                SELECT
                    MAX(action_date)
                FROM
                    gl_je_action_log
                WHERE
                    je_batch_id = gjb.je_batch_id
                    AND action_code = 'APPROVED'
            ) approved_date,
            gjh.doc_sequence_value,
            (
                SELECT
                    MAX(full_name)
                FROM
                    per_person_names_f
                WHERE
                    person_id = approver_employee_id
                    AND name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            ) batch_approver,
            gp.period_year,
            gjb.description          batch_desc,
            (
                SELECT
                    aia.doc_sequence_value
                FROM
                    ap_invoices_all aia
                WHERE
                    aia.invoice_id = xdl.applied_to_source_id_num_1
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) voucher_number,
            project_num,
            project_name,
            task_number,
            task_name,
            xah.description          sla_desc,
            xte.transaction_number   sla_transaction_number,
            xah.application_id,
            xah.ae_header_id,
            xah.event_type_code,
            xah.accounting_entry_type_code,
            ( 'https://'
              || (
                SELECT
                    external_virtual_host pod_url
                FROM
                    ask_deployed_domains
                WHERE
                    deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
            )
              || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=XLA_SUBLEDGER_VIEWJOURNAL&action=VIEW&objKey=applicationId='
              || xah.application_id
              || ';aeHeaderId='
              || xah.ae_header_id ) AS prod_link,
            ( 'https://'
              || (
                SELECT
                    external_virtual_host pod_url
                FROM
                    ask_deployed_domains
                WHERE
                    deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
            )
              || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=GL_EDITJOURNAL&action=EDIT&objKey=jeBatchId='
              || gjb.je_batch_id
              || ';jeHeaderId='
              || gjh.je_header_id ) AS prod_link1
        FROM
            xla_ae_lines               xal,
            xla_distribution_links     xdl,
            xla_ae_headers             xah,
            gl_import_references       gir,
            gl_ledgers                 gl,
            led_seg                    natural_account_seg,
            led_seg                    cost_centre_seg,
            led_seg                    balance_account_seg,
            gl_je_headers              gjh,
            gl_je_lines                gjl,
            gl_code_combinations       gcc,
            gl_je_batches              gjb,
            gl_period_statuses         gp,
            xla_transaction_entities   xte,
            (
                SELECT
                    segment1    project_num,
                    ppat.name   project_name,
                    aida.invoice_distribution_id
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                    ap_invoice_lines_all           aila,
                    pjf_projects_all_b             ppa,
                    pjf_projects_all_tl            ppat
                WHERE
                    aida.invoice_line_number = aila.line_number
                    AND aida.invoice_id = aila.invoice_id
                    AND aila.pjc_project_id = ppa.project_id
                    AND ppat.project_id = ppa.project_id
                    AND ppat.language = 'US'
            ) proj_det,
            (
                SELECT
                    pt.task_number,
                    pt.description AS task_name,
                    aida.invoice_distribution_id
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                    ap_invoice_lines_all           aila,
                    pjf_tasks_v                    pt
                WHERE
                    aida.invoice_line_number = aila.line_number
                    AND aida.invoice_id = aila.invoice_id
                    AND aila.pjc_task_id = pt.task_id
            ) task_det
        WHERE
            gjh.je_source = 'Payables'
            AND gjh.actual_flag = 'A'
            AND gjl.status = 'P'
            AND natural_account_seg.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND natural_account_seg.segment_label_code = 'GL_ACCOUNT'
            AND cost_centre_seg.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND cost_centre_seg.segment_label_code = 'FA_COST_CTR'
            AND balance_account_seg.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND balance_account_seg.segment_label_code = 'GL_BALANCING'
            AND xah.entity_id = xte.entity_id (+)
            AND gjb.je_batch_id (+) = gjh.je_batch_id
            AND gl.ledger_id = gjh.ledger_id
            AND xal.ae_header_id = xdl.ae_header_id
            AND xal.ae_line_num = xdl.ae_line_num
            AND xal.application_id = xdl.application_id
            AND xah.ae_header_id = xal.ae_header_id
            AND proj_det.invoice_distribution_id (+) = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
            AND task_det.invoice_distribution_id (+) = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
            AND xah.application_id = xal.application_id
            AND accounting_line_code <> 'AP_NON_RECOV_TAX_ACCRUAL_INV'
            AND gir.gl_sl_link_id = xal.gl_sl_link_id
            AND gir.gl_sl_link_table = xal.gl_sl_link_table
            AND gir.je_header_id = gjl.je_header_id
            AND gir.je_line_num = gjl.je_line_num
            AND gjl.je_header_id = gjh.je_header_id
            AND gcc.code_combination_id = gjl.code_combination_id
            AND gjl.period_name = gp.period_name
            AND gl.ledger_id = gp.ledger_id
            AND gp.application_id = 200
            AND ( gl.ledger_id IN (
                :p_ledger
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_ledger || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( gp.period_year IN (
                :p_year
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_year || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( gp.period_name IN (
                :p_period
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_period || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( gjb.name IN (
                :p_batch
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_batch || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( gjh.je_source IN (
                :p_source
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_source || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( gjh.je_category IN (
                :p_category
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_category || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( ( gcc.segment1
                    || '-'
                    || gcc.segment2
                    || '-'
                    || gcc.segment3
                    || '-'
                    || gcc.segment4
                    || '-'
                    || gcc.segment5
                    || '-'
                    || gcc.segment6 ) IN (
                :p_concatenated_seg
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_concatenated_seg || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( DECODE(natural_account_seg.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2, 'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4'
            , gcc.segment4, 'SEGMENT5', gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) IN (
                :p_natural_account
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_natural_account || 'All'

title: Customer Account Not Used In Last N Months In Oracle Fusion
description:
In the Below SQL, you can find Customer Account Not Used In Last N Months by default it will give you the last 6-month analysis.
It will check the customer not used on AR transaction ( Bill - To, Ship
sql:
WITH max_pp AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        bill_to_customer_id AS customer_id
    FROM
        ra_customer_trx_all
    GROUP BY
        bill_to_customer_id
    UNION
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        ship_to_customer_id AS customer_id
    FROM
        ra_customer_trx_all
    GROUP BY
        ship_to_customer_id
    UNION
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        customer_id
    FROM
        ar_cash_recos_all
    GROUP BY
        customer_id
            UNION
              SELECT MAX (creation_Date) AS creation_date,
        sold_to_customer_id AS customer_id
    FROM
        doo_headers_all
    GROUP BY
        sold_to_customer_id
    UNION
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        pay_from_customer AS customer_id
    FROM
        ar_cash_receipts_all
            GROUP BY
        pay_from_customer
    UNION
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        customer_id
    FROM
        ar_payment_schedules_all
    GROUP BY
        customer_id
)
SELECT
    hca.ACCOUNT_NUMBER,
    hca.cust_account_id,
    hca.creation_date,
    hca.created_by,
    hca.status,
    hca.account_name,
    hp.party_name,
    hp.party_number,
    CASE
        WHEN ( hca.account_termination_date > SYSDATE ) THEN
            'Active'
        ELSE
            'Inactive'
    END AS termination_status,
    (
        SELECT
            nvl(TO_CHAR(MAX(pp.creation_date), 'DD-MM-YYYY'), 'Never Used')
        FROM
            max_pp pp
        WHERE
            pp.customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
    ) AS last_transacted_by,
    CASE
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(MAX(pp.creation_date))
            FROM
                max_pp pp
            WHERE
                pp.customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
        ) BETWEEN 0 AND 180
          THEN
             'Between 0 to 180 Days'
          WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(MAX(pp.creation_date))
            FROM
                max_pp pp
            WHERE
                pp.customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
        ) BETWEEN 181 AND 360 THEN
            'Between 181 to 360 Days'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(MAX(pp.creation_date))
            FROM
                max_pp pp
            WHERE
                pp.customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
        ) BETWEEN 361 AND 720 THEN
            'Between 1 to 2 Years'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(SYSDATE) - trunc(MAX(pp.creation_date))
            FROM
                max_pp pp
            WHERE
                pp.customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
        ) BETWEEN 721 AND 1080 THEN
            'Between 2 to 3 Years'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(MAX(pp.creation_date))
            FROM
                max_pp pp
            WHERE
                pp.customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
        ) IS NULL THEN
            'Never Used'
    END AS bucket,
    TO_CHAR(hca.creation_date, 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || TO_CHAR(hca.creation_date, 'YY') month_date
FROM
    hz_cust_accounts   hca,
    hz_parties         hp
WHERE
    hca.party_id = hp.party_id
    AND hca.cust_account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT
            nvl(bill_to_customer_id, 1235)
        FROM
            ra_customer_trx_all
        WHERE
            trunc(creation_date) BETWEEN trunc(add_months(SYSDATE, - nvl(:p_month, 6))) AND trunc(SYSDATE)
    )
    AND hca.cust_account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT
            nvl(ship_to_customer_id, 1235)
        FROM
            ra_customer_trx_all
        WHERE
            trunc(creation_date) BETWEEN trunc(add_months(SYSDATE, - nvl(:p_month, 6))) AND trunc(SYSDATE)
    )
    AND hca.cust_account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT
            nvl(customer_id, 1235)
        FROM
            ar_cash_recos_all
        WHERE
            trunc(creation_date) BETWEEN trunc(add_months(SYSDATE, - nvl(:p_month, 6))) AND trunc(SYSDATE)
    )
    AND hca.cust_account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT
            nvl(sold_to_customer_id, 1235)
        FROM
            doo_headers_all
        WHERE
            trunc(creation_date) BETWEEN trunc(add_months(SYSDATE, - nvl(:p_month, 6))) AND trunc(SYSDATE)
    )
    AND hca.cust_account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT
            nvl(pay_from_customer, 1235)
        FROM
            ar_cash_receipts_all
        WHERE
            trunc(creation_date) BETWEEN trunc(add_months(SYSDATE, - nvl(:p_month, 6))) AND trunc(SYSDATE)
    )
    AND hca.cust_account_id NOT IN (
        SELECT NVL(customer_id, 1235)
        FROM
            ar_payment_schedules_all
        WHERE
            trunc(creation_date) BETWEEN trunc(add_months(SYSDATE, - nvl(:p_month, 6))) AND trunc(SYSDATE)
    )
Please find the Sample  Output of the report.

title: Open AR Transaction With Inactive Customer
description:
In the below SQL you can find Open Transaction With Inactive Customer, Customer Inactive level (Customer, Customer Site, Customer Site Use).
Using this SQL you can filter the data based on 
Ledger Nam
sql:
SELECT
    rcta.customer_trx_id,
    rcta.creation_date,
    pu.username,
    rcta.trx_number,
    rcta.trx_date,
    rcta.status_trx,
    hca.account_number,
    hca.cust_account_id,
    hou.name   AS business_unit,
    gl.name    AS ledger_name,
    TO_CHAR(hca.account_termination_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd')
            AS ACCOUNT_TERMINATION_DATE,
         (SELECT
            SUM(rctla.extended_amount)
        FROM
            ra_customer_trx_lines_all rctla
        WHERE
            rctla.customer_trx_id = rcta.customer_trx_id
    ) amount,
    hp.party_name,
    hps.party_site_number,
    hps.party_site_name,
    (
        SELECT
            SUM(apsa.amount_due_remaining)
        FROM
            ar_payment_schedules_all apsa
        WHERE
            rcta.customer_trx_id = apsa.customer_trx_id
    ) reamaing_amount,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( hca.account_termination_date < SYSDATE ) THEN
                'Customer'
        END
        ||
        CASE WHEN ( hca.account_termination_date < SYSDATE ) THEN
                ','
        END
        ||
        CASE
            WHEN ( hcasa.end_date < SYSDATE ) THEN
                'Customer Site'
        END
        ||
        CASE
            WHEN ( hcasa.end_date < SYSDATE ) THEN
                ','
        END
        ||
        CASE
            WHEN ( hcsua.end_date < SYSDATE ) THEN
                'Customer Site Use'
        END
    ) AS level_wise
FROM
    ra_customer_trx_all      rcta,
    hz_cust_accounts         hca,
    hz_cust_acct_sites_all   hcasa,
    hz_cust_site_uses_all    hcsua,
    hr_organization_units    hou,
    gl_ledgers               gl,
    per_users                pu,
    hz_parties               hp,
    hz_party_sites           hps
WHERE
    rcta.bill_to_customer_id = hca.cust_account_id
         AND rcta.bill_to_site_use_id = hcsua.site_use_id
    AND hcsua.cust_acct_site_id = hcasa.cust_acct_site_id
    AND hca.cust_account_id = hcasa.cust_account_id (+)
    AND rcta.org_id = hou.organization_id (+)
    AND rcta.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id (+)
    AND (
        SELECT
            SUM(apsa.amount_due_remaining)
        FROM
            ar_payment_schedules_all apsa
               WHERE
            rcta.customer_trx_id = apsa.customer_trx_id
    ) != 0
         --   AND rcta.TRX_NUMBER = '331360'
         AND ( hca.account_termination_date < SYSDATE
          OR hcasa.end_date < SYSDATE
          OR hcsua.end_date < SYSDATE )
    AND rcta.created_by = pu.username
    AND hca.party_id = hp.party_id (+)
    AND hcasa.party_site_id = hps.party_site_id (+)
    AND ( rcta.org_id IN (
        :p_org_id
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_org_id || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( pu.user_id IN (
        :p_user
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_user || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( rcta.set_of_books_id IN (
        :p_ledger
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( trunc(rcta.trx_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, trunc(rcta.trx_date)) AND nvl(:p_end_date, trunc(rcta.trx_date)) )
    AND ( trunc(rcta.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(rcta.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(rcta.creation_date
    )) )
ORDER BY
    hca.cust_account_id,
    rcta.customer_trx_id
Please find the below sample Output of the Report.

title: GL Period Close Analysis
description:
Please find the Below SQL For GL Period Close Analysis, using this Analysis you can identify 7 types of Analysis.
Application And Ledger Level Period Close
Genral ledger application Level Period Close
sql:
SELECT
    AVG(time_diff) AS time_diff1,
    application_name,
    name
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            fav.application_name,
            ( trunc(gp.last_update_date) - trunc(gp.end_date) ) AS time_diff,
            gl.name
        FROM
            gl_period_statuses   gp,
            fnd_application_vl   fav,
            gl_ledgers           gl
        WHERE
            gp.application_id=FAV.APPLICATION_ID
and GP.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND gp.application_id = '101'
            AND gp.closing_status IN (
                'C',
                'P',
                'W'
            )
            AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                  OR gl.name IN (    SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+',
                                                       1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND (:p_period IS NULL
                  OR gp.period_year IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+',
                                                               1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            fav.application_name,
            ( trunc(gp.last_update_date) - trunc(gp.end_date) ) AS time_diff,
            gl.name
        FROM
            gl_period_statuses   gp,
            fnd_application_vl   fav,
            gl_ledgers           gl
        WHERE
            gp.application_id = fav.application_id
            AND gp.application_id='200'
and gp.closing_status IN (
                'C',
                'P',
                'W'
            )
            AND gl.ledger_id = gp.set_of_books_id
            AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                  OR gl.name IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                                           IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( :p_period IS NULL
                  OR GP.period_year IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            fav.application_name,
            ( trunc(gp.last_update_date) - trunc(gp.end_date) ) AS time_diff,
            gl.name
        FROM
            gl_period_statuses   gp,
            fnd_application_vl   fav,
            gl_ledgers           gl
        WHERE
            gp.application_id = fav.application_id
            AND gp.application_id = '222'
            AND gp.closing_status IN (
                'C',
                'P',
                'W'
            )
            AND gl.ledger_id = gp.set_of_books_id
            AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                  OR gl.name IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+',
                                                       1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( :p_period IS NULL
                  OR gp.period_year IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            fav.application_name,
            ( trunc(gp.last_update_date) - trunc(gp.end_date) ) AS time_diff,
            gl.name
        FROM
            gl_period_statuses   gp,
            fnd_application_vl   fav,
            gl_ledgers           gl
        WHERE
            gp.application_id = fav.application_id
            AND gp.application_id = '10037'
            AND gp.closing_status IN (
                'C',
                'P',
                'W'
            )
            AND gl.ledger_id = gp.set_of_books_id
            AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                  OR gl.name IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( :p_period IS NULL
                  OR gp.period_year IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            'Fixed Asset' AS application_name,
            CASE
                WHEN ( fdp.period_close_date IS NOT NULL ) THEN
                    round(fdp.period_close_date - all_period.end_date, 2)
                ELSE
                    NULL
            END time_diff,
            all_period.name
        FROM
            fa_deprn_periods fdp,
            (
                SELECT
                    fcp.period_name,
                    fbc.book_type_code,
                    ffy.fiscal_year_name,
                    fcp.end_date,
                    fcp.start_date,
                    fbc.deprn_calendar,
                    gl.name,
                    gl.ledger_id,
                    fcp.start_date start_date1,
                    fbc.book_type_name
                FROM
                    fa_fiscal_year        ffy,
                    fa_book_controls      fbc,
                    fa_calendar_periods   fcp,
                    gl_ledgers            gl
                WHERE
                    fbc.fiscal_year_name = ffy.fiscal_year_name
                    AND fcp.calendar_type = fbc.deprn_calendar
                    AND ( fcp.start_date BETWEEN ffy.start_date AND ffy.end_date )
                    AND fbc.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
                    AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                          OR gl.name IN (
                        SELECT
                            regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                        FROM
                            dual
                        CONNECT BY
                            regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
                    ) )
                    AND ( :p_period IS NULL
                          OR ffy.fiscal_year IN (
                        SELECT
                            regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                        FROM
                            dual
                        CONNECT BY
                            regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
                    ) )
            ) all_period
        WHERE
            all_period.book_type_code = fdp.book_type_code (+)
            AND fdp.period_close_date IS NOT NULL
            AND all_period.period_name = fdp.period_name (+)
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            'Cost Management' AS application_name,
            (
                CASE
                    WHEN cps.status_code = 'C' THEN
                        round(trunc(cps.last_update_date) - trunc(cps.end_date), 2)
                    ELSE
                        NULL
                END
            ) time_diff,
            gl.name
        FROM
            cst_period_statuses   cps,
            cst_cost_books_vl     ccbv,
            hr_organization_v     hov,
            cst_cost_org_books    ccob,
            gl_ledgers            gl,
            gl_calendars          gc
        WHERE
            cps.cost_book_id = ccbv.cost_book_id
            AND cps.cost_org_id = hov.organization_id
            AND ccob.cost_book_id = cps.cost_book_id
            AND ccob.cost_org_id = cps.cost_org_id
            AND ccob.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND cps.status_code = 'C'
            AND gc.calendar_id = ccob.calendar_id
            AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(hov.effective_start_date) AND trunc(effective_end_date)
            AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                  OR gl.name IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+',
                                                       1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( :p_period IS NULL
                  OR cps.period_year IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
    )
GROUP BY
    application_name,
    name
Genral ledger application Level Period Close
