    gp.period_name,
GP.set_of_books_id,
    gp.application_id,
    fav.application_name,
    fav.product_code,
    gl.name,
    ( trunc(gp.last_update_date) - trunc(gp.end_date)) AS time_diff,
    DECODE(gp.closing_status, 'C', 'Closed', 'F', 'Future Entry', 'N', 'Never Opened', 'O', 'Open', 'P', 'Permanently Closed',
                             'W', 'Waiting'
    ) AS status
FROM
    gl_period_statuses   gp,
    fnd_application_vl   fav,
    gl_ledgers           gl
WHERE
    gp.application_id = fav.application_id
    AND gp.application_id = '10037'
    AND gp.closing_status IN (
        'C',
        'P',
        'W'
    )
    AND gl.ledger_id = gp.set_of_books_id
    AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
          OR gl.name IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                                   FROM DUAL
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_period IS NULL
          OR gp.period_year IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr (:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
Fixed Asset application Level Period Close
SELECT
    fdp.period_close_date,
    'Fixed Asset' AS application_name,
    fdp.period_open_date,
    TO_CHAR(all_period.start_date1, 'YYYYMMDD') sort_start_date,
    fdp.fiscal_year,
    all_period.period_name,
    all_period.book_type_code,
    all_period.fiscal_year_name,
    all_period.end_date,
    all_period.start_date,
    all_period.deprn_calendar,
    all_period.NAME as ledger_name,
         ALL_PERIOD.book_type_name,
    (
        SELECT
            pp.period_name
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    pp2.period_name
                FROM
                    fa_book_controls      pp1,
                    fa_calendar_periods   pp2
                WHERE
                    all_period.ledger_id =pp1.set_of_books_id
                    AND pp2.calendar_type = pp1.deprn_calendar 
   and pp2.end_date IS NOT NULL
                ORDER BY
                    pp2.END_DATE DESC
            ) pp
        WHERE
            ROWNUM =1
    ) AS latest_period,
      
            CASE
        WHEN ( fdp.period_close_date IS NULL )
             AND (FDP.period_open_date IS NULL ) THEN
            'NEVER OPEN'
        WHEN ( fdp.period_close_date IS NOT NULL ) THEN
                'CLOSE'
            WHEN ( fdp.period_close_date IS NULL ) THEN
            'OPEN'
    END period_status,
    CASE
        WHEN ( fdp.period_close_date IS NOT NULL ) THEN
            round(fdp.period_close_date - all_period.end_date, 2)
        ELSE
            NULL
    END time_diff
FROM
    fa_deprn_periods fdp,
    (
        SELECT
            fcp.period_name,
            fbc.book_type_code,
            ffy.fiscal_year_name,
            fcp.end_date,
            fcp.start_date,
            fbc.deprn_calendar,
            gl.NAME,
                 GL.ledger_id,
            fcp.start_date start_date1,
            fbc.book_type_name
        FROM
            fa_fiscal_year        ffy,
            fa_book_controls      fbc,
            fa_calendar_periods   fcp,
            gl_ledgers            gl
        WHERE
            fbc.fiscal_year_name = ffy.fiscal_year_name
            AND fcp.calendar_type = fbc.deprn_calendar
                 AND ( fcp.start_date BETWEEN ffy.START_DATE AND ffy.end_date )
            AND FBC.set_of_books_id = GL.ledger_id
            AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
                  OR gl.name IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
            AND ( :p_period IS NULL
                  OR ffy.fiscal_year IN (
                SELECT
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
                FROM
                    dual
                CONNECT BY
                    regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
            ) )
    ) all_period
WHERE
    all_period.book_type_code = fdp.book_type_code (+)
    AND fdp.period_close_date IS NOT NULL
    AND all_period.period_name = fdp.period_name (+)
ORDER BY
    fdp.book_type_code,
    all_period.start_date
Cost Management application Level Period Close
SELECT
    cps.end_date,
    cps.start_date,
    'Cost Management' AS application_name,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN cps.status_code = 'C' THEN
                round(trunc(cps.last_update_date) - trunc(cps.end_date), 2)
            ELSE
                NULL
        END
    ) time_diff,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN cps.status_code='C' then  trunc(cps.last_update_date)
            ELSE
                NULL
        END
    ) last_update_date,
    (
        SELECT
            pp.period_name
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    pp1.period_name
                FROM
                    cst_period_statuses   pp1,
                    cst_cost_org_books pp2
                WHERE
                    cps.period_year = pp1.period_year
                    AND pp2.cost_book_id = pp1.cost_book_id
                    AND pp2.cost_org_id = pp1.cost_org_id
                    AND pp1.status_code= 'C'
                ORDER BY
                    pp1.end_date DESC
            ) pp
        WHERE
            ROWNUM = 1
    ) AS latest_period,
    cps.period_year,
    cps.period_num,
    cps.period_type,
    cps.period_set_name,
         CPS.status_code,
    cps.period_name,
    ccbv.cost_book_code,
    ccbv.cost_book_desc,
    hov.name,
    gl.name              AS ledger_name,
    gc.period_set_name   calendar_name,
    gc.description       AS calendar_desc,
    DECODE(cps.status_code, 'C', 'Closed', 'N', 'Never Opened', 'O', 'Open', 'P', 'Pending Closed', 'F', 'Finally Close') AS status_name
FROM
    cst_period_statuses   cps,
    cst_cost_books_vl     ccbv,
    hr_organization_v HOV,
         CST_COST_ORG_BOOKS    ccob,
    gl_ledgers            gl,
    gl_calendars          gc
WHERE
    cps.cost_book_id = ccbv.cost_book_id
    AND cps.cost_org_id = hov.organization_id
    AND ccob.cost_book_id = cps.cost_book_id
    AND ccob.cost_org_id = cps.cost_org_id
         AND ccob.ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
         and cps.status_code = 'C'
    AND GC.calendar_id = CCOB.calendar_id
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(hov.effective_start_date) AND trunc(effective_end_date)
    AND ( :p_ledger IS NULL
          OR gl.name IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_ledger, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
    AND ( :p_period IS NULL
          OR cps.period_year IN (
        SELECT
            regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level)
        FROM
            dual
        CONNECT BY
            regexp_substr(:p_period, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
    ) )
ORDER BY
    cps.start_date,
    cps.period_name

title: Fusion Invoice AP Aging Report  Based on Invoice Date, Detail & Supplier Wise
description:
We are divided this report into 2 type 
Detail 
Summary
In the Detail Part, the user is able to see the complete transaction level of detail, & in Summary, the user is able to see detail by Supplier (
sql:
select report type ( Detail or Summary).
Please find the below SQL for Detail Report 
/******************************************************************   
Date              Developer         Version               Description    
20-07-2021      Pulkit jain              1.0                    AP Aged Bucket Detail
 ****************************************************************/SELECT
    detail.*,
    :p_report AS report_type_detail,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk1_30,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk31_60,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk61_90,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate > 90 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk_90,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN round(days_since_sysdate, 0) < 1 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk_current
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            ( trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)) - trunc(ps.due_date) ) days_since_sysdate,
            pv.vendor_name            vendor_name,
            hou.organization_id,
            pv.segment1               vendor_number,
            i.invoice_num             invoice_number,
            pv.vendor_id              vendor_id,
            i.invoice_date,
            i.gl_date                 gl_date,
            (
                CASE
                    WHEN i.invoice_type_lookup_code = 'PREPAYMENT' THEN
                        nvl(((
                            SELECT
                                SUM(aipa.amount)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_payments_all aipa
                            WHERE
                                aipa.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                                AND(trunc(aipa.accounting_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)))
                        ) -(
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(apla.amount), 0)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_lines_all apla
                            WHERE
                                apla.line_type_lookup_code = 'AWT'
                    --for  Hold Invoice amount
                                AND i.invoice_id = apla.invoice_id
                        ) +(
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(nvl(application_dist.base_amount, application_dist.amount)), 0)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_distributions_all   application_dist, ap_invoice_distributions_all   prepay_dist
                            WHERE
                                i.invoice_id = prepay_dist.invoice_id
                                AND prepay_dist.invoice_distribution_id = application_dist.prepay_distribution_id
                                AND trunc(application_dist.accounting_date) <= nvl(:p_date_from, trunc(application_dist.accounting_date
                                ))
                        )) * - 1, 0)
                    ELSE
                        ( ( nvl(i.invoice_amount, 0) * nvl(i.exchange_rate, 1) ) - nvl((
                            SELECT
                                SUM(aipa.amount)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_payments_all aipa
                            WHERE
                                aipa.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                                AND(trunc(aipa.accounting_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)))
                        ), 0) + (
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(apla.amount), 0)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_lines_all apla
                            WHERE
                                apla.line_type_lookup_code = 'AWT'
                    --for  Hold Invoice amount
                                AND i.invoice_id = apla.invoice_id
                        ) + (
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(nvl(prepay_dist.base_amount, prepay_dist.amount)), 0)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_distributions_all   application_dist,
                                ap_invoice_distributions_all   prepay_dist
                            WHERE
                                i.invoice_id = prepay_dist.invoice_id
                                AND prepay_dist.prepay_distribution_id = application_dist.invoice_distribution_id
                                AND trunc(application_dist.accounting_date) <= nvl(:p_date_from, trunc(application_dist.accounting_date
                                ))
                        ) )
                END
            ) AS amt_due_remaining,
            (
                SELECT
                    nvl(SUM(apla.amount), 0)
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_lines_all apla
                WHERE
                    apla.line_type_lookup_code = 'AWT'
                    AND i.invoice_id = apla.invoice_id
            ) AS with_holding_amount,
            (
                SELECT
                    nvl(SUM(aipa.amount), 0)
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_payments_all aipa
                WHERE
                    aipa.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND ( trunc(aipa.accounting_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)) )
            ) AS payment_amount,
            i.invoice_id              invoice_id,
            nvl(i.invoice_amount, 0) * nvl(i.exchange_rate, 1) invoice_amount_ledger,
            ( nvl(i.invoice_amount, 0) * nvl(i.exchange_rate, 1) ) - ( nvl(ps.amount_remaining, 0) * nvl(i.exchange_rate, 1) ) amount_paid_ledger
            ,
            i.invoice_currency_code   invoice_currency_code,
            hou.name                  bu_name,
            i.created_by              invoice_created_by,
            gl.name                   ledger_name,
            i.source,
            pv.attribute1             AS cpid,
            i.description             AS invoice_desc,
            i.invoice_type_lookup_code,
            nvl(doc_sequence_value, voucher_num) AS voucher_number,
            (
                SELECT
                    displayed_field
                FROM
                    poz_lookup_codes
                WHERE
                    lookup_type = 'POZ_VENDOR_TYPE'
                    AND upper(language) = upper('US')
                    AND lookup_code = pv.vendor_type_lookup_code
            ) AS supplier_type,
            NULL AS code_type,
            (
                SELECT
                    MAX(check_date)
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_payments_all   aipa,
                    ap_checks_all             aca
                WHERE
                    aipa.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND aipa.check_id = aca.check_id
            ) AS last_payment_date,
            (
                SELECT
                    aila.description
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_lines_all aila
                WHERE
                    aila.line_type_lookup_code = 'ITEM'
                    AND aila.line_number = 1
                    --ONly want to fetch First line description
                    AND aila.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
            ) item_desc,
            (
                SELECT
                    description
                FROM
                    ap_lookup_codes
                WHERE
                    lookup_type = 'PAYMENT METHOD'
                    AND lookup_code = i.payment_method_code
            ) AS payment_method_code,
            (
                SELECT
                    att.name
                FROM
                    ap_terms_tl att
                WHERE
                    att.term_id = i.terms_id
                    AND upper(att.language) = upper('US')
                    --to find term name for payment term  
            ) AS paymnet_term,
            ps.due_date,
            ps.hold_flag              AS payment_hold_flag,
            (
                SELECT
                    aha.hold_reason
                FROM
                    ap_holds_all aha
                WHERE
                    aha.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            ) invoice_hold,
            NULL AS ap02_signoff,
            (
                SELECT
                    display_name
                FROM
                    per_person_names_f_v
                WHERE
                    i.requester_id = person_id
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(effective_start_date) AND trunc(effective_end_date) )
                    AND name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            ) AS requestor,
            (
                SELECT
                    pea.email_address
                FROM
                    per_email_addresses    pea,
                    per_person_names_f_v   ppnf
                WHERE
                    i.requester_id = ppnf.person_id
                    AND ( trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date) )
                    AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
                    AND ppnf.person_id = pea.person_id
            ) AS requestor_email,
            (
                SELECT
                    meaning
                FROM
                    fnd_lookup_values_tl
                WHERE
                    lookup_type = 'NLS TRANSLATION'
                    AND i.approval_status = lookup_code
                    AND upper(language) = upper('US')
            ) AS validation,
            (
                SELECT
                    meaning
                FROM
                    fnd_lookup_values_tl
                WHERE
                    lookup_type = 'AP_ACCOUNTING_STATUS'
                    AND ( ap_invoices_utility_pkg.get_accounting_status(i.invoice_id) ) = lookup_code
                    AND upper(language) = upper('US')
            ) AS inv_hdr_accounting_status,
            (
                SELECT
                    MAX(pla.need_by_date)
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                    ap_invoice_lines_all           aila,
                    po_distributions_all           pda,
                    po_line_locations_all          pla
                WHERE
                    aila.line_type_lookup_code = 'ITEM'
                    AND aila.line_number = 1
                    AND aida.distribution_line_number = 1
                     -- we only want to select Line number 1 data 
                    AND aila.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND aida.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND aila.line_number = aida.invoice_line_number
                    AND pda.po_distribution_id = aida.po_distribution_id
                    AND pda.po_line_id = pla.po_line_id
                    AND pda.po_header_id = pla.po_header_id
                    AND pla.line_location_id = pda.line_location_id
            ) AS last_need_by_date,
            (
                SELECT
                    pla.item_description
                FROM
                    ap_invoice_distributions_all   aida,
                    ap_invoice_lines_all           aila,
                    po_distributions_all           pda,
                    po_lines_all                   pla
                WHERE
                    aila.line_type_lookup_code = 'ITEM'
                    AND aila.line_number = 1
                    AND aida.distribution_line_number = 1
                     -- we only want to select Line number 1 data 
                    AND aila.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND aida.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                    AND aila.line_number = aida.invoice_line_number
                    AND pda.po_distribution_id = aida.po_distribution_id
                    AND pda.po_line_id = pla.po_line_id
                    AND pda.po_header_id = pla.po_header_id
            ) AS po_desc
        FROM
            ap_payment_schedules_all   ps,
            ap_invoices_all            i,
            poz_suppliers_v            pv,
            hr_operating_units         hou,
            gl_ledgers                 gl,
            per_users                  pu
        WHERE
            i.invoice_id = ps.invoice_id (+)
            AND i.vendor_id = pv.vendor_id
            AND i.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND i.created_by = pu.username
            AND hou.organization_id = i.org_id
            AND ( hou.organization_id IN (
                :p_org_name
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_org_name || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( 'Detailed' IN (
                :p_report
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_report || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( pv.vendor_id IN (
                :p_supplier
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_supplier || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( trunc(i.invoice_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)) )
    ) detail
WHERE
    nvl(validation, 0) <> 'Incomplete'
-- to remove incomplete status 
    AND nvl(amt_due_remaining, 0) <> 0
    --remove if invocie remaining amount is 0
    AND ( inv_hdr_accounting_status IN (
        :p_account_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_account_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( supplier_type IN (
        :p_supplier_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_supplier_type || 'All'
    ) )

/******************************************************************

 ****************************************************************/SELECT

        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk1_30,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE

        END

    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN
                nvl(detail.amt_due_remaining, 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk61_90,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate > 90 THEN

            ELSE
                0

    ) buk_90,
    SUM(

            ELSE

        END
    ) buk_current,

    (

            i.invoice_num    invoice_number,
            i.invoice_type_lookup_code,

            (
                CASE
                    WHEN i.invoice_type_lookup_code = 'PREPAYMENT' THEN
                        nvl(((
                            SELECT

                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_payments_all aipa
                            WHERE
                                aipa.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                                AND(trunc(aipa.accounting_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)))
                        ) -(
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(apla.amount), 0)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_lines_all apla
                            WHERE
                                apla.line_type_lookup_code = 'AWT'
                    --for  Hold Invoice amount
                                AND i.invoice_id = apla.invoice_id
                        ) +(
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(nvl(application_dist.base_amount, application_dist.amount)), 0)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_distributions_all   application_dist, ap_invoice_distributions_all   prepay_dist
                            WHERE
                                i.invoice_id = prepay_dist.invoice_id
                                AND prepay_dist.invoice_distribution_id = application_dist.prepay_distribution_id
                                AND trunc(application_dist.accounting_date) <= nvl(:p_date_from, trunc(application_dist.accounting_date
                                ))
                        )) * - 1, 0)
                    ELSE
                        ( ( nvl(i.invoice_amount, 0) * nvl(i.exchange_rate, 1) ) - nvl((
                            SELECT
                                SUM(aipa.amount)
                            FROM
                                ap_invoice_payments_all aipa
                            WHERE
                                aipa.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
                                AND(trunc(aipa.accounting_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)))
                        ), 0) + (
                            SELECT
                                nvl(SUM(apla.amount), 0)

                            WHERE
                                apla.line_type_lookup_code = 'AWT'

                    meaning
                FROM
                    fnd_lookup_values_tl
                WHERE
                    lookup_type = 'NLS TRANSLATION'
                    AND i.approval_status = lookup_code
                    AND upper(language) = upper('US')
            ) AS validation,
            (
                SELECT
                    meaning
                FROM
                    fnd_lookup_values_tl
                WHERE
                    lookup_type = 'AP_ACCOUNTING_STATUS'
                    AND ( ap_invoices_utility_pkg.get_accounting_status(i.invoice_id) ) = lookup_code
                    AND upper(language) = upper('US')
            ) AS inv_hdr_accounting_status
        FROM
            ap_payment_schedules_all   ps,
            ap_invoices_all            i,
            poz_suppliers_v            pv,
            hr_operating_units         hou,
            gl_ledgers                 gl,
            per_users                  pu
        WHERE
            i.invoice_id = ps.invoice_id (+)
            AND i.vendor_id = pv.vendor_id
            AND i.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
            AND i.created_by = pu.username
            AND hou.organization_id = i.org_id
            AND ( hou.organization_id IN (
                :p_org_name
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_org_name || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( 'Summary' IN (
                :p_report
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_report || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( pv.vendor_id IN (
                :p_supplier
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_supplier || 'All'
            ) )
            AND ( trunc(i.invoice_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)) )
    ) detail
WHERE
    nvl(validation, 0) <> 'Incomplete'
  -- to remove incomplete status 
    AND nvl(amt_due_remaining, 0) <> 0
        --remove if invocie remaining amount is 0
    AND ( inv_hdr_accounting_status IN (
        :p_account_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_account_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( supplier_type IN (
        :p_supplier_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_supplier_type || 'All'
    ) )
GROUP BY
    vendor_name,
    vendor_number,
    cpid

title: Oracle Fusion AR Aging Report Based On Transaction Date, by Customer Level
sql:
SELECT
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 1 AND 30 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
                        WHEN detail.trx_type IN(
                            'DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                            (detail.total_amt_rem)
                        ELSE
                            0
                    END
                ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk1_30,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN
                nvl((
        CASE
            WHEN detail.trx_type IN('DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                            (Detail.total_amt_rem)
                        ELSE
                0
        END
    ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk31_60,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 61 AND 90 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
                        WHEN detail.trx_type in(
                            'DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                (detail.total_amt_rem)
            ELSE
                0
                    END
                ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk61_90,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 91 AND 180 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
            WHEN Detail.trx_type in (
                            'DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                            (detail.total_amt_rem)
                        ELSE
                            0
                    END
                ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk91_180,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate BETWEEN 181 AND 360 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
                        WHEN detail.trx_type IN(
                            'DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                            (detail.total_amt_rem)
                        ELSE
                0
                    END
                ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk181_360,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate > 360 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
                        WHEN detail.trx_type IN(
                            'DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                            (detail.total_amt_rem)
                        ELSE
                            0
        END
    ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk_360,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN days_since_sysdate > 60 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
            WHEN detail.trx_type in ('DM','INV'
                        ) THEN
                (Detail.total_amt_rem)
            ELSE
                0
                    END
                ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk_60,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN round(days_since_sysdate, 0) < 1 THEN
                nvl((
                    CASE
                        WHEN detail.trx_type in ('DM', 'INV'
                        ) THEN
                            (detail.total_amt_rem)
                        ELSE
                            0
                    END
                ), 0)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) buk_current,
    detail.cust_number,
    Detail.cust_account_id,
    detail.customer_name,
    detail.bu_name,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN detail.trx_type IN(
                'CM', 'ONACC'
            ) THEN
                (detail.total_amt_rem)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) credit_memo,
    --If the transaction class is CM and ONACC then its credit memo Trx
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN detail.trx_type = 'DM' THEN
                (detail.total_amt_rem)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) debit_memo,
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN detail.trx_type IN(
                'DM', 'INV'
            ) THEN
                (detail.total_amt_rem)
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS total_debit,
    ( SUM(detail.total_amt_rem) - SUM(detail.unallocated_rec_amount) ) AS balance,
    ( ( -1 ) * SUM(detail.unallocated_rec_amount) ) AS unallocated_receipt,
    detail.country,
    detail.customer_class_code,
    detail.cpid,
    nvl(SUM(detail.dispute_amount), 0) AS total_dispute_amount,
    hcpf.dunning_letters,
    hcpf.credit_hold,
    ac.name     colletor_name,
    hcpc.name   AS profile_name,
    nvl(hcpf.credit_limit, 0) AS credit_limit,
    detail.hold_date,
    --Right Now, we are not able to Find  hold date for this we need to create DFF
    (
        SELECT
            MAX(apsa1.due_date)
        FROM
            ar_payment_schedules_all apsa1
        WHERE
            detail.cust_account_id = apsa1.customer_id
            AND apsa1.class = 'PMT'
            AND trunc(apsa1.due_date) <= trunc(:p_date_from)
    ) AS last_payment_date
    --Subquery Required because We want to find Last payment Date on Customer level 
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            rct.trx_class           AS trx_type,
            hou.name                bu_name,
            hca.cust_account_id,
            hca.account_number      cust_number,
            ( ( amount_due_original ) * ( nvl(rct.exchange_rate, 1) ) - ( nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM((ara.amount_applied + nvl(unearned_discount_taken, 0) + nvl(earned_discount_taken, 0)) * nvl(rct.exchange_rate, 1
                    ))
                FROM
                    ar_cash_receipts_all             acr, ar_receivable_applications_all   ara
                WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                    AND acr.cash_receipt_id = ara.cash_receipt_id
                    AND ara.applied_payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                    AND ara.status IN(
                        'APP'
                    )
                    AND trunc(ara.gl_date) <= trunc(:p_date_from)
            ), 0) + nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM((aav.amount * - 1) * nvl(rct.exchange_rate, 1))
                FROM
                    ar_adjustments_all aav
                WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = aav.customer_trx_id
                    AND aav.payment_schedule_id = aps.payment_schedule_id
                    AND trunc(aav.gl_date) <= trunc(:p_date_from)
                    AND aav.status = 'A'
            ), 0) + nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(ara.amount_applied *(- 1) * nvl(rct.exchange_rate, 1))
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = ara.customer_trx_id
                    AND ara.status IN(
                        'ACTIVITY', 'APP'
                    ) 
                                                --     AND ara.display = 'Y' 
                    AND trunc(ara.gl_date) <= trunc(:p_date_from)
            ), 0) + nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(ara.amount_applied * nvl(rct.exchange_rate, 1))
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all ara
                WHERE
                    rct.customer_trx_id = ara.applied_customer_trx_id
                    AND ara.status IN(
                        'APP'
                    )
                    AND ara.cash_receipt_id IS NULL 
                                                --    AND ara.display = 'Y' 
                    AND trunc(ara.gl_date) <= trunc(:p_date_from)
            ), 0) ) ) total_amt_rem,
            0 AS unallocated_rec_amount,
            trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE)) - trunc(aps.due_date) days_since_sysdate,
            rct.trx_number          invoice_number,
            hzp.party_name          customer_name,
            rct.trx_date            invoice_date,
            hzp.country,
            hca.customer_class_code,
            hca.attribute1          AS cpid,
            aps.amount_in_dispute   AS dispute_amount,
            hca.attribute_date1     AS hold_date
        FROM
            ra_customer_trx_all        rct,
            hz_cust_accounts           hca,
            hz_parties                 hzp,
            ar_payment_schedules_all   aps,
            ra_cust_trx_types_all      rctt,
            hr_operating_units         hou
        WHERE
            rct.bill_to_customer_id = hca.cust_account_id 
               -- FOR  COMPLETE FLAG 
            AND rct.complete_flag = 'Y'
            AND hzp.party_id = hca.party_id
            AND rct.customer_trx_id = aps.customer_trx_id
            AND rctt.cust_trx_type_seq_id = rct.cust_trx_type_seq_id
            AND rct.org_id = hou.organization_id
            AND trunc(rct.trx_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE))
            AND ( hou.organization_id IN (
                :p_ou_name
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_ou_name || 'All'
            ) )
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            'Receipt' AS trx_type,
            hou.name              AS bu_name,
            hzc.cust_account_id,
            hzc.account_number    AS cust_number,
            0 AS total_amt_rem,
            nvl(((acr.amount * nvl(acr.exchange_rate, 1)) - nvl((
                SELECT
                    SUM(amount_applied) * nvl(acr.exchange_rate, 1)
                FROM
                    ar_receivable_applications_all
                WHERE
                    cash_receipt_id = acr.cash_receipt_id
                    AND status IN(
                        'ACTIVITY', 'APP'
                    )
                    AND gl_date <= :p_date_from
            ), 0)), 0) AS unallocated_rec_amount,
            NULL AS days_since_sysdate,
            receipt_number        AS invoice_number,
            party_name            AS customer_name,
            receipt_date          AS invoice_date,
            hp.country,
            hzc.customer_class_code,
            hzc.attribute1        AS cpid,
            NULL dispute_amount,
            hzc.attribute_date1   AS hold_date
        FROM
            ar_cash_receipts_all   acr,
            hz_cust_accounts       hzc,
            hz_parties             hp,
            hr_operating_units     hou
        WHERE
            acr.pay_from_customer = hzc.cust_account_id
            AND acr.status <> 'REV'
            --for Removing Reverse Receipt
            AND acr.org_id = hou.organization_id
            AND hp.party_id = hzc.party_id
            AND trunc(acr.receipt_date) <= trunc(nvl(:p_date_from, SYSDATE))
            AND ( hou.organization_id IN (
                :p_ou_name
            )
                  OR 'All' IN (
                :p_ou_name || 'All'
            ) )
    ) detail,
    hz_customer_profiles_f    hcpf,
    ar_collectors             ac,
    hz_cust_profile_classes   hcpc
WHERE
    detail.cust_account_id = hcpf.cust_account_id (+) 
  --because if there is no profile for customer 
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(hcpf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(hcpf.effective_end_date)
    AND hcpf.site_use_id IS NULL
    AND ac.collector_id (+) = hcpf.collector_id 
         --because if there is no Collector for customer 
    AND hcpc.profile_class_id (+) = hcpf.profile_class_id 
         --because if there is no profile for customer 
GROUP BY
    detail.cust_number,
    detail.cust_account_id,
    detail.customer_name,
    detail.bu_name,
    detail.country,
    detail.customer_class_code,
    detail.cpid,
    hcpf.dunning_letters,
    hcpf.credit_hold,
    ac.name,
    hcpc.name,
    hcpf.credit_limit,
    detail.hold_date

title: Accounts Payable AP BR 100, AP Manage Key SQL Oracle Fusion.
description:
In this code, you can find below topics SQL.
AP: Manage Supplier Type Lookup
AP: Manage Payables Calendars

AP: Manage In
sql:
SELECT
    flv.lookup_type,
    flv.lookup_code,
    flv.meaning,
    flv.description,
    flv.display_sequence,
    flv.tag,
    to_char(flv.start_date_active, 'DD-Mon-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') start_date_active,
    to_char(flv.end_date_active, 'DD-Mon-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') end_date_active,
    decode(flv.enabled_flag, 'Y', 'Yes', 'No') enabled_flag,
    fltcst.meaning    ""CUSTOMIZATION_LEVEL"",
    fatv.user_module_name,
   --fss.set_name,
    replace(to_char(CAST(flv.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') creation_date,
    replace(to_char(CAST(flv.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') last_update_date,
    flv.created_by,
    flv.last_updated_by,
    flv.attribute_category,
    flv.attribute1,
    flv.attribute2,
    flv.attribute3,
    flt.meaning       lookup_type_meaning,
    flt.description   lookup_type_description,
    fltrst.meaning    ""REST_ACCESS_SECURED""
FROM
    fnd_lookup_types_vl    flt,
    fnd_lookup_values_vl   flv,
    fnd_application_vl     fav,
    fnd_appl_taxonomy_vl   fatv,
    fnd_setid_sets         fss,
    fnd_lookup_values_vl   fltrst,
    fnd_lookup_values_vl   fltcst
WHERE
    1 = 1
    AND flt.lookup_type IN (
        'POZ_VENDOR_TYPE'
    )
    AND flt.lookup_type = flv.lookup_type
    AND flv.view_application_id = fav.application_id
    AND flt.module_id = fatv.module_id
    AND flv.set_id = fss.set_id
    AND flt.rest_access_secured = fltrst.lookup_code
    AND fltrst.lookup_type = 'ORA_FND_REST_ACCESS_SECURED'
    AND flt.customization_level = fltcst.lookup_code
    AND fltcst.lookup_type = 'LOOKUP_CUSTOMIZATION_LEVEL'
	AND fss.language= USERENV('LANG') 
ORDER BY
    1,
    5
AP: Manage Payables Calendars
SELECT flvclt.meaning calendar_type,
       apt.calendar_name calendar_name,
       apt.description,
       to_char(apt.start_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') start_date,
       to_char(apt.effective_to, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') effective_to,
       to_char(apt.effective_from, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') effective_from,
       apt.period_name_format,
       initcap(apt.period_frequency) period_frequency,
       apt.periods_per_year,
       app.period_name,
       app.period_num,
       app.period_year,
       to_char(app.start_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') period_start_date,
       to_char(app.end_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') period_end_date,
       replace(to_char(CAST(apt.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' ||
       'AMERICAN'),
               ' ',
               'T') creation_date,
       replace(to_char(CAST(apt.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' ||
       'AMERICAN'),
               ' ',
               'T') last_update_date,
       apt.created_by,
       apt.last_updated_by,
       to_char(app.due_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') period_due_date,
       app.entered_period_name period_name_prefix,
       apt.attribute_category ptype_attribute_category,
       apt.attribute1 ptype_attribute1,
       apt.attribute2 ptype_attribute2,
       apt.attribute3 ptype_attribute3,
       app.attribute_category period_attribute_category,
       app.attribute1 period_attribute1,
       app.attribute2 period_attribute2,
       app.attribute3 period_attribute3
FROM ap_other_period_types apt,
     ap_other_periods app,
     fnd_lookup_values_vl flvclt
WHERE apt.calendar_name = app.calendar_name (+)
      AND apt.calendar_type = app.calendar_type (+)
      AND apt.calendar_type = flvclt.lookup_code
      AND flvclt.lookup_type = 'MODULE'
ORDER BY apt.calendar_type,
         apt.calendar_name,
         app.period_year,
         app.period_num
AP: Manage Payment Terms

    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') creation_date,

    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') last_update_date,
    atv.created_by,

    atv.attribute1           term_attribute1,

    fnd_flex_ext.get_segs('GL', 'GL#', gcc.chart_of_accounts_id, fsp.accts_pay_code_combination_id, - 1) accts_pay_cc,

           NULL, 'No', fsp.gapless_inv_num_flag) gapless_inv_num_flag,
    fsp.buying_company_identifier,
    ft.territory_short_name     vat_country_code,
    fsp.vat_registration_num,
    pldt.location_name          bill_to_location,
    replace(to_char(CAST(fsp.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') creation_date,
    replace(to_char(CAST(fsp.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') last_update_date,
    fsp.created_by,
    fsp.last_updated_by,
    fsp.global_attribute_category,
    fsp.global_attribute1,
    fsp.global_attribute2,
    fsp.global_attribute3,
    fsp.global_attribute_number1,

    gl_code_combinations            gcc14,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc13,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc12,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc11,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc10,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc9,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc8,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc7,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc6,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc5,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc4,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc3,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc2,
    gl_code_combinations            gcc,
    fnd_lookup_values               flv2,
    fnd_lookup_values               flv,
    per_location_details_f_tl       pldt,
    per_location_details_f          pld,
    fnd_territories_tl              ft,
    gl_daily_conversion_types       gdct2,
    gl_daily_conversion_types       gdct,

WHERE
    trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN hou.effective_start_date AND hou.effective_end_date
    AND hout.organization_id = hou.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN hout.effective_start_date AND hout.effective_end_date
    AND hout.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houc.organization_id = hou.organization_id
    AND houc.classification_code = 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT'
    AND houc.status = 'A'
    AND hoi.organization_id = hou.organization_id
    AND hoi.org_information_context = houc.classification_code
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN hoi.effective_start_date AND hoi.effective_end_date
    AND gl.ledger_id (+) = hoi.org_information3
    AND fsp.org_id (+) = hou.organization_id
    AND gdct.conversion_type (+) = fsp.default_exchange_rate_type
    AND ft.territory_code (+) = fsp.vat_country_code
    AND ft.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
    AND pld.location_id (+) = fsp.bill_to_location_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN pld.effective_start_date (+) AND pld.effective_end_date (+)
    AND pldt.location_details_id (+) = pld.location_details_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN pldt.effective_start_date (+) AND pldt.effective_end_date (+)
    AND pldt.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
    AND flv.lookup_type (+) = 'LIABILITY FLEXBUILD METHOD'
    AND flv.lookup_code (+) = nvl(fsp.liability_post_lookup_code, 'NONE')
    AND flv.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
    AND flv2.lookup_type (+) = 'EXPENSE ACCRUAL OPTION'
    AND flv2.lookup_code (+) = fsp.expense_accrual_code
    AND flv2.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
    AND gcc.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.accts_pay_code_combination_id
    AND gcc2.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.prepay_code_combination_id
    AND gcc3.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.accts_pay_code_combination_id
    AND gcc4.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.rate_var_gain_ccid
    AND gcc5.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.rate_var_loss_ccid
    AND gcc6.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.disc_taken_code_combination_id
    AND gcc7.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.misc_charge_ccid
    AND gcc8.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.freight_code_combination_id
    AND gcc9.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.prepay_tax_diff_ccid
    AND gcc10.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.one_time_pay_liab_ccid
    AND gcc11.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.one_time_pay_expense_ccid
    AND gcc12.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.gain_code_combination_id
    AND gcc13.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.loss_code_combination_id
    AND gcc14.code_combination_id (+) = fsp.retainage_code_combination_id
    AND gdct2.conversion_type (+) = nvl(fsp.default_pmt_exchange_rate_type, 'X')
ORDER BY
    hout.name

    AND houc.organization_id = hou.organization_id

    AND hoi.organization_id = hou.organization_id
    AND hoi.org_information_context = houc.classification_code

    AND gl.ledger_id (+) = hoi.org_information3

AP: Manage Payment Options
SELECT

           NULL, 'No', asp.post_dated_payments_flag) post_dated_payments_flag,
    decode(asp.allow_supplier_bank_override, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No',
           NULL, 'No', asp.allow_supplier_bank_override) allow_supplier_bank_override,
    decode(asp.pay_doc_category_override, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No',
           NULL, 'No', asp.pay_doc_category_override) pay_doc_category_override,
    decode(asp.allow_pymt_third_party_ovrd, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No',
           NULL, 'No', allow_pymt_third_party_ovrd) allow_pymt_third_party_ovrd,
    flv.meaning                 when_to_account_pmt,
    decode(fsp.make_rate_mandatory_pmt_flag, 'Y', 'Yes', 'N', 'No',
           NULL, 'No', fsp.make_rate_mandatory_pmt_flag) make_rate_mandatory_pmt_flag,
    gdct.user_conversion_type   default_pmt_exchange_rate_type,
    flv2.meaning                bank_charge_deduction_type,
    replace(to_char(CAST(asp.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') creation_date,
    replace(to_char(CAST(asp.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') last_update_date,
    asp.created_by,
    asp.last_updated_by
FROM
    hr_org_unit_classifications_f   houc,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl      hout,
    hr_all_organization_units_f     hou,
    fnd_lookup_values               flv2,
    fnd_lookup_values               flv,
    gl_daily_conversion_types       gdct,
    financials_system_params_all    fsp,
    ap_system_parameters_all        asp
WHERE
    trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN hou.effective_start_date AND hou.effective_end_date
    AND hout.organization_id = hou.organization_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN hout.effective_start_date AND hout.effective_end_date
    AND hout.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houc.organization_id = hou.organization_id
    AND houc.classification_code = 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT'
    AND houc.status = 'A'
    AND asp.org_id = hout.organization_id
    AND fsp.org_id (+) = asp.org_id
    AND flv.lookup_type (+) = 'ACCT_PAYMENT_OPTIONS'
    AND flv.lookup_code (+) = asp.when_to_account_pmt
    AND flv.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
    AND flv2.lookup_type (+) = 'AP_BANK_CHARGE_DEDUCTION_TYPE'
    AND flv2.lookup_code (+) = nvl(asp.bank_charge_deduction_type, 'X')
    AND flv2.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
    AND gdct.conversion_type (+) = nvl(fsp.default_pmt_exchange_rate_type, 'X')
ORDER BY
    1
AP: Manage Distribution Sets
SELECT hr.name org_name,
       ads.distribution_set_name,
       ads.description header_desc,
       ads.total_percent_distribution total_p,
       to_char(ads.inactive_date, 'DD-MON-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=ENGLISH') inactive_date,
       adl.distribution_set_line_number line_num,
       adl.percent_distribution dist_p,
       adl.description line_desc,
       aitt.description type_1099,
       adl.dist_code_combination_id,
       fnd_flex_ext.get_segs('GL', 'GL#', gcc.chart_of_accounts_id, adl.dist_code_combination_id) account_num,
       ppa.segment1 project_number,
       ppe.element_number task_number,
       pet.expenditure_type_name,
       poe.name expenditure_organization,
       adl.pjc_contract_id,
       adl.pjc_funding_allocation_id,
       ads.attribute_category,
       ads.attribute1,
       ads.attribute2,
       ads.attribute3,
       replace(to_char(CAST(ads.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' ||
       'AMERICAN'),
               ' ',
               'T') creation_date,
       replace(to_char(CAST(ads.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' ||
       'AMERICAN'),
               ' ',
               'T') last_update_date,
       ads.created_by,
       ads.last_updated_by
FROM ap_distribution_sets_all ads,
     ap_distribution_set_lines_all adl,
     hr_operating_units hr,
     gl_code_combinations gcc,
     ap_income_tax_types aitt,
     pjf_projects_all_b ppa,
     pjf_proj_elements_b ppe,
     pjf_exp_types_vl pet,
     pjf_organizations_expend_v poe
WHERE ads.org_id = hr.organization_id
      AND ads.distribution_set_id = adl.distribution_set_id
      AND gcc.code_combination_id = adl.dist_code_combination_id
      AND aitt.income_tax_type (+) = adl.type_1099
      AND ppa.project_id (+) = adl.pjc_project_id
      AND ppe.proj_element_id (+) = adl.pjc_task_id
      AND pet.expenditure_type_id (+) = adl.pjc_expenditure_type_id
      AND poe.org_id (+) = ppa.org_id
      AND poe.organization_id (+) = adl.pjc_organization_id

  replace(to_char(CAST(last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') last_update_date,

AP: Manage Aging Periods
SELECT ph.period_name,
       ph.description,
       decode(ph.status, 'A', 'Active', 'Inactive') status,
       pl.days_start,
       pl.days_to,
       pl.report_heading1,
       pl.report_heading2,
       pl.period_sequence_num,
       ph.attribute_category,
       ph.attribute1,
       ph.attribute2,
       ph.attribute3,
       pl.attribute_category line_attribute_category,
       pl.attribute1 line_attribute1,
       pl.attribute2 line_attribute2,
       pl.attribute3 line_attribute3,
	     replace(to_char(CAST(ph.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') creation_date,
  replace(to_char(CAST(ph.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN'),' ','T') last_update_date,
       ph.created_by,
       ph.last_updated_by
FROM ap_aging_periods ph,
     ap_aging_period_lines pl
WHERE ph.aging_period_id = pl.aging_period_id (+)
ORDER BY 1,
         pl.period_sequence_num
AP: Manage Tax Regions
SELECT
    region_short_name,
    region_code,
    region_long_name,
    reporting_limit,
    decode(reporting_limit_method_code, 'FEDERAL', 'Same as Federal', 'INDIVIDUAL', 'Compare Individually',
           'SUM', 'Compare Sum') reporting_limit_method_code,
    to_char(active_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN') active_date,
    to_char(inactive_date, 'DD-Mon-YYYY', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' || 'AMERICAN') inactive_date,
    created_by,
    last_updated_by,
    replace(to_char(CAST(creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=' ||
    'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') creation_date,
    replace(to_char(CAST(last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') last_update_date
FROM
    ap_income_tax_regions
ORDER BY
    region_short_name
AP: Manage Reporting Entities
SELECT
    hr.name                      org_name,
    are.entity_name,
    are.tax_identification_num   tax_num,
    hz.location_name,
    hz.description,
    arela.balancing_segment_value,
    replace(to_char(CAST(are.creation_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') creation_date,
    replace(to_char(CAST(are.last_update_date AS TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE), 'DD-Mon-YYYY HH24:MI:SS.FF3TZH:TZM', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE='
    || 'AMERICAN'), ' ', 'T') last_update_date,
    are.created_by,
    are.last_updated_by,
    ffvt.description             bsv_description
FROM
    ap_reporting_entities_all       are,
    hr_operating_units              hr,
    hr_locations                    hz,
    ap_reporting_entity_lines_all   arela,
    gl_ledgers                      gl,
    ap_system_parameters_all        asp,
    fnd_vs_values_tl                ffvt,
    fnd_vs_values_b                 ffv,
    fnd_kf_segment_instances        fksgi,
    fnd_kf_labeled_segments         fkls,
    fnd_kf_segments_b               fksg,
    fnd_kf_str_instances_b          fksi
WHERE
    hz.location_id = are.location_id
    AND are.org_id = hr.organization_id
    AND arela.tax_entity_id = are.tax_entity_id
    AND are.org_id = asp.org_id
    AND gl.ledger_id = asp.set_of_books_id
    AND gl.ledger_id = asp.set_of_books_id
    AND fksi.application_id = 101
    AND fksi.key_flexfield_code = 'GL#'
    AND fksi.structure_instance_number = gl.chart_of_accounts_id
    AND fksg.structure_id = fksi.structure_id
    AND fkls.structure_id = fksg.structure_id
    AND fkls.segment_code = fksg.segment_code
    AND fkls.segment_label_code = 'GL_BALANCING'
    AND fksgi.structure_instance_id = fksi.structure_instance_id
    AND fksgi.segment_code = fksg.segment_code
    AND ffv.value_set_id = fksgi.value_set_id
    AND ffv.value = arela.balancing_segment_value
    AND ffvt.value_id = ffv.value_id
    AND ffvt.language = userenv('LANG')
ORDER BY
    org_name,
    entity_name,
    balancing_segment_value

title: Customer Outbound Oracle Fusion.

sql:
SELECT

    hp.party_name                  AS customer_name,
    hps.party_site_number,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN (
                SELECT
                    hcsua.site_use_code
                FROM
                    hz_cust_site_uses_all hcsua
                WHERE   hcasa.cust_acct_site_id = hcsua.cust_acct_site_id
                    AND hcsua.status = 'A'
                    AND     ( SYSDATE BETWEEN hcsua.start_date
                                AND     nvl (hcsua.end_date, sysdate + 1) )
AND hcsua.site_use_code = 'BILL_TO'
            ) = 'BILL_TO'
                THEN    hl.address1
        END) bill_to_address_1
      ,
    (
        CASE
        WHEN (
                SELECT  hcsua.site_use_code
                FROM
                    hz_cust_site_uses_all hcsua
                WHERE
                    hcasa.cust_acct_site_id = hcsua.cust_acct_site_id
                    AND hcsua.status = 'A'

                                sysdate BETWEEN hcsua.start_date AND     nvl (hcsua.end_date, sysdate + 1) )
AND hcsua.site_use_code = 'BILL_TO'

AND hcsua.site_use_code = 'SHIP_TO'

    hca.tax_code,
    contactpersonparty.email_address,
    hp.party_id,
    hp.party_type                  customer_type,
    (
        SELECT
            origsystem.orig_system_name
        FROM
            hz_orig_sys_references   originalsystemreference,
            hz_orig_systems_vl       origsystem
        WHERE
            originalsystemreference.orig_system = origsystem.orig_system
            AND originalsystemreference.owner_table_name = 'HZ_PARTIES'
            AND originalsystemreference.owner_table_id = hp.party_id
    ) customer_source,
    zpap.country_code              vat_country,
    zpap.rep_registration_number   vat_number,
    NULL website_bill_to_site_reference,
    NULL website_ship_to_site_reference,
    NULL website_customer_reference,
    zpap.tax_classification_code   vat_status,
    hcasa.cust_acct_site_id,
    hca.cust_account_id,
    hps.party_site_id
FROM
    hz_customer_profiles_f   hcpf,
    hz_locations             hl,
    hz_party_sites           hps,
    hz_cust_acct_sites_all   hcasa,
    hz_parties               hp,
    hz_cust_accounts         hca,
    hz_cust_account_roles    customeraccountcontact,
    hz_parties               contactpersonparty,
    zx_party_tax_profile     zpap
WHERE
    1 = 1
    AND hca.party_id = hp.party_id
    AND hca.cust_account_id = hcasa.cust_account_id
    AND hcasa.party_site_id = hps.party_site_id
    AND hps.location_id = hl.location_id
    AND hp.party_id = zpap.party_id (+)
    AND hca.cust_account_id = hcpf.cust_account_id (+)
    AND hca.party_id = hcpf.party_id (+)
    AND hcpf.site_use_id IS NULL
    AND customeraccountcontact.contact_person_id = contactpersonparty.party_id
    AND customeraccountcontact.status = 'A'
    AND customeraccountcontact.primary_flag = 'Y'
    AND hcasa.cust_acct_site_id = customeraccountcontact.cust_acct_site_id (+)
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN hcpf.effective_start_date AND hcpf.effective_end_date )
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN hcasa.start_date AND nvl(hcasa.end_date, SYSDATE + 1) )
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN hps.start_date_active AND nvl(hps.end_date_active, SYSDATE + 1) )

title: Oracle Fusion Cash management Opening and closing balance Mismatch statements.
description:
Using the Below SQL you can find the Opening and Closing Balance Mismatch statements.
Tables:
ce_statement_headers
ce_bank_accounts
CE_BANKS_V
ce_bank_branches_v
Columns:
STATEMENT_HEADER_ID
BALANCE_C
sql:
SELECT
    csh.statement_header_id,
    csh.balance_check,
    csh.statement_number,
    csh.bank_account_id,
    csh.currency_code,
    csh.statement_date,
    csh.stmt_from_date,
         CSH.stmt_to_date,
    csh.recon_status_code,
    csh.AUTOREC_PROCESS_CODE,
    csh.STATEMENT_ENTRY_TYPE,
    csh.creation_date,
         CSH.CREATED_BY,
         CB.BANK_NAME,
         CBB.bank_branch_name,
         (
        SELECT
            csb.balance_amount
        FROM
            ce_stmt_balances csb
        WHERE CSH.statement_header_id = csb.STATEMENT_HEADER_ID
                 AND csb.BALANCE_CODE = 'OPBD')
            AS opening_balance,
    (
        SELECT
            csb.balance_amount
            FROM CE_STMT_BALANCES CSB
           WHERE CSH.statement_header_id = csb.statement_header_id
                 AND CSB.balance_code = 'CLBD'
    ) AS ClOSING_BALANCE,
    (
        SELECT
            SUM (nvl(AMOUNT, 0)) AS total_line_amount
                  FROM (SELECT nvl(DECODE(csl.flow_indicator, 'DBIT', - 1 * csl.AMOUNT,
                                       'CRDT', CSL.amount),0) AS amount,
                    csh.statement_header_id
                FROM
                    ce_statement_lines     csl,
                    ce_statement_headers   csh2
                WHERE
                    csh2.statement_header_id = csl.statement_header_id (+)
                    AND csh2.STATEMENT_HEADER_ID = csh.statement_header_id
            )
        GROUP BY
            statement_header_id
    ) AS total_line_amount,
    cba.bank_account_name
FROM
    ce_statement_headers   csh,
    ce_bank_accounts       cba,
         CE_BANKS_V             cb,
    ce_bank_branches_v     cbb
WHERE
    (
        SELECT
            SUM(nvl(amount, 0)) AS LINE_AMOUNT
                  FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    nvl(DECODE(csl.flow_indicator, 'DBIT', - 1 * csl.amount, 'CRDT', csl.AMOUNT),0)
                                  AS AMOUNT,
                    csh.statement_header_id
                FROM
                    ce_statement_lines     csl,
                    ce_statement_headers   csh1
                WHERE
                    csh1.statement_header_id =csl.statement_header_id (+)
and  CsH1.statement_header_id =csh.statement_header_id
            )
        GROUP BY STATEMENT_HEADER_ID
    ) <>(SELECT CLBD_BALANCE_AMOUNT - opbd_balance_amount
        FROM
            (
                SELECT
                    balance_amount AS opbd_balance_amount
                FROM CE_STMT_BALANCES
                          WHERE
                    balance_code = 'OPBD'
                           
                                AND statement_header_id = csh.statement_header_id
                    AND bank_account_id = csh.bank_account_id),
                        (
                SELECT
                    balance_amount AS clbd_balance_amount
                FROM
                    ce_stmt_balances
                WHERE
                    balance_code = 'CLBD'
                    AND statement_header_id = csh.STATEMENT_HEADER_ID
                    AND bank_account_id = csh.bank_account_id
            )
    )
    AND   CSH.bank_account_id = cba.bank_account_id
    AND cba.bank_id = cb.bank_party_id
         AND CBA.BANK_BRANCH_ID = cbb.branch_party_id
		  AND ( cba.bank_account_id IN (
        :p_bank_account_name
    )
              OR 'All' IN (:p_bank_account_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND CSH.statement_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, CSH.statement_date)
                                    AND NVL(:p_end_date, csh.statement_date)
ORDER BY
    csh.STATEMENT_HEADER_ID

title: Oracle Fusion: How to add Dynamic Deep Link In OTBI Analysis & Dashboard?
description:
AS per Oracle SR Dynamic Deep link is not possible in OTBI analysis, but we can achieve this using some HTML code.
If you don't know how to add a Normal deep link please click on the below post first.
sql: select "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time" subject area then select some columns for example:- Invoice ID Invoice Number Invoice Amount Business Unit Name Now suppose you want to apply a deep link on the Invoice Number. then first find the normal deep link for the Invoice Number. https://xxxxxxxx.oraclecloud.com/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=AP_VIEWINVOICE&action=VIEW&objKey=InvoiceId={Invoice_id} then convert this normal deep link into HTML deep Link and In place of invoice_id use the Invoice id column from the Subject area. '||cast("- General Information"."Invoice Number" as char)||' In OTBI we need to pass it link a text ( In ' ' ), and before changing in column formula section please enable column heading checkbox. Then Click On OK and Save the Analysis. Currently, in the Results section, you are able to see the complete Link of the invoice number column. To convert the Invoice column to HTML supportive follow the below instructions. Click on column properties Go to Data formatting tab Then Enable  Override Default Data Format check box. select Treat Text As HTML. Then Click on OK and Save the Analysis and go to the Results section. After this when you click on the Invoice number you can easily redirect to the invoice page on Page.

title: Oracle Fusion Fixed Asset (FA) Register & Fixed Asset Detail Report
description:
Hi
Please find the below SQL for Fixed Asset Register.
Column Name:  
ASSET_ID
ASSIGNED_TO
OPENING_BALANCE
ASSET_NUMBER
LOCATION
DESCRIPTION
ASSET_TYPE
TRANSACTION_TYPE
BOOK_TYPE_CODE
MAJOR_CATEGORY
M
sql:
SELECT main_outer.*
FROM   (SELECT main_q.asset_id,
               person_num
               assigned_to,
               ( Round((Nvl (( SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                 adjustment_amount,
                 adjustment_amount * - 1)) FROM fa_adjustments WHERE
                 book_type_code =
                 main_q.book_type_code AND period_counter_adjusted < (SELECT
                 period_counter
                 FROM
                 fa_deprn_periods WHERE fiscal_year|| Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) =
                 :p_from_period
                 AND book_type_code = main_q.book_type_code ) AND asset_id =
                 main_q.asset_id
                 AND source_type_code IN( 'CIP ADDITION', 'ADDITION' ) AND
                 adjustment_type IN(
                 'CIP COST', 'COST' ) ), 0) * units_assigned) / MAIN_Q.units, 2)
                 --addition
                 + Round((Nvl(( SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                 adjustment_amount,
                 adjustment_amount * -1)) FROM fa_adjustments WHERE
                 book_type_code =
                 main_q.book_type_code AND period_counter_adjusted <( SELECT
                 period_counter
                 FROM
                 fa_deprn_periods WHERE fiscal_year|| Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) =
                 :p_from_period
                 AND book_type_code = main_q.book_type_code ) AND asset_id =
                 main_q.asset_id
                 AND source_type_code IN( 'CIP ADJUSTMENT', 'ADJUSTMENT' ) AND
                 adjustment_type
                 IN( 'CIP COST', 'COST' ) ), 0) * units_assigned) /
                 main_q.units, 2)
                 -- adjustment,
                 + Round((Nvl(( SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                 adjustment_amount,
                 adjustment_amount * - 1)) FROM fa_adjustments WHERE
                 book_type_code =
                 main_q.book_type_code AND period_counter_adjusted <( SELECT
                 period_counter
                 FROM
                 fa_deprn_periods WHERE fiscal_year|| Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) =
                 :p_from_period
                 AND book_type_code = main_q.book_type_code ) AND asset_id =
                 main_q.asset_id
                 AND source_type_code IN( 'TRANSFER' ) AND adjustment_type IN(
                 'COST',
                 'CIP COST' ) ), 0) * units_assigned) / main_q.units, 2)
                 --transfer,
                 + Round((Nvl(( SELECT SUM( Decode(faa.debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                 faa.adjustment_amount, faa.adjustment_amount * - 1)) FROM
                 fa_adjustments faa,
                 fa_transaction_headers fth WHERE faa.book_type_code =
                 main_q.book_type_code
                 AND faa.period_counter_adjusted < ( SELECT period_counter FROM
                 fa_deprn_periods WHERE fiscal_year|| Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) =
                 :P_FROM_PERIOD
                 AND book_type_code = main_q.book_type_code ) AND faa.asset_id =
                 main_q.asset_id AND fth.transaction_header_id =
                 faa.transaction_header_id AND
                 faa.source_type_code IN( 'RETIREMENT', 'REINSTATEMENT' ) AND
                 faa.adjustment_type IN( 'COST',
                 'CIP COST' ) ), 0) * units_assigned) / main_q.units, 2)
                 -- retirement,
                 + Round((Nvl(( SELECT SUM(Decode(faa.debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                 faa.adjustment_amount, faa.adjustment_amount * - 1)) FROM
                 fa_adjustments faa,
                 fa_transaction_headers fth WHERE faa.book_type_code =
                 main_q.book_type_code
                 AND faa.period_counter_adjusted <( SELECT period_counter FROM
                 fa_deprn_periods
                 WHERE fiscal_year|| Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) = :p_from_period AND
                 book_type_code
                 = main_q.book_type_code ) AND faa.asset_id = main_q.asset_id
                 AND
                 fth.transaction_header_id = faa.transaction_header_id AND
                 faa.adjustment_type
                 IN( 'IMPAIR RESERVE' )
                 ), 0) * units_assigned) / main_q.units, 2)
                 --IMPAIR RESERVE
                 + Round((Nvl(( SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                 adjustment_amount,
                 adjustment_amount * - 1)) FROM fa_adjustments WHERE
                 book_type_code =
                 main_q.book_type_code AND period_counter_adjusted <( SELECT
                 period_counter
                 FROM
                 fa_deprn_periods WHERE fiscal_year|| Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) =
                 :p_from_period
                 AND book_type_code = main_q.book_type_code ) AND asset_id =
                 main_q.asset_id
                 AND source_type_code IN( 'REVALUATION' ) AND adjustment_type IN
                 (
                 'COST',
                 'CIP COST' ) ), 0) * units_assigned) / main_q.units, 2) )
                      opening_balance,
               main_q.asset_number,
               main_q.location,
               main_q.description,
               main_q.asset_type,
               main_q.transaction_type,
               main_q.book_type_code,
               main_q.major_category,
               main_q.minor_category,
               main_q.tag_number,
               main_q.depreciate_flag,
               main_q.serial_number,
               main_q.manufacturer_name,
               main_q.in_use_flag,
               main_q.date_placed_in_service,
               main_q.method_code,
               main_q.account_code,
               main_q.life_in_months,
               main_q.units_assigned                                       units
               ,
               CASE
                 WHEN main_q.remaining_months < 0 THEN 0
                 ELSE main_q.remaining_months
               END                                                         AS
                      remaining_months,
               main_q.asset_key_ccid,
               SUM(main_q.addition)
               addition,
               SUM(main_q.adjustment)
               adjustment,
               SUM(main_q.retirement)
               retirement,
               SUM(main_q.transfer)
               transfer,
               SUM(main_q.revaluation)
               revaluation,
               SUM(main_q.cost)                                            cost,
               SUM(main_q.impair_reserve)
                      impair_reserve,
               main_q.depreciation_reserve
                      depreciation_reserve,
               main_q.depreciation
               depreciation
                      ,
               Nvl(main_q.ytd, 0)
                      ytd_depreciation,
               main_q.units_assigned,
               main_q.employee_name,
               SUM(main_q.open_ret_dep)
                      accu_depr_disp,
               CASE
                 WHEN transaction_type = 'FULL RETIREMENT' THEN
                 accumulated_depreciation + depreciation
                 ELSE SUM(main_q.open_ret_dep)
               END
                      ret_acc_dep_amt,
               main_q.accumulated_depreciation
        FROM   (SELECT fa.asset_id,
                       fa.asset_number,
                       fl.segment1
                       || '.'
                       || fl.segment2
                       || '.'
                       || fl.segment3                                   AS
                       location,
                       fa.asset_type,
                       fa.description,
                       fa.tag_number,
                       fa.serial_number,
                       fa.manufacturer_name,
                       periods.calendar_period_open_date,
                       fa.model_number,
                       fa.in_use_flag,
                       fb.depreciate_flag,
                       fm.life_in_months,
                       history.units_assigned,
                       history.assigned_to,
                       (SELECT ppn.full_name
                        FROM   per_person_names_f_v ppn
                        WHERE  history.assigned_to = ppn.person_id
                               AND Trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN
                                   effective_start_date AND
                                   effective_end_date
                               AND ROWNUM = 1)
                       employee_name,
                       (SELECT ppn1.person_number person_num
                        FROM   per_all_people_f ppn1
                        WHERE  history.assigned_to = ppn1.person_id
                               AND Trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN
                                   effective_start_date AND
                                   effective_end_date
                               AND ROWNUM = 1)
                       person_num,
                       (SELECT segment1
                        FROM   fa_asset_keywords
                        WHERE  code_combination_id = fa.asset_key_ccid)
                       asset_key_ccid,
                       fm.life_in_months - Ceil(Months_between(
                       (SELECT pr.calendar_period_open_date
                        FROM   fa_deprn_periods pr
                        WHERE  fiscal_year
                               || Lpad(period_num, 2, 0) =
                               :p_to_period
                               AND book_type_code =
                                   :p_book_type_code),
                                 fb.date_placed_in_service))
                                remaining_months,
                       /* description - change made remaning amount not coming correctly*/
                       ( fb.original_cost * units_assigned ) / units
                       opening_balance
                       ,
                       periods.book_type_code,
                       gcc.segment1
                       || '.'
                       || gcc.segment2
                       || '.'
                       || gcc.segment3
                       || '.'
                       || gcc.segment4
                       || '.'
                       || gcc.segment5
                       || '.'
                       || gcc.segment6
                       account_code,
                       fc.segment1
                       major_category,
                       fc.segment2
                       minor_category,
                       ah.units,
                       periods.period_counter,
                       fb.date_placed_in_service,
                       fm.method_code,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(deprn_amount) deprn_amount
                                    FROM   fa_deprn_summary a
                                    WHERE  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND period_counter IN(SELECT
                                               period_counter
                                                                 FROM
                                               fa_deprn_summary b
                                                                 WHERE
                                               book_type_code = a.book_type_code
                                               AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                               AND period_counter IN(SELECT
                                                   period_counter
                                                                     FROM
                                                   fa_deprn_periods
                                                                     WHERE
                                                   book_type_code =
                                                   b.book_type_code
                                                   --and FISCAL_YEAR = substr(:p_to_period,1,4)
                                                   AND
                                                   fiscal_year
                                                   ||
                                                   Lpad(period_num, 2, 0)
                                                   BETWEEN
                                                   :p_from_period AND
                                                   :p_to_period))
                                           AND book_type_code =
                                               periods.book_type_code)
                               , 0) *
                               units_assigned
                             ) / ah.units, 2)
                       depreciation,
                       ( fb.cost * units_assigned ) / ah.units          cost,
                       Round(( CASE
                                 WHEN Upper(Substr(:p_to_period, 1, 3)) = 'JAN'
                               THEN
                                 Nvl((SELECT ytd_deprn
                                      FROM   fa_deprn_summary
                                      WHERE  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                             AND period_counter =
                                                 periods.period_counter
                                             AND book_type_code =
                                                 periods.book_type_code), 0)
                                 ELSE Nvl((SELECT ytd_deprn
                                           FROM   fa_deprn_summary a
                                           WHERE  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                                  AND period_counter =
                                                      (SELECT Max(period_counter
                                                              )
                                                       FROM   fa_deprn_summary b
                                                       WHERE
                                                      book_type_code =
                                                      a.book_type_code
