                                                      AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                                      AND period_counter IN(
                                                          SELECT
                                                          period_counter
                                                                            FROM
                                                          fa_deprn_periods
                                                          WHERE
                                                          book_type_code =
                                                          b.book_type_code
                                                          AND fiscal_year =
                                                              Substr(
                                                              :p_to_period,
                                                                            1, 4
                                                                            )
                                                          AND fiscal_year
                                                              || Lpad(period_num
                                                                 , 2, 0)
                                                              <=
                                                              :p_to_period))
                                                  AND book_type_code =
                                                      periods.book_type_code),
                                      0)
                               END * units_assigned ) / ah.units, 2)    ytd,
                       ---
                       Round(Nvl((SELECT deprn_reserve
                                  FROM   fa_deprn_summary
                                  WHERE  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                         AND period_counter =
                                             (SELECT Max(period_counter)
                                              FROM   fa_deprn_summary
                                              WHERE
                                             asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                             AND period_counter <
                                                 (SELECT period_counter
                                                  FROM
                                                 fa_deprn_periods
                                                                   WHERE
                                                 ROWNUM = 1
                                                 AND fiscal_year
                                                     || Lpad(period_num
                                                        , 2,
                                                        0) =
                                                     :p_from_period))
                                         AND book_type_code =
                                             periods.book_type_code),
                             0) *
                             units_assigned / ah.units, 2)
                               accumulated_depreciation,
                       /* description-- change made because accumulated depreciation amount not coming correctly */
                       -----
                       Round(( CASE
                                 WHEN Upper(Substr(:p_to_period, 1, 3)) = 'JAN'
                               THEN
                                 Nvl((SELECT deprn_reserve
                                      FROM   fa_deprn_summary
                                      WHERE  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                             AND period_counter =
                                                 periods.period_counter
                                             AND book_type_code =
                                                 periods.book_type_code), 0)
                                 ELSE Nvl((SELECT deprn_reserve
                                           FROM   fa_deprn_summary
                                           WHERE  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                                  AND period_counter =
                                                      (SELECT Max(period_counter
                                                              )
                                                       FROM   fa_deprn_summary
                                                       WHERE
                                                  asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                                  AND period_counter <= (
                                                      SELECT
                                                      period_counter
                                                      FROM
                                                      fa_deprn_periods
                                                      WHERE
                                                      ROWNUM = 1
                                                      AND fiscal_year
                                                          || Lpad(
                                                      period_num, 2
                                                             , 0) =
                                                          :p_to_period))
                                                  AND book_type_code =
                                                      periods.book_type_code),
                                      0)
                               END * units_assigned ) / ah.units, 2)
                       depreciation_reserve,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND source_type_code IN(
                                               'CIP ADDITION', 'ADDITION'
                                                                  )
                                           AND adjustment_type IN(
                                               'CIP COST', 'COST' )
                                   ), 0) *
                               units_assigned
                             ) / ah.units, 2)                           addition
                       ,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(
debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND source_type_code IN(
                                               'ADJUSTMENT', 'CIP ADJUSTMENT' )
                                           AND adjustment_type IN
                                               ( 'COST', 'CIP COST' )
                                   ), 0) *
                               units_assigned
                             ) / ah.units, 2)
                       adjustment,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND adjustment_type IN(
                                               'IMPAIR RESERVE' )),
                               0) *
                               units_assigned ) / ah.units, 2)
                       impair_reserve,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND source_type_code IN( 'TRANSFER' )
                                           AND adjustment_type IN
                                               ( 'COST', 'CIP COST' )
                                   ), 0) *
                               units_assigned
                             ) / ah.units, 2)                           transfer
                       ,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(
debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND source_type_code IN
                                               ( 'RETIREMENT' )
                                           AND adjustment_type IN
                                               ( 'COST', 'CIP COST' )
                                   ), 0) *
                               units_assigned
                             ) / ah.units, 2)
                       retirement,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND source_type_code IN(
                                               'REVALUATION' )
                                           AND adjustment_type IN
                                               ( 'COST', 'CIP COST' )
                                   ), 0) *
                               units_assigned
                             ) / ah.units, 2)
                       revaluation,
                       fb.cost                                          c1,
                       Round(( Nvl((SELECT SUM(Decode(debit_credit_flag, 'DR',
                                               adjustment_amount,
                                               adjustment_amount * -1
                                               ))
                                    FROM   fa_adjustments
                                    WHERE  book_type_code =
                                           periods.book_type_code
                                           AND period_counter_adjusted =
                                               periods.period_counter
                                           AND asset_id = fa.asset_id
                                           AND debit_credit_flag IN
                                               ( 'DR', 'CR' )
                                           AND source_type_code IN
                                               ( 'RETIREMENT' )
                                           AND adjustment_type IN( 'RESERVE' )),
                               0) *
                               units_assigned )
                             / ah.units, 2)
                       open_ret_dep,
                       (SELECT DISTINCT fth.transaction_type_code
                        FROM   fa_deprn_summary fd,
                               fa_deprn_periods fdp,
                               fa_transaction_headers fth,
                               fa_retirements fr
                        WHERE  fd.asset_id = fa.asset_id
                               AND fdp.period_counter = fd.period_counter
                               AND fdp.book_type_code = fd.book_type_code
                               AND fth.asset_id = fd.asset_id
                               AND fth.transaction_type_code = 'FULL RETIREMENT'
                               AND To_char(fr.date_retired, 'YYYY')
                                   || To_char(fr.date_retired, 'MM') BETWEEN
                                   :p_from_period AND :p_to_period
                               AND fr.transaction_header_id_in =
                                   fth.transaction_header_id)
                                          transaction_type
                FROM   fa_additions_vl fa,
                       fa_books fb,
                       fa_distribution_history history,
                       fa_asset_history ah,
                       gl_code_combinations gcc,
                       fa_deprn_periods periods,
                       fa_methods fm,
                       fa_categories_vl fc,
                       fa_category_books cb,
                       fa_locations fl
                WHERE  fa.asset_id = history.asset_id
                       AND fa.asset_id = fb.asset_id
                       AND Nvl((SELECT periods1.period_close_date
                                FROM   fa_deprn_periods periods1
                                WHERE  periods1.fiscal_year
                                       || Lpad(periods1.period_num, 2, 0) =
                                       :p_to_period
                                       AND periods.book_type_code =
                                           periods1.book_type_code),
                           SYSDATE)
                           BETWEEN ( history.date_effective ) AND Nvl(
                                   ( history.date_ineffective ),
                                                                  SYSDATE)
                       AND Nvl((SELECT periods1.period_close_date
                                FROM   fa_deprn_periods periods1
                                WHERE  periods1.fiscal_year
                                       || Lpad(periods1.period_num, 2, 0) =
                                       :p_to_period
                                       AND periods.book_type_code =
                                           periods1.book_type_code),
                           SYSDATE)
                           BETWEEN ( ah.date_effective ) AND Nvl(
                                   ( ah.date_ineffective ),
                                                             SYSDATE)
                       AND fb.transaction_header_id_in =
                           (SELECT Max(transaction_header_id_in)
                            FROM   fa_books fb1
                            WHERE  fb1.asset_id = fb.asset_id
                                   AND fb1.book_type_code =
                                       fb.book_type_code
                               )
                       AND fa.asset_id = ah.asset_id --Changes on 5th Oct
                       AND history.location_id = fl.location_id
                       AND gcc.code_combination_id = history.code_combination_id
                       AND periods.book_type_code = history.book_type_code
                       AND fb.method_id = fm.method_id
                       AND cb.category_id = fc.category_id
                       AND cb.book_type_code = periods.book_type_code
                       AND ah.category_id = fc.category_id
                       AND fb.book_type_code = periods.book_type_code
                       AND fa.asset_type = Nvl(:p_asset_type, fa.asset_type)
                       AND periods.book_type_code = :p_book_type_code
                       AND Nvl(fl.segment1
                               || '.'
                               || fl.segment2
                               || '.'
                               || fl.segment3, 'NA') = Nvl(:p_location,

title: Invoice Header Dump Report
description:
Requirement Document
Field
Description
Measure Calculation
Dimension
Ledger Name
 
 
Yes
Business Unit
 
 
Yes
Bank Account Name
 
 
Yes
Bank Currency
 
Multi-currency Bank Payment
 
Payment Date
sql:
SELECT
    aipa.check_id,
    aia.invoice_id,
    aca.creation_date          AS paym_creation_date,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f_v   ppnf, per_users              pu
        WHERE
            upper(pu.username) = upper(aca.created_by)
            AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND(trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date))
    ), aca.created_by) as payment_creation_by,
    apsa.due_date,
    aia.invoice_num,
    hou.name                   business_unit,
    aterms.name                AS invoice_payment_term,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f_v   ppnf, per_users              pu
        WHERE
            upper(pu.username) = upper(aia.created_by)
            AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND(trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date))
    ), aia.created_by) AS invoice_created_by,
    aipa.discount_taken,
    aipa.discount_lost,
    aipa.exchange_rate         payment_exch_rate,
    ( aipa.discount_taken * nvl(aipa.exchange_rate, 1) ) discount_taken_ledger_currency,
    ( aipa.discount_lost * nvl(aipa.exchange_rate, 1) ) discount_lost_ledger_currency,
    (
        SELECT
            flvv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_vl flvv
        WHERE
            flvv.lookup_type = 'AP_WFAPPROVAL_STATUS'
            AND flvv.lookup_code = aia.wfapproval_status
    ) AS approval_status,
    (
        SELECT
            MAX(wft.creation_date)
        FROM
            ap_inv_aprvl_hist_all wft
        WHERE
            wft.history_type = 'DOCUMENTAPPROVAL'
            AND wft.invoice_id = aia.invoice_id
            AND wft.response IN (
                'APPROVED',
                'MANUALLY APPROVED',
                'ORA_AUTO APPROVED'
            )
    ) AS invoice_approval_date,
    aia.creation_date          invoice_creation_date,
    (
        SELECT
            ipmv_inv.payment_method_name inv_payment_method_name
        FROM
            iby_payment_methods_vl ipmv_inv
        WHERE
            apsa.payment_method_code = ipmv_inv.payment_method_code
    ) invoice_payment_method,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f_v   ppnf, per_users              pu
        WHERE
            upper(pu.username) = upper(ps.created_by)
            AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND(trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date))
    ), ps.created_by) AS supplier_created_by,
    aca.remit_to_supplier_name,
    (
        SELECT
            extbnkacct.bank_account_name
        FROM
            iby_ext_bank_accounts extbnkacct
        WHERE
            aca.external_bank_account_id = extbnkacct.ext_bank_account_id
    ) AS remit_to_bank_account,
    aia.invoice_currency_code,
    ps.vendor_name             supplier_name,
    (
        SELECT
            flvv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_vl flvv
        WHERE
            flvv.lookup_type = 'POZ_VENDOR_TYPE'
            AND flvv.lookup_code = ps.vendor_type_lookup_code
    ) AS supplier_type,
    aia.invoice_amount         invoice_amount,
    aia.invoice_date           invoice_date,
    gl.name                    AS ledger_name,
    gl.currency_code           AS ledger_currency,
    aca.bank_account_name,
    ipmv.payment_method_name   payment_payment_method_name,
    aca.status_lookup_code,
    (
        SELECT
            payableslookup_inv_type.displayed_field
        FROM
            ap_lookup_codes payableslookup_inv_type
        WHERE
            payableslookup_inv_type.lookup_type = 'INVOICE TYPE'
            AND aia.invoice_type_lookup_code = payableslookup_inv_type.lookup_code
    ) invoice_type,
    aipa.amount * nvl(aipa.exchange_rate, 1) AS payment_inst_ledger_amount,
    aipa.amount                payment_installment_amount,
    pmttype.meaning            payment_type,
    aca.currency_code          payment_currency,
    aca.check_number           payment_number,
    aca.check_date             AS payment_date,
    aipa.posted_flag,
    'N' AS dummy
FROM
    ap_checks_all              aca,
    ap_invoice_payments_all    aipa,
    ap_invoices_all            aia,
    hr_operating_units         hou,
    poz_suppliers_v            ps,
    gl_ledgers                 gl,
    iby_payment_methods_vl     ipmv,
    fnd_lookup_values_vl       pmttype,
    ap_payment_schedules_all   apsa,
    ap_terms                   aterms
WHERE
    aca.check_id = aipa.check_id
    AND aipa.invoice_id = aia.invoice_id
    AND aca.vendor_id = ps.vendor_id (+)
    AND aca.org_id = hou.organization_id
    AND aipa.set_of_books_id = gl.ledger_id
    AND aca.payment_type_flag = pmttype.lookup_code
    AND pmttype.lookup_type = 'PAYMENT TYPE'
    AND aia.invoice_id = apsa.invoice_id
    AND aipa.payment_num = apsa.payment_num
    AND aia.terms_id = aterms.term_id (+)
    AND aca.payment_method_code = ipmv.payment_method_code
    AND aca.status_lookup_code <> 'VOIDED'
    AND trunc(aca.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(aca.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(aca.creation_date)
    )

title: Payment Basic Detail SQL
description:
Requirement Document
Filed
Description
Measure Calculation
Dimension
Dummy
Ledger Name
 
 
Yes
Business Unit
 
 
Yes
Bank Account Name
 
 
Yes
Bank Currency
 
Multi-currency Bank Payment
 
Payment Dat
sql:
SELECT
    gl.name                    ledger_name,
    hou.bu_name                business_unit,
    (
        SELECT
            cba.bank_account_name
        FROM
            ce_bank_accounts        cba,
            ce_bank_acct_uses_all   cbaua
        WHERE
            aca.ce_bank_acct_use_id = cbaua.bank_acct_use_id
            AND cbaua.bank_account_id = cba.bank_account_id
    ) AS bank_account_name,
    aca.currency_code          payment_currency,
    (
        SELECT
            cba.currency_code
        FROM
            ce_bank_accounts        cba,
            ce_bank_acct_uses_all   cbaua
        WHERE
            aca.ce_bank_acct_use_id = cbaua.bank_acct_use_id
            AND cbaua.bank_account_id = cba.bank_account_id
    ) AS bank_currency,
    aca.check_date             payment_date,
      gl.currency_code           ledger_currency,
    (
        SELECT
            flvv.meaning
        FROM
              fnd_lookup_values_vl flvv
        WHERE
            flvv.lookup_type = 'POZ_VENDOR_TYPE'
            AND flvv.lookup_code = ps.vendor_type_lookup_code
    ) AS supplier_type,
    (
        SELECT
            flvv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_vl flvv
        WHERE
            flvv.lookup_type = 'PAYMENT TYPE'
            AND flvv.lookup_code = aca.payment_type_flag
    ) AS payment_type,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f_v   ppnf, per_users              pu
        WHERE
            upper(pu.username) = upper(aca.created_by)
            AND pu.person_id = ppnf.person_id
            AND name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND(trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date))
    ), aca.created_by) AS created_by,
    ps.vendor_name             AS supplier_name,
    aca.creation_date          payment_creation_date,
    aca.check_number,
    aca.check_id,
    (
        SELECT
            flvv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_vl flvv
        WHERE
            flvv.lookup_type = 'CHECK STATE'
            AND flvv.lookup_code = aca.status_lookup_code
    ) payment_status,
    aca.amount,
    aca.amount * nvl(aca.exchange_rate, 1) AS payment_ledger_amount,
    aca.exchange_rate,
    aca.exchange_rate_type,
    aca.exchange_date,
    aca.checkrun_name          AS payment_process_request_name,
    adsa.name                  AS document_sequence_name,
    ipmv.payment_method_name   AS payment_method,
    aca.remit_to_supplier_name,
    (
        SELECT
            payprofi.payment_profile_name
        FROM
            iby_acct_pmt_profiles_tl payprofi
        WHERE
            aca.payment_profile_id = payprofi.payment_profile_id
            AND payprofi.language = userenv('LANG')
    ) AS payment_process_profile,
    (
        SELECT
            extbnkacct.bank_account_name
        FROM
            iby_ext_bank_accounts extbnkacct
        WHERE
            aca.external_bank_account_id = extbnkacct.ext_bank_account_id
    ) AS remit_to_bank_account,
    aca.future_pay_due_date    AS maturity_date,
    aca.recon_flag             AS reconciliation_status,
    'N' AS dummy
FROM
    gl_ledgers                   gl,
    fun_names_business_units_v   hou,
    ap_checks_all                aca,
    poz_suppliers_v              ps,
    fnd_document_sequences       adsa,
    iby_payment_methods_vl       ipmv
WHERE
    aca.org_id = hou.bu_id
    AND gl.ledger_id = hou.primary_ledger_id
    AND aca.vendor_id = ps.vendor_id (+)
    AND adsa.doc_sequence_id (+) = aca.doc_sequence_id
    AND aca.payment_method_code = ipmv.payment_method_code
    AND trunc(aca.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(aca.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(aca.creation_date)
    )

title: GL Journal Header Dump SQL
description:
Requirement Document
Field
Description
Measure Calculation
Dimension
Ledger Name
 
 
Yes
Subledger Journal
Originated from Subledger or not
Subledger JV%
 
Journal Source
Automatic, Subledger
Automati
sql:
SELECT
    gl.name                               ledger_name,
    gjh.je_from_sla_flag,
    gjst.user_je_source_name              source_name,
    gjct.user_je_category_name            category_name,
    gjh.multi_currency_flag,
    gl.partition_group_code               AS period_set_name,
    gl.chart_of_accounts_id,
    gjh.default_effective_date            gl_date,
    ( '!'
      || gjh.period_name ) AS period_name,
    gp.start_date                         period_start_date,
    gp.end_date                           period_end_date,
    gjh.creation_date,
    gl.ledger_category_code,
    DECODE(gjh.actual_flag, 'A', 'Actual', 'B', 'Budget', 'E', 'Encumbrance', gjh.actual_flag) actual_flag,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_users            pu, per_person_names_f   ppnf
        WHERE
            ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = pu.person_id
            AND SYSDATE BETWEEN ppnf.effective_start_date AND ppnf.effective_end_date
            AND pu.username = gjh.created_by
            AND ROWNUM = 1
    ), gjh.created_by) created_by,
    CASE
        WHEN ( (
            SELECT
                COUNT(DISTINCT currency_code)
            FROM
                gl_je_lines gjl
            WHERE
                gjh.je_header_id = gjl.je_header_id
        ) > 1 ) THEN
            NULL
        ELSE
            (
                SELECT
                    currency_code
                FROM
                    gl_je_lines gjl
                WHERE
                    gjh.je_header_id = gjl.je_header_id
                    AND ROWNUM = 1
            )
    END journal_currency_code,
    gl.currency_code                      ledger_currency_code,
    CASE
        WHEN gjh.accrual_rev_period_name IS NULL THEN
            NULL
        ELSE
            '!' || gjh.accrual_rev_period_name
    END reversal_period_name,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            flv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_tl flv
        WHERE
            flv.lookup_type = 'REVERSAL_OPTION_CODE'
            AND flv.lookup_code = gjh.accrual_rev_change_sign_flag
            AND flv.language = 'US'
    ), gjh.accrual_rev_change_sign_flag) reversal_option,
    nvl((
        SELECT
            flv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_tl flv
        WHERE
            flv.lookup_type = 'JE_REVERSAL_STATUS'
            AND flv.lookup_code = gjh.accrual_rev_status
            AND flv.language = 'US'
    ), gjh.accrual_rev_status) reversal_status,
    (
        SELECT
            flv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_tl flv
        WHERE
            flv.lookup_type = 'JE_BATCH_APPROVAL_STATUS'
            AND flv.lookup_code = gjb.approval_status_code
            AND flv.language = 'US'
    ) AS approval_status,
    (
        SELECT
            flv.meaning
        FROM
            fnd_lookup_values_tl flv
        WHERE
            flv.lookup_type = 'MJE_BATCH_STATUS'
            AND flv.lookup_code = gjb.status
            AND flv.language = 'US'
    ) AS batch_status,
    DECODE(gjh.status, 'U', 'Unposted', 'P', 'Posted', 'Error') journal_status,
    gjh.posted_date,
    (
        SELECT
            MIN(gjal.action_date)
        FROM
            gl_je_action_log gjal
        WHERE
            gjb.je_batch_id = gjal.je_batch_id
            AND gjal.action_code NOT IN (
                'CREATED',
                'POSTED',
                'UPDATED',
                'REVERSED'
            )
    ) min_action,
    (
        SELECT
            MAX(gjal.action_date)
        FROM
            gl_je_action_log gjal
        WHERE
            gjb.je_batch_id = gjal.je_batch_id
            AND gjal.action_code NOT IN (
                'CREATED',
                'POSTED',
                'UPDATED',
                'REVERSED'
            )
    ) max_action,
    docsequence.name                      subledger_sequence_name,
    funcloseacctseqversions.header_name   reporting_sequence_name,
    funpostacctseqversions.header_name    accounting_sequence_name,
    gjh.doc_sequence_value,
    (
        SELECT
            COUNT(*)
        FROM
            gl_je_lines gjl
        WHERE
            gjh.je_header_id = gjl.je_header_id
    ) journal_line_count,
    gjh.je_header_id,
    gjb.je_batch_id,
    gjh.name,
    gjh.description,
    gjh.running_total_accounted_dr        running_total_dr,
    gjh.running_total_accounted_cr        running_total_cr,
    gjh.parent_je_header_id,
    gjh.reversed_je_header_id,
    'N' AS dummy
FROM
    gl_je_headers            gjh,
    gl_je_batches            gjb,
    gl_ledgers               gl,
    gl_periods               gp,
    gl_je_sources_tl         gjst,
    gl_je_categories_tl      gjct,
    fnd_document_sequences   docsequence,
    fun_seq_versions         funcloseacctseqversions,
    fun_seq_versions         funpostacctseqversions
WHERE
    gjh.je_batch_id = gjb.je_batch_id
    AND gl.ledger_id = gjh.ledger_id
    AND gp.period_name = gjh.period_name
    AND gl.period_set_name = gp.period_set_name
    AND gjh.je_source = gjst.je_source_name
    AND gjst.language = 'US'
    AND gjh.je_category = gjct.je_category_name
    AND gjct.language = 'US'
    AND ( trunc(gjh.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(gjh.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(gjh.creation_date
    )) )
    AND gjh.doc_sequence_id = docsequence.doc_sequence_id (+)
    AND gjh.close_acct_seq_version_id = funcloseacctseqversions.seq_version_id (+)
    AND gjh.posting_acct_seq_version_id = funpostacctseqversions.seq_version_id (+)

title: Please find the below SQL for Project Billing Invoice Cycle Time
description:
Hi Please find the Columns and tables that we are using below SQL.
Column Name
Ledger Name
Business Unit
Project Organization
Project Unit
Project Type
Customer Name
Invoice Status Code
Project Name
P
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
    'Total' AS total,
    (
        SELECT
            SUM(invoicedistributionpeo1.cont_curr_billed_amt)
        FROM
            pjb_inv_line_dists invoicedistributionpeo1
        WHERE
            invoicedistributionpeo1.invoice_id = invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id
    ) AS invoice_amount,
    (
        SELECT
            external_virtual_host pod_url
        FROM
            ask_deployed_domains
        WHERE
            deployed_domain_name = 'FADomain'
    )
    || '/fscmUI/faces/deeplink?objType=PROJECT_INVOICES&action=NONE&objKey=InvoiceId='
    || invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id AS prod_link,
    invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date,
    TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date), 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date), 'YY') approve_period,
    invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.exception_flag,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id,
    invoiceheaderpeo.gl_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.released_date,
    TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date), 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || TO_CHAR(trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date), 'YY') released_period,
    invoiceheaderpeo.transfer_status_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.transferred_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_type_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code,
    invoiceheaderpeo.pa_date,
    invoiceheaderpeo.taxation_country,
    invoiceheaderpeo.created_by            draft_by_person,
    invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date         draft_date,
    personnamedpeo.display_name            AS approved_by_person,
    personnamedpeo1.display_name           AS released_by_person,
    nvl(personnamedpeo2.display_name, invoiceheaderpeo.created_by) AS submitted_by_person,
    contractheaderpeo.contract_number,
    nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) AS submitted_date,
    TO_CHAR(trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date)), 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
    || '-'
    || TO_CHAR(trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date)), 'YY') submitted_period,
    ledger.name                            AS ledger_name,
    contracttypepeo.name                   contract_type_name,
    transactionheader.trx_number,
    transactionheader.customer_trx_id,
    transactionheader.creation_date        AS ar_trx_creation_date,
    transactionheader.created_by           AS ar_trx_created_by,
    projectbasepeo.project_id,
    projectbasepeo.project_currency_code,
    projectbasepeo.segment1                AS project_number,
    projecttranslationpeo.name             AS project_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
    projectstatuspeo.project_status_code   AS project_status_code,
    personnamedpeo3.list_name              AS project_manajor_name,
    worktypepeo.name                       AS work_type_name,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN transactionheader.creation_date IS NOT NULL THEN
                trunc(transactionheader.creation_date) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date)
        END
    ) AS draft_to_ar_invoice,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) IS NOT NULL THEN
                trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date)) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date
                )
        END
    ) AS draft_to_submit,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date IS NOT NULL THEN
                trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date) - trunc(nvl(invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date
                ))
        END
    ) AS submit_to_approve,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN invoiceheaderpeo.released_date IS NOT NULL THEN
                trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.approved_date)
        END
    ) AS approve_to_release,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN invoiceheaderpeo.transferred_date IS NOT NULL THEN
                trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.transferred_date) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.released_date)
        END
    ) AS release_to_transfer,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN transactionheader.creation_date IS NOT NULL THEN
                trunc(transactionheader.creation_date) - trunc(invoiceheaderpeo.transferred_date)
        END
    ) AS transfer_to_ar_invoice,
    organizationunittranslation.name       AS business_unit,
    pptt.project_type                      project_type,
    projectunitdpeo.name                   project_unit,
    projectowningorgdpeo.name              project_org,
    hca.account_name                       customer_name
FROM
    pjb_inv_line_dists              invoicedistributionpeo,
    pjb_invoice_headers             invoiceheaderpeo,
    okc_k_headers_vl                contractheaderpeo,
    per_person_names_f_v            personnamedpeo,
    per_person_names_f_v            personnamedpeo1,
    per_person_names_f_v            personnamedpeo2,
    hr_organization_information_f   organizationinformationpeo,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl      organizationunittranslation,
    gl_ledgers                      ledger,
    okc_contract_types_vl           contracttypepeo,
    ra_customer_trx_all             transactionheader,
    pjf_projects_all_b              projectbasepeo,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v      latesprojectmanagerpeo,
    pjf_projects_all_tl             projecttranslationpeo,
    pjf_work_types_vl               worktypepeo,
    pjf_project_statuses_vl         projectstatuspeo,
    per_person_names_f_v            personnamedpeo3,
    pjf_project_types_tl            pptt,
    hr_organization_v               projectowningorgdpeo,
    hr_organization_v               projectunitdpeo,
    hz_cust_accounts                hca
WHERE
    ( invoicedistributionpeo.invoice_id = invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_id (+)
      AND invoiceheaderpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
      AND invoicedistributionpeo.contract_id = contractheaderpeo.id
      AND invoicedistributionpeo.major_version = contractheaderpeo.major_version
      AND invoiceheaderpeo.approved_by_person_id = personnamedpeo.person_id (+)
      AND invoiceheaderpeo.released_by_person_id = personnamedpeo1.person_id (+)
      AND invoiceheaderpeo.submitted_by_person_id = personnamedpeo2.person_id (+)
      AND invoicedistributionpeo.org_id = organizationinformationpeo.organization_id
      AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = organizationinformationpeo.org_information_context
      AND organizationinformationpeo.organization_id = organizationunittranslation.organization_id
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslation.effective_start_date AND organizationunittranslation.effective_end_date )
      AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslation.language
      AND projectbasepeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id
      AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code
      AND projectbasepeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id
      AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo1.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo1.effective_end_date (+) )
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo2.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo2.effective_end_date (+) )
      AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationinformationpeo.effective_start_date AND organizationinformationpeo.effective_end_date ) )
    AND projectbasepeo.project_type_id = pptt.project_type_id (+)
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = pptt.language
   -- AND contractheaderpeo.contract_number = 'IC AU010 to US010'
    --AND invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num = '1'
    AND organizationinformationpeo.org_information3 = ledger.ledger_id
    AND contractheaderpeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id (+)
    AND TO_CHAR(invoiceheaderpeo.contract_id) = transactionheader.interface_header_attribute2 (+)
    AND TO_CHAR(invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num) = transactionheader.interface_header_attribute3 (+)
    AND invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id = projectbasepeo.project_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_id = projecttranslationpeo.project_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = projecttranslationpeo.language
    AND projectbasepeo.work_type_id = worktypepeo.work_type_id (+)
    AND projectbasepeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code
    AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo3.person_id (+)
    AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo3.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo3.effective_end_date (+) )
    AND ( organizationunittranslation.name IN (
        :p_business_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_business_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( pptt.project_type IN (
        :p_project_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_type || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectunitdpeo.name IN (
        :p_project_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectowningorgdpeo.name IN (
        :p_project_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( hca.account_name IN (
        :p_customer_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_customer_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( contractheaderpeo.contract_number IN (
        :p_contract_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_contract_number || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_num IN (
        :p_invoice_num
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_invoice_num || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_status_code IN (
        :p_invoice_status_code
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_invoice_status_code || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.invoice_currency_code IN (
        :p_invoice_currency_code
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_invoice_currency_code || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ledger.name IN (
        :p_ledger
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectbasepeo.project_id IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( projectbasepeo.project_id IN (
        :p_project_num
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_num || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( personnamedpeo3.list_name IN (
        :p_project_manager
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_manager || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( worktypepeo.name IN (
        :p_work_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_work_type || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( invoiceheaderpeo.created_by IN (
        :p_invoice_created_by
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_invoice_created_by || 'All'
    ) )
  /*  AND invoiceheaderpeo.gl_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_acc_start_date, invoiceheaderpeo.gl_date) AND nvl(:p_acc_end_date, invoiceheaderpeo
    .gl_date)*/
    AND invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date BETWEEN nvl(:p_start_date, invoiceheaderpeo.creation_date) AND nvl(:p_end_date, invoiceheaderpeo
    .creation_date)

title: Please find the below SQL for Project Cost Adjustment.
description:
Hi Please find the Columns and tables that we are using below SQL
Column Name
Transaction Number
Project Name
Project Number
Project Org Name
Project Business Unit
Task Name
Task Number
Expenditure Ty
sql:
SELECT
    'Total' AS total,
    TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') adj_creation_date,
    ( TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'Mon', 'NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=AMERICAN')
      || (
        CASE
            WHEN peiaa.expenditure_item_id IS NOT NULL THEN
                '-'
            ELSE
                NULL
        END
    )
      || TO_CHAR(peiaa.creation_date, 'YY') ) adj_creation_date_month,
    peiaa.created_by                    AS adj_created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup1.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup1
        WHERE
            lkup1.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE'
            AND lkup1.lookup_code = peiaa.adjustment_type
    ) adjustment_type,
    peiaa.adjustment_type as adjustment_type_1,
    peiaa.expenditure_item_id           AS adj_id,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup2.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup2
        WHERE
            lkup2.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJUST_HISTORY_REC_STATUS'
            AND lkup2.lookup_code = peiaa.status
    ) adjustment_status,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup3.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup3
        WHERE
            lkup3.lookup_type = 'PJC_ADJ_SOURCE'
            AND lkup3.lookup_code = peiaa.module_code
    ) adjustment_source,
    peiaa.adjustment_justification,
    TO_CHAR(peia.creation_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') creation_date,
    peia.expenditure_item_id            AS transaction_id,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peia.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peia.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peia.creation_date
            )) ) THEN
                1
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) count_of_trx,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                1
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) count_of_adj,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                1
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS adj_line_count,
    peia.created_by,
    (
        SELECT
            COUNT(peiaa1.expenditure_item_id)
        FROM
            pjc_expend_item_adj_acts peiaa1
        WHERE
            peiaa1.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
            AND ( trunc(peiaa1.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa1.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa1
            .creation_date)) )
            AND ( peiaa1.status IN (
        :p_adj_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_adj_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peiaa1.adjustment_type IN (
        :p_adj_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_adj_type || 'All'
    ) )
            
    ) AS count_adj,
    peia.expenditure_item_id            transaction_number,
    ppav.name                           project_name,
    ppav.segment1                       project_number,
    ptv.task_name,
    ptv.task_number,
    petv.expenditure_type_name,
    peia.denom_raw_cost                 raw_cost_in_transaction_currency,
    peia.projfunc_raw_cost              raw_cost_in_project_currency,
    TO_CHAR(peia.expenditure_item_date, 'DD-MM-YYYY') expenditure_item_date,
    peia.quantity                       quantity,
    peia.unit_of_measure,
    pwtt.name                           work_type_name,
    peia.billable_flag                  billable,
    peia.capitalizable_flag             capitalizable,
    peia.user_batch_name                user_expenditure_batch_name,
    houfteo.name                        expenditure_organization,
    project_owning_org.name             project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                        AS project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                        project_unit,
    ptsb.user_transaction_source        transaction_source,
    ptdt.document_name,
    ptdet.doc_entry_name                document_entry,
    (
        SELECT
            lkup1.meaning
        FROM
            pjc_lookups lkup1
        WHERE
            lkup1.lookup_type = 'PJC_CMT_PROCESSING_STATUS'
            AND lkup1.lookup_code = peia.invoiced_flag
    ) invoice_status,
    peia.bill_hold_flag                 hold_invoice,
    ps.vendor_name                      supplier_name,
    pect.expenditure_category_name,
    peia.project_currency_code          project_currency,
    peia.denom_currency_code            transaction_currency,
    xep.name                            project_legal_entity_name,
    (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) AS project_manager_name,
    ppav.project_status_code            project_status,
    gl.name                             ledger_name,
    ptsb.transaction_source_id          transaction_source_number,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                (
                    SELECT
                        peiain.denom_raw_cost
                    FROM
                        pjc_exp_items_all peiain
                    WHERE
                        peiaa.expenditure_item_id = peiain.expenditure_item_id
                )
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS adj_amount_transaction_currency,
    gl.currency_code                    ledger_currency,
    (
        CASE
            WHEN ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa
            .creation_date)) ) THEN
                (
                    SELECT
                        peiain.denom_raw_cost * nvl(peiain.acct_exchange_rate, 1)
                    FROM
                        pjc_exp_items_all peiain
                    WHERE
                        peiaa.expenditure_item_id = peiain.expenditure_item_id
                )
            ELSE
                0
        END
    ) AS adj_amount,
    peia.transferred_from_exp_item_id   transferred_from_transaction_number,
    peia.adjusted_expenditure_item_id   adjusting_item
FROM
    pjc_exp_items_all            peia,
    pjc_expend_item_adj_acts     peiaa,
    pjf_projects_all_vl          ppav,
    pjf_tasks_v                  ptv,
    pjf_exp_types_vl             petv,
    pjf_work_types_tl            pwtt,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   houfteo,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl   houftpu,
    xle_entity_profiles          xep,
    pjf_txn_sources_vl           ptsb,
    pjf_txn_document_tl          ptdt,
    pjf_txn_doc_entry_tl         ptdet,
    poz_suppliers_v              ps,
    pjf_exp_categories_tl        pect,
    pjf_exp_types_b              petb,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v   project_managet_project,
    fun_names_business_units_v   fnbu,
    gl_ledgers                   gl
WHERE
    1 = 1
--and peia.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID=347699
    AND peia.expenditure_item_id = peiaa.expenditure_item_id (+)
    AND peia.project_id = ppav.project_id
    AND peia.task_id = ptv.task_id
    AND peia.expenditure_type_id = petv.expenditure_type_id
    AND peia.work_type_id = pwtt.work_type_id (+)
    AND peia.expenditure_organization_id = houfteo.organization_id
    AND ppav.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND peia.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND ptsb.transaction_source_id = peia.transaction_source_id
    AND ptdt.document_id = peia.document_id
    AND ptdet.doc_entry_id = peia.doc_entry_id
    AND peia.vendor_id = ps.vendor_id (+)
    AND peia.expenditure_type_id = petb.expenditure_type_id
    AND petb.expenditure_category_id = pect.expenditure_category_id
    AND ppav.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND ppav.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppav.org_id
    AND fnbu.primary_ledger_id = gl.ledger_id
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(houfteo.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houfteo.effective_end_date)
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houfteo.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND ptdt.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND ptdet.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND pect.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND pwtt.language (+) = userenv('LANG')
--    and peiaa.status='X'
--and peiaa.adjustment_type='Edit comment'
    AND ( gl.ledger_id IN (
        :p_ledger_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_ledger_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( xep.legal_entity_id IN (
        :p_legal_entity_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_legal_entity_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( project_owning_org.organization_id IN (
        :p_project_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( fnbu.bu_id IN (
        :p_project_business_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_business_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppav.project_status_code IN (
        :p_project_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( project_managet_project.resource_source_id IN (
        :p_project_manager
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_manager || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peia.project_currency_code IN (
        :p_project_currency
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_currency || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ( trunc(peiaa.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peiaa.creation_date
    )) )
          OR ( trunc(peia.creation_date) BETWEEN nvl(:p_from_date, trunc(peia.creation_date)) AND nvl(:p_to_date, trunc(peia.creation_date
          )) ) )
    AND ( ptsb.transaction_source_id IN (
        :p_transaction_source
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_transaction_source || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ptdt.document_id IN (
        :p_document
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_document || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peiaa.status IN (
        :p_adj_status
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_adj_status || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( peiaa.adjustment_type IN (
        :p_adj_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_adj_type || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( houfteo.organization_id IN (
        :p_expenditure_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_expenditure_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppav.project_id IN (
        :p_project_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_number || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppav.project_id IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( petv.expenditure_type_name IN (
        :p_expenditure_type
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_expenditure_type || 'All'
    ) )

title: Please find the below SQL for Contract VS Invoice VS Revenue Report.
description:
Hi Please find the Columns and tables that we are using below SQL
Column Name
Contract Name
Contract Number
Contract Type Name
Contract Status
Contract BU
Contract Legal Entity
Contract Customer Name
sql:
WITH contract_detail AS (
    SELECT
        contractheaderbasepeo.id                         AS contract_header_id,
        contractlinebasepeo.id                           AS contract_line_id,
        contractheaderbasepeo.major_version              AS contract_header_major_version,
        contractlinebasepeo.major_version                AS contract_line_major_version,
        contractheaderbasepeo.contract_number,
        contractheaderbasepeo.currency_code              AS contract_currency_code,
        contractlinebasepeo.line_number                  AS contract_line_number,
        contractheadertranslationpeo.cognomen            AS contract_name,
        contractlinetranslationpeo.item_name             AS contract_line_item_name,
        contractlinetypepeo.name                         AS contractlinetype_name,
        contracttypepeo.name                             AS contracttype_name,
        contractheaderowningorgpeo.name                  AS contract_owning_org,
        contractheader_bu.name                           AS contract_bu,
        legalentitypeoc.name                             AS contract_legal_entity_name,
        contractheaderowningorgpeo.classification_code   AS owningorg_class_code,
        customerpartypeo.party_name                      AS contract_customer_name,
        contractheaderbasepeo.estimated_amount           AS contract_header_amount,
        nvl(contractlinebasepeo.line_amount, 0) AS contract_line_amount
        ,
        contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_plan_name,
        contractlinE_REV_PLAN.bill_plan_name             AS revenue_plan_name,
        (
            SELECT
                lookup1.meaning
            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl lookup1
            WHERE
                lookup1.lookup_type = 'OKC_STATUS'
                AND lookup1.language = 'US'
                AND lookup1.lookup_code = contractheaderbasepeo.sts_code
        ) AS contract_header_status,
        (
            SELECT
                lookup1.meaning
            FROM
                fnd_lookup_values_tl lookup1
            WHERE
                lookup1.lookup_type = 'OKC_STATUS'
                AND lookup1.language = 'US'
                AND lookup1.lookup_code = contractlinebasepeo.sts_code
        ) AS contract_line_status
    FROM
        okc_k_lines_b           contractlinebasepeo,
        okc_k_headers_all_b     contractheaderbasepeo,
        okc_k_headers_tl        contractheadertranslationpeo,
        okc_k_lines_tl          contractlinetranslationpeo,
        pjb_bill_plans_vl       contractlinepjbbillplanpeo,
        pjb_bill_plans_vl       contractline_rev_plan,
        okc_contract_types_vl   contracttypepeo,
        okc_line_types_vl       contractlinetypepeo,
        hr_organization_v       contractheaderowningorgpeo,
        hr_organization_v       contractheader_bu,
        hz_cust_accounts        hca,
        hz_parties              customerpartypeo,
        xle_entity_profiles     legalentitypeoc
    WHERE
        contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractheaderbasepeo.major_version
        AND contractlinebasepeo.dnz_chr_id = contractheaderbasepeo.id
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.id = contractheadertranslationpeo.id
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.major_version = contractheadertranslationpeo.major_version
        AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = contractheadertranslationpeo.language
        AND contractlinebasepeo.id = contractlinetranslationpeo.id
        AND contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractlinetranslationpeo.major_version
        AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = contractlinetranslationpeo.language
        AND contractlinebasepeo.bill_plan_id = contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_plan_id (+)
        AND contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.major_version (+)
        AND contractlinebasepeo.revenue_plan_id = contractline_rev_plan.bill_plan_id (+)
        AND contractlinebasepeo.major_version = contractline_rev_plan.major_version (+)
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.contract_type_id = contracttypepeo.contract_type_id
        AND contractlinebasepeo.line_type_id = contractlinetypepeo.line_type_id
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.owning_org_id = contractheaderowningorgpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = contractheaderowningorgpeo.classification_code (+)
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.org_id = contractheader_bu.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'FUN_BUSINESS_UNIT' ) = contractheader_bu.classification_code (+)
        AND contractheaderbasepeo.legal_entity_id = legalentitypeoc.legal_entity_id (+)
        AND contractlinepjbbillplanpeo.bill_to_cust_acct_id = hca.cust_account_id (+)
        AND hca.party_id = customerpartypeo.party_id (+)
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN contractheaderowningorgpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND contractheaderowningorgpeo.effective_end_date
        (+) )
        AND contractlinebasepeo.version_type = 'C'
       --AND contractheaderbasepeo.contract_number in ( 'SPPI005')
        AND ( :p_contract_name IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractheaderbasepeo.id IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_type IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_type = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contracttypepeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_type, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_type, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_contract_organization IS NULL
              OR :p_contract_organization = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR contractheaderowningorgpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_organization, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_contract_organization, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_customer_name IS NULL
              OR :p_customer_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR customerpartypeo.party_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_customer_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_customer_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
    ORDER BY
        line_number
), invocie_amount AS (
    SELECT
        invoicedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        SUM(invoicedistributionpeo.ledger_curr_billed_amt) AS invoice_amount,
        invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        invoicedistributionpeo.contract_project_linkage_id
    FROM
        pjb_inv_line_dists invoicedistributionpeo
    GROUP BY
        invoicedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        invoicedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        contract_project_linkage_id
), revenue_amount AS (
    SELECT
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        SUM(revenuedistributionpeo.ledger_curr_revenue_amt) AS revenue_amount,
        revenuedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_project_linkage_id
    FROM
        pjb_rev_distributions revenuedistributionpeo
    GROUP BY
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_line_id,
        revenuedistributionpeo.transaction_project_id,
        revenuedistributionpeo.contract_project_linkage_id
), project_detail AS (
    SELECT
        projectpeo.name                       AS project_name,
        projectpeo.project_currency_code,
        projectpeo.project_id,
        projectpeo.projfunc_currency_code,
        projectpeo.segment1                   project_number,
        projectpeo.service_type_code          AS project_service_type_code,
        projecttypepeo.project_type,
        projectowningorgdpeo.name             project_owning_org,
        legalentitypeo.name                   AS proejct_legal_entity,
        projectstatuspeo.project_status_name,
        projectunitdpeo.name                  AS project_unit_name,
        worktypepeo.name                      AS project_work_type_name,
        personnamedpeo.list_name              AS project_manager_name,
        organizationunittranslationpeo.name   AS project_bu_name
    FROM
        pjf_projects_all_vl          projectpeo,
        pjf_project_types_vl         projecttypepeo,
        pjf_latestprojectmanager_v   latesprojectmanagerpeo,
        hr_organization_v            projectowningorgdpeo,
        xle_entity_profiles          legalentitypeo,
        pjf_project_statuses_vl      projectstatuspeo,
        per_person_names_f_v         personnamedpeo,
        hr_organization_v            projectunitdpeo,
        pjf_work_types_vl            worktypepeo,
        hr_organization_units_f_tl   organizationunittranslationpeo
    WHERE
        projectpeo.project_type_id = projecttypepeo.project_type_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.project_id = latesprojectmanagerpeo.project_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.carrying_out_organization_id = projectowningorgdpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'PA_PROJECT_ORG' ) = projectowningorgdpeo.classification_code (+)
        AND projectpeo.legal_entity_id = legalentitypeo.legal_entity_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.project_status_code = projectstatuspeo.project_status_code
        AND latesprojectmanagerpeo.resource_source_id = personnamedpeo.person_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.project_unit_id = projectunitdpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( 'PRJ_PROJECT_UNIT' ) = projectunitdpeo.classification_code (+)
        AND projectpeo.work_type_id = worktypepeo.work_type_id (+)
        AND projectpeo.org_id = organizationunittranslationpeo.organization_id (+)
        AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = organizationunittranslationpeo.language (+)
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectowningorgdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectowningorgdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN personnamedpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND personnamedpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN projectunitdpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND projectunitdpeo.effective_end_date (+) )
        AND ( SYSDATE BETWEEN organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_start_date (+) AND organizationunittranslationpeo.effective_end_date
        (+) )
        AND ( :p_project_currency IS NULL
              OR :p_project_currency = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectpeo.project_currency_code IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_currency, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_currency, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_bu IS NULL
              OR :p_project_bu = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR organizationunittranslationpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_bu, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_bu, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_legal_entity IS NULL
              OR :p_project_legal_entity = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR legalentitypeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_legal_entity, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_legal_entity, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_manager IS NULL
              OR :p_project_manager = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR personnamedpeo.list_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_manager, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_manager, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_unit IS NULL
              OR :p_project_unit = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectunitdpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_unit, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_unit, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_status IS NULL
              OR :p_project_status = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectstatuspeo.project_status_name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_status, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_status, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_project_name IS NULL
              OR :p_project_name = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectpeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_project_name, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_project_name, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_service_type IS NULL
              OR :p_service_type = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR projectpeo.service_type_code IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_service_type, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_service_type, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
        AND ( :p_work_type IS NULL
              OR :p_work_type = '*)nqgtac(*'
              OR worktypepeo.name IN (
            SELECT
                regexp_substr(:p_work_type, '[^,]+', 1, level)
            FROM
                dual
            CONNECT BY
                regexp_substr(:p_work_type, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
        ) )
)
SELECT
    'Total' AS total_c,
    'Total' AS total_p,
    cd.*,
    nvl(fl.funding_amount, 0) AS funding_amount,
    taskstructurepeo.element_number   task_number,
    taskstructurepeo.name             task_name,
    pd.*,
    nvl(ia.invoice_amount, 0) AS invoice_amount,
    nvl(ra.revenue_amount, 0) AS revenue_amount,
    nvl(fl.funding_amount, 0) - nvl(ia.invoice_amount, 0) AS prj_backlog_fun_inv,
    nvl(fl.funding_amount, 0) - nvl(ra.revenue_amount, 0) AS prj_backlog_fun_rev,
    nvl(ia.invoice_amount, 0) - nvl(ra.revenue_amount, 0) AS prj_backlog_inv_rev
FROM
    pjb_cntrct_proj_links   fl,
    contract_detail         cd,
    pjf_proj_elements_vl    taskstructurepeo,
    project_detail          pd,
    invocie_amount          ia,
    revenue_amount          ra
WHERE
    fl.version_type = 'C'
    AND fl.active_flag = 'Y'
    AND cd.contract_header_id = fl.contract_id (+)
    AND cd.contract_line_id = fl.contract_line_id (+)
    AND cd.contract_line_major_version = fl.major_version (+)
    AND fl.proj_element_id = taskstructurepeo.proj_element_id (+)
    AND fl.project_id = pd.project_id (+)
    AND fl.contract_line_id = ia.contract_line_id (+)
    AND fl.project_id = ia.transaction_project_id (+)
    AND fl.link_id = ia.contract_project_linkage_id (+)
    AND fl.contract_line_id = ra.contract_line_id (+)
    AND fl.project_id = ra.transaction_project_id (+)
    AND fl.link_id = ra.contract_project_linkage_id (+)
ORDER BY
    contract_number,
    contract_line_number,
    project_number

title: Oracle Fusion Project Not Used In last N Months SQL.
description:
Hi, 
Please find the below detail for this SQL,
Tables
pjf_projects_all_b (Project Base)
pjf_projects_all_tl (Project Name)
xle_entity_profiles (legal Entity Name)
hr_organization_units_f_tl (Owning o
sql:
WITH last_creation_info AS (
    SELECT
        MAX(creation_date) AS creation_date,
        project_id
    FROM
        (
            SELECT
                transaction_project_id AS project_id,
                MAX(creation_date)     creation_date
            FROM
                pjb_inv_line_dists
            GROUP BY
                transaction_project_id
            UNION ALL
            SELECT
                project_id,
                MAX(creation_date) creation_date
            FROM
                pjc_cost_dist_lines_all
            GROUP BY
                project_id
            UNION ALL
            SELECT
                transaction_project_id AS project_id,
                MAX(creation_date)     creation_date
            FROM
                pjb_rev_distributions prd
            GROUP BY
                transaction_project_id
        )
    GROUP BY
        project_id
)
SELECT
'Total' as Dummy,
    ppab.project_id,
    ppat.name                                                     AS project_name,
    ppab.segment1                                                 AS project_number,
    to_char(lci.creation_date, 'DD/MM/YYYY')                      AS last_used_date,
    nvl(to_char((lci.creation_date), 'DD/MM/YYYY'), 'Never Used') AS last_transacted_by,
    CASE
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 0 AND 180    THEN
            '1) Between 0 to 180 Days'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 181 AND 360  THEN
            '2) Between 181 to 360 Days'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 361 AND 720  THEN
            '3) Between 1 to 2 Years'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(sysdate) - trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) BETWEEN 721 AND 1080 THEN
            '4) Between 2 to 3 Years'
        WHEN (
            SELECT
                trunc(MAX(lci.creation_date))
            FROM
                last_creation_info lci
            WHERE
                lci.project_id = ppab.project_id
        ) IS NULL THEN
            '5) Never Transacted'
    END                                                           AS bucket,
    ppab.project_status_code                                      project_status,
    xep.name                                                      project_legal_entity_name,
    project_owning_org.name                                       project_owninng_org_name,
    fnbu.bu_name                                                  AS project_business_unit,
    houftpu.name                                                  project_unit,
       (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) AS project_manager_name,
    ppab.creation_date as project_creation_date,
to_date(01
|| '-'|| to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'MM')
    || '-'
    || to_char(trunc(ppab.creation_date), 'YY'),'DD-mm-yy') project_month_creation_date,
    ppab.created_by as project_created_by
    
FROM
    pjf_projects_all_b         ppab,
    pjf_projects_all_tl        ppat,
 
    last_creation_info         lci,
    xle_entity_profiles        xep,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl project_owning_org,
    hr_organization_units_f_tl houftpu,
    fun_names_business_units_v fnbu,
    pjf_latestprojectmanager_v   project_managet_project
WHERE
        1 = 1
    AND ppab.project_id = ppat.project_id
    AND ( userenv('LANG') ) = ppat.language
    AND ppab.project_status_code = 'ACTIVE'
    AND ppab.project_id = lci.project_id(+)
    AND nvl(lci.creation_date, TO_DATE('01-01-1900', 'DD-MM-YYYY')) < add_months(sysdate, -nvl(:p_month, 6))
    AND ppab.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND ppab.carrying_out_organization_id = project_owning_org.organization_id
    AND ppab.project_unit_id = houftpu.organization_id
    AND fnbu.bu_id = ppab.org_id
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(project_owning_org.effective_start_date) AND trunc(project_owning_org.effective_end_date)
    AND trunc(sysdate) BETWEEN trunc(houftpu.effective_start_date) AND trunc(houftpu.effective_end_date)
    AND project_owning_org.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND houftpu.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND ppab.project_id = project_managet_project.project_id
    AND ( xep.name IN (
        :p_legal_entity_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_legal_entity_name || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( project_owning_org.name IN (
        :p_project_org
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_org || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( fnbu.bu_name IN (
        :p_project_business_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_business_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( houftpu.name IN (
        :p_project_unit
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_unit || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( (
        SELECT
            ppnf.display_name
        FROM
            per_person_names_f ppnf
        WHERE
            trunc(SYSDATE) BETWEEN trunc(ppnf.effective_start_date) AND trunc(ppnf.effective_end_date)
            AND ppnf.name_type = 'GLOBAL'
            AND ppnf.person_id = project_managet_project.resource_source_id
    ) IN (
        :p_project_manager
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_manager || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppab.project_id IN (
        :p_project_number
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_number || 'All'
    ) )
    AND ( ppat.name IN (
        :p_project_name
    )
          OR 'All' IN (
        :p_project_name || 'All'
    ) )

title: In Oracle Fusion how to find a joint between a work order, sales order, and Item (Name Plate Battery
description:
Purpose of Report:
  
       For the Work Order Execution of the MP battery, the production operator prints the Name Plate Label which contains the description of the product, logo, Designation, Type
sql:
SELECT
    esib.inventory_item_id,
    esib.item_number,
    esib.item_type,
    esib.organization_id,
    esit.description               item_desc,
    hao.name                       inventotry_org_name,
    hao1.name                      AS master_org_name,
    iop.organization_code          AS inventory_org_code,
    esib.unit_weight,
    esib.weight_uom_code,
    eieb_bcb_g.attribute_char5     AS voltage,
    eieb_bcb_g.attribute_number4   AS ampere_hour,
    eieb_bcb_g.attribute_number5   AS acid_volume,
    (
        SELECT
