            esib_c.item_number
        FROM
            egp_components_b      ecb,
            egp_system_items_b    esib_c,
            egp_item_classes_tl   eict
        WHERE
            egb.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb.bill_sequence_id
            AND ecb.pk1_value = esib_c.inventory_item_id
            AND esib.organization_id = esib_c.organization_id
            AND esib_c.item_catalog_group_id = eict.item_class_id
            AND eict.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND eict.item_class_name = 'FG MOTIVE POWER CELLS by MP Cell'
			--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    ) AS tray_battery_cell_epn,
    (
        SELECT
            esib_c.item_number
        FROM
            egp_components_b      ecb,
            egp_system_items_b    esib_c,
            egp_item_classes_tl   eict
        WHERE
            egb.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb.bill_sequence_id
            AND ecb.pk1_value = esib_c.inventory_item_id
            AND esib.organization_id = esib_c.organization_id
            AND esib_c.item_catalog_group_id = eict.item_class_id
            AND eict.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND eict.item_class_name = 'TRAYS(LEAD[MP/NP]&LITHIUM) by MP Batt'
			--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    ) AS tray_battery_epn,
    (
        SELECT
            ecb.component_quantity
        FROM
            egp_components_b      ecb,
            egp_system_items_b    esib_c,
            egp_item_classes_tl   eict
        WHERE
            egb.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb.bill_sequence_id
            AND ecb.pk1_value = esib_c.inventory_item_id
            AND esib.organization_id = esib_c.organization_id
            AND esib_c.item_catalog_group_id = eict.item_class_id
            AND eict.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND eict.item_class_name = 'FG MOTIVE POWER CELLS by MP Cell'
			--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    ) AS number_cells_blocks,
	-- we need subquery because we need to fetch the data from child level
    wwst.wo_status_name,
    wwob.work_order_number,
    wwob.planned_start_quantity,
  --  esib.base_item_id,
    wwob.work_order_id,
    isn.serial_number,
    xep.name                       AS legal_entity_name,
    wwob.planned_completion_date,
    ( hp_l.address1
      || ' '
      || hp_l.address2
      || ' '
      || hp_l.city
      || ' '
      || hp_l.postal_code
      || ' '
      || hp_l.state
      || ' '
      || ftv_l.territory_short_name ) AS legal_entity_address,
    ftv_o.territory_short_name     AS org_country_name,
    esib.item_number               AS base_item_number,
    NULL AS sales_order,
    NULL AS salesorder_ship_date,
    TO_CHAR(wwob.planned_completion_date, 'MM/YYYY') AS max_date
FROM
    egp_system_items_b          esib,
    egp_system_items_tl         esit,
    inv_org_parameters          iop,
    hr_all_organization_units   hao,
    hr_all_organization_units   hao1,
    egp_structures_b            egb,
    ego_item_eff_b              eieb_ind_cb_g,
    ego_item_eff_b              eieb_bcb_g,
    wie_work_orders_b           wwob,
    wie_wo_statuses_tl          wwst,
    inv_serial_numbers          isn,
    xle_entity_profiles         xep,
    hz_parties                  hp_l,
    fnd_territories_vl          ftv_l,
    per_locations               pl,
    fnd_territories_vl          ftv_o
WHERE
    esib.organization_id = esit.organization_id
    AND nvl(esib.item_type, 'XX') <> 'CTO'
	-- we use union in this, here we are only fetcing the data from CTO
    AND esib.inventory_item_id = esit.inventory_item_id
    AND esit.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND esib.organization_id = iop.organization_id
    AND iop.organization_id = hao.organization_id
    AND iop.master_organization_id = hao1.organization_id
------------------------------------------------
    AND esib.inventory_item_id = egb.pk1_value
    AND esib.organization_id = egb.pk2_value
    AND egb.alternate_bom_designator = 'Primary'   
	-- In this we need to only fetch the primary Alternate Details
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- 
    AND esib.inventory_item_id = eieb_bcb_g.inventory_item_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib.master_org_id = eieb_bcb_g.organization_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib.acd_type = eieb_bcb_g.acd_type (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib.inventory_item_id = eieb_ind_cb_g.inventory_item_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib.master_org_id = eieb_ind_cb_g.organization_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib.acd_type = eieb_ind_cb_g.acd_type (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND eieb_ind_cb_g.context_code (+) = 'IND Cells/Bloc group'
	--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    AND eieb_bcb_g.context_code (+) = 'Bat/Cels/Bloc group'
	--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    -------------------------------------------------------------------
    AND wwob.work_order_id = :p_order_number
    AND wwob.organization_id = :p_org_id
    AND wwob.work_order_status_id = wwst.wo_status_id
    AND wwst.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND wwob.inventory_item_id = esib.inventory_item_id
    AND wwob.organization_id = esib.organization_id
    AND wwob.inventory_item_id = isn.inventory_item_id (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND wwob.organization_id = isn.current_organization_id (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND wwob.work_order_id = isn.last_txn_source_id (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND wwob.work_order_number = isn.last_txn_source_name (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND iop.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND xep.party_id = hp_l.party_id
    AND hp_l.country = ftv_l.territory_code
    AND hao.location_id = pl.location_id
    AND pl.country = ftv_o.territory_code
UNION ALL
SELECT
    esib.inventory_item_id,
    esib.item_number,
    esib.item_type,
    esib.organization_id,
    esit.description               item_desc,
    hao.name                       inventotry_org_name,
    hao1.name                      AS master_org_name,
    iop.organization_code          AS inventory_org_code,
    esib.unit_weight,
    esib.weight_uom_code,
    eieb_bcb_g.attribute_char5     AS voltage,
    eieb_bcb_g.attribute_number4   AS ampere_hour,
    eieb_bcb_g.attribute_number5   AS acid_volume,
    (
        SELECT
            esib_c_2.item_number
        FROM
            egp_components_b      ecb_c,
            egp_system_items_b    esib_c_2,
            egp_item_classes_tl   eict_1
        WHERE
            egb_c.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb_c.bill_sequence_id
            AND ecb_c.pk1_value = esib_c_2.inventory_item_id
            AND esib_c.organization_id = esib_c_2.organization_id
            AND esib_c_2.item_catalog_group_id = eict_1.item_class_id
            AND eict_1.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND eict_1.item_class_name = 'FG MOTIVE POWER CELLS by MP Cell'
			--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    ) AS tray_battery_cell_epn,
    (
        SELECT
            esib_c_2.item_number
        FROM
            egp_components_b      ecb_c,
            egp_system_items_b    esib_c_2,
            egp_item_classes_tl   eict_1
        WHERE
            egb_c.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb_c.bill_sequence_id
            AND ecb_c.pk1_value = esib_c_2.inventory_item_id
            AND esib_c.organization_id = esib_c_2.organization_id
            AND esib_c_2.item_catalog_group_id = eict_1.item_class_id
            AND eict_1.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND eict_1.item_class_name = 'TRAYS(LEAD[MP/NP]&LITHIUM) by MP Batt'
			--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    ) AS tray_battery_epn,
    (
        SELECT
            ecb_c.component_quantity
        FROM
            egp_components_b      ecb_c,
            egp_system_items_b    esib_c_2,
            egp_item_classes_tl   eict_1
        WHERE
            egb_c.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb_c.bill_sequence_id
            AND ecb_c.pk1_value = esib_c_2.inventory_item_id
            AND esib_c.organization_id = esib_c_2.organization_id
            AND esib_c_2.item_catalog_group_id = eict_1.item_class_id
            AND eict_1.language = userenv('LANG')
            AND eict_1.item_class_name = 'FG MOTIVE POWER CELLS by MP Cell'
			--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    ) AS number_cells_blocks,
    wwst.wo_status_name,
    wwob.work_order_number,
    wwob.planned_start_quantity,
    wwob.work_order_id,
    isn.serial_number,
    xep.name                       AS legal_entity_name,
    wwob.planned_completion_date,
    ( hp_l.address1
      || ' '
      || hp_l.address2
      || ' '
      || hp_l.city
      || ' '
      || hp_l.postal_code
      || ' '
      || hp_l.state
      || ' '
      || ftv_l.territory_short_name ) AS legal_entity_address,
    ftv_o.territory_short_name     AS org_country_name,
    esib_base_item.item_number     AS base_item_number,
    dha.order_number               AS sales_order,
    dfla.schedule_ship_date        AS salesorder_ship_date,
    TO_CHAR(
        CASE
            WHEN trunc(dfla.schedule_ship_date) >= trunc(wwob.planned_completion_date) THEN
                trunc(dfla.schedule_ship_date)
            ELSE
                (wwob.planned_completion_date)
        END, 'MM/YYYY') AS max_date
FROM
    egp_system_items_b          esib,
    egp_system_items_b          esib_base_item,
    egp_system_items_tl         esit,
    inv_org_parameters          iop,
    hr_all_organization_units   hao,
    hr_all_organization_units   hao1,
    egp_structures_b            egb,
    egp_structures_b            egb_c,
    egp_components_b            ecb,
    egp_system_items_b          esib_c,
    egp_item_classes_tl         eict,
    ego_item_eff_b              eieb_ind_cb_g,
    ego_item_eff_b              eieb_bcb_g,
    wie_work_orders_b           wwob,
    wie_wo_statuses_tl          wwst,
    inv_serial_numbers          isn,
    xle_entity_profiles         xep,
    hz_parties                  hp_l,
    fnd_territories_vl          ftv_l,
    per_locations               pl,
    fnd_territories_vl          ftv_o,
    doo_document_references_v   ddrv,
    doo_fulfill_lines_all       dfla,
    doo_headers_all             dha
WHERE
    esib.organization_id = esit.organization_id (+)
    AND esib.item_type = 'CTO'
	-- we use union in this, here we are only fetcing the data from CTO
    AND esib.inventory_item_id = esit.inventory_item_id 
    AND esit.language  = userenv('LANG')
    AND esib.organization_id = iop.organization_id
    AND iop.organization_id = hao.organization_id
    AND iop.master_organization_id = hao1.organization_id
------------------------------------------------
    AND esib_base_item.inventory_item_id = egb.pk1_value
    AND esib_base_item.master_org_id = egb.pk2_value
    AND egb.alternate_bom_designator = 'Primary'
		-- In this we need to only fetch the primary Alternate Details
    AND egb.common_bill_sequence_id = ecb.bill_sequence_id
    AND ecb.pk1_value = esib_c.inventory_item_id
    AND esib_base_item.organization_id = esib_c.organization_id
    AND esib_c.item_catalog_group_id = eict.item_class_id
    AND eict.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND eict.item_class_name = 'TRAY (MP/NP) BATTERIES by MP Batt'
	--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
   ----------------------------------------------------------------- 
    AND esib_c.inventory_item_id = egb_c.pk1_value (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib_c.organization_id = egb_c.pk2_value (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND egb_c.alternate_bom_designator (+) = 'Primary'
	
   -------------------------------------------------------------
    AND esib_c.inventory_item_id = eieb_bcb_g.inventory_item_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib_c.master_org_id = eieb_bcb_g.organization_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib_c.acd_type = eieb_bcb_g.acd_type (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib_c.inventory_item_id = eieb_ind_cb_g.inventory_item_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib_c.master_org_id = eieb_ind_cb_g.organization_id (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND esib_c.acd_type = eieb_ind_cb_g.acd_type (+)-- outer joint Require if item DFF is not there
    AND eieb_ind_cb_g.context_code (+) = 'IND Cells/Bloc group'
    AND eieb_bcb_g.context_code (+) = 'Bat/Cels/Bloc group'
	--we only need to Fetch the data for One EFF
    -------------------------------------------------------------------
    AND wwob.work_order_id = :p_order_number
    AND wwob.organization_id = :p_org_id
    AND wwob.work_order_status_id = wwst.wo_status_id
    AND wwst.language = userenv('LANG')
    AND wwob.inventory_item_id = esib.inventory_item_id
    AND wwob.organization_id = esib.organization_id
    AND esib.base_item_id = esib_base_item.inventory_item_id
    AND esib.organization_id = esib_base_item.organization_id
    AND wwob.inventory_item_id = isn.inventory_item_id (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND wwob.organization_id = isn.current_organization_id (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND wwob.work_order_id = isn.last_txn_source_id (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND wwob.work_order_number = isn.last_txn_source_name (+)-- outer joint Require if serial number is not there
    AND iop.legal_entity_id = xep.legal_entity_id
    AND xep.party_id = hp_l.party_id
    AND hp_l.country = ftv_l.territory_code
    AND hao.location_id = pl.location_id
    AND pl.country = ftv_o.territory_code
	----------------------------------------------------
    AND wwob.source_header_ref_id = ddrv.doc_user_key (+) --as per RD
    AND ddrv.doc_ref_type (+) = 'SUPPLY_ORDER' --as per RD
    AND ddrv.header_id = dha.header_id (+) --as per RD
    AND ddrv.fulfill_line_id = dfla.fulfill_line_id (+)

title: Oracle Fusion OTBI Tips and Tricks
description:
How to Get by Default( Month Start Date and Month Last date ) Date in Dashboard Prompt
.
select TIMESTAMPADD(SQL_TSI_MONTH, -1, TIMESTAMPADD( SQL_TSI_DAY , DAYOFMONTH( CURRENT_DATE) * -(1) + 1, CURREN
sql:
select TIMESTAMPADD(SQL_TSI_MONTH, -1, TIMESTAMPADD( SQL_TSI_DAY , DAYOFMONTH( CURRENT_DATE) * -(1) + 1, CURRENT_DATE)) FROM "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"
select TIMESTAMPADD(SQL_TSI_MONTH, +1, TIMESTAMPADD( SQL_TSI_DAY , DAYOFMONTH( CURRENT_DATE) * -(1) + 1, CURRENT_DATE)) FROM "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"
How to Pass Presentation variables from one dashboard prompt to a Different dashboard prompt
.
Select "Time"."Date" from "Procurement - Purchasing Real Time" WHERE ("Time"."Date" = @{P_START_DATE}{'2020-01-01'})
Select "Time"."Date" from "Procurement - Purchasing Real Time" WHERE ("Time"."Date" = @{P_END_DATE}{Current_date})
How to remove Cache In OTBI Analysis
.
SET VARIABLE DISABLE_CACHE_HIT=1,DISABLE_PLAN_CACHE_HIT=1;
SET VARIABLE DISABLE_CACHE_HIT=1, DISABLE_CACHE_SEED=1, DISABLE_PLAN_CACHE_HIT=1
SET VARIABLE LOGLEVEL=7,DISABLE_CACHE_HIT=1,DISABLE_PLAN_CACHE_HIT=1
How to pass All Column value in OTBI Analysis Filter when the Presentation variable is blank.
is equal to / is in  @{P_SERVICE}{(All Column Values)}
How to Convert Date in "MMM-YY" format  in OTBI
CONCAT(CONCAT( case  when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=01 then 'Jan' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=02 then 'Feb' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=03 then 'Mar' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=04 then 'Apr' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=05 then 'May' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=06 then 'June' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=07 then 'July' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=08 then 'Aug' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=09 then 'Sep' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=10 then 'Oct' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=11 then 'Nov' when MONTHNAME("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date")=12 then 'Dec' end, ' - '), SUBSTRING((CAST("Time"."Asset Calendar Period End Date" AS CHAR)) FROM 1 FOR 4))
How to Import Custom KFF/DFF in the Otbi Subject area?
Run the following scheduled processes by navigating to Tools/Schedule Processes
-    Create Rules XML File for BI Extender Automation
-    Import Oracle Fusion Data Extensions for Transactional Business Intelligence
How to Filter the Data in OTBI Prompt?
SELECT "Cost Transaction Type"."Base Transaction Type Name"
FROM "Costing - Cost Accounting Real Time"
WHERE DESCRIPTOR_IDOF (
"Costing - Cost Accounting Real Time"."Cost Transaction Details".
"Cost Transaction Type") = 'ISSUE'
FETCH FIRST 65001 ROWS ONLY

title: How to Join multiple subject areas in OTBI? (Cross-Subject Area Joins)
description:
Overview of Cross-Subject Area Joins
You can create analyses that combine data from more than one subject area. This type of query is referred to as a cross-subject area analysis. Review guidelines fo
sql:
select 
Analysis
In the Select Subject Area window, select a subject area.
In the Criteria tab, expand the dimensions and add a column to the analysis.
In the Subject Areas region, click 
Add/Remove Subject Areas
.
In the Subject Area region of the Criteria tab, expand the dimensions and add a column to the analysis.
If the column is a local dimension, add a measure from the subject area. If it's preferable to hide the measure in your analysis, select its Column Properties, and in the Column Format tab of the Column Properties dialog box, select the 
Hide
 check box and click 
OK
.
If you are using a local dimension, in the Advanced tab, navigate to the Advanced SQL Clauses section, select 
Show Total value for all measures on unrelated dimensions
, then click 
Apply SQL
.
Click the 
Results
 tab to see the results of the analysis.
Click the 
Criteria
 tab again to return to the analysis definition.
Things to consider when the report is built with more than one subject areas:1. You should have a common dimension in all the subject areas
2. Add Measure/Fact from each subject area on the report
  3. Pull at least one measure from each subject area into the criteria.  
4. Click on the Advanced tab of the Analysis report --> Scroll down till you see the Advance SQL clause --> Check the Dimensionality checkbox --> Click on Apply SQL button. Click Ok on the popup window. Go to the Criteria tab and Result tab to see the result.
Please review the guidelines for creating cross-subject area analysis.
Please make sure that columns from a CONFORMED Dimension (a dimension common to both subject areas) are included in the analysis
Include at least one Fact / Measure column from each subject area (please make sure the fact columns are at the same level of granularity, and folder structure)  in case you do not need the Fact columns to be displayed, you can hide the column.
Run the analysis with the following variables: SET VARIABLE ENABLE_DIMENSIONALITY=1, NO_FORCE_TO_DETAIL_BIN=1;
They need to be added to the prefix section under the Advanced tab.
Please go through the below KM for a complete guide:
Fusion Applications OTBI: Guidelines for creating cross-subject area analyses in Oracle Transactional BI (OTBI) (Doc ID 1567672.1)
For Example:-
SET VARIABLE ENABLE_DIMENSIONALITY = 1; SELECT    0 s_0,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Assignment Event Details"."Assignment Number" s_1,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Assignment Event Details"."Assignment Sequence" s_2,
 "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Assignment Event Details"."Assignment Status Type" s_3,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Assignment Event Details"."Assignment Type" s_4,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Worker"."Employee First Name" s_5,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Worker"."Employee Last Name" s_6,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Real Time"."Worker Assignment Details"."Assignment Sequence" s_7,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Real Time"."Worker Assignment Details"."Assignment Status Type" s_8,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time"."Assignment Event"."Assignment Event Count" s_9,    "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Real Time"."Worker Assignment"."Assignment Count" s_10 FROM "Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Event Real Time" WHERE (("Worker"."Employee Last Name" = 'Weasley') AND ("Worker"."Employee First Name" = 'George') AND ("Workforce Management - Worker Assignment Real Time"."Worker Assignment Details"."Assignment Status Type" = 'Active')) ORDER BY 1, 2 ASC NULLS LAST, 3 ASC NULLS LAST, 8 ASC NULLS LAST, 9 ASC NULLS LAST, 5 ASC NULLS LAST, 4 ASC NULLS LAST, 6 ASC NULLS LAST, 7 ASC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST 65001 ROWS ONLY
One more Example:- 
SELECT "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"."- General Information".
        "Invoice Date"
          s_1,
       "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"."- General Information".
        "Invoice ID"
          s_2,
       "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"."- General Information".
        "Invoice Number"
          s_3,
       "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"."Business Unit".
        "Business Unit Name"
          s_4,
       "Payables Invoices - Installments Real Time"."- General Information".
        "Invoice ID"
          s_5,
       "Payables Invoices - Installments Real Time"."- General Information".
        "Invoice Number"
          s_6,
       "Payables Invoices - Installments Real Time".
        "Invoices Installment Amounts"."Invoice Currency"
          s_7,
       "Payables Invoices - Installments Real Time".
        "Invoices Installment Details"."Payment Number"
          s_8,
       "Payables Invoices - Installments Real Time".
        "Invoices Installment Amounts"."Gross Amount"
          s_9
  FROM "Payables Invoices - Transactions Real Time"
 WHERE "- General Information"."Invoice ID" =
          ("Payables Invoices - Installments Real Time".
            "- General Information"."Invoice ID")
otbi_cross_subject_area_reporting_guidelines
Download

title: Oracle Fusion Bursting SQL for EMAIL || FTP || UCM || Printer
description:
Sample Email Bursting Query:
Select distinct invoice_num as "KEY",
'Session_1' as TEMPLATE,
'en-US' LOCALE,
'PDF' OUTPUT_FORMAT,
'EMAIL' DEL_CHANNEL,
'pulkitj@evosysglobal.com' PARAMETER1,
'pulkitjain
sql:
Select distinct invoice_num as "KEY",
'Session_1' as TEMPLATE,
'en-US' LOCALE,
'PDF' OUTPUT_FORMAT,
'EMAIL' DEL_CHANNEL,
'pulkitj@evosysglobal.com' PARAMETER1,
'pulkitjain172@gmail.com' PARAMETER2,
'bipublisher-report@workflow.mail.em2.cloud.oracle.com' PARAMETER3,
'Your Invoices' PARAMETER4,
'Ho Please find attached your invoices' PARAMETER5,
'true' PARAMETER6,
'donotreply@mycompany.com' PARAMETER7
from ap_invoices_all
Sample FTP Bursting Query:
SELECT 1 AS "KEY",
       'PP Integration Report' AS "TEMPLATE", --layout name not rtf
       'ETEXT' AS template_format,
       'en-US' locale,
       'TEXT' AS output_format,
       'FTP' AS del_channel,
       'II028_' || TO_NUMBER (TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
          output_name,                             -- job history  output name
       'TestFTP' AS parameter1,                                  --server name
       'ap153168' AS parameter2,                                       --unmae
       'sys@123' AS parameter3,                                       --pwd
       '/E_1/Emp_Expense/' AS parameter4,                   --remote directory
          'II028_'
       || TO_NUMBER (TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
       || '.txt'
          AS parameter5,                                       --ftp file name
       'true' parameter6                                      --for secure ftp
  FROM DUAL
Sample UCM Bursting Query:
SELECT 1 key,
       'Output' template,
       'RTF' template_format,
       'CSV' output_format,
       'WCC' del_channel,
       'UCM' parameter1,                                     --Server name
       'FAFusionImportExport' parameter2,                     --Security Group
       'interface.user' parameter3,         --Author (Username of server name)
       'fin$/receivables$/export$' parameter4,            --Account (Optional)
       'GL_LISTING' || TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') parameter5,       --Title
       'GL_LISTING' || TO_CHAR (SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '.csv' parameter6, --Primary File (or File Name)
       '123' parameter7 ,        -- comments                                  
       'GLLIST' parameter8,     --Content ID (UCM ID) and non mandatory parameter
       'True' parameter9        --non mandatory parameter
  FROM DUAL
Sample Printer Bursting Query:
============================================
Format:
PARAMETER1: Printer group => pass the 'Direct Printers' as the constant value
PARAMETER2: Printer name => pass the Server Name
PARAMETER3: Number of Copies needed
PARAMETER4: (Sides Valid values are:
"d_single_sided" for single-sided
"d_double_sided_l" for duplex/long edge
"d_double_sided_s" for tumble/short edge
If the parameter is not specified, single-sided will be used.)
PARAMETER5: (Tray Valid values are:
"t1" for "Tray 1"
"t2" for "Tray 2"
"t3" for "Tray 3"
If not specified, the printer default will be used.)
PARAMETER6: (Print range. For example "3" will print page 3 only,
 "2-5" will print pages 2-5, "1,3-5" will print pages 1 and 3-5) (if not put null all pages will print).
=======================
Sample :
select 
1 key,
'Output' TEMPLATE,
'en-US' LOCALE,
'PDF' OUTPUT_FORMAT,
'PRINT' DEL_CHANNEL,
'CMR REPORT' OUTPUT_NAME,
'Direct Printers' PARAMETER1,
'La Cartuja SPLCRICOH_162' PARAMETER2,
'1' PARAMETER3,
null PARAMETER4,
null PARAMETER5,
'1' PARAMETER6
from dual

title: Understanding SQL for SLA Invalid Liability Usages
description:
--Invalid Receivables Account usage
WITH led_seg AS (
SELECT
segment.application_column_name AS seg,
gls.ledger_id,
gls.chart_of_accounts_id,
segment.segment_name,
segment.flex_value_set_id,
gls.name
sql:
WITH led_seg AS (
SELECT
segment.application_column_name AS seg,
gls.ledger_id,
gls.chart_of_accounts_id,
segment.segment_name,
segment.flex_value_set_id,
gls.name
FROM
fnd_id_flex_segments_vl segment,
fnd_id_flex_structures_vl struct,
fnd_id_flexs flex,
fnd_application_vl application,
fnd_kf_str_instances_vl fksi,
gl_ledgers gls,
fnd_kf_labeled_segments fkls
WHERE
struct.id_flex_code = segment.id_flex_code
AND flex.id_flex_code = segment.id_flex_code
AND struct.id_flex_num = segment.id_flex_num
AND fksi.structure_instance_number = struct.id_flex_num
AND struct.application_id = application.application_id
AND application.application_id = 101
AND gls.chart_of_accounts_id = struct.id_flex_num
AND fkls.structure_id = fksi.structure_id
AND fkls.segment_code = segment.segment_name
AND fkls.segment_label_code = 'GL_ACCOUNT'
AND gls.ledger_category_code = 'PRIMARY'
AND ( :p3 IS NULL
OR :p3 = 'ALL'
OR 
gls.name
 IN (
SELECT
regexp_substr(:p3, '[^,]+', 1, level)
FROM
dual
CONNECT BY
regexp_substr(:p3, '[^,]+', 1, level) IS NOT NULL
) )
), xx_data AS (
SELECT
ffvv.flex_value,
ffvv.description s_desc
/* --ffvv.value_category,
ls.seg AS segment_name,
ls.ledger_id,
ls.name
,
regexp_substr(compiled_value_attributes,
'[^'
                      || CHR(10)
                      || ']+',
1,
7) level_7_value */
FROM
fnd_flex_values_vl ffvv
WHERE
ffvv.flex_value_set_id IN (
SELECT DISTINCT
ls.flex_value_set_id
FROM
led_seg ls
)
AND nvl(regexp_substr(compiled_value_attributes,
'[^'
                              || CHR(10)
                              || ']+',
1,
7),
'N') = 'AR' --AP/AR
), code_combination AS (
SELECT /*+ qb_name(CodeCombinationPVO) */
gcc.account_type,
gcc.chart_of_accounts_id,
gcc.code_combination_id,
decode(ls.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2,
'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4', gcc.segment4, 'SEGMENT5',
gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) AS natural_account,
concatenated_segments
FROM
gl_code_combinations gcc,
led_seg ls
WHERE
ls.chart_of_accounts_id = gcc.chart_of_accounts_id
AND decode(ls.seg, 'SEGMENT1', gcc.segment1, 'SEGMENT2', gcc.segment2,
'SEGMENT3', gcc.segment3, 'SEGMENT4', gcc.segment4, 'SEGMENT5',
gcc.segment5, 'SEGMENT6', gcc.segment6, 'SEGMENT7', gcc.segment7) IN (
SELECT
xd.flex_value
FROM
xx_data xd
)
)SELECT
to_char(xlalines.accounting_date, 'MM-YYYY') month,
xlalines.accounting_date,
xlahdr.ae_header_id,
xlalines.ae_line_num,
xlahdr.application_id,
xlahdr.balance_type_code,
xlahdr.event_type_code,
xlahdr.je_category_name,
xlahdr.description,
xsv.application_name,
xlahdr.period_name,
ls.name
 AS ledger_name,
gcc.natural_account,
gcc.concatenated_segments,
xlalines.accounting_class_code,
transactionentity.transaction_number
FROM
led_seg ls,
code_combination gcc,
xla_ae_lines xlalines,
xla_ae_headers xlahdr,
-- xla_lookups lookuppeo,
xla_subledgers_vl xsv,
xla_transaction_entities transactionentity
WHERE
1 = 1
AND xlalines.ledger_id = ls.ledger_id
AND xlalines.code_combination_id = gcc.code_combination_id
AND xsv.application_id = xlahdr.application_id
